1.1: Dan komansman, Bondie kre lesiel ek later.
1.2: Later pena enn zoli form e li vid. Teneb kouver partou. Lespri Bondie pe plane lor dilo.
1.3: Lerla Bondie dir: “Mo oule ki lalimier paret!” Vremem, lalimier koumans briye.
1.4: Bondie trouv ki lalimier enn bon kitsoz. Li separ lalimier ek teneb.
1.5: Li apel lalimier “lizour” ek teneb “lanwit”. Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Samem premie zour.
1.6: Bondie dir: “Mo oule kre enn gran plafon omilie dilo. Li pou separ dilo ki anba ek dilo ki lao.”
1.7: Sa arive. Bondie kre sa gran plafon la pou separ dilo ki anba ek dilo ki lao.
1.8: Bondie apel sa gran plafon la “lesiel”. Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Samem deziem zour.
1.9: Bondie dir ankor: “Mo oule ki tou dilo ki anba lesiel rasanble dan enn sel plas. Les bann terin sek paret.” Sa arive.
1.10: Bondie apel bann terin sek “later”. Li apel dilo ki finn rasanble ansam “lamer”. Bondie trouv sa bon.
1.11: Bondie dir: “Mo oule ki later prodwir bann verdir. Bizin ena bann plant ek bann pie fri. Sakenn bizin ena so semans.” Sa arive.
1.12: Later prodwir bann verdir. Ena tou kalite plant, e tou kalite pie-fri. Sakenn ena so semans. Bondie trouv tousala bon.
1.13: Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Samem trwaziem zour.
1.14: Bondie dir: “Mo oule kre bann lalimier dan lesiel pou separ lizour ek lanwit. Bann lalimier la pou fer kone kan zour fet. Zot pou fer osi konn dat ek lane.
1.15: Bann lalimier la bizin briye dan lesiel pou ekler later.” Samem arive.
1.16: Bondie kre de gro lalimier. Pli gro la pou eklere lizour, e pli tipti la pou eklere aswar. Li kre osi bann zetwal.
1.17: Bondie plas zot dan lesiel pou ekler later.
1.18: Ena eklere lizour, ena eklere aswar, e zot separ lalimier ek teneb. Bondie trouve sa bon.
1.19: Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Sa mem katriyem zour.
1.20: Bondie dir: “Mo oule ki lamer ranpli ar tou kalite kreatir vivan. Mo oule kre bann zwazo pou anvol dan lezer.”
1.21: Alor, Bondie kre bann gran mons marin ek tou bann kreatir ki deplas par group dan dilo. Li kre osi tou kalite zwazo. Bondie trouve sa bon.
1.22: Bondie beni zot, e li dir : “Gagn boukou piti e ranpli lamer.” E li donn lord bann zwazo pou ogmante lor later.
1.23: Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Samem sinkiem zour.
1.24: Bondie dir: “Mo oule ki later prodwir tou kalite kreatir vivan: bann zanimo domestik, bann ti bebet ek bann zanimo sovaz. Sakenn dapre so lespes.” Sa arive.
1.25: Bondie kre tou kalite zanimo sovaz, zanimo domestik, bann ti bebet ek reptil; sakenn dapre so lespes. Bondie trouv sa bon.
1.26: Lerla Bondie dir: “Anou kre bann imin dan nou limaz ek dan nou resanblans. Zot ava ena lotorite lor bann pwason dan lamer ek bann zwazo dan lezer. Zot ava ena lotorite osi lor bann zanimo domestik, bann zanimo sovaz, ek tou bann bebet ek reptil ki viv lor later.”
1.27: Alor, Bondie kre bann imin dan so resanblans, li kre zot dan resanblans Bondie, li kre zot, Zom ek Fam.
1.28: Bondie beni zot e li dir zot: “Fer zanfan, peple e ranpli later, e metriz li. Bann pwason dan lamer, bann zwazo dan lezer ek tou bann zanimo ki viv lor later pou bizin soumet divan zot.”
1.29: Bondie dir ankor: “Mo pe donn zot bann plant avek sakenn so semans partou lor later. Mo pe donn zot osi bann pie ki zot fri ena lagrin ouswa lwayo. Servi tousala pou zot nouritir.
1.30: Me bann zanimo, bann zwazo, ek tou bann bebet ki ena lavi lor later pou gagn feyaz pou manze.” Samem arive.
1.31: Bondie get tou seki li finn kre, e vremem tou bien bon. Aswar fer, apre sa gramatin swiv. Samem siziem zour.

2.1: Lesiel, later ek tou leres finn fini kre.
2.2: Bondie finn fini tou travay ki li ti ena pou fer, e setiem zour li repoze.
2.3: Bondie beni setiem zour e fer li vinn enn zour spesial parski li finn repoze sa zour la.
2.4: Ala kouma Bondie finn kre lesiel ek later. LESEGNER Bondie kre lesiel ek later.
2.5: Me pena okenn plantasion lor later. Okenn lerb pankor pouse dan karo. LESEGNER Bondie pankor fer lapli tonbe, e pena personn pou travay later.
2.6: Me enn lasours dilo sorti depi dan later e aroz sirfas later.
2.7: LESEGNER Bondie pran inpe later e li fasonn enn zom # 2:7 An Ebre, zom (adam) sorti dan mem mo ki later (adamah). . Lerla li soufle enn souf lavi dan so narinn, e zom la vinn enn kreatir vivan.
2.8: LESEGNER Bondie plant enn zardin dan Eden ki trouv dan les, e li fer Zom la res laba.
2.9: LESEGNER Bondie fer tou kalite pie fri pouse. Zot zoli pou gete e zot fri bon pou manze. Dan milie zardin la, li plant de pie fri. Enn la donn lavi, e lot la donn konesans # 2:9 Literalman, pie lavi ek pie konesans lebien ek lemal. .
2.10: Enn larivier ki pran so lasours dan Eden aroz zardin la. Laba, li diviz an kat brans.
2.11: Premie la apel Pisonn, e li antour Pei Avila kot ena lor.
2.12: Dan sa pei la, ena bon kalite lor. Ena osi bann plant parfime ek bann pier-presie # 2:12 Ena tradiksion ekrir “Kornalinn,” enn pier presie ki rouz fonse. .
2.13: Deziem larivier la apel Gion e li antour Pei Kous.
2.14: Trwaziem larivier la apel Tig e li koul dan les Asiri. E katriyem larivier la apel Efrat.
2.15: LESEGNER Bondie met zom la dan zardin Eden pou okip li e pou kiltiv li.
2.16: LESEGNER Bondie donn zom la enn lord: “To kapav manz tou fri ki ena dan zardin,
2.17: me zame pa manz fri lor pie ki donn konesans. Zour ki to manz sa fri la, to pou mor.”
2.18: LESEGNER Bondie dir: “Li pa bon ki zom res tousel. Mo pou donn li enn partner pou ed li.”
2.19: Avek lapousier later, LESEGNER Bondie fasonn tou bann zanimo ek tou bann zwazo. Li fer zot tou vinn divan zom la, pou ki li donn sakenn enn nom. Koumsamem, tou bann kreatir vivan finn gagn zot nom.
2.20: Zom la donn enn nom sak zanimo domestik, sak zwazo ek sak zanimo sovaz. Me li pa trouv enn ki kapav ed li kouma enn partner.
2.21: Alor, LESEGNER Bondie fer zom la gagn enn somey lour. Letan li pe dormi, LESEGNER Bondie tir enn kot avek li e referm so laser.
2.22: Avek sa kot la, LESEGNER Bondie form enn fam e li amenn li divan zom la.
2.23: Sann fwa la, zom la dir: “Asterla wi, ala enn ki ena mo lezo, ek mo laser. Mo pou apel li Fam, parski finn tir li avek Zom # 2:23 An Ebre fam dir “ishah” et zom dir “ish”. .”
2.24: Ala kifer, enn zom kit lakaz so papa ek so mama pou al viv avek so fam, e toulede vinn kouma enn sel lekor.
2.25: Zom la ek so fam ti touni, me zot pa ti gagn okenn laont.

3.1: Serpan pli rize ki tou bann zanimo sovaz ki LESEGNER Bondie finn kre. Serpan dimann fam la: “Eski vremem Bondie finn dir zot pa manz okenn fri ki trouv dan zardin?”
3.2: Fam la reponn li: “Non, nou kapav manz bann fri ki dan zardin.
3.3: Me Bondie finn defann nou manz fri lor pie ki trouv omilie zardin. Li finn mem defann nou tous fri la, sinon nou pou mor.”
3.4: Me serpan la dir li: “Manti sa, zot pa pou mor zot.
3.5: Bondie kone ki si zot manz sa fri la, zot lizie pou ouver. Zot pou vinn kouma Bondie e zot pou gagn enn gran konesans.”
3.6: Fam la trouv sa fri la bien atiran e bon pou manze. Fri la donn anvi manze pou gagn lasazes. Lerla, li kas enn fri e li manze. Li donn enn bout so mari ki avek li e li osi manze.
3.7: Deswit, zot lizie ouver e zot realize ki zot touni. Zot atas bann fey fig ansam e zot kouver zot lekor.
3.8: Ler pre pou aswar, enn ti labriz soufle. Zot tann LESEGNER Bondie pe mars-marse dan zardin. Zot al kasiet deyer bann pie pou li pa trouv zot.
3.9: Me LESEGNER Bondie apel zom la e dimann li: “Kot twa?”
3.10: Li reponn: “Mo finn tann twa pe marse dan zardin. Mo finn gagn per e mo finn al kasiet akoz mo touni.”
3.11: LESEGNER Bondie dimann li: “Kouma to kone to touni? Eski to finn manz fri ki mo finn defann twa manze?”
3.12: Zom la dir: “Sa fam ki to finn donn mwa la sa. Li finn kas fri lor pie la, li finn donn mwa e mo finn manze.”
3.13: LESEGNER Bondie dir fam la: “Kifer to finn fer sa?” Fam la reponn: “Serpan la finn anbet mwa, akoz sa mo finn manze.”
3.14: LESEGNER Bondie dir ek serpan la: “Akoz to finn fer sa, mo modi twa parmi tou bann zanimo. To pou ranp lor to vant, e to pou manz lapousier toulezour ki to viv lor later.
3.15: Pou ena laenn ant twa ek fam la, ant to desandan ek so desandan. Zot pou rod kraz to latet, e twa to pou rod mord zot talon.”
3.16: Lerla, LESEGNER Bondie dir fam la: “Mo pou ogmant douler to groses, e to pou soufer kan to gagn zanfan. Twa, to pou atire ar to mari, me li, li pou dominn twa.”
3.17: Lerla, LESEGNER Bondie dir zom # 3:17 Adam la: “To finn ekout to fam, To finn manz sa fri la. Pourtan, mo ti donn twa enn lord, mo ti defann twa manz sa. Asterla, akoz twa later pou modi. Toulezour to pou bizin trime pou gagn to bouse manze.
3.18: Later pou prodwir pikan ek move-zerb pou twa, e to pou bizin manz seki pouse dan karo.
3.19: To pou transpire toulezour pou to gagn to dipin ziska ki to retourn dan later, later kot to finn sorti. Ek lapousier to finn pran nesans, dan lapousier to pou retourne.”
3.20: Adam apel so fam Ev, ki vedir vivan. Limem mama tou bann imin lor later.
3.21: LESEGNER Bondie fer bann linz ar lapo zanimo e abiy zom la ek so fam.
3.22: Lerla, LESEGNER Bondie dir: “Asterla zom la finn vinn kouma noumem. Li finn gagn enn gran konesans. Tansion li avoy lame, li kas fri dan pie ki donn lavi e li manze. Lerla li pou viv pou touzour.”
3.23: Ala kifer LESEGNER Bondie pous zot depi dan zardin Eden. Zom la bizin al travay later kot finn tir li.
3.24: Apre sa LESEGNER Bondie met enn bann anz pou gardien lantre zardin. Zot ena bann lepe ki kas dife e ki tourn dan tou direksion. Zot servi sa pou gardien sime ki al kot pie ki donn lavi.

4.1: Adam gagn relasion avek so fam Ev. Alor Ev tom ansint e gagn Kain. Ev dir: “LESEGNER finn beni mwa e mo finn reysi gagn enn garson.”
4.2: Plitar, Ev gagn enn deziem garson. Li apel li Abel. Kan zot grandi, Abel vinn enn elver zanimo e Kain vinn enn planter.
4.3: Enn zour, Kain amenn bann prodwi so rekolt pou ofer LESEGNER enn ofrand.
4.4: Abel osi ofer so ofrand LESEGNER. Li touy bann premie-ne dan so troupo e li ofer LESEGNER bann meyer morso. LESEGNER aksepte Abel ek so ofrand.
4.5: Me li pa aksepte Kain ek so ofrand. Alor, Kain ankoler e li boude.
4.6: LESEGNER dir Kain: “Kifer to pe ankoler, e kifer to pe fer enn move figir koumsa?
4.7: Si to fer seki bon, eski to pa pou relev latet? Asterla pese dan kwin to laport e li pe rod gagn twa. Me to bizin dominn li.”
4.8: Enn zour, Kain invit so ti-frer Abel pou al fer enn letour. Kan zot dan karo, Kain sot lor so ti-frer Abel e li touy li.
4.9: Lerla, LESEGNER dimann Kain: “Kot to frer Abel?” Kain reponn: “Mo pa kone. Eski mo gardien mo frer mwa?”
4.10: LESEGNER dir li: “Ki to finn fer, Kain? Disan to frer pe kriye mwa depi dan later.
4.11: Asterla, to pou gagn malediksion. To pou nepli kapav fer plantasion lor sa later ki finn ouver pou akeyir disan to frer ki to lame finn verse.
4.12: Kan to plante, nanye pa pou pouse. To pou kouma enn evade san valer, kouma enn vagabon lor later.”
4.13: Kain dir LESEGNER: “Mo pinision tro lour pou mo sarye.
4.14: Zordi to fer mwa kit mo terin. Pli pir, mo pou bizin viv san to prezans. Mo pou kouma enn derasine ek enn vagabon. Si kikenn trouv mwa, li pou touy mwa.”
4.15: LESEGNER dir li: “Li pa vre. Si kikenn touy twa, pou bizin set lavi pou vanz twa.” LESEGNER met enn mark spesial lor Kain pouki personn pa touy li kan zwenn li.
4.16: Lerla, Kain kit prezans LESEGNER. Li al res dan Nod ki dan les Zardin Eden.
4.17: Kain gagn relasion ek so fam. So fam tom ansint e gagn Enok. Kain aranz enn lavil e li apel li Enok, parey kouma so garson.
4.18: Enok papa Irad, e Irad papa Meouzael. Meouzael papa Metousael e Metousael papa Lemek.
4.19: Lemek pran de fam. Enn apel Ada e lot la apel Sila.
4.20: Ada gagn Yabal, anset bann dimoun ki viv anba latant e ki elve bann troupo.
4.21: So frer apel Youbal, anset tou bann mizisien ki zwe laarp ek laflit.
4.22: Sila, de so kote, gagn Toubal-Kain, enn forzron ki fer tousort kalite zouti an bronz ek fer. Ser Toubal-Kain apel Naama.
4.23: Lemek dir so de fam: “Ada ek Sila, ekout mo parol, Zot, bann fam Lemek, tann mo koze: Mo finn touy enn zom ki finn bles mwa, Mo finn touy enn zennzan ki finn lev lame lor mwa.
4.24: Si Kain ti vo set lavi, Mwa mo vo 77 lavi.”
4.25: Adam ek Ev gagn ankor enn garson. Ev apel li Set e li dir: “Bondie finn donn mwa enn lot garson pou ranplas Abel ki Kain finn touye.”
4.26: Plitar, Set osi gagn enn garson. Li apel li Enos. Depi sa lepok la, dimoun koumans invok nom LESEGNER.

5.3: Adam ena 130 an, e li gagn enn garson ki resanble li boukou. Li apel li Set.
5.4: Apre nesans Set, Adam viv ankor 800 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.6: Kan Set gagn 105 an, li vinn papa Enos.
5.7: Apre nesans Enos, Set viv ankor 807 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.9: Kan Enos ena 90 an, li vinn papa Kenann.
5.10: Apre nesans Kenann, Enos viv ankor 815 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.12: Kan Kenann ena 70 an, li vinn papa Malaleel.
5.13: Apre nesans Malaleel, Kenann viv ankor 840 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.15: Kan Malaleel ena 65 an, li vinn papa Yered.
5.16: Apre nesans Yered, Malaleel viv ankor 830 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.18: Kan Yered ena 162 an, li vinn papa Enok.
5.19: Apre nesans Enok, Yered viv ankor 800 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.21: Kan Enok ena 65 an, li vinn papa Matousalem.
5.22: Apre nesans Matousalem, Enok mars dan sime Bondie ankor 300 an. Li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.25: Kan Matousalem ena 187 an, li vinn papa Lemek.
5.26: Apre nesans Lemek, Matousalem viv ankor 782 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.28: Lemek ena 182 an kan li gagn enn garson.
5.29: Li apel li Noe. Lemek dir: “Sa zanfan la pou soulaz nou dan nou travay. Vremem, li finn vinn pli dir depi ki LESEGNER finn modi later.”
5.30: Apre nesans Noe, Lemek viv ankor 595 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
5.32: Noe ena 500 an, e li ena 3 garson: Sem, Kam ek Zafet.

6.1: Kan dimoun pe ogmante lor later, boukou tifi pe pran nesans.
6.2: Bann abitan lesiel # 6:2 Bann abitan lesiel. Literalman: “Bann garson Bondie”. trouv bann tifi la bien zoli. Zot vinn marye avek seki zot swazire.
6.3: Lerla, LESEGNER dir: “Mo souf lavi pa pou res dan bann imin pou touzour, parski zot zis enn bann mortel. Zot lavi pa pou depas 120 an.”
6.4: Sa lepok la, e mem apre, ena bann zean lor later. Zot desandan bann abitan lesiel # 6:4 Get verse 2 ek so not. ek bann tifi imin. Zot bann gran gerye e zot bien renome.
6.5: LESEGNER trouve ki bann dimoun finn vinn bien move lor later. Zot leker touletan ranpli ar lemal.
6.6: LESEGNER regrete ki li finn met bann imin lor later. Sa fer so leker fermal.
6.7: Li dir: “Mo pou detrir tou dimoun lor later. Mo pou balye zot tou, dimoun, zanimo, bebet, ek zwazo. Mo regrete ki mo finn kre zot.”
6.9: Ala zistwar Noe. Parmi bann zenerasion dan so lepok, Noe enn zom zis, san repros, e li mars avek Bondie.
6.10: Li ena 3 garson: Sem, Kam ek Zafet.
6.13: Lerla, Bondie dir Noe: “Mo finn desid pou eliminn tou dimoun. Akoz zotmem ki later finn ranpli ek violans. Asterla, mo pou detrir zot tou ansam ar later.
6.14: Pran bann meyer dibwa e aranz enn bato. Met plizir kabinn ladan. Mastik so plans andan ek deor avek koltar.
6.15: Ala ki dimansion to pou fer li: 150 met longer, 25 met larzer, e 15 met oter.
6.16: Met so plafon 50 santimet pli lao ki so rebor. Bato la bizin ena 3 letaz e to ava met so laport dan enn flan.
6.17: Mwa, mo pou fer enn deliz pas lor later pou detrir tou seki ena lavi anba lesiel. Nanye pa pou sape.
6.18: Me ala mo pe fer enn lalians avek twa. Rant dan bato, twa, to fam, to bann garson ek to bann belfi.
6.19: Pran enn mal ek enn femel dan sak lespes parmi tou bann kreatir vivan. Met zot dan bato pouki zot res vivan avek twa.
6.20: Pran de dan sak lespes zwazo, dan sak lespes zanimo ek dan sak lespes ti bebet ki ranpe lor later. Amenn zot dan bato avek twa pou gard zot vivan.
6.21: Stok bann provizion nouritir pou twa ek pou tou seki pou avek twa.”
6.22: Noe fer tou seki Bondie komann li.

7.1: LESEGNER dir Noe: “Rant dan bato, twa ek tou to fami. Mo finn trouve ki parmi sa zenerasion la, to tousel enn zom zis ek fidel divan mwa.
7.2: Pran avek twa set mal ek set femel parmi sak lespes zanimo ki pir. Me pran enn sel mal ek enn femel dan sak ras zanimo ki inpir.
7.3: Pran osi set per parmi sak lespes zwazo, pou ki zot ras prezerve lor later.
7.4: Dan set zour, mo pou fer lapli tonbe e li pou dire 40 zour ek 40 nwit. Mo pou balye tou bann kreatir vivan ki mo finn kre lor later.”
7.5: Noe fer tou seki LESEGNER komann li.
7.6: Noe ena 600 an kan deliz koumanse lor later.
7.7: Li rant dan bato avek so bann garson, so fam, ek so bann belfi, pou sov zot lavi akoz deliz.
7.10: Set zour plitar, deliz koumanse lor later.
7.13: Sa zour la, Noe rant dan bato avek so fam, so 3 garson, Sem, Kam ek Zafet, ek so 3 belfi.
7.14: Zot pran avek zot, tou bann lespes zanimo sovaz, zanimo domestik ek reptil ki ranpe lor later. Zot pran osi tou bann lespes zwazo ek bann lezot bebet ki ena lezel.
7.15: Tou bann kreatir vivan rant dan bato avek Noe, de par de.
7.16: Zot tou rantre, enn mal ek enn femel dan sak lespes, parey kouma Bondie finn komann Noe. Apre sa LESEGNER ferm laport deryer li.
7.17: Deliz kontigne pandan 40 zour lor later. Dilo mont bien ot e bato la flote.
7.18: Nivo dilo kontign ogmante boukou. Bato la derive lor dilo.
7.19: Nivo dilo kontign monte ziska tou bann pli ot montagn kouver.
7.20: Dilo mont 7 met pli ot ki bann pwint montagn.
7.21: Tou kreatir vivan lor later mor: bann zwazo, zanimo, ti bebet ek dimoun.
7.22: Tou seki ena lavi lor later mor.
7.23: Ala ki manier LESEGNER balye tou seki vivan lor later. Tou mor: dimoun, zanimo, ti bebet ek zwazo. Zis Noe ek seki avek li dan bato reysi sape.
7.24: Nivo dilo res ot lor later pandan 150 zour.

8.1: Bondie pa finn bliye Noe ek tou bann zanimo ki avek li dan bato. Bondie fer enn divan soufle lor later e nivo dilo koumans bese.
8.2: Bann lasours dilo aret koule. Bann lafnet dan lesiel ferme e lapli aret tonbe.
8.3: Bann dilo ki lor later koumans bese dousma-dousma. 150 zour apre deliz, nivo dilo finn dimigne.
8.4: Lor disetiem zour dan setiem mwa, bato la tom lor sek lor montagn Ararat.
8.5: Nivo dilo kontign desann. Premie zour dan diziem mwa, bann pwint montagn koumans paret.
8.6: Apre 40 zour, Noe ouver enn linpos.
8.7: Li larg enn korbo, e Korbo la ale-vini ziska ki dilo sek lor later.
8.8: Lerla, Noe larg enn pizon pou verifie si vremem dilo finn sek lor sirfas later.
8.9: Me pizon la pa trouv enn plas pou li poze, parski ankor ena dilo partou. Pizon la retourn ek Noe dan bato. Noe avoy so lame deor e fer li rantre.
8.10: Noe atann ankor set zour, lerla li relarg pizon la.
8.11: Ler pre pou aswar, pizon la retourne. Dan so labek ena enn ti bourzon pie zoliv. Alor, Noe kone ki dilo finn bese.
8.12: Me Noe atann ankor set zour e li relarg pizon la. Sann fwa la, li pa retourne.
8.13: Premie zour dan lane ki Noe gagn 601 an, dilo finn sek lor later. Noe ouver plafon bato, e li trouve ki later finn sek.
8.14: Lor vennsetiem zour dan deziem mwa, later finn sek partou.
8.16: “Sorti dan bato ek to fam, to bann garson ek to bann belfi.
8.17: Tir tou bann zwazo, bann zanimo ek tou bann lezot bebet ki avek twa dan bato. Zot ava ogmante e ranpli later.”
8.18: Alor, Noe sorti dan bato avek so bann garson, so fam, ek so bann belfi.
8.19: Tou bann kreatir vivan sorti dan bato par group, dapre zot lespes.
8.20: Noe aranz enn lotel pou LESEGNER. Li pran enn zanimo ek enn zwazo parmi sak lespes ki ti pir. Li ofer zot kouma enn sakrifis lor lotel.
8.21: LESEGNER apresie parfin sakrifis la. Lerla li dir: “Zame ankor mo pa pou modi later akoz bann imin ki mo finn fer. Li vre ki bann dimoun azir mal, Depi zot zenn zot leker sal. Me zame mo pa pou detrir sa bann kreatir vivan la, kouma mo finn fer sann fwa la.
8.22: Tanki later existe, pou ena touzour enn letan pou seme, ek enn letan pou rekolte. Freser ek saler, lete ek liver, lanwit ek lizour, pou existe touzour.”

9.1: Bondie beni Noe ek so bann garson, e li dir zot: “Fer zanfan, ogmante e ranpli later.
9.2: Tou bann zanimo lor later, bann zwazo, bann ti-bebet ek bann pwason dan lamer pou per zot e pou soumet divan zot. Mo met tousala dan zot lame.
9.3: Mo donn zot tou bann kreatir vivan kouma nouritir. Avan, mo ti donn zot bann plant pou manze. Asterla, mo donn zot tou.
9.4: Me fode pa zot manz laser avek so lavi, setadir so disan.
9.5: Pou zot disan osi mo pou dimann kont. Si enn zanimo touy enn dimoun, mo pou dimann li kont. Si enn dimoun touy enn lot dimoun, mo pou dimann li kont.
9.6: Si kikenn vers disan enn dimoun, so disan osi pou verse parey. Parski Bondie finn kre dimoun dan so prop resanblans.
9.7: Kanta zot, fer boukou zanfan, ogmante e ranpli later.”
9.8: Lerla, Bondie dir Noe ek so bann garson:
9.9: “Mo pe fer enn lalians avek zot, ek zot bann desandan apre zot.
9.10: Sa lalians la konsern osi bann zwazo, bann zanimo domestik ek bann zanimo sovaz. Setadir, tou seki finn sorti dan bato avek zot.
9.11: Mo fer enn lalians ar zot tou: zame mo pou fer enn lot deliz detrir later ek bann kreatir vivan.”
9.12: Bondie dir: “Ala sign lalians ki mo pe fer ant mwa ek zot, ek tou bann kreatir vivan pou touzour:
9.13: Mo met mo larkansiel dan niaz. Samem pou sign mo lalians ant mwa ek bann abitan later.
9.14: Sak fwa mo fer niaz kouver lesiel, e ki larkansiel paret,
9.15: mo pou rapel lalians ki mo finn fer avek zot ek tou bann kreatir vivan. Zame pa pou ena ankor deliz pou detrir lavi lor later.
9.16: Kan mo trouv larkansiel dan niaz, mo pou rapel lalians eternel ki mo finn fer avek tou bann kreatir vivan lor later.”
9.17: Bondie dir Noe: “Samem sign mo lalians ki mo fer avek tou seki vivan lor later.”
9.18: Bann garson Noe ki finn sorti dan bato apel Sem, Kam ek Zafet. Plitar, Kam gagn enn garson ki li apel Kanaan.
9.19: Bann desandan sa trwa garson Noe lamem ki finn peple later.
9.20: Noe enn planter e limem premie dimoun ki fer plantasion rezin.
9.21: Enn zour li bwar divin e li sou. Lerla li alonz touni dan so latant.
9.22: Kam, papa Kanaan, trouv so papa touni, e li al dir sa so de frer.
9.23: Sem ek Zafet met enn latwal lor zot zepol. Zot mars an-aryer e zot kouver zot papa. Zot figir tourn lot kote, e zot pa trouv zot papa touni.
9.24: Kan Noe desoule, li aprann seki so deziem garson finn fer.
9.25: Li dir: “Malediksion lor Kanaan; li pou enn dernie esklav pou so bann frer.
9.26: Beni Sem SEGNER mo Bondie. Fer Kanaan vinn so esklav.
9.27: Donn Zafet boukou later. Fer so desandan viv ansam ar desandan Sem, e fer Kanaan vinn so esklav.”
9.28: Apre deliz, Noe viv ankor 350 an.

10.1: Apre deliz, bann garson Noe, Sem, Kam ek Zafet gagn boukou zanfan. Ala lalis zot bann desandan:
10.2: Bann garson Zafet apel Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yavan, Toubal, Mesek ek Tira.
10.3: Bann garson Gomer: Askenaz, Rifat ek Togarma.
10.4: Bann garson Yavan apel Elisa, Tarsis, Kitim ek Rodanim.
10.5: Zotmem anset bann nasion ki viv lor lakot. Tousala bann desandan Zafet. Zot groupe dan zot pei dapre zot langaz; dan zot nasion dapre zot klan.
10.6: Bann garson Kam apel Kous, Misraim, Pout ek Kanaan.
10.7: Bann garson Kous: Seba, Avila, Sabta, Ragma ek Sabteka. Bann garson Ragma apel Saba ek Dedann.
10.8: Kous osi papa Nemrod, premie gran gerye lor later.
10.9: Nemrod enn gran saser divan LESEGNER. Akoz samem ena enn koze ki dir: “Setel Nemrod, enn gran saser divan LESEGNER.”
10.10: Bann premie gran lavil dan so rwayom: Babel, Erek ek Akad, dan pei Sinear.
10.11: Nemrod sorti dan sa landrwa la e li al dan Asiri. Laba, li batir lavil Niniv, Reobot ek Kela.
10.12: Li batir osi lavil Resenn, ant Niniv ek gran lavil Kela.
10.13: Misraim anset bann abitan Loud, Anem, Leab ek Naftou,
10.14: Patros, Kaftor, ek Kaslou, kot bann Filistin sorti.
10.15: Kanaan papa Sidon, so premie garson, ek Het.
10.16: Kanaan, li osi anset bann Zebizit, Amorit, Gigarsit,
10.18: bann Arvadit, Semarit ek Amatit. Apre sa, bann desandan Kanaan disperse partou.
10.19: Zot teritwar pran depi Sidon, Gerar, ziska Gaza, e depi Sodom, Gomor, Adma ek Seboim, ziska Lesa.
10.20: Tousala bann desandan Kam. Zot groupe dan zot pei dapre zot langaz; dan zot nasion dapre zot klan.
10.23: Aram papa Ous, Oul, Geter ek Mas.
10.24: Arpaksad papa Sela, e Sela papa Eber.
10.25: Eber ena de garson. Premie la apel Peleg, ki vedir divizion. Dan sa lepok la bann abitan later divize. Frer Peleg apel Yoktann.
10.26: Yoktann papa Almodad, Selef, Azarmavet, Yera,
10.30: Zot teritwar pran depi Mesa, pas par Sefar, ziska bann montagn dan les.
10.31: Tousala bann desandan Sem. Zot groupe dan zot pei dapre zot langaz; dan zot nasion dapre zot klan.
10.32: Tousala desandan bann garson Noe dapre zot klan ek zot pep. Apre deliz, zot desandan mem ki finn peple partou lor later.

11.1: Dans sa lepok la, tou dimoun lor later koz mem langaz.
11.2: Zot sorti dan les e zot trouv enn gran laplenn dan Mezopotami. Zot desid pou res laba.
11.3: Zot dir ant zotmem: “Anou fer blok e anou sof zot dan four.” Zot servi blok kouma ros, e koltar kouma mortie.
11.4: Lerla zot dir: “Anou aranz enn lavil ek enn latour ki tous lesiel. Koumsa, nou pou vinn renome e nou pa pou disperse lor later.”
11.5: Lerla, LESEGNER desann pou get lavil ek latour ki bann imin pe konstrir.
11.6: LESEGNER dir: “Get enn kou! Zot form enn sel pep, e zot koz mem langaz. Si asterlamem zot pe fer koumsa, plitar zot pou kapav fer tou seki zot anvi.
11.7: Anou desann pou met konfizion dan zot langaz. Koumsa personn pa pou konpran so kamarad.”
11.8: Alor, LESEGNER dispers zot partou lor later, e zot aret batir zot lavil.
11.9: Sa lavil la apel Babel, akoz labamem LESEGNER finn met konfizion dan langaz bann dimoun. LESEGNER finn dispers zot partou lor later.
11.10: Ala lalis bann desandan Sem. Dezan apre deliz, Sem ena 100 an. Li gagn enn garson ki apel Arpaksad.
11.11: Apre nesans Arpaksad, Sem viv ankor 500 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.12: Arpaksad ena 35 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Sela.
11.13: Apre nesans Sela, Arpaksad viv ankor 403 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.14: Sela ena 30 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Eber.
11.15: Apre nesans Eber, Sela viv ankor 403 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.16: Eber ena 34 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Peleg.
11.17: Apre nesans Peleg, Eber viv ankor 430 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.18: Peleg ena 30 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Reou.
11.19: Apre nesans Reou, Peleg viv ankor 209 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.20: Reou ena 32 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Seroug.
11.21: Apre nesans Seroug, Reou viv ankor 207 an. Li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.22: Seroug ena 30 an kan li gagn enn garson ki apel Nahor.
11.23: Apre nesans Nahor, Seroug viv ankor 200 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.24: Lor so 29 an, Nahor gagn enn garson ki apel Tera.
11.25: Apre nesans Tera, Nahor viv ankor 119 an e li gagn ankor lezot zanfan.
11.26: Tera ena 70 an e li deza ena trwa garson: Abram, Nahor, ek Arann.
11.27: Ala lalis bann desandan Tera: Tera gagn Abram, Nahor ek Arann. Arann gagn Lot.
11.28: Arann mor dan so pei natal, Our, kot bann Kaldeen. Kan Arann mor, so papa Tera ankor vivan.
11.31: Enn zour, Tera desid pou kit Our pou al res dan Kanaan. Li amenn avek li so garson Abram, so belfi Sarai, ek so tizanfan Lot. Me kan zot ariv Arann, zot desid pou res labamem.
11.32: Tera mor dan Arann laz 205 an.

12.1: LESEGNER dir Abram: “Kit to pei, to fami ek lakaz to papa. Al dan enn pei ki mo pou montre twa.
12.2: Mo pou fer twa vinn papa enn gran nasion, e mo pou beni twa. To nom pou respekte partou. E to pou enn benediksion pou lezot.
12.3: Mo pou beni dimoun ki pou beni twa, me mo pou modi dimoun ki pou modi twa. Atraver twa, mo pou beni tou bann fami lor later.” # 12:3 Kapav dir osi: “Tou bann nasion lor later pou dimann mwa beni zot kouma mo finn beni twa.”
12.6: Abram kontign travers pei la ziska ki li ariv kot gran pie More, dan Sikem. Sa lepok la, bann Kananeen ankor pe res laba.
12.7: Enn zour, LESEGNER aparet avek Abram, e dir li: “Mo pou donn to bann desandan sa pei la.” Abram aranz enn lotel pou LESEGNER dan sa landrwa la, parski labamem LESEGNER finn aparet avek li.
12.8: Lerla li al dan direksion bann montagn ki trouv dan les Betel. Li dres so latant ant Betel ek Ai. Laba, li aranz enn lotel pou LESEGNER. Li invok LESEGNER par so nom.
12.9: Apre sa, letap par letap, Abram pran direksion Negev.
12.10: Sa lepok la, enn lafaminn fer ravaz dan Kanaan. Telman lafaminn la dir, Abram ek Sarai bizin al res Lezip pou inpe letan.
12.11: Kan zot pre pou ariv Lezip, Abram dir so fam, Sarai: “Mo kone ki to bien zoli.
12.12: Kan bann Ezipsien pou trouv to bote, zot pou touy mwa akoz mo to mari. Me zot pou les twa vivan.
12.13: Dir zot ki to mo ser. Lerla zot pou tret mwa bien akoz twa, e mo lavi pou sov.”
12.14: Kan zot ariv Lezip, bann Ezipsien trouv Sarai extra zoli.
12.15: Letan bann ofisie Faraon trouv li, zot al koz li avek Faraon. Lerla, zot amenn li viv dan sato Faraon.
12.16: Faraon tret Abram bien akoz Sarai. Li donn li mouton, kabri, bef, serviter ek servant, bourik ek samo.
12.17: Me akoz Sarai, fam Abram, LESEGNER avoy bann gran maler lor Faraon ek so lantouraz.
12.18: Lerla, Faraon fer apel Abram e dir li: “Kifer to finn fer sa ar mwa? Kifer to pa ti dir mwa ki Sarai to fam?
12.19: Kifer to finn fer mwa krwar ki li to ser? Akoz sa mo finn pran li pou mo fam. Ala to fam, pran li ale!”
12.20: Faraon donn lord so bann serviter pou kondir Abram ek Sarai andeor pei avek tou seki zot posede.

13.1: Abram kit Lezip. Li al Negev avek so fam, so neve Lot, e tou seki li posede.
13.2: Abram extra ris. Li ena enn kantite troupo zanimo, e li posed boukou larzan ek lor.
13.3: Inpe letan apre, Abram kit Negev. Li kanpe dan plizir plas ziska ki li ariv dan enn landrwa ant Betel ek Ai. Li ti deza kanpe laba avan.
13.4: Labamem ki li ti aranz enn lotel e ti invok nom LESEGNER.
13.5: Lot res avek so tonton Abram. Li osi, li posed bann troupo mouton, kabri ek bef. Li ena so prop fami ek so bann serviter.
13.6: Pena ase patiraz dan sa landrwa la pou Abram ek Lot, parski zot ena boukou troupo. Zot nepli kapav res ansam.
13.7: Bagar eklate ant bann berze Abram ek bann berze Lot. Anplis, bann Kananeen ek bann Perizit ankor pe res laba.
13.8: Lerla Abram dir Lot: “Nou mem disan nou. Fode pa ena dispit ant nou, ni ant nou bann berze.
13.9: Li pou pli bon si nou separe. Ankor ena boukou terin lib dan sa pei la. Si to swazir pou al lenor, mo pou al lesid. Si to swazir pou al lesid, mo pou al lenor.”
13.10: Lot get dan direksion bann teritwar kot larivier Zourdin. Li trouve ki pa mank dilo laba. Sa lepok la, LESEGNER pa ti ankor detrir Sodom ek Gomor. Tou sa bann landrwa la, ziska Soar, zot ver kouma Zardin LESEGNER. Zot kouma later Lezip.
13.11: Lot swazir pou al dan bann laplenn ki pre ar Zourdin. Alor, li lev so kan e li al dan direksion les. Ala ki manier Lot ek so tonton Abram finn separe.
13.12: Abram res dan Pei Kanaan. Lot al res dan bann lavil ki trouv dan vale Zourdin. Li plant so latant pre ar Sodom.
13.13: Bann abitan Sodom bien move, e zot bann pese bien grav divan LESEGNER.
13.14: Apre separasion Lot ek Abram, LESEGNER dir Abram: “Lev to lizie e get dan direksion lenor, lesid, les ek lwes.
13.15: Mo pou donn twa ek to bann desandan tou sa bann pei la pou touzour.
13.16: Mo pou donn twa enn gran desandans. Zot pou vinn boukou kouma lapousier later. Parey kouma pa kapav kont lapousier later, pa pou kapav kont to bann desandan.
13.17: Leve, al admir sa Pei la an-longer e an-larzer. Mo pe donn twa tousala.”
13.18: Abram dekanpe e li al plant so latant pre kot bann gran pie Mamre, ki trouv dan Ebron. Abram aranz enn lotel pou LESEGNER laba.

14.1: Dan sa lepok la, Amrafel, lerwa Sinear, Aryok, lerwa Elasar, Kedorlaomer, lerwa Elam, ek Tidal, lerwa Goim fer lalians.
14.2: Zot al lager kont Bera, lerwa Sodom, Birsa, lerwa Gomor, Sinab, lerwa Adma, Semeber, lerwa Seboim ek lerwa Bela, setadir Soar.
14.5: Enn an apre ki revolt ti finn koumanse, Kedorlaomer ek so bann alie koumans atake. Lor zot larout, zot bat bann Refait dan Asterot-Karnaim. Zot bat osi bann Zouzit dan lavil Am, ek bann Emit dan laplenn Kiriataim.
14.6: Apre sa zot bat bann Onit dan zot bann kolinn dan Seir. Zot pourswiv bann Onit ziska El-Parann, pre ar dezer.
14.7: Lerla zot retourn dan Enn-Mispat, setadir Kades. Zot ravaz bann teritwar Amalesit, e zot bat bann Amorit ki res dan Asasonn-Tamar.
14.8: Lerlamem, bann lerwa Sodom, Gomor, Adma, Seboim ek Bela, setadir Soar, ek zot bann larme, desann dan vale Sidim.
14.9: Zot konbat kont Kedorlaomer, lerwa Elam, Tidal, lerwa Goim, Amrafel, lerwa Mezopotami, ek Aryok, lerwa Elasar. Sink lerwa kont kat lerwa.
14.10: Ena boukou pwi goudron dan vale Sidim. Lerwa Sodom ek lerwa Gomor sove, e zot tom dan pwi goudron. Bann ki reysi sape al kasiet dan bann montagn.
14.11: Kedorlaomer ek so bann alie ranport laviktwar. Zot pran bann rises ek bann rezerv nouritir dan Sodom ek Gomor.
14.12: Lot, neve Abram, pe res dan Gomor. Bannla fer li prizonie. Zot amenn li ek tou seki li posede.
14.13: Enn zom reysi sape. Li vinn anons sa nouvel la Abram ki enn Ebre. Sa letan la, Abram pe kanpe kot bann gran pie Mamre, enn Amorit. Mamre frer Eskol ek Aner. Touletrwa finn fer enn lalians avek Abram.
14.14: Kouma Abram tann nouvel ki bann lennmi finn amenn so neve Lot kouma prizonie, li rasanble so bann pli bon gerye. Ena antou 318. Abram ek so bann zom pourswiv bann lennmi ziska Dann.
14.15: Li diviz so bann zom an-plizir group. Zot atak bann lennmi aswar. Abram ek so bann zom ranport laviktwar. Zot pourswiv bann lennmi ziska Oba, dan Nor Damas.
14.16: Abram ramenn tou bann rises ki bann lennmi ti pran. Li ramenn osi so neve Lot, tou bann fam, ek tou lezot prizonie.
14.17: Abram finn ranport enn gran viktwar lor lerwa Kedorlaomer ek so bann alie. Ler li retourne, lerwa Sodom vinn zwenn li dan vale Save, setadir vale Lerwa.
14.18: Melkisedek, lerwa Salem, amenn dipin ek divin. Li enn pret ki servi Bondie Treo.
14.19: Li beni Abram e li dir: “Abram, Bondie Treo # 14:19 An Ebre: “El Elyon”. beni twa, Limem Kreater lesiel ek later;
14.20: Glorifie Bondie Treo. Li finn livre to bann lennmi dan to lame.” Lerla Abram donn Melkisedek 10 poursan bann rises ki li finn amene.
14.21: Apre sa, lerwa Sodom dir Abram: “Donn mwa mo bann dimoun, me gard tou leres pou twa.”
14.22: Me Abram reponn li: “Mo finn fer serman divan LESEGNER, Bondie Treo, ki finn kre lesiel ek later.
14.23: Mo pa pou pran nanye seki pou twa, ni enn brin difil, ni enn lase sandalet. Koumsa, to pa pou kapav dir: ‘Mo finn fer Abram vinn ris.’
14.24: Mo pa pou pran nanye, exsepte bann nouritir ki mo bann zom finn manze. Les mo bann alie, Aner, Eskol ek Mamre pran zot par, zotmem.”

15.1: Enn zour, LESEGNER koz avek Abram dan enn vizion e dir li: “Abram, pa bizin per! Momem to Protekter. Mo pou donn twa enn gran rekonpans.”
15.2: Abram reponn: “A Segner BONDIE, ki to pou donn mwa? To konn bien ki mo pena zanfan. Eliezer ki sorti Damas pou vinn mo eritie.
15.3: To pa finn donn mwa zanfan. Akoz sa, mo domestik Eliezer ki finn ne dan mo lakaz, limem pou vinn mo eritie.”
15.4: LESEGNER dir Abram: “Non, pa sa zom la ki pou vinn to eritie, me to prop disan. To prop garson ki pou vinn to eritie.”
15.5: Li fer Abram sorti deor e li dir li: “Lev to lizie lao, e get lesiel. Kont bann zetwal si to kapav. To bann desandan pou vinn boukou kouma bann zetwal dan lesiel.”
15.6: Abram met so konfians dan LESEGNER. Akoz sa LESEGNER rekonet li kouma enn zom zis.
15.7: Li dir Abram: “Momem LESEGNER ki finn fer twa sorti dan Our, pei bann Kaldeen. Mo pe fer twa vinn propriyeter sa pei la.”
15.8: Abram dir li: “Segner BONDIE, kouma mo pou kone si sa pei la pou vinn pou mwa?”
15.9: LESEGNER reponn li: “Amenn enn zenis, enn sev, ek enn belie 3 an sakenn. Amenn osi enn tourtrel ek enn zenn pizon.”
15.10: Abram obeir LESEGNER. Li ouver bann zanimo la ande. Li met sak lamwatie vizavi so lot lamwatie. Me li pa ouver bann zwazo.
15.11: Bann votour desann pou manz kadav bann zanimo la, me Abram farous zot.
15.12: Ler soley kouse, Abram gagn enn somey lour. Enn nwarte ki fer per antour li.
15.13: Lerla, LESEGNER dir li: “Abram, to bann desandan pou al res dan enn pei etranze. Bann abitan sa pei la pou tret zot kouma esklav. Bannla pou fer dominer ar zot pandan 400 an.
15.14: Me sa pep ki pou tret zot kouma esklav la pou gagn mo pinision. Lerla to bann desandan pou kit sa pei la avek boukou rises.
15.15: Twa, Abram, to pou viv bien lontan, e to pou mor anpe dan to vieyes.
15.16: Apre kat zenerasion # 15:16 Kat zenerasion pe fer referans 400 an ki desandan Abram pou dan enn pei etranze. Get verse 13. to bann desandan pou retourn isi. Lerla, mo pou pini bann Amorit. Asterla zot pese pankor vinn ase grav pouki mo pous zot lor zot later.”
15.17: Soley finn kouse e fer bien nwar. Enn sel kou, enn resipian lafime ek enn flanbo paret. Zot laflam ek lafime pas ant bann lamwatie zanimo ki Abram finn ouver.
15.18: Sa zour la, LESEGNER fer enn lalians avek Abram. Li dir li: “Mo pou donn to bann desandan sa pei la antie, depi larivier Lezip ziska gran larivier Efrat.
15.19: Mo pou donn zot teritwar bann Kenit, bann Kenizit, bann Kadmonit,
15.20: bann Itit, bann Perizit, bann Refait,
15.21: bann Amorit, bann Kananeen, bann Girgasit ek bann Zebizit.”

16.1: Sarai, fam Abram, pa kapav gagn zanfan. Li ena enn servant Egypsienn ki apel Agar.
16.2: Sarai dir Abram: “Kouma to kone, LESEGNER pa finn donn mwa zanfan. Al gagn relasion avek mo servant Agar. Kitfwa atraver li mo pou kapav gagn enn garson # 16:2 Dan sa lepok la ti ena enn koutim: Bann madam ki pa ti kapav gagn zanfan, ti permet zot mari gagn relasion ek zot servant. Zanfan ki servant la ti gagne ti vinn pou madam la. .” Abram aksepte propozision Sarai.
16.3: Alor, Sarai donn Abram so servant Agar pou fam. Sa arive 10 an apre ki zot ti vinn res dan Kanaan.
16.4: Abram gagn relasion avek Agar e Agar tom ansint. Kan li kone li ansint, li pran grander e li get Sarai avek mepri.
16.5: Sarai dir Abram: “Twa ki lakoz si zordi Agar pe maltret mwa. Mo finn met mo servant dan to lebra. Aster, ler li kone li ansint, li fer koumadir mo pa vo nanye. Me LESEGNER ki pou zize kisannla ena rezon ant mwa ek twa.”
16.6: Abram reponn li: “Agar to servant sa. To kapav tret li kouma to anvi.” Lerla, Sarai tret Agar avek severite. Agar bizin kit lakaz sove ale.
16.7: Inpe plitar, Anz LESEGNER trouv Agar dan dezer. Li kot enn pwi ki trouv lor larout Sour.
16.8: Anz la dir li: “Agar, servant Sarai, kot to sorti e kot to pe ale?” Agar dir: “Mo pe sove akoz mo patronn Sarai.”
16.9: Anz LESEGNER dir li: “Retourn kot to patronn e obeir li.
16.10: Pli tar mo pou donn twa enn gran desandans. Telman zot pou boukou, personn pa pou kapav konte ki kantite zot ete.
16.11: To ansint, e to pou gagn enn garson. To pou apel li Ismael, # 16:11 An Ebre Ismael vedir: Bondie tande. parski LESEGNER finn tann to detres.
16.12: To garson pou ena karakter enn bourik sovaz, Li pou lager kont tou, e tou pou lager kont li. Li pa pou viv mem manier ar so fami.”
16.13: Lerla, Agar poz limem lakestion: “Kouma mo kapav finn trouv Bondie e res vivan?” Li invok LESEGNER e li dir : “Tomem El Roi.” Sa nom la vedir Bondie ki trouv mwa.
16.14: Ala kifer finn apel sa pwi la ‘Lahai-Roi’, ki vedir Bondie Vivan ki trouv mwa. Li trouv ant Kades ek Bered.

17.1: Kan Abram ena 99 an, LESEGNER aparet avek li ankor enn fwa e dir li: “Momem Bondie Toupwisan. Mars dan mo prezans e res touzour san repros.
17.2: Mwa, mo pou etabli mo lalians avek twa. Mo pou donn twa boukou desandan.”
17.3: Abram prosterne ziska so figir tous later. Lerla Bondie dir li:
17.4: “Ala mo lalians ki mo etabli avek twa: To pou vinn anset enn kantite nasion.
17.5: To nom pou nepli Abram, me Abraam, # 17:5 An Ebre nom Abraam vedir “anset boukou nasion.” parski mo pou fer twa vinn anset boukou nasion.
17.6: Mo pou donn twa boukou desandan. Zot pou form boukou nasion. Ena mem ki pou vinn lerwa parmi to bann desandan.
17.7: Mo pou gard mo lalians avek twa, e avek tou to bann desandan apre twa. Mo lalians pou dire zenerasion apre zenerasion. Mo pou zot Bondie pou touzour.
17.8: Zordi to zis enn etranze dan sa pei la. Me pei Kanaan antie pou vinn pou twa ek to desandan pou touzour. E mwa, mo pou zot Bondie.”
17.9: Bondie dir Abraam ankor: “Abraam, respekte mo lalians, twa ek to bann desandan pou touzour.
17.10: Ala mo lalians ki twa ek to bann desandan bizin respekte pou touletan: Tou bann mal parmi zot pou bizin sirkonsi.
17.11: Zot sirkonsizion pou enn sign lalians ki mo etabli avek zot.
17.12: Depi asterla, to pou bizin sirkonsi tou tibaba mal kan li gagn wit zour. To bizin sirkonsi osi to bann esklav mal ki finn ne dan to lakaz, e bann ki to finn aste ar bann etranze.
17.13: Tou esklav ki finn ne kot twa, e bann ki to finn aste ar bann etranze, pou sirkonsi. Sa pou enn sign dan zot lekor, ki mo lalians avek zot pou dire pou touzour.
17.14: Si enn mal pa finn sirkonsi, li pou kas mo lalians. Li pa pou kapav form parti so pep.”
17.15: Bondie koz avek Abraam ankor enn fwa, e dir li: “Aret apel to fam Sarai. Asterla so nom pou Sara. # 17:15 Sarai ek Sara, toulede nom vedir laprinses.
17.16: Mo pou beni li, e li pou donn twa enn garson. Li pou vinn anset enn kantite nasion. Parmi so bann desandan, ena ki pou vinn lerwa bann pep.”
17.17: Abraam prostern li bien ba. Apre sa li riye e li dir dan so leker: “Eski enn bonom 100 an kapav fer zanfan? Sara ena 90 an, eski li pou kapav vinn mama?”
17.18: Lerla Abraam dir Bondie: “Beni Ismael e les li viv dan to prezans.”
17.19: Bondie dir: “Non, to fam Sara pou donn twa enn garson. To pou apel li Izaak # 17:19 An Ebre, sa nom la vedir “Li riye.” . Mo pou etabli mo lalians avek li e avek so bann desandan apre li. Mo lalians pou dire pou touzour.
17.20: Mo finn tann to lapriyer konsernan Ismael. Mo pou beni li osi, e mo pou donn li boukou zanfan. Li pou ena enn kantite desandan. Li pou vinn papa 12 prins ek anset enn gran nasion.
17.21: Me mo lalians pou avek Izaak. Sara pou gagn li dan sa mem lepok la, lane prosenn.”
17.22: Kan Bondie fini koz avek Abraam, li ale.
17.23: Lerla, Abraam sirkonsi so garson Ismael. Li sirkonsi tou bann esklav mal ki viv kot li. Ena parmi finn ne dan so lakaz, e ena li finn aste. Sa zour la, tou bann mal sirkonsi, parey kouma Bondie finn dir Abraam.
17.24: Abraam ena 99 an kan li sirkonsi.
17.25: So garson Ismael ena 13 an kan li sirkonsi.
17.26: Abraam ek so garson Ismael sirkonsi sa zour la.
17.27: Sa mem zour la, li sirkonsi tou bann mal ki res kot li. Parmi, ena so bann esklav ki finn ne dan so lakaz ek bann ki li finn aste ar bann etranze.

18.1: LESEGNER aparet avek Abraam kot bann gran pie Mamre. Soley midi pe tap for, e Abraam pe asize dan lantre so latant.
18.2: Li lev lizie e li trouv trwa zom pe diboute pre kot li. Deswit, li galoupe depi dan lantre so latant e li al zwenn zot. Li prostern divan zot ziska so figir tous later.
18.3: Lerla li dir: “Segner, si to anvi akord mwa to faver, fer mwa plezir, vinn kot mwa, to serviter.
18.4: Les mo fer amenn inpe dilo pou lav zot lipie. Zot ava repoz zot anba pie.
18.5: Mo pou servi zot enn bout dipin pouki zot repran lafors. Apre sa zot ava kontign zot larout. Koumsa, zot pa pou finn pas kot zot serviter pou nanye.” Zot reponn: “Nou dakor, fer seki to pe dir.”
18.6: Abraam degaze al get Sara dan latant. Li dir li: “Degaze pran trwa mezir to meyer lafarinn, petri li e kwi trwa dipin.”
18.7: Lerla, li galoup dan troupo e li swazir enn zenn bef bien tann ek fondan. Li donn li enn serviter pou prepar enn bon repa.
18.8: Apresa, Abraam servi so bann viziter. Li donn zot laviann, dile fre ek dile-kaye. Zot manze, e Abraam dibout anba pie, pre kot zot.
18.9: Bann viziter la dimann Abraam: “Kot to fam Sara?” Li reponn: “Li lamem, dan latant.”
18.10: Enn parmi sa trwa la dir li: “Mo pou retourn kot twa dan mem sezon lane prosenn e to fam Sara pou ena enn garson.” Sara pe ekoute dan lantre latant, deryer Abraam.
18.11: Abraam ek Sara dan zot vie zour. Depi bien lontan Sara finn aret gagn so peryod.
18.12: Lerla Sara riye e li dir dan so leker: “Mo enn bonnfam dan laz. Anplis, mo mari osi finn vinn vie. Kouma mo pou kapav gagn sa plezir la?”
18.13: LESEGNER dimann Abraam: “Kifer Sara finn riye? Kifer li pe panse li tro vie pou gagn zanfan?
18.14: Eski ena kitsoz ki inposib pou LESEGNER? Kan letan pou arive lane prosenn, mo pou revinn kot twa, e Sara pou ena enn garson.”
18.15: Sara demanti parski li gagn per. Li dir: “Mo pa finn riye mwa.” LESEGNER reponn: “Wi, mo kone to finn riye.”
18.16: Apre zot repa, bann viziter la leve pou repran zot larout. Zot get dan direksion Sodom. Abraam fer enn bout sime avek zot.
18.17: LESEGNER dir: “Mo pa pou kasiet Abraam seki mo pou fer.
18.18: Mo kone Abraam pou vinn anset enn gran nasion ki pou bien for. Atraver li, tou bann pep lor later pou gagn benediksion.
18.19: Mo finn swazir li pou ansegn so bann zanfan ek so bann desandan obzerv mo bann komannman. Li pou montre zot pratik lazistis ek ladrwatir. Lerla mo pou realiz mo promes anver Abraam.”
18.20: Alor LESEGNER dir Abraam: “Akizasion kont Sodom ek Gomor bien grav, e zot pese orib.
18.21: Mo pou bizin desann pou verifie par momem. Mo pou kone si tou sa bann akizasion la vre ouswa fos.”
18.22: De parmi bann viziter la pran direksion Sodom. Me Abraam res la, dan prezans LESEGNER.
18.23: Lerla Abraam koste e dimann li: “Eski vremem to pou detrir bann inosan ansam ek bann koupab?
18.24: Si ena 50 bon dimoun dan sa lavil la, eski to pou detrir li kanmem? Eski to pa pou pardonn li akoz sa 50 bon dimoun la?
18.25: Non, to pa kapav fer enn zafer parey. Bann inosan pa kapav mor, ek gagn mem pinision ki bann koupab. Twa ki Ziz lor later, to pou azir dapre lazistis.”
18.26: LESEGNER reponn: “Si mo trouv 50 dimoun zis dan Sodom, mo pou pardonn lavil la antie akoz zot.”
18.27: Abraam dir li: “SEGNER, mwa ki zis lapousier ek lasann, exkiz mwa si mo oze koz avek twa.
18.28: Kapav pou mank sink dan sa 50 la. Eski to pou detrir li zis akoz mank sink?” LESEGNER reponn: “Mo pa pou detrir li si mo trouv 45 dimoun zis.”
18.29: Abraam repran laparol e li dir: “Sipoze ena 40.” Li reponn: “Si mo trouv 40 dimoun zis, mo pa pou detrir li.”
18.30: Abraam dir: “Mo sipliy twa SEGNER, pa bizin ankoler si mo koz ankor. Me li posib ki pou ena 30.” Li reponn: “Mo pa pou fer li si mo trouv 30 dimoun zis.”
18.31: Abraam dir : “Exkiz mwa si mo oze koz ankor. Ki to pou fer si ena zis 20 bon dimoun?” Li reponn: “Akoz sa 20 la mo pa pou detrir li.”
18.32: Lerla Abraam dir: “Pa ankoler SEGNER. Permet mwa koz enn dernie fwa. Kapav pou ena zis 10.” Li dir: “Akoz sa 10 la mo pa pou detrir li.”
18.33: Kan LESEGNER fini koz avek Abraam, li kontign so larout, e Abraam retourn kot li.

19.1: Ler pre pou aswar, de anz la ariv Sodom. Lot pe asize pre kot lantre lavil. Kouma li trouv zot, li leve e li al zwenn zot. Li prostern divan zot ziska so figir tous later.
19.2: Lerla li dir zot: “Mo sipliy zot, fer mwa loner vinn kot mwa, zot serviter. Zot ava lav zot lipie e dormi dan mo lakaz zordi. Dime gramatin zot ava lev boner pou kontign zot larout.” Zot reponn: “Non, nou pou pas lanwit lamem, lor laplas piblik.”
19.3: Me telman Lot insiste, zot fini par aksepte so linvitasion. Li kwi dipin san levin e li prepar enn bon repa. Lerla zot manze.
19.4: Zot pankor al dormi, kan bann zom lavil Sodom vinn antour lakaz Lot. Zot tou vini, depi pli zenn ziska pli vie.
19.5: Zot kriye Lot e zot dir: “Kot sa bann zom ki finn vinn kot twa la? Amenn zot isi pou nou viol zot.”
19.6: Lot sorti deor, e li ferm laport deryer li.
19.7: Li dir zot: “Mo sipliy zot, mo bann frer, pa fer sa pese orib la.
19.8: Mo ena de tifi ki ankor vierz. Mo pou amenn zot isi. Zot ava fer seki zot anvi avek zot. Me pa tous sa bann zom la. Mo bann invite sa, mo bizin protez zot.”
19.9: Bannla reponn: “Sorti la ale do! Tomem to enn etranze isi e to oule fer lalwa? Taler twa ki pou pey lepokase.” Zot pous Lot avek violans, e zot vini pou defons laport.
19.10: Me sa de invite la ris Lot dan lakaz, e zot ferm laport.
19.11: Lerla zot fer tou bann zom ki deor vinn aveg; depi pli piti ziska pli gran. Personn pa kapav trouv laport.
19.12: De anz la dimann Lot: “Kisannla ki res kot twa ankor? Eski to ena zann, garson, tifi oubien enn lot fami dan lavil? Fer zot tou sove ale.
19.13: LESEGNER finn avoy nou pou detrir lavil. Bann akizasion kont bann abitan Sodom bien grav.”
19.14: Lot degaze al get so bann pretan-zann, e li dir zot: “Degaze kit lavil ale, LESEGNER pou detrir li.” Me bannla pran sa an badinaz.
19.15: Kan pre pou lizour, de anz la pres Lot pou ale. Zot dir li: “Leve, pran to fam ek to de tifi ale, sinon zot pou mor ansam ek bann abitan lavil.”
19.16: Lot ankor pe ezite, me LESEGNER finn deside pou sov zot lavi. Alor de anz la ris zot par lame, e kondir zot andeor lavil.
19.17: Kan zot ariv andeor lavil, de anz la dir zot: “Ale, sov zot lavi. Pa vir deryer e pa aret okennpar. Al kasiet dan montagn, sinon zot pou mor.”
19.20: Get laba ena enn ti lavil. Li pa lwin e nou pou kapav sove al laba. Mo pa dimann zot gransoz: Permet nou al laba pou sap nou lavi.”
19.21: Enn parmi dir li: “Dakor, mo fer twa sa faver la osi. Mo pa pou detrir sa ti lavil la.
19.22: Degaze al kasiet laba. Mo pa pou kapav fer nanye tanki zot pa ansekirite laba.” Pou sa rezon la, finn apel sa lavil la Soar, ki vedir tipti.
19.23: Soley pe leve kan Lot ek so fami ariv Soar.
19.24: LESEGNER fer enn lapli souf ek dife tom lor Sodom ek Gomor.
19.25: Li detrir sa bann lavil la ek zot bann abitan. Li detrir osi tou bann plantasion dan sa rezion la.
19.26: Fam Lot get deryer e li vinn enn stati disel.
19.27: Boner gramatin, Abraam al dan landrwa kot li ti koz avek LESEGNER.
19.28: Li zet enn regar dan direksion Sodom, Gomor ek bann landrwa dan lezanviron. Li trouv zis lafime ki pe monte depi dan laplenn, parey kouma kan lerb sek finn pran dife.
19.29: Kan Bondie desid pou detrir bann lavil dan sa rezion la, Lot ti pe res laba. Me Bondie pa finn bliye promes ki li ti fer Abraam. Akoz sa, li sov Lot dan sa maler la; li epargn so lavi.
19.30: Lot gagn per pou res dan Soar. Li kit lavil la e li al dan montagn ek so de tifi. Zot res dan enn lagrot laba.
19.31: Enn zour, pli gran tifi la dir ek so ti-ser: “Nou papa pe vinn vie, e pena enn zom par isi pou marye avek nou dapre koutim.
19.32: Anou soul nou papa ar divin. Lerla, nou ava dormi avek li. Koumsa, nou ava gagn enn desandan atraver nou papa.”
19.33: Sa swar la, zot fer zot papa bwar divin ziska li sou. Lerla, premie tifi la dormi avek li. Lot pa konn nanye ki pe pase.
19.34: Landime, premie tifi la dir so ti-ser: “Yerswar mo ti dormi avek nou papa. Anou donn li divin ankor aswar. Lerla, to ava al dormi avek li. Koumsa, nou toulede kapav gagn enn desandan pou nou papa.”
19.35: Sa swar la ankor, zot fer zot papa bwar divin ziska li sou. Lerla, pli zenn tifi la al dormi avek li. Lot pa konn nanye ki pe pase.
19.36: Alor, toulede tifi tom ansint pou zot papa.
19.37: Pli gran tifi la gagn enn garson, e li apel li Moab. Limem anset bann Moabit.
19.38: Pli zenn tifi la osi gagn enn garson, e li apel li Ben-Ami. Limem anset bann Amonit.

20.1: Abraam kit landrwa kot li pe reste, e li al dan direksion dezer Negev. Li res inpe letan ant Kades ek Sour. Apre sa li al res Gerar kouma enn etranze.
20.2: Abraam dir tou dimoun ki Sara so ser. Alor, Abimelek, lerwa Soar, fer amenn Sara kot li.
20.3: Me aswar, Bondie averti Abimelek dan enn rev e dir li: “To pou mor, parski sa fam ki to finn amenn kot twa la, li enn fam marye.”
20.4: Abimelek pankor gagn relasion avek Sara. Alor, li dir: “Segner, mo pep ek mwa, nou inosan. Kifer to pou detrir nou?
20.5: Abraam, limem, finn dir mwa ki Sara so ser. Sara osi finn dir mwa ki Abraam so frer. Mo pa finn fer nanye demal. Mo konsians trankil.”
20.6: Bondie kontign koz avek li dan so rev e dir li: “Wi, mo kone to inosan. Akoz sa mo pa finn les twa tous li. Mo finn anpes twa fer sa pese la.
20.7: Asterla, rann Abraam so fam. Li enn profet; li ava priye pou twa pouki to pa mor. Me si to refiz rann li so fam, to pou mor, twa ek to pep.”
20.8: Abimelek leve bien boner gramatin. Li fer apel tou so lantouraz e li rakont zot tou seki finn pase. Bannla gagn extra per.
20.9: Lerla, Abimelek fer apel Abraam, e li dimann li: “Kifer to finn fer sa avek nou? Mo pa finn fer twa nanye demal. Me twa, to finn oule fer mwa ek mo pep komet enn gran pese. To pa ti bizin fer enn zafer parey ar mwa.
20.10: Ki finn pas dan to latet pou to fer sa?”
20.11: Abraam reponn li: “Mo ti krwar ki personn pena respe pou Bondie isi. Mo ti per tansion zot touy mwa pou pran mo fam.
20.12: Anplis, vremem li mo ser. Nou ena mem papa, me pa mem mama. Akoz sa mo finn kapav marye avek li.
20.13: Depi ki Bondie finn donn mwa lord pou kit lakaz mo papa, mo finn dimann Sara enn faver: ‘partou kot nou ale, dir ki mo to frer.’”
20.14: Apre sa, Abimelek rann li so fam. Anmemtan, li donn li mouton ek bef, serviter ek servant.
20.15: Abimelek dir Abraam: “To bienveni dan mo pei. To kapav res kot to anvi.”
20.16: Lerla, Abimelek dir Sara: “To trouve, mo finn donn to frer 1,000 pies larzan. Sa enn prev divan tou dimoun ki to inosan dan sa zafer la. Personn pa pou kapav blam twa.”

21.1: LESEGNER fer seki li ti promet Sara. Sara gagn faver LESEGNER.
21.2: Alor, li tom ansint, e li donn Abraam enn garson dan so vie zour. Sa arive dan letan ki Bondie ti finn anonse.
21.4: Abraam sirkonsi Izaak lor so wit zour, parey kouma Bondie finn komann li.
21.5: Abraam ena 100 an kan so garson Izaak ne.
21.6: Sara dir: “Bondie finn fer mwa riye ar lazwa. Tou dimoun ki pou tann sa nouvel la pou riye avek mwa.
21.7: Kisannla ti pou dir Abraam, ki enn zour, Sara ti pou donn zanfan bwar? Pourtan, mo finn donn li enn garson dan so vie zour.”
21.8: Zanfan la grandi. Zour ki Sara sevre li, Abraam fer enn gran fet.
21.9: Enn zour, Sara trouv Ismael pe zwe avek so garson Izaak # 21:9 Dan tex Ebre mank “avek so garson Izaak”. . Ismael ti sa garson ki Agar, enn servant Ezipsien, ti donn Abraam.
21.10: Lerla Sara dir Abraam: “Pous sa esklav la ek so garson. Fodepa ki so garson vinn to eritie ansam ek mo garson Izaak.”
21.11: Sa bann parol la boulvers Abraam akoz so garson.
21.12: Me Bondie dir li: “Abraam, pa pran traka akoz garson la ek to servant. Fer seki Sara finn dir twa. Izaak, limem pou donn twa bann desandan ki mo finn promet twa.
21.13: Konsernan garson to servant, mo pou fer li vinn papa enn nasion, parski li osi to zanfan.”
21.14: Abraam leve boner landime gramatin. Li donn Agar dipin ek enn gourd-lapo ranpli ek dilo. Lerla li met zanfan la lor ledo Agar e li fer zot ale. Agar ek so garson ale, e zot tourn an-ron dan dezer Berseba.
21.15: Kan finn nepli ena dilo dan so gourd-lapo, Agar abandonn so garson anba enn bwison.
21.16: Apre sa, li al asiz enn bon distans. Li dir: “Mo pa anvi trouv mo garson mor.” Lerla li plore for-for.
21.17: Bondie tann lagoni Ismael e anz Bondie apel Agar depi dan lesiel: “Agar, ki to gagne? Pa bizin per! Bondie finn tann lavwa to garson.
21.18: Lev twa! Al pran to garson e ser li for dan to lebra. Mo pou fer li vinn papa enn gran nasion.”
21.19: Lerla Bondie ouver lizie Agar e li trouv enn pwi. Li al ranpli so gourd-lapo ek dilo e li fer so garson bwar.
21.22: Sa lepok la, Abimelek ek Pikol, sef so larme, vinn get Abraam e dir li: “Bondie avek twa dan tou seki to fer.
21.23: Promet mwa divan Bondie, ki zame to pa pou fer fos avek mwa e avek mo bann desandan. Parey kouma mo finn azir bien avek twa, twa osi to pou azir bien avek mwa e avek sa pei kot to pe reste kouma enn etranze la.”
21.24: Lerla Abraam dir li: “Mo promet twa.”
21.25: Abraam fer enn konplint avek Abimelek. Bann zom Abimelek ti finn pran enn so bann pwi par lafors.
21.26: Abimelek dir li: “Premie fwa mo pe tann koz sa. Kifer to pa ti dir mwa sa depi avan. La, mo pena okenn lide kisannla finn fer sa.”
21.27: Abraam donn Abimelek mouton, kabri ek bef. Lerla toulede fer enn lalians.
21.28: Apre sa, Abraam met set mouton apar dan so troupo.
21.29: Abimelek dimann li: “Kifer to finn met sa set mouton la apar?”
21.30: Abraam reponn: “Aksepte sa set mouton la kouma enn prev ki sa pwi la pou mwa.”
21.31: Sa landrwa la apel Berseba akoz lalians ki toulede finn fer laba.
21.32: Abraam ek Abimelek fer sa lalians la dan Berseba. Apre sa, Abimelek ek Pikol, sef so larme, retourn dan pei bann Filistin.
21.33: Abraam plant enn pie tamaris dan Berseba. Laba, li invok nom LESEGNER, Bondie Eternel # 21:33 Bondie Eternel: An Ebre: “El Olam.” .
21.34: Abraam res ankor enn long letan kouma enn etranze dan pei bann Filistin.

22.1: Enn zour, Bondie teste Abraam. Li apel li, e Abraam reponn: “Wi, mo pe ekout twa.”
22.2: Bondie dir li: “Pran to garson Izaak, to sel garson ki to kontan boukou. Al dan pei Moriya, lor enn montagn ki mo pou montre twa. Laba to ava ofer mwa li kouma enn sakrifis antie.”
22.3: Abraam leve boner gramatin e li koup dibwa pou sakrifis. Li prepar so bourik pou vwayaz. Lerla li pran larout avek so garson Izaak ek de serviter. Li al dan landrwa ki Bondie finn dir li.
22.4: Lor trwaziem zour, Abraam lev lizie e li trouv landrwa la lwin divan.
22.5: Li dir ek so de serviter: “Res isi ek mo bourik. Mo garson ek mwa, nou pou al lao pou ador Bondie. Apre sa nou pou retourne.”
22.6: Abraam fer so garson Izaak sarye dibwa pou sakrifis. Limem, li amenn labrez pou alim dife ek enn kouto. Lerla toulede al ansam.
22.7: Lor sime, Izaak apel so papa, Abraam: “Papa!” Abraam reponn li: “Wi, mo garson.” Izaak dimann li: “Nou ena dibwa ek labrez pou alim dife, me kot mouton pou sakrifis antie?”
22.8: Abraam reponn: “Mo garson, Bondie pou donn tou seki neseser; limem pou donn mouton pou sakrifis antie.” Alor, toulede kontign mars ansam.
22.9: Kan zot ariv dan landrwa ki Bondie ti dir li, Abraam aranz enn lotel, e li plas dibwa lor lotel la. Lerla, li atas so garson Izaak e li met li alonze lor dibwa la.
22.10: Apre sa, Abraam pran so kouto pou egorz so garson.
22.11: Me anz LESEGNER apel Abraam depi lesiel: “Abraam, Abraam!” Abraam reponn: “Wi! Mo pe ekout twa.”
22.12: Anz la dir li: “Pa lev to lame lor sa zanfan la. Pa fer li dimal. Asterla mo kone ki vremem to respekte Bondie. To pa finn refiz mwa to garson, to sel garson.”
22.13: Abraam lev lizie e li trouv enn belye. So korn finn may dan enn bwison. Abraam al pran belye la, e ofer li kouma enn sakrifis antie dan plas so garson.
22.14: Abraam apel sa plas la ‘LESEGNER donn tou seki neseser.’ Akoz sa, ziska zordi ankor dir: lor montagn LESEGNER, li pou donn tou seki neseser # 22:14 Kapav dir osi: LESEGNER pou gete limem. .
22.15: Enn deziem fwa, anz LESEGNER apel Abraam depi lesiel.
22.16: Li dir li: “To pa finn refiz mwa to garson, to sel garson. Asterla, ekout parol LESEGNER! Mo fer twa enn promes:
22.17: Mo pou beni twa. To bann desandan pou vinn boukou kouma bann zetwal dan lesiel, e kouma bann grin disab dan bor lamer. Zot pou ranport la viktwar lor zot bann lennmi e zot pou pran bann lavil zot bann lennmi.
22.18: To finn obeir mwa. Akoz sa, tou bann nasion lor later pou gagn benediksion atraver to bann desandan.”
22.19: Apre sa, Abraam retourn kot so bann serviter ti pe atann. Zot leve, e ansam, zot pran larout pou retourn Berseba kot Abraam finn etabli.
22.20: Apre sa bann evennman la, Abraam gagn nouvel ki so frer Nahor finn gagn plizir zanfan avek Milka.
22.21: Ala nom zot bann zanfan: Premie la apel Ous. So bann frer apel Bouz, Kemouel, papa Aram,
22.22: Kesed, Azo, Pildas, Yidlaf, ek Betouel.
22.23: Betouel papa Rebeka. Nahor ek Milka ena antou wit garson.
22.24: Anplis, Nahor ena enn metres ki apel Reouma. Li finn donn li kat zanfan: Teba, Gaam, Tahas ek Maaka.

23.2: Lerla li mor dan Kiriat-Arba, setadir Hebron, dan pei Kanaan. Abraam fer dey so fam Sara e li plor so lamor.
23.3: Ariv enn ler, li lev kot lekor so fam e li al koz avek bann Itit.
23.4: Li dir zot: “Mo pe viv kouma enn etranze parmi zot. Vann enn bout terin avek mwa. Mo pou fer enn tonbo pou anter mo fam.”
23.6: “Misie, ekout nou, silteple! To enn gran sef parmi nou. Personn pa pou refiz twa enn tonbo pou anter to fam. To kapav anter li dan nou meyer tonbo.”
23.7: Abraam leve e li prostern li divan bann Itit, bann abitan sa landrwa la.
23.8: Lerla li dir zot: “Si vremem zot dakor ki mo anter mo fam isi, ekout mwa. Koz avek Efron, garson Soar, pou mwa.
23.9: Dir li donn mwa kavern Makpela ki pou li e ki trouv dan bout so terin. Mo pou pey li pri ki sa koute divan zot tou. Koumsa, mo ava posed sa terin la e mo ava fer enn tonbo laba.”
23.10: Efron lamem parmi bann Itit. Zot finn zwenn avek Abraam kot laport lavil. Lerla Efron reponn Abraam divan tou bann Itit.
23.11: Li dir: “Misie, ekout mwa, silteple! Dan prezans mo pep, mo fer twa kado sa terin la ek so kavern. To kapav anter to fam laba.”
23.12: Abraam prostern ankor enn fwa divan zot.
23.13: Lerla li dir Efron divan zot tou: “Ekout mwa, silteple! Mo pou donn twa pri ki sa terin la koute. Aksepte mo propozision, lerla mo pou anter mo fam laba.”
23.16: Abraam tom dakor avek Efron. Li pez larzan valer 400 Sekel dapre pwa ki bann marsan ti pe servi. Li donn Efron sa larzan la divan tou dimoun.
23.19: Lerla, Abraam anter so fam Sara dan kavern ki trouv lor terin Makpela. Terin la pa lwin ek Mamre, setadir Ebron, dan pei Kanaan.
23.20: Terin la ti pou bann Itit, me Abraam finn aste li avek zot e li fer enn kavo laba.

24.1: Abraam finn vinn bien vie. LESEGNER finn beni li boukou, e li finn reysi dan tou kitsoz.
24.2: Enn zour, Abraam apel so pli ansien serviter ki ansarz so lakaz. Li dir li: “Met to lame anba mo lakwis! # 24:2 Met to lame anba mo lakwis: Sa ti enn koutim dan sa lepok la kan enn dimoun ti bizin fer enn serman inportan. .
24.3: Fer enn promes lor nom LESEGNER, Bondie lesiel ek later. Promet ki zame to pa pou fer mo garson marye isi, avek enn tifi Kananeen.
24.4: To pou al dan mo pei, kot mo bann fami. Laba to pou swazir enn fam pou mo garson Izaak.”
24.5: Serviter la reponn li: “Kapav tifi la pa pou anvi swiv mwa pou vinn isi. Eski lerla mo pou bizin amenn to garson laba, dan pei kot to sorti?”
24.6: Abraam dir li: “Non, sirtou pa amenn mo garson laba.
24.7: LESEGNER, Bondie ki dan lesiel, finn fer mwa kit lakaz mo papa ek mo pei natal. Li finn koz avek mwa. Li finn promet mwa ki li pou donn mo bann desandan sa pei la. Li pou avoy so anz divan twa. To pou reysi amenn enn fam pou mo garson.
24.8: Si tifi la pa anvi swiv twa, pa pou to lafot. To pa pou gagn mo malediksion, mem si to finn fer sa serman la. Me sirtou pa amenn mo garson laba.”
24.9: Lerla, serviter la met so lame anba lakwis so met Abraam. Li fer serman pou obeir so lord.
24.10: Serviter la pran dis samo dan troupo so met. Li pran osi bann meyer kado ki so met posede. Lerla, li koumans so vwayaz pou al vilaz Nahor, dan Mezopotami.
24.11: Enn tanto, li fer so bann samo repoze kot enn pwi ki trouv zis andeor vilaz. Sa ler lamem, bann fam al sers dilo dan pwi.
24.12: Serviter la priye: “SEGNER, Bondie ki mo met Abraam adore, permet mwa fer enn bon rankont zordi. Montre to gran lamour pou mo met Abraam.
24.13: Mo pe dibout pre kot sa pwi la. Bann tifi pou sorti dan vilaz pou vinn sers dilo.
24.14: Mo pou koz avek enn parmi zot. Mo pou dimann li inpe dilo pou bwar. Si li dir mwa: ‘Bwar, apre sa mo pou donn to bann samo osi bwar’, mo pou kone ki limem to finn swazir pou to serviter Izaak. Sa pou enn prev to gran lamour pou mo met.”
24.15: Avan mem ki serviter la fini priye, enn zennfi vinn sers dilo ek so seo dan so lame. Li apel Rebeka, tifi Betouel. Betouel garson Milka ek Nahor, frer Abraam.
24.16: Zennfi la extra zoli, e li ankor vierz. Li al ranpli so seo dan pwi.
24.17: Lerla, serviter la galoupe al zwenn li e dir li: “Silteple, donn mwa inpe dilo pou bwar.”
24.18: Zennfi la dir li: “Bwar Misie!” Li vers so seo lor so lame pou fer li bwar.
24.19: Kan li fini donn li dilo, li dir serviter la: “Asterla mo pou al tir dilo pou to bann samo. Mo pou donn zot tou bwar kantite zot anvi.”
24.20: Li degaze vers dilo dan basin ki servi pou fer zanimo bwar. Apre, li al replin so seo ankor plizir fwa, pouki tou samo gagn ase bwar.
24.21: Pandan sa letan la, serviter la pe obzerv li ansilans. Li anvi kone si vremem LESEGNER finn fer so vwayaz vinn enn reysit.
24.22: Kan tou bann samo finn fini bwar, serviter la donn Rebeka enn pouli ek de brasle lor. Pouli la pez apepre sis gram, e bann brasle la pez apepre 100 gram sakenn.
24.23: Lerla li dimann li: “Kisannla to papa? Eski ena ase plas kot li pou mwa ek mo bann zom pas lanwit?”
24.24: Li reponn: “Mwa, mo tifi Betouel, garson Milka ek Nahor.
24.25: Kot mo papa ena ase plas pou zot pas lanwit. Nou ena osi lapay ek lerb pou zot zanimo.”
24.26: Serviter la azenou e li loue LESEGNER.
24.27: Li dir: “Mo remersi twa SEGNER, Bondie mo met Abraam! To finn montre to gran lamour ek to fidelite anver mo met. LESEGNER finn kondir mwa kot bann fami mo met.”
24.28: Lerla, Rebeka galoup lakaz so mama pou rakont seki finn arive.
24.31: Li dir li: “Vinn avek mwa, twa ki LESEGNER finn beni! Kifer to pe res isi? Mo finn fini fer prepar lakaz pou twa ek to bann zom. Ena osi enn plas pou to bann samo.”
24.32: Serviter la al kot Laban. Laban fer tir bagaz lor bann samo, e donn zot lapay ek lerb. Lerla zot amenn dilo pou serviter Abraam ek so bann zom lav zot lipie.
24.33: Apre sa, Laban fer amenn manze pou zot. Me serviter Abraam dir: “Mo pa pou kapav manze tanki mo pa dir seki mo ena pou dir.” Laban dir li: “To kapav koze.”
24.34: Alor, li koumans rakonte: “Mo enn serviter Abraam.
24.35: LESEGNER finn beni mo met boukou e li finn fer li vinn bien ris. Li finn donn li boukou troupo zanimo, larzan ek lor, samo ek bourik, serviter ek servant.
24.36: Sara, so defen fam, finn donn li enn garson dan so vie zour. Li finn donn so garson Izaak tou so dibien.
24.37: Mo met finn obliz mwa fer sa serman la: ‘Zame to pa fer mo garson marye avek enn fam Kananeenn, isi dan sa pei la.
24.38: Me, al lakaz mo papa, kot mo bann fami, pou swazir enn fam pou mo garson.’
24.39: Mo ti dir mo met: ‘Kapav tifi la pa pou anvi swiv mwa.’
24.40: Li ti dir mwa: ‘Mo mars avek LESEGNER. Li pou avoy so anz divan twa, e li pou fer twa reysi dan to vwayaz. To pou trouv enn fam pou mo garson kot mo bann fami, lakaz mo papa.
24.41: Si to al kot mo bann fami, to pou realiz to par dan serman ki to finn fer. Si zot refiz twa tifi la, pa twa ki pou responsab. To serman pou anile.’
24.42: Zordi, kan mo ti ariv kot zot pwi, mo ti priye: ‘SEGNER, Bondie mo met Abraam, fer mwa reysi dan mo vwayaz.
24.43: Mo pe dibout pre kot sa pwi la. Si enn zennfi vinn sers dilo, mo pou dimann li inpe dilo pou bwar.
24.44: Si li donn mwa bwar, e si li ofer pou donn mo bann samo osi bwar, mo pou kone limem LESEGNER finn swazir pou marye avek garson mo met.’
24.45: Mo pa ti ankor fini priye, Rebeka ti vini ek so seo dan so lame. Li ti al tir dilo dan pwi. Lerla, mo ti dimann li dilo pou bwar.
24.46: Deswit, li ti vers so seo e li ti dir mwa: ‘Bwar, apre mo pou donn to bann samo osi bwar.’ Mo finn bwar, e apre sa, li finn fer mo bann samo bwar.
24.47: Lerla mo ti dimann li: ‘Kisannla to papa?’ Li ti reponn: ‘Mwa tifi Betouel, garson Nahor ek Milka.’ Lerlamem, mo ti met enn pouli lor so nene ek de brasle dan so pwagne.
24.48: Apre sa mo ti azenou pou ador LESEGNER. Mo ti remersi LESEGNER, Bondie mo met Abraam. Li ti finn kondir mwa kot bann fami mo met, e mo finn trouv enn tifi pou marye ek so garson.
24.49: Asterla, dir mwa si zot pou montre zot lamitie ek zot fidelite anver mo met. Sinon mo pou bizin al dan enn lot direksion.”
24.50: Lerla, Laban ek Betouel reponn: “LESEGNER, limem finn swazire. Nou pa kapav dir nanye.
24.51: Ala Rebeka divan twa. Amenn li avek twa. Li ava marye avek garson to met, parey kouma LESEGNER finn dir.”
24.52: Kan serviter Abraam tann zot repons, li azenou pou remersi LESEGNER.
24.53: Lerla, li donn Rebeka bann bizou larzan ek lor, ek bann zoli linz. Li donn osi so frer ek so mama bann kado gran-gran valer.
24.54: Apre sa, serviter Abraam ek so bann zom manze-bwar. Lerla zot al dormi. Landime gramatin, serviter Abraam dir frer Rebeka ek so mama: “Les mo retourn kot mo met aster.”
24.55: Zot reponn li: “Les tifi la res avek nou ankor inpe letan; omwin dis zour. Lerla li ava al avek twa.”
24.56: Me serviter la dir zot: “Pa retard mwa, LESEGNER limem finn fer mwa reysi mo vwayaz. Les mwa al get mo met aster.”
24.57: Bannla reponn: “Anou apel Rebeka e dimann li si li dakor.”
24.58: Vremem, zot apel Rebeka e zot dimann li: “Eski to pou al avek sa misie la zordi mem?” Li reponn: “Wi, mo pou ale.”
24.59: Alor, zot dakor pou les Rebeka ale avek so servant. Serviter Abraam ek so bann zom prepare pou pran larout avek zot.
24.60: Avan Rebeka ale, lafami beni li ek sa bann parol la: “Twa, nou ti-ser, To pou vinn anset boukou dimoun. To bann desandan ava pran lavil zot bann lennmi.”
24.61: Lerla, Rebeka ek so bann servant mont lor samo. Zot pran larout ansam avek serviter Abraam ek so bann zom.
24.62: Sa letan la, Izaak ti finn kite kot pwi Lahai-Roi. Aster li pe res dan rezion Negev.
24.63: Enn tanto, Izaak pe mars-marse dan lakanpagn. Ler li lev lizie, li trouv bann samo pe vini.
24.64: Rebeka trouv Izaak pe vini delwin. Li degaze desann lor so samo.
24.65: Li dimann serviter la: “Get enn zom pe vini laba dan karo, kisannla sa?” Serviter la reponn: “Limem mo met Izaak.” Kouma Rebeka tann sa, li pran so vwal e li kouver so figir.
24.66: Serviter la rakont Izaak tou seki finn pase.
24.67: Lerla Izaak amenn Rebeka dan latant Sara, so defen mama. Izaak kontan Rebeka, e li pran li pou so fam. Ala ki manier Izaak gagn konsolasion apre lamor so mama.

25.1: Abraam pran enn lot fam ki apel Ketoura.
25.2: Li donn li sis zanfan: Zimrann, Yoksann, Medann, Madian, Isbak ek Soua.
25.3: Yoksann papa Seba ek Dedann. Plitar, Dedann vinn anset bann Asourit, bann Letousit ek bann Leoumit.
25.4: Bann zanfan Madian apel Efa, Efer, Anok, Abida ek Elda. Tousala bann desandan Ketoura.
25.5: Abraam fer Izaak vinn so eritie.
25.6: Li donn bann zanfan Agar ek Ketoura bann kado. Apre sa, li fer zot al res dan bann pei les, lwin ek so garson Izaak.
25.8: Li rann so dernie soupir e li mor apre enn vieyes ere.
25.9: So bann garson, Izaak ek Ismael, anter li dan kavern Makpela. Sa kavern la trouv dan les Mamre. Li lor terin Efron, garson Soar, enn Itit.
25.10: Abraam ti aste sa terin la avek bann Itit kan li ti ankor vivan. Bannla anter Abraam akote so fam Sara.
25.11: Bondie beni Izaak apre lamor so papa Abraam. Izaak al res pre kot pwi Lahai-Roi.
25.12: Ala lalis bann desandan Ismael, garson Abraam. So mama apel Agar, enn Ezipsienn, servant Sara.
25.13: Ala nom bann garson Ismael depi pli gran ziska pli tipti: Nebayot, Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
25.15: Hadad, Tema, Yetour, Nafis, ek Kedma.
25.16: Sa douz lamem bann garson Ismael. Zot vinn bann sef dan zot tribi. Zot donn zot vilaz zot prop nom.
25.17: Ismael ena 137 an kan li rann so dernie soupir e li mor.
25.18: So bann zanfan res dan bann rezion ant Avila ek Sour. Sa bann rezion la pre ar Lezip, dan direksion Asiri. Zot res lwin ar bann lezot desandan Abraam.
25.20: Izaak ena 40 an kan li marye avek Rebeka. Papa Rebeka apel Betouel, enn abitan Padann-Aram. Frer Rebeka apel Laban. Betouel ek so garson Laban enn bann Arameen.
25.21: Rebeka pa kapav gagn zanfan. Alor, Izaak priye LESEGNER pou li. LESEGNER ekzos so lapriyer, e Rebeka tom ansint.
25.22: Bann zanfan Rebeka lager dan so vant. Sa fer Rebeka dekouraze, e li dir: “Si sa pou koumsa, kifer mo ti bizin tom ansint?” Lerla li al priye LESEGNER pou li gagn enn repons.
25.23: LESEGNER reponn li: “Ena de nasion dan to vant, To pou donn nesans de pep diferan. Enn ladan pou pli for. Seki pli gran pou servi seki pli zenn.”
25.24: Kan ler arive pou Rebeka akouse, li gagn zimo.
25.25: Premie tibaba la rouz e so lekor kouver ar pwal. Alor zot apel li Ezai # 25:25 Dan langaz Ebre, Ezai vedir “kouver ar pwal”. .
25.26: Letan so frer ne, so lame pe trap talon Ezai. Alor zot apel li Zakob. Izaak ena 60 an kan zot ne.
25.27: De garson la grandi. Ezai vinn enn gran saser. Li pas so letan dan bwa. Zakob enn zom trankil. Li prefer res dan latant.
25.28: Izaak ena enn preferans pou Ezai. Li kontan manz zanimo ki Ezai lasas. Me Rebeka prefer Zakob.
25.29: Enn zour, Zakob pe kwi enn bon lasoup. Anmemtan, Ezai sorti lasas e li bien fatige.
25.30: Li dir Zakob: “Les mo manz inpe to lasoup rouz. Mo pe gagn extra fin.” Ala ki manier Ezai gagn nom Edom, setadir rouz.
25.31: Zakob dir li: “Vann to drwa premie garson avek mwa avan.”
25.32: Ezai reponn: “Mo pre pou mordefin. Ki mo pou fer ek mo drwa premie garson?”
25.33: Zakob dir li: “Fer enn serman avan.” Alor, Ezai fer serman e li donn Zakob so drwa premie garson.
25.34: Lerla, Zakob donn Ezai dipin ek lasoup lanti. Ezai manze-bwar, apre li ale. Li pa kas latet ek so drwa premie garson.

26.1: Ena enn lafaminn dan pei. Li pa mem lafaminn ki ti ena dan lepok Abraam. Izaak al Gerar, kot Abimelek, lerwa bann Filistin.
26.2: LESEGNER aparet avek Izaak e dir li: “Pa bizin al Lezip. Al res dan pei ki mo pou montre twa.
26.3: Res laba kouma enn etranze. Mo pou avek twa, e mo pou beni twa. Mo pou donn twa ek to bann desandan tou sa later la. Samem mo ti promet to papa Abraam; mo pou respekte mo promes.
26.4: To bann desandan pou vinn boukou, kouma bann zetwal dan lesiel. Tou sa later la pou vinn pou zot. Tou bann nasion lor later pou gagn benediksion atraver zot,
26.5: parski Abraam ti ekout mo lavwa. Li ti gard mo bann komannman e li ti obeir mo lord, mo lalwa ek mo bann exizans.”
26.7: Kan bann zom dan landrwa kestionn li lor Rebeka, li dir zot: “Mo ser sa.” Li pa oze dir ki Rebeka so fam. Izaak per tansion kikenn touy li akoz Rebeka, telman li enn zoli fam.
26.8: Izaak res laba enn bon lepok. Enn zour, Abimelek, lerwa bann Filistin, get par lafnet. Li trouv Izaak ek so fam Rebeka pe exprim zot lamour.
26.9: Deswit, Abimelek fer apel Izaak e dir li: “Rebeka to fam sa, pa vre? Kifer to finn dir nou li to ser?” Izaak reponn: “Mo ti gagn per tansion kikenn touy mwa akoz li.”
26.10: Lerla Abimelek dir li: “Kifer to finn fer sa ar nou? Ankor inpe, enn zom ti kapav dormi avek to fam. Sa ti pou rann nou koupab.”
26.11: Lerla, Abimelek warning lepep: “Si kikenn tous sa zom la, oubien so fam, li pou perdi so lavi.”
26.12: Sa mem lane la, Izaak koumans plante dan sa pei la. LESEGNER beni li e li rekolte 100 fwa plis ki seki li seme.
26.13: Izaak prospere deplizanpli e li vinn bien ris.
26.14: Li ena boukou troupo zanimo, ek boukou serviter ek servant. Alor, bann Filistin zalou li.
26.15: Zot bous tou bann pwi ki so papa Abraam ti fer fouye kan li ti ankor vivan.
26.16: Ler Abimelek trouv tousala, li dir Izaak: “Kit nou landrwa ale. To finn vinn tro for pou nou.”
26.17: Alor, Izaak kit sa landrwa la, e li al res dan vale Gerar.
26.18: Li fer debous bann pwi ki ti fouye dan lepok so papa Abraam. Bann Filistin ti finn bous zot apre lamor Abraam. Izaak donn bann pwi la mem nom ki so papa ti donn zot avan.
26.19: Enn zour, bann serviter Izaak fouy enn pwi dan vale, e zot trouv enn lasours dilo.
26.20: Ler bann berze Gerar trouv sa, zot vinn lev diskision ar bann berze Izaak. Zot dir: “Nou dilo sa.” Akoz sa bann diskision la, Izaak apel sa pwi la Esek, ki vedir dispit.
26.21: Lerla bann serviter Izaak fouy enn lot pwi. Bann berze Gerar vinn lev lager ankor enn fwa. Izaak apel sa pwi la Sitna, ki vedir opozision.
26.22: Izaak al inpe pli lwin pou fouy enn trwaziem pwi. Sann fwa la, personn pa vinn lev lager. Alor Izaak apel sa pwi la Reobot, ki vedir plas lib. Izaak dir: “Asterla, LESEGNER finn fer plas pou nou. Nou pou prospere dan sa pei la.”
26.23: Izaak kit sa landrwa la, e li al Berseba.
26.24: Sa swar la, LESEGNER aparet avek li e dir li: “Momem Bondie to papa Abraam. Pa bizin to per. Mo pou avek twa e mo pou beni twa. Mo pou donn twa boukou desandan akoz mo serviter Abraam.”
26.25: Alor, Izaak aranz enn lotel laba e li invok nom LESEGNER. Li dres so latant laba e so bann serviter fouy enn pwi.
26.26: Letan Izaak pe res Berseba, Abimelek sorti Gerar e vinn kot li. Li amenn avek li so konseye Ahouzat, ek Pikol, sef so larme.
26.27: Izaak dir zot: “Kifer zot vinn kot mwa kan zot pa kontan mwa? Pa zotmem ti pous mwa kot zot?”
26.28: Lerla zot dir li: “Nou oblize rekonet ki LESEGNER avek twa. Nou panse li ti pou bon si ti ena enn lakor ant twa ek nou. Anou fer enn lalians!
26.29: Promet ki to pa pou fer nou ditor. Nou osi nou pa finn fer twa ditor. Okontrer, nou finn tret twa bien, e nou finn les twa al anpe. Asterla, LESEGNER pe beni twa boukou.”
26.30: Sa zour la, Izaak prepar enn gran repa pou zot, e zot manze-bwar.
26.31: Landime gramatin, zot lev boner. Sakenn pret serman, e zot fer enn lalians. Lerla Izaak dir zot orevwar, e zot al anpe.
26.32: Sa mem zour la, bann serviter Izaak vinn donn li enn bon nouvel: “Nou finn trouv dilo dan pwi ki nou ti pe fouye!”
26.33: Izaak apel sa pwi la Siba, ki vedir serman. Ala kifer ziska zordi ankor apel sa lavil la Berseba # 26:33 Berseba: Pwi serman. .
26.34: Kan Ezai gagn 40 an, li marye avek Zidit, tifi Beri, enn Itit. Ezai marye osi avek Basmat, tifi Elon. Li osi enn Itit.
26.35: Sa de la rann lavi Izaak ek Rebeka amer.

27.1: Izaak finn vinn enn vie bonom; so lizie finn abime e li preske aveg. Li fer apel Ezai, so premie garson. Li dir li: “Mo garson.” Ezai reponn: “Mo lamem papa.”
27.2: Izaak dir li: “To kone ki asterla mo finn vinn vie. Mo pa kone komie letan mo reste pou viv.
27.3: Pran to bann lekipman lasas, to sak ek to fles. Al lasas enn zanimo dan bwa.
27.4: Lerla, prepar enn bon repa kouma mo kontan. Apre sa, amenn li pou mo manze. Kan mo fini manze, mo pou donn twa mo benediksion avan mo mor.”
27.5: Rebeka finn tann Izaak koz avek so garson Ezai. Ezai al dan bwa pou lasas enn zanimo pou so papa.
27.6: Lerla, Rebeka dir so garson Zakob: “Mo finn tann to papa koz avek to frer Ezai.
27.7: Li finn dir li: ‘Amenn enn zanimo e prepar enn bon repa pou mo manze. Apre, mo pou beni twa divan LESEGNER avan mo mor.’
27.8: Asterla, mo garson, ekout mwa bien e obeir mwa!
27.9: Al dan troupo e amenn de zoli ti-kabri pou mwa. Mo pou prepar enn bon repa kouma to papa kontan.
27.10: Kan mo fini kwi, to ava al donn to papa manze. Lerla, li pou donn twa so benediksion avan li mor.”
27.11: Me Zakob dir so mama: “To konn bien ki mo frer Ezai ena boukou pwal lor so lekor, e mwa non.
27.12: Si mo papa trap mo lame, li pou kone mo pe anbet li. Lerla, olie li donn mwa so benediksion, li pou donn mwa malediksion.”
27.13: So mama dir li: “Malediksion la ava tom lor mwa, mo garson. Zis fer seki mo finn dir twa e amenn bann ti-kabri la.”
27.14: Zakob obeir e li al sers zot pou so mama. So mama prepar enn bon repa, parey kouma Izaak kontan.
27.15: Rebeka pran pli bon linz so premie garson Ezai e li fer Zakob met lor li.
27.16: Rebeka kouver lame ek likou Zakob avek lapo bann ti-kabri la.
27.17: Lerla li donn Zakob sa bon manze la, avek dipin ki li finn prepare.
27.18: Zakob rant kot so papa e li dir: “Papa!” Li reponn: “Wi mo garson! Mo pe ekout twa. Me dir mwa lekel mo garson to ete.”
27.19: Zakob dir so papa: “Mwa sa, Ezai, to gran garson. Mo finn fer seki to ti finn dir mwa. Asterla, asize e manz sa bon laviann ki mo finn prepare pou twa la. Apre sa to ava donn mwa to benediksion.”
27.20: Izaak dir li: “Kouma to finn gagn zanimo la vit koumsa mo garson?” Zakob reponn: “LESEGNER to Bondie finn fer mwa reysi.”
27.21: Lerla Izaak dir Zakob: “Vinn pre ar mwa mo garson. Les mwa tous twa pou mo kone si tomem mo garson Ezai.”
27.22: Zakob koste ek so papa e Izaak tous so lame. Lerla li dir: “Koumadir lavwa Zakob, me lame Ezai.”
27.25: Alor, Izaak dir li: “Servi mwa, mo garson. Les mo manz sa bon laviann la. Apre, mo pou donn twa mo benediksion.” Zakob donn li manze. Li amenn osi inpe divin, e so papa bwar.
27.26: Kan Izaak fini manze, li dir Zakob: “Vinn anbras to papa, mo garson.”
27.27: Zakob koste, e li anbras so papa. Izaak santi loder so linz. Lerla li beni li par sa bann parol la: “A, mo garson, to loder parey kouma enn zardin ki LESEGNER finn beni.
27.28: Bondie ava donn twa lapli ki sorti dan lesiel, e rekolt ki sorti dan later, manze ek bwar anabondans.
