47.5: Lerla, Faraon dir Zozef: “To papa ek to bann frer finn vinn kot twa.
47.6: Pei Lezip antie divan twa. To kapav fer zot res dan meyer landrwa. Pena problem si zot res dan Gosenn. Anplis, si to trouve ki ena bann dimoun serye parmi zot, met zot ansarz mo prop troupo.”
47.7: Apre sa, Zozef prezant Faraon so papa Zakob. Zakob salye Faraon avek enn gran respe.
47.8: Lerla, Faraon dimann Zakob: “Ki laz to ena?”
47.9: Zakob reponn: “Ena 130 an depi ki mo lor later. Mo finn touzour bizin deplase dan plizir landrwa, kouma enn etranze. Mo bann anset osi ti bizin deplase kouma bann etranze. Pourtan, zot finn viv boukou pli lontan ki mwa. Mo lavi finn pas vit, e mo finn konn boukou difikilte.”
47.10: Zakob salye Faraon ankor enn fwa, apre li sorti.
47.11: Zozef fer seki Faraon finn dir. Li fer so papa ek so bann frer res dan rezion Ramses, meyer landrwa dan Lezip. Li mem fer zot vinn propriyeter zot terin.
47.12: Zozef nouri so papa, so bann frer, ek tou zot fami. Li donn zot manze dapre kantite dimoun ki ena dan zot lakaz.
47.13: Lafaminn terib e pena manze dan plizir pei. Dan Lezip ek dan Kanaan, bann dimoun pe koumans deperi.
47.14: Zot vinn aste dible ar Zozef. Ala ki manier Zozef ramas tou larzan dan Lezip ek dan Kanaan. Li depoz sa larzan la kot Faraon.
47.15: Ariv enn letan, larzan bann Ezipsien ek bann Kananeen fini. Tou bann Ezipsien vinn get Zozef. Zot dir li: “Donn nou manze. Pa les nou mor divan twa, zis parski nou nepli ena kas.”
47.16: Zozef dir zot: “Si zot nepli ena kas, donn mwa zot bann zanimo. Anretour, mo pou donn zot manze.”
47.17: Alor, zot amenn zot bann zanimo ar Zozef. Li donn zot dible kont zot seval, zot bef, zot mouton, zot kabri ek zot bourik. Toutlong lane, Zozef donn zot manze kont zot bann zanimo.
47.18: Lane swivan, zot revinn get Zozef e zot dir li: “Misie Gouverner, kouma to kone, nou nepli ena kas. Nou bann zanimo deza pou twa asterla. Nou nepli ena nanye, sof noumem ek nou bann terin.
47.19: Kifer nou bizin mor divan twa? Nou bann terin pou res abandone. Aste nou ek nou bann terin, e donn nou manze. Nou ava vinn esklav Faraon, e li ava servi nou bann terin. Donn nou dible. Lerla nou pa pou mor, e nou terin pa pou abandone.”
47.20: Ala ki manier Zozef aste tou bann terin dan Lezip pou Faraon. Lafaminn telman grav, ki tou dimoun vann zot terin. Alor, Faraon vinn propriyeter tou bann terin dan Lezip.
47.21: Depi enn bout Lezip ziska lot bout, tou dimoun vinn esklav Faraon.
47.22: Zis terin bann pret ki Zozef pa kapav aste. Ena enn lalwa dan zot faver. Faraon donn zot enn pansion pou zot manze. Akoz sa, zot pa bizin vann zot terin.
47.23: Enn zour, Zozef koz avek popilasion Lezip e li dir zot: “Zot kone ki mo finn aste zot ek zot terin pou Faraon. Asterla, mo pou donn zot semans pou zot plante.
47.24: Me kan zot rekolte, zot bizin donn Faraon 20 poursan zot rekolt. Zot kapav gard leres pou semans e pou nouri zot fami.”
47.25: Zot dir li: “Misie Gouverner, to finn bon anver nou, e to finn sap nou lavi. Nou dakor pou vinn esklav Faraon.”
47.26: Alor, Zozef fer enn lalwa ki ankor existe ziska zordi: Dan Lezip, 20 poursan tou bann rekolt bizin vinn pou Faraon. Zis terin bann pret ki pa vinn pou Faraon.
47.27: Bann Izraelit pe res dan rezion Gosenn, dan Lezip. Zot vinn propriyeter terin e zot gagn boukou zanfan.
47.28: Zakob res 17 an dan Lezip. Li viv antou 147 an.
47.29: Kan Zakob santi lamor aprose, li fer apel Zozef, e li dir li: “Si vremem to kontan mwa, montre mwa to lamour ek to fidelite. Met to lame anba mo lakwis # 47:29 Get sapit 24 verse 2, ek so not. e fer serman ki to pa pou anter mwa dan Lezip.
47.30: Kan mo mor to ava amenn mo lekor andeor Lezip. To ava al anter mwa dan tonbo mo bann anset.” Zozef reponn li: “Mo pou fer seki to finn dir, papa.”
47.31: Me Zakob dir li: “Promet mwa!” Zozef promet li. Lerla, Zakob prosterne kot dosie so lili.

48.1: Enn zour, Zozef gagn nouvel ki so papa malad. Li pran so de garson, Manase ek Efraim, e li al get so papa.
48.2: Bannla dir Zakob ki Zozef finn vinn get li. Li fer enn gran zefor e li asiz lor so lili.
48.3: Li dir Zozef: “Bondie Toupwisan ti aparet avek mwa dan Louz, dan pei Kanaan. Li ti beni mwa.
48.4: Li ti dir mwa: ‘Mo pou donn twa boukou desandan. To pou vinn anset enn gran nasion. Mo pou donn to bann desandan sa pei la pou touzour.’”
48.5: Zakob azoute: “To finn gagn de garson dan Lezip avan ki mo vinn kot twa. Zordi mo konsider Efraim ek Manase kouma mo prop zanfan, parey kouma Riben ek Simeon.
48.6: Bann zanfan ki to pou gagne apre zot, pou res pou twa. Zot ava gagn enn par dan teritwar zot de gran frer.
48.7: Enn zour, mo ti pe sorti Padann-Aram, pou al Efrata dan Kanaan. Zis avan nou ti ariv laba, to mama Rasel ti mor divan mwa. Mo ti anter li laba, dan bor larout Efrata, setadir Betleem.”
48.8: Lerla, lizie Zakob tap lor bann zanfan Zozef. Li dimande: “Pou ki sa bann zanfan la?”
48.9: Zozef reponn so papa: “Mo de garson ki Bondie finn donn mwa isi, dan Lezip.” Zakob dir li: “Fer zot koste ar mwa, pou mo beni zot.”
48.10: Zakob vie, e li pa trouv bien kler. Zozef fer so de garson koste ar li. Zakob ser zot dan so lebra e li anbras zot.
48.11: Lerla, li dir Zozef: “Mo pa ti krwar si enn zour mo pou retrouv twa. Me Bondie finn permet mwa trouv to bann zanfan osi.”
48.12: Zozef tir so bann garson lor zenou so papa. Lerla, li prostern divan so papa.
48.13: Apre, li trap lame so de garson. Efraim dan so lame drwat, kote gos Zakob. Manase dan so lame gos, kote drwat Zakob. Zozef fer zot apros ar Zakob ankor enn fwa.
48.14: Me kan Zakob beni zot, li fer so lame krwaze. Li poz so lame drwat lor latet Efraim ki pli zenn. E li poz so lame gos lor latet Manase ki pli gran.
48.15: Lerla, li beni Zozef par sa bann parol la: “Bondie ki mo granper Abraam ek mo papa Izaak ti adore, Bondie ki finn touzour mo berze depi ki mo finn ne ziska zordi,
48.16: e anz ki finn tir mwa dan tou danze, beni sa de zanfan la! Zot ava gard mo nom vivan, Parey kouma nom mo granper Abraam, ek mo papa Izaak. Bondie ava donn zot boukou desandan lor later.”
48.17: Zozef remarke ki so papa finn met so lame drwat lor latet Efraim. Li pa kontan. Li trap lame drwat so papa pou met lor latet Manase.
48.18: Li dir so papa: “To pe fer erer, papa! Ala pli gran la isi. Met to lame drwat lor so latet.”
48.19: Me so papa refize, e dir li: “Mo kone kisannla pli gran mo garson. Bann desandan Manase pou vinn enn gran pep. Me Efraim pou vinn pli gran ki li. So bann desandan pou form plizir nasion.”
48.20: Sa zour la, Zakob donn zot so benediksion e li dir: “Bann Izraelit pou servi zot nom pou pronons bann benediksion. Zot pou dir: ‘Bondie beni twa, Kouma li ti beni Efraim ek Manase.’” Ala ki manier Zakob sit nom Efraim avan Manase.
48.21: Apre sa, li dir Zozef: “Mo ler pre pou arive. Me Bondie pou avek zot. Li pou fer zot retourn dan pei mo bann anset.
48.22: Mwa, mo donn twa enn pli gran par ki to bann frer. Mo donn twa rezion Sikem. Mo ti pran sa lavil la avek bann Amorit par lafors mo lepe ek mo fles.”

49.1: Zakob fer apel so bann garson e li dir zot: “Rasanble zot! Mo pou fer zot konn zot lavenir.
49.2: Vinn ansam, ekout mwa, zanfan Zakob, Ekout zot papa Izrael!
49.3: Twa Riben, mo premie zanfan, Mo premie fri kan mo ti ankor portan. To depas to bann frer par to kouraz ek to pwisans.
49.4: To azite kouma dilo larivier, me aster to pou nepli premie. To finn perdi tou to loner parski to ti dormi avek mo fam, anplis, lor mo prop lili.
49.5: Simeon ek Levi, zot bann vre frer. Zot tom dakor pou fer lager.
49.6: Me mo pa pou pran par dan zot plan; Pou sa, zame mo pou ena letan. Wi, dan zot koler, zot finn touy dimoun, pou zot plezir, zot finn bles toro.
49.7: Mo modi zot koler, ek zot move karakter. Mo pou separ zot desandan dan Izrael, Mo pou dispers zot partou dan pei.
49.8: Zida, to bann frer pou onor twa, Zot pou prostern divan twa. To pou ranport laviktwar lor to bann lennmi.
49.9: Zida, mo garson, to kouma enn zenn lion ki sorti lasas e ki finn bien manze. Li rant dan so reper, li kas so pares e li dormi. Kisannla pou oze vinn deranz li?
49.10: Pouvwar rwayal pou res touzour dan fami Zida. Baton sef pou res dan lame bann desandan Zida, Ziska ki enn gran lerwa leve, Kikenn ki lepep pou respekte.
49.11: So karo rezin pou telman ranpli, ki li pa pou ezite pou atas so bourik dan pie rezin. Li pa pou per pou atas so ti-bourik dan meyer brans rezin. Li pou lav so linz dan divin, e so palto dan zi rezin.
49.12: So lizie pou vinn rouz ar labondans divin, so ledan pou blansi ar labondans dile.
49.13: Zabilon pou res dan bor lamer; li pou enn lepor pou bann bato. So teritwar pou al ziska Sidon.
49.14: Isakar solid kouma enn bourik, Li dormi dan so park, antoure ar doub miray.
49.15: Li trouv landrwa la bon, e pei la agreab. Li finn ofer so zepol pou sarye fardo, Li finn aksepte fer enn travay esklav.
49.16: Dann pou gouvern so pep, Parey kouma bann lezot tribi Izrael.
49.17: Dann kouma enn serpan lor larout, enn viper lor sime. Serpan la mord lapat seval, e so kavalie tonbe.
49.18: SEGNER, mo pe atann to delivrans!
49.19: Gad, bann bandi pou atak li, me li pou riposte, e pourswiv zot.
49.20: Aser pou prodwir manze anabondans, Li pou rekolte bann prodwi dign pou lerwa.
49.21: Neftali kouma enn gazel dan lanatir; li gagn bann zoli piti.
49.22: Zozef kouma enn zarb bien ver ki pous pre kot enn larivier. So bann brans al ziska lot kote miray.
49.23: Bann lennmi finn tir kout fles lor li, Zot finn provok li, zot finn fatig li.
49.24: Me li finn tini ferm, ek so zarm dan so lame. So lebra ek so lame pa finn tranble, par lafors Bondie Zakob, Berze ek Protekter Izrael.
49.25: Bondie to papa pou protez twa. Bondie Toupwisan pou beni twa. Li ava donn twa benediksion lapli ki sorti lao dan lesiel, ek dilo lasours ki sorti anba later. Li pou donn twa boukou zanfan, e to bann troupo pou ogmante boukou.
49.26: Zozef, benediksion to papa depas bienfe bann montagn ki existe depi touzour. Li pli ris ki rises bann kolinn eternel. Sa benediksion la ava vers lor latet Zozef, Parmi so bann frer, limem sef.
49.27: Benzamin kouma enn loulou feros; gramatin li devor so viktim, Tanto li partaz leres.”
49.28: Samem bann parol ki Zakob dir so bann garson kan li beni zot. Li donn sakenn enn benediksion spesial. So bann garson form 12 tribi Izrael.
49.29: Apre sa, Zakob dir zot so dernie volonte: “Kan mo mor, anter mwa dan tonbo mo bann anset. Li enn kavern ki trouv lor terin Efron, enn Itit.
49.30: Zot pou trouv li dan Makpela, pre ar Mamre, dan pei Kanaan. Abraam ti aste sa terin la avek Efron pou li fer enn tonbo laba.
49.31: Abraam ek so fam Sara anter laba, parey kouma Izaak ek so fam Rebeka. Momem, mo finn anter mo fam Lea laba.
49.32: Abraam ti aste sa terin la ek so kavern avek bann Itit.”
49.33: Kan Zakob fini koz ar so bann garson, li alonz lor so lili. Lerla, li rann so dernie soupir, e li al rezwenn so bann anset dan lamor.

50.1: Zozef degaze may so papa, li anbras li lor so figir e li plore for-for.
50.2: Zozef donn lord so bann dokter pou anbom lekor so papa.
50.3: Bann dokter la swiv koutim; zot pran 40 zour pou anbom lekor Izrael. Zot servi bann delwil parfime pou konserv so lekor. Bann Ezipsien fer enn dey 70 zour pou Zakob.
50.4: Kan sa 70 zour dey la finn pase, Zozef dir ar bann ki pros ar lerwa: “Si vremem zot ena lamitie pou mwa, koz ek lerwa dan mo faver.
50.5: Avan mo papa ti mor, li ti fer mwa promet pou al anter li dan Kanaan. Li ena enn tonbo laba. Dir Lerwa donn mwa permision pou mo al anter mo papa. Apre sa, mo pou retourne.”
50.6: Faraon dir zot: “Dir Zozef respekte so promes e al anter so papa dan Kanaan.”
50.7: Zozef pran larout pou al anter so papa. Bann minis Faraon ek bann ansien dan Lezip antie al avek li.
50.8: Li amenn osi so fami, so bann frer, ek tout lafami so papa. Zis bann zanfan ek bann troupo res dan Gosenn.
50.9: Bann saryo ek zot kavalie eskort zot. Tousala form enn gran kortez.
50.10: Zot ariv dan enn landrwa ki apel Goren-Atad, dan les larivier Zourdin. Zot organiz enn gran seremoni, e zot fer ankor enn dey set zour dan sa landrwa la.
50.11: Bann Kananeen ki res laba trouv sa lanterman la. Zot dir ant zot: “Lezip dan enn gran dey.” Depi sa, apel sa landrwa la Abel-Misraim, ki vedir dey Lezip.
50.12: Bann garson Zakob fer tou seki zot papa ti finn dir zot.
50.13: Zot amenn so lekor dan Kanaan. Zot anter li dan kavern Makpela ki pre ar Mamre. Abraam ti finn aste sa terin la avek Efron, enn Itit.
50.14: Apre lanterman Zakob, Zozef retourn Lezip avek so bann frer, ek tou seki finn akonpagn li pou lanterman so papa.
50.15: Apre lamor Zakob, bann frer Zozef dir ant zot: “Asterla, nou papa finn mor, kapav Zozef pou ayir nou. Kapav li pou oule vanze pou tou dimal ki nou finn fer li.”
50.16: Alor, zot desid pou al get Zozef, e zot dir li: “Avan nou papa ti mor, li ti dir nou:
50.17: ‘Dir Zozef: Mo sipliy twa, pardonn to bann frer pou zot fot, ek pou tou dimal ki zot finn fer twa.’ Asterla, nou sipliy twa, pardonn nou pou seki nou finn fer twa. Apretou, nou ador mem Bondie ki nou papa.” Ler Zozef tann sa, li plore.
50.18: Lerla, so bann frer osi plore. Zot tom dan so lipie, e zot dir li: “Nou to bann esklav.”
50.19: Me Zozef dir zot: “Pa bizin zot per! Mo pa dan plas Bondie mwa.
50.20: Zot ti anvi fer mwa dimal. Me Bondie finn sanz sa anbien. Bondie ti anvi sov lavi boukou dimoun, e samem finn arive.
50.21: Pa bizin zot pran okenn traka! Mo pou nouri zot ek zot bann fami.” Bann parol Zozef donn so bann frer kouraz.
50.22: Zozef ek fami so papa res Lezip. Li viv ziska 110 an.
50.23: Zozef reysi trouv bann zanfan ek bann tizanfan Efraim. Li mem adopte bann zanfan Makir, garson Manase.
50.24: Avan so lamor, Zozef dir so bann frer: “Mo zour pre pou arive. Me Bondie pou ed zot. Li pou fer zot sorti dan Lezip. Li pou retourn zot dan pei ki li ti promet Abraam, Izaak, ek Zakob.
50.25: Promet mwa ki zot pou amenn mo lezo avek zot kan Bondie pou tir zot dan Lezip.”
50.26: Inpe letan apre, Zozef mor dan Lezip, laz 110 an. Zot anbom so lekor avek delwil parfime e zot met li dan enn serkey dan Lezip.

1.1: Dan lepok kan bann ziz gouvern Israel # 1:1 Bann ziz ti pe gouverne apepre 1100 avan Z. K., lir liv Ziz. , ena enn lafaminn dan pei. Enn zom pe res Betleem dan rezion Zida. Li pran so fam ek so de garson e zot al res dan pei Moab.
1.2: Misie la apel Elimelek e so fam apel Naomi. Zot de garson apel Malonn ek Kilionn. Zot fer parti klan Efrata. Kan zot ariv dan pei Moab, zot etabli laba.
1.3: Me Elimelek, mari Naomi, mor dan pei Moab. Naomi res tousel avek so de garson.
1.4: Plitar, toulede garson marye ar bann tifi Moabit. Enn apel Orpa ek lot la apel Rit. Apepre dizan plitar,
1.5: Malonn ek Kilionn osi mor. Naomi res tousel, san mari ni zanfan.
1.6: Dan pei Moab, Naomi tann dir ki LESEGNER finn beni so pep avek bann bon rekolt. Alor, li ek so bann belfi desid pou kit sa pei la.
1.7: Zot kit landrwa kot zot pe reste e zot pran larout ansam pou retourn dan Zida.
1.8: Me, dan sime, Naomi dir so bann belfi: “Asterla, retourn lakaz zot mama. Zot finn touzour fidel anver bann ki finn mor e anver mwa. LESEGNER ava bon avek zot osi.
1.9: Ki LESEGNER beni zot e fer zot trouv enn lot dimoun. Koumsa, sakenn ava gagn so prop menaz.” Apre sa, Naomi anbras zot. Me toulede koumans kriye e plore for-for.
1.10: Zot dir Naomi: “Non, nou anvi retourn avek twa, parmi to pep.”
1.11: Me Naomi redir zot: “Ale! Retourne mo bann tifi. Kifer zot anvi swiv mwa? Eski zot panse mo ankor kapav gagn zanfan ki pou marye ar zot # 1:11 Ti ena enn koutim: kan enn mari mor san zanfan, so frer ti bizin marye avek so fam pou donn li enn desandan. ?
1.12: Non, mo tro vie pou sa. Retourn kot zot! Apretou, mem si mo ti kapav remarye e gagn zanfan zordimem,
1.13: eski zot ti pou kapav atann ziska ki bann garson la grandi? Non, mo bann tifi, LESEGNER finn rann mo lavi amer. Li finn pini mwa, me pa zot. Mo sor pou tro dir pou zot.”
1.14: Letan bannla tann sa, toulede plor ankor pli for. Landernie, Orpa fini par anbras so belmer pou dir li orevwar. Me Rit pa oule kit so belmer enn pous.
1.15: Naomi dir li: “Get to belser finn ale. Li finn retourn parmi so pep e avek so bann bondie. Kifer to pa retourn avek li twa osi?”
1.16: Me Rit dir li: “Napa fors mwa pou kit twa napa anpes mwa swiv twa! Kot to pou ale, mo pou ale; kot to pou reste, mo pou reste; to pep pou osi mo pep, to Bondie pou osi mo Bondie.
1.17: La kot to pou mor, labamem mwa osi mo pou mor. La kot to pou antere, labamem mwa osi mo pou antere. Ki LESEGNER pini mwa si mo bizin kit twa. Zis lamor ki pou separ nou!”
1.18: Naomi trouve ki so belfi ti finn fini desid pou swiv li. Lerla li aret persiste ar li.
1.19: Alor, zot toulede marse ziska ki zot ariv Betleem. Letan zot ariv laba, tou dimoun dan vilaz gagn enn gran lazwa akoz zot. Bann fam pe dir ant zot: “Ala Naomi!”
1.20: Me Naomi dir zot: “Aret apel mwa Naomi # 1:20 Naomi, an Ebre, vedir erez. , apel mwa Mara # 1:20 Mara, an Ebre, vedir ranpli ar lamertim. , parski Bondie Toupwisan finn rann mo lavi bien amer.
1.21: Mo ti ale lame plin, me LESEGNER finn retourn mwa lame vid. Kifer zot kontign apel mwa Naomi? Zot pa trouve LESEGNER finn fer mwa ditor? Bondie Toupwisan finn fer mwa gagn maler lor maler.”
1.22: Ala ki manier Naomi kit pei Moab avek so belfi Rit, ki enn Moabit. Zot retourn Betleem dan komansman sezon rekolt dible.

2.1: Naomi ena enn fami dekote so mari Elimelek. Li apel Boaz. Li bien ris e dimoun bien respekte li.
2.2: Enn zour, Rit ki enn Moabit, dir so belmer Naomi: “Les mo al dan karo. Kikfwa mo kapav gagn sans zwenn kikenn ki ava permet mwa ramas zepi lorz ki bann travayer kit deryer zot”. Naomi dir li: “Ale mo tifi.”
2.3: Vremem, Rit al dan enn karo. Li ramas bann zepi ki bann travayer pe kit deryer. Li pa kone si sa karo la pou Boaz, fami Elimelek.
2.4: Plitar dan lazourne, Boaz sorti Betleem e li vinn dan karo. Li dir so bann travayer: “LESEGNER avek zot.” Bannla reponn: “LESEGNER beni twa.”
2.5: Letan Boaz trouv Rit, li dimann formenn ki ansarz bann travayer: “Kisannla sa zenn fam la?”
2.6: Formenn la reponn: “Enn zenn Moabit. Limem ki finn vinn ansam ar Naomi depi pei Moab.
2.7: Li finn dimann permision pou ramas bann zepi ki bann travayer kit deryer zot. Depi gramatin boner li la, lor so lipie. Ziska ler li pa finn pran okenn repo.”
2.8: Lerla Boaz al dir Rit: “Ekoute mo tifi, pa bizin al ramas zepi lorz dan karo enn lot dimoun. Res isi avek bann zenn fam ki travay dan mo karo.
2.9: Get bien ki kote bannla pe rekolte e swiv zot. Mo finn donn lord mo bann zom pou les twa trankil. Si to swaf, al pran dilo dan barik ki mo bann serviter finn ranpli.”
2.10: Letan Rit tann sa, li prostern li divan Boaz ziska ki so figir tous later. Lerla li dir: “Kifer to bon koumsa avek mwa alor ki mo enn etranze?”
2.11: Boaz dir li: “Dimoun finn rakont mwa tou seki to finn fer pou to belmer depi lamor to mari. To finn kit to papa ek to mama ek later kot to finn ne. To finn aksepte pou viv parmi enn pep ki to pa ti kone avan.
2.12: LESEGNER ava rekonpans twa pou tousala. To finn vinn rod proteksion LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael. Li ava donn twa so benediksion anabondans.”
2.13: Rit dir Boaz: “To finn ena enn gran bonte pou mwa, Met. To bann bon parol rekonfort mo leker. Dedir mo pa mem enn to bann servant.”
2.14: Dan ler dezene, Boaz dir Rit: “Vinn manz avek nou. Pran dipin e tranp li dan lasos.” Rit vinn asiz ansam ar bann travayer. Boaz donn li enn pla pistas griye. Rit manze ziska ki li rasazie. Li pa kapav fini so manze.
2.15: Kan Rit retourn dan karo pou ramas zepi lorz, Boaz donn lord tou so bann travayer: “les li ramas lorz mem ant bann pake zepi ki finn fini atase. Pa bizin anpes li.
2.16: Kan zot koup bann zepi, pa ezite pou kit inpe anba. Les li ramase. Pa bizin zot kriy ar li.”
2.17: Rit ramas lorz dan karo ziska tanto. Lerla, li tap bann zepi la pou grenn tou bann lagrin. Li reysi gagn enn gro sak, anviron 30 kilo lorz # 2:17 An Ebre, enn “efa” egal anviron 30 kilo. .
2.18: Lerla li pran so sak lorz e li retourn dan vilaz. Li montre so belmer ki kantite lorz li finn ramase. Apre sa li donn so belmer manze ki ti reste dan so dezene.
2.19: Naomi dimann li: “Kot to finn gagn tousala? Dan ki karo to finn ramas tou sa lorz la? Bondie ava beni sa dimoun ki finn bon anver twa la.” Lerla Rit rakont so belmer e li dir li: “Mo finn ramas dible dan karo enn misie ki apel Boaz.”
2.20: Naomi dir Rit: “LESEGNER ava beni sa dimoun la! LESEGNER pe kontign montre nou so bonte. Pa zis nou, ki vivan, me osi bann ki finn mor.” Lerla Naomi dir Rit: “Boaz enn fami avek nou. Li parmi bann ki sipoze ed nou.”
2.21: Rit, enn Moabit, dir so belmer: “Boaz finn donn mwa permision pou ramas lorz ansam ar bann zenn fam ki travay dan so karo ziska rekolt fini.”
2.22: Lerla Naomi dir Rit: “Bien bon mo tifi, res avek bann servant Boaz. Si to al dan enn lot karo, to riske al gagn maltrete.”
2.23: Alor, Rit kontign ramas lorz deryer bann servant Boaz. Li ramas lorz ek dible ziska rekolt fini. Rit kontigne res kot so belmer Naomi.

3.1: Enn zour, Naomi dir Rit: “Mo tifi, mo bizin ed twa trouv enn dimoun. Koumsa, to pou ena to prop menaz e li pou ava fer to boner.
3.2: To konn nou fami, Boaz. Limem ti les twa travay avek so bann servant. Zordi-swar li pou taminn lorz dan so plantasion.
3.3: Bengn twa, met to pli bon linz ek parfim twa. Apre sa, to al dan landrwa kot li pe taminn lorz. Me res kasiet ziska ki li fini manze-bwar.
3.4: Kan li pou al dormi, get bien dan ki plas li ete. Lerla, to ale, san fer tapaz, to dekouver so lipie # 3:4 Dapre koutim sa lepok la, kan enn fam ti dekouver lipie enn zom, sa ti vedir ki fam la ti pe rod proteksion zom la. e to alonz twa lamem. Limem li pou dir twa ki bizin fer.”
3.5: Rit dir so belmer: “Mo pou fer tou seki to finn dir mwa.”
3.6: Alor Rit al dan landrwa kot Boaz pe taminn lorz. Li fer exakteman seki so belmer ti dir li.
3.7: Kan Boaz fini manze-bwar, li ti dan enn bon mood. Li al dormi kot enn ta lagrin ti anpile. Alor Rit ale, san fer okenn tapaz, li glis li anba dra kot lipie Boaz.
3.8: Omilie lanwit, somey Boaz kase! Li gagn sok letan li trouv enn fam pe dormi kot so lipie.
3.9: Li dimande: “Kisannla twa?” Rit reponn: “Mwa sa, Rit, to servant. Mo finn vinn rod to proteksion, parski to enn fami pros. To ena enn responsabilite anver mwa.”
3.10: Boaz dir li: “Ki LESEGNER beni twa, mo tifi. To ti montre to fidelite anver fami to belmer, me sann-fwa la, to finn montre enn pli gran fidelite ankor. To pa finn al rod zenn-zenn garson, ki zot ris ouswa pov.
3.11: Pa bizin to trakase, mo pou fer tou seki kapav pou rann twa erez. Tou dimoun dan pei kone ki to enn fam drwat.
3.12: Wi, li vre ki mo enn fami pros e mo ena enn devwar anver twa. Me ena enn lot misie ki pli pros ek to fami ki mwa.
3.13: Res lamem pou sa lanwit la. Dime gramatin nou ava gete si li oule pran to responsabilite kouma enn fami pros. Si li aksepte, les limem fer li. Si li pa aksepte, mo promet divan LESEGNER ki mo pou pran to responsabilite momem. Ale! Dormi lamem ziska gramatin.”
3.14: Rit dormi kot lipie Boaz ziska gramatin. Me li lev boner, avan mem ki lizour fer, pou ki personn pa remark li. Boaz dir: “personn pa bizin kone si enn fam finn vinn isi.”
3.15: Avan ki Rit ale, Boaz dir li: “Amenn to manto e trap li bien.” Boaz ranpli manto la ar apepre 15 kilo lorz e li met li lor ledo Rit. Lerla, Rit retourn dan vilaz.
3.16: Rit al direk ar so belmer. Naomi dimann li: “kouma sa finn pase, mo tifi?” Lerla, Rit rakont tou seki Boaz finn fer pou li.
3.17: Rit dir: “Li finn mem ofer mwa sa 15 kilo lorz la. Li pa ti anvi mo retourn kot mo belmer lame vid.”
3.18: Naomi dir Rit: “Pran pasians mo tifi. Biento nou pou kone ki pe rezerve pou twa. Mo sir ki lespri Boaz pa pou trankil tanki li pa fini okip tousala zordimem.”

4.1: Boaz al asiz lor laplas piblik, kot laport lavil. Anmemtan, sa lot fami pros avek Elimelek la pase. Limem ki Boaz ti koz avek Rit. Boaz dir li: “Bonzour kamarad! Vinn asiz inpe!” Vremem, li vinn asize.
4.2: Boaz invit osi dis Ansien dan lavil pou vinn asize, e zot aksepte.
4.3: Lerla, li dir ar fami pros Elimelek: “To kone ki Naomi finn retourne depi pei Moab. Li pe vann terin ki ti pou nou kouzin, Elimelek.
4.4: Mo pe dir twa sa parski tomem fami pli pros. To ena drwa aste li divan tou bann Ansien ek tou seki pe asize ansam avek nou la. Si to pou aste li, al fer li. Me si to pa pou aste li, fer mwa kone, parski momem deziem fami pli pros.” Fami pros la dir: “Mo dakor pou aste terin la.”
4.5: Lerla, Boaz dir li: “Si to aste sa terin la ar Naomi, to pou bizin osi marye avek Rit, sa vev Moabit la. Koumsa, leritaz la pou res dan fami so defin mari.”
4.6: Letan fami pros la tann sa, li dir: “Si sa pou koumsa, mo pa pou aste terin la. Sa pou al kre problem avek mo prop leritaz. Azir dan mo plas twa parski mo pa pou kapav pran sa responsabilite la.”
4.7: Ena enn koutim dan Izrael sa lepok la: Kan bann dimoun fer enn lavant ouswa sanz zot drwa proprieter, enn la tir enn kote savat e donn li lot dimoun la. Sa prouve ki lavant la, ouswa lesanz la, legal.
4.8: Akoz samem letan fami pros la dir Boaz aste terin la, li tir enn kote savat e li donn li.
4.9: Apre sa, Boaz dir bann Ansien ek tou dimoun ki la sa zour la: “Zordi zot tou temwin ki mo finn aste, avek Naomi, tou seki ti pou Elimelek ek so de garson Malonn ek Kilionn.
4.10: Mo finn osi aksepte pou marye ar Rit, vev Malonn ki sorti Moab. Koumsa, leritaz pou res dan fami defin la. Pou ena bann zanfan ki pou gard so nom vivan parmi so fami e dan lavil. Zot tou temwin pou sa osi.”
4.11: Ler Boaz fini koze, tou bann ki la dir: “Wi, nou tou temwin. LESEGNER ava beni sa fam ki pe rant dan to lakaz la. Li ava kouma Rasel ek Lea, bann fam Zakob, ki finn donn nesans pep Izrael. To rises ava ogmante dan klan Efrata, e to nom ava vinn renome dan Betleem.
4.12: LESEGNER ava donn twa boukou zanfan avek sa zenn fam la. To fami ava vinn kouma fami Perez, garson Tamar ek Zida.”
4.13: Alor, Boaz marye avek Rit e gagn relasion avek li. LESEGNER beni Rit e donn li enn garson.
4.14: Ler zanfan la ne, bann fam dan Betleem dir Naomi: “Anou remersi LESEGNER. Zordi, li finn donn twa enn desandan. Ki so nom vinn renome partou dan Izrael!
4.15: Sa zanfan la pou transform to lavi. Li pou ed twa dan to vie-zour. To belfi vo plis ki set garson pou twa, parski li kontan twa e li finn donn twa sa ti-zanfan la.”
4.16: Lerla, Naomi pran zanfan la e ser li dan so lebra. Limem pran responsabilite pou grandi zanfan la.
4.17: Bann fam dan vwazinaz pe krie: “Naomi finn gagn enn garson.” Zot apel li Obed. Plitar Obed vinn papa Zese, papa David.
4.18: Ala lalis bann zanset David depi Perez: Perez papa Ezronn.
4.19: Ezronn papa Ram, e Ram papa Aminadab.
4.20: Aminadab papa Nasonn e Nasonn papa Salomon.
4.21: Salomon papa Boaz, e Boaz papa Obed.
4.22: Obed papa Zese, e Zese papa David.

1.1: Sa pase dan lepok Zerses, ki regn lor 127 provins depi Lenn ziska Kous # 1:1 Kous, ti enn rezion dan sid Lezip akot zordi ena Letiopi ek Soudan. .
1.2: Sa lepok la, lerwa Zerses pe siez lor tronn rwayal dan lavil Siz.
1.3: Dan trwaziem lane so regn, li organiz enn gran festin pou tou so bann ofisie ek minis. Larme Pers ek Medi, bann nob ek gouverner bann provins, tou prezan.
1.4: Lerwa la montre bann gran rises ki fer loner so rwayom ek bann kiksoz gran valer ki montre so grander. Fet la deroule 180 zour.
1.5: Apre sa, lerwa fer enn lot fet dan zardin pale. Tou bann dimoun ki res dan lavil Siz invite; depi pli ris ziska pli pov. Sa fet la dire pandan enn semenn antie.
1.6: Ena rido blan avek bann rozet ble ki atase ar bann riban mov an-lin. Sa bann riban la, atase dan bann bag larzan ki fixe lor bann kolonn marb. Ena bann lez lor ek larzan ki kouver enn sali mozaik; marb, perl ek ros kouler.
1.7: Servi labwason dan tou sort kalite goble an-or. Ena divin par kantite, e zot servi li anabondans.
1.8: Sak dimoun kapav bwar kantite ki li anvi. Lerwa finn donn lord bann serviter dan so pale pou fer tou seki so bann invite anvi.
1.9: Larenn Vasti osi organiz enn festin dan sato lerwa Zerses pou tou bann fam.
1.10: Lor setiem zour, lerwa ena lazwa apre ki li finn bwar divin. Li apel so set serviter personel: Meoumann, Bizta, Arbona, Bigta, Abagta, Zetar ek Karkas.
1.11: Li donn zot lord pou amenn larenn Vasti, avek so kouronn rwayal, divan li. Larenn Vasti ena enn bote extraordiner. Lerwa anvi montre tou bann pep ek bann ofisie kouma larenn zoli.
1.12: Me larenn Vasti refiz ekout lord ki lerwa finn donn li atraver bann serviter la. Sa fer lerwa bwi ar koler.
1.13: Lerwa desid pou al koz avek bann konseye ki konn lalwa, pou kone seki zot panse. Lerwa abitie pran so bann desizion avek led bann konseye ki bien konn lalwa ek koutim.
1.14: Ala nom bann dimoun ki li fer vini: Karsena, Setar, Admata, Tarsis, Meres, Marsena ek Memoukann. Zot set minis Pers ek Medi ki gagn akse ar lerwa anpremie dan rwayom.
1.15: Lerwa dimann zot: “Dapre lalwa, ki bizin fer ar larenn Vasti? Li pa finn obeir lord ki lerwa ti donn li atraver bann minis.”
1.16: Lerla, Memoukann dir divan lerwa ek bann ofisie: “Larenn Vasti pa finn fer fos zis ar lerwa, me osi ar tou bann ofisie ek tou dimoun ki dan bann provins lerwa Zerses.
1.17: Seki larenn finn fer la, tou fam pou konn sa e zot pou defie lotorite zot mari. Bann fam la pou dir: ‘Larenn Vasti, limem li pa finn obeir kan lerwa Zerses ti donn li lord pou vinn divan li!’
1.18: Zordimem, bann fam tou bann minis dan Pers ek Medi pou kone ki larenn Vasti finn fer. Lerla, zot osi zot pou koumans dezobeir zot mari e sa pou kre enn gran dezord!
1.19: Si lerwa zize ki sa bon, fer enn lord rwayal sorti. Ekrir li dan bann lalwa Pers ek Medi pou ki pa kapav sanz li; fer ki Vasti nepli gagn okenn drwa pou vinn divan lerwa Zerses ankor. Lerla, lerwa ava donn tit larenn enn lot dimoun ki pli respektab.
1.20: Letan sa lalwa la pou proklame partou dan so gran rwayom, tou bann fam, gran dimoun kouma ti dimoun, pou bizin onor zot mari.”
1.21: Sa konsey la fer lerwa ek so bann ofisie plezir. Lerwa fer parey kouma Memoukann finn propoze.
1.22: Li avoy bann let dan tou provins rwayal. Sak provins gagn let la dan so prop lekritir ek sak tribi dan so prop langaz. Lord la deklare ki sak zom bizin sef dan so prop lakaz.

2.1: Apre bann levennman avek larenn Vasti, koler lerwa Zerses finn pase. Li reflesi lor seki larenn Vasti finn fer ek lor desizion ki finn pran kont larenn.
2.2: Bann serviter ki travay ar lerwa lerla dir: “Anou rod bann zoli tifi vierz pou lerwa.
2.3: Les lerwa angaz bann dimoun dan tou bann provins so rwayom. Zot ava rasanble bann zenn vierz dan arem ki trouv dan kapital Siz. Fer Egay okip sa, Parski limem ki ena responsabilite bann fam. Li ava donn zot bann prodwi bote.
2.4: Tifi ki pou fer plezir lerwa ava vinn larenn dan plas Vasti.” Sa bann lide la fer lerwa plezir e li fer exakteman samem.
2.5: Ena enn Zwif dan kapital Siz ki apel Mardose. Li garson Zair, garson Simey. Simey garson Kis, enn Benzaminit.
2.6: Kis parmi bann ki ti deporte depi Zerizalem, ansam ar Yekonia, lerwa Zida. Nabikodonozor, lerwa Babilonn, ki ti deport zot.
2.7: Mardose finn grandi Adasa, setadir Ester, so kouzinn, parski li pa ena ni papa ni mama. Tifi la enn bote. Letan so bann paran ti mor, Mardose ti adopte li kouma so prop tifi.
2.8: Kan lord lerwa proklame, enn kantite zennfi rasanble dan sitadel Siz. Zot lor responsabilite Egay e Ester parmi zot.
2.9: Ester pler Egay boukou e li gagn so faver. Egay donn lord pou fer so bann makiyaz e pou donn li bann pli bon manze. Li swazir set servant dan pale lerwa, zis pou Ester. Lerla, Egay avoy li ek so bann servant dan meyer plas dan arem.
2.10: Ester pa les personn konn so lorizinn, parski Mardose finn defann li koz sa.
2.11: Toulezour Mardose mars-marse divan laport lakour arem pou gagn nouvel Ester e kone seki pe ariv li.
2.12: Dan arem, bann tifi la bizin swiv enn tretman pou zot bote pandan douz mwa: sis mwa avek delwil oubien lamir ek sis mwa avek parfin ek kosmetik. Lerla, amenn zot, sakenn so tour, divan lerwa Zerses.
2.13: Kan zennfi la al divan lerwa, zot donn li tou seki li dimande pou amenn ar li dan pale.
2.14: Amenn li kot lerwa aswar, e gramatin li retourn dan deziem arem lor responsabilite Sasgaz, serviter lerwa. Limem ki ansarz bann konkibinn. Tifi la pa retourn kot lerwa ankor, apart si lerwa apresie li e lerla fer apel li.
2.15: Ler arive pou Ester, tifi Abihel, tonton Mardose, pou al kot lerwa. Li pa dimann nanye apart seki Egay, enik lerwa, ti konsey li. Tou dimoun ki zwenn Ester admir li.
2.16: Amenn Ester dan pale rwayal divan lerwa Zerses, lor diziem mwa, ki mwa Tebet, dan setiem lane so regn.
2.17: Lerwa kontan Ester plis ki tou lezot fam. Parmi tou sa bann vierz la, Ester gagn faver ek tandres lerwa. Lerwa met kouronn rwayal lor latet Ester e fer li vinn larenn dan plas Vasti.
2.18: Lerla, lerwa fer enn gran festin anloner Ester pou tou so bann ofisie ek minis. Lerwa donn enn zour konze dan tou provins. Li donn bann kado dign enn lerwa, ek leker kontan.
2.19: Letan rasanble bann zennfi la enn deziem fwa, Mardose pe okip enn pos dan pale lerwa.
2.20: Ester, dan so kote, finn swiv konsey Mardose pou pa dir personn so lorizinn. Ester obeir Mardose, parey kouma li ti obeir li kan Mardose ti grandi li.
2.21: Dan lepok kot Mardose pe okip sa pos inportan la dan pale lerwa, Bigtann ek Teres, de ofisie lerwa ki vey lantre pale, ankoler. Zot fer konplo pou touy lerwa Zerses.
2.22: Me Mardose dekouver zot rol. Li al koz sa ar larenn Ester. Lerla, larenn al dir sa lerwa lor nom Mardose.
2.23: Letan al fer lanket, dekouver ki konplo la vre. Lerla, met toulede zom pandi. Zot fer ekrir sa levennman la dan liv arsiv, dan prezans lerwa.

3.1: Amann garson Amedata, enn Agazit. Apre bann levennman ki finn pase, lerwa Zerses nomm Amann pli gran fonksioner lakour rwayal. Lerwa fer li vinn premie minis parmi tou bann ofisie.
3.2: Tou bann serviter ki travay ar lerwa fer tou seki Amann dir. Zot tou kourbe divan li parski lerwa finn donn lord tou dimoun pou swiv seki li komann zot. Me Mardose refiz kourbe divan li.
3.3: Letan bann lezot serviter trouv sa, zot dimann Mardose: “Kifer to pa obeir lord lerwa?”
3.4: Bann serviter la koz ar Mardose toulezour pou li sanz so latitid. Zot raport sa ar Amann, me sa pa servi nanye. Mardose dir zot ki li enn Zwif.
3.5: Ler Amann trouve ki Mardose pa kourbe divan li e ki li pa obeir so bann lord, sa fer li extra ankoler.
3.6: Me Amann pa anvi atak Mardose tousel, parski li finn aprann ki Mardose enn Zwif. Li desid pou fer enn konplo pou detrir tou bann Zwif ki dan rwayom lerwa Zerses antie.
3.7: Dan komansman douziem lane regn lerwa Zerses, dan premie mwa ki ti apel mwa Nisann, Amann fer gete ki pli bon dat ek mwa pou realiz so plan. Sa apel “Pourim”. Sor ti tom lor treziem zour dan douziem mwa ki apel mwa Adar.
3.8: Amann al dir ar lerwa Zerses: “Ena enn parti lepep ki disperse, zot pa oule melanz zot ar bann dimoun ki dan bann provins to rwayom. Zot lalwa diferan ar lalwa bann lezot dimoun e zot pa oule obeir bann lord lerwa. Sa pa korek ditou. Lerwa bizin pa toler zot.
3.9: Si lerwa zize ki li bon, fer enn dekre ki pou donn lord detrir zot. Mo sir mo pou kapav gagn ziska trwasan tonn larzan ki mo pou donn bann ofisie ki ansarz bann biznes Lerwa. Zot pou kapav met sa larzan la dan lakes lerwa.”
3.10: Lerla, lerwa tir so bag li donn Amann, garson Amedata ki enn Agazit. Amann, limem lennmi bann Zwif.
3.11: Lerwa dir Amann: “Mo larg pep la dan to lame. Gete ki to oule fer ar zot e to kapav gard larzan la pou twa.”
3.12: Lor treziem zour dan premie mwa, konvok tou bann sekreter lakour rwayal. Amann donn zot lord pou ekrir bann let e pou avoy kot bann reprezantan lerwa ek bann gouverner dan tou bann provins. Ekrir osi bann sef tribi dan sak provins. Ekrir zot dan zot prop lekritir ek zot prop langaz. Zot ekrir let la lor nom lerwa Zerses e stanp li ar so bag.
3.13: Lerla, avoy let la dan tou bann provins lerwa Zerses. Donn lord pou detrir, pou touy ek exterminn, dan enn zour, tou bann Zwif; zenn ek vie, fam ek zanfan. Sa tom treziem zour dan douziem mwa, ki apel mwa Adar. Finn osi gagn lord pou fer piyaz ar zot bann dibien.
3.14: Zot avoy enn kopi sa let la dan sak provins kouma enn dekre ki proklame ki tou bann pep bizin prepar zot pou sa zour la.
3.15: Bann let la ale vit-vit par lord lerwa ek dekre la pase dan kapital Siz. Amann ek lerwa pe amize, manze-bwar, me bann zabitan Siz dan traka, nepli kone ki pou fer.

4.1: Kan Mardose aprann tou seki ti pe maniganse kont bann Zwif, li telman afekte par tousala ki li desir so linz. Li met enn sak goni lor li ek lasann lor so latet. Lerla, li al mars partou dan lavil, e li kriye for-for pou montre so douler.
4.2: Letan li ariv divan laport pale, li res lamem parski personn pa gagn drwa rant dan lakour lerwa avek enn sak goni lor li.
4.3: Dan sak provins kot lord lerwa ek so dekre arive, ena gran tristes ek dey parmi bann Zwif. Zot gard karem, kriye, plore ar lasagrin. Laplipar met sak goni lor zot ek lasann lor zot latet.
4.4: Bann servant ek ofisie Ester vinn anons li sa nouvel la. Letan Ester tann sa, li extra afekte. Ester fer avoy linz pou Mardose pou ki li kapav tir so sak goni lor li. Mardose pa aksepte bann linz la.
4.5: Lerla, Ester fer apel Atak, enn parmi bann ofisie ki lerwa finn avoye pou servi li. Ester donn li lord pou al pran ransegnman ar Mardose pou kone ki pe arive e kifer li pe azir koumsa.
4.6: Atak al rod Mardose lor laplas konsey divan laport pale lerwa.
4.7: Mardose rakont li tou seki finn pase. Li dir li komie kas Amann finn promet pou met dan lakes rwayal si detrir tou bann Zwif.
4.8: Mardose donn li enn kopi sa dekre ki ordonn destriksion bann Zwif e ki pe sirkile partou dan Siz. Mardose dimann Atak montre sa let la Ester pou ki li kapav al pled koz so pep divan lerwa.
4.9: Ler li fini gagn tou ransegnman, Atak retourne e rakont Ester tou seki Mardose finn dir.
4.10: Apre ki Ester finn bien ekout Atak, li avoy li kot Mardose avek sa mesaz la:
4.11: “Tou dimoun kone ki, si enn serviter oubien ninport kisannla dan bann provins lerwa, al prezant li divan lerwa dan lakour andan pale, san ki finn apel li, sa dimoun la pou gagn lamor. Pena sape, sa lalwa la pou tou dimoun. Pou ki dimoun la ena enn sans viv, fode ki lerwa prezant li so baton rwayal. Momem lerwa pa finn apel mwa depi trant zour.”
4.12: Bannla al raport Mardose seki Ester finn dir.
4.13: Letan Mardose tann sa, li dir zot al dir Ester: “Pa panse ki twa to pou sape parmi bann Zwif, zis parski to res dan pale lerwa.
4.14: Si dan enn sitiasion koumsa to swazir pou ferm to labous, soulazman ek delivrans bann Zwif pou vinn dan enn lot fason. Me twa ek fami to papa pou mor. Ki kone, kapav to finn vinn larenn pou enn mision koumsa?”
4.15: Apre ki li finn tann sa, Ester fer dir Mardose:
4.16: “Al rasanble tou bann Zwif ki dan Siz e fer zot tou gard karem lor mo nom. Pa manze ni bwar pandan trwa zour, ki li lanwit ki li lizour. Mo bann servant ek mwa, nou osi nou pou gard karem parey kouma zot. Apre sa mo pou al get lerwa, mem si sa kont lalwa. Si mo bizin mor, mo ava mor.”
4.17: Mardose al fer ekzakteman seki Ester ti dimann li fer.

5.1: Apre trwa zour karem, Ester met so rob rwayal. Li rant dan lakour ki trouv andan pale. Lakour la vizavi ar lasal kot ena tronn. Lerwa pe asiz lor so tronn ki vizavi lantre pale.
5.2: Kouma lerwa trouv Ester pe diboute dan lakour, lerwa donn li so faver. Deswit, li tir so baton rwayal e li prezant li dan direksion Ester. Ester aprose e li tous baton rwayal la dan so bout.
5.3: Lerwa dimann li: “Ki finn arive, larenn Ester? Ki mo kapav fer pou twa? Seki to dimande mo pou donn twa, mem si sa kout mwa lamwatie mo rwayom.”
5.4: Ester reponn li : “Si sa fer lerwa plezir, les li vinn avek Amann dan festin ki mo finn prepare pou lerwa zordi.”
5.5: Lerwa dir: “Degaze al sers Amann pou ki nou realiz dezir Ester.” Lerla, zot toulede, lerwa ek Amann, al dan festin ki Ester finn prepare.
5.6: Letan ki zot pe amize, manze-bwar, lerwa dimann Ester: “Ki to ti anvi dimann mwa? Mo pou donn twa tou seki to oule, seki to dimande to pou gagne. Mem si sa kout mwa lamwatie mo rwayom, mo pou fer li pou twa.”
5.8: Si mo finn gagn lestim lerwa e si sa fer li plezir pou donn mwa seki mo dimande, mo ti pou kontan si lerwa ek Amann vinn dan festin ki mo pou organize pou zot dime. Lerla, mo pou dir lerwa mo dezir.”
5.9: Sa zour la, Amann ale leker kontan. Li trouv Mardose dan lakour pale. Mardose pa ni leve ni gagn per divan li. Sa fer so koler monte.
5.10: Me Amann kontrol so koler e li al so lakaz. Letan li rant kot li, Amann apel so fam, Zeres, ek so bann kamarad.
5.11: Li koumans flat limem ar zot. Li dir zot ki kantite rises ek komie garson li ena. Li osi dir zot ki manier lerwa finn nomm li pli gran fonksioner lakour rwayal. Sa donn li enn gran loner.
5.12: Amann dir ankor: “Mem larenn Ester pa finn les personn, apart mwa, akonpagn lerwa dan festin ki li ti prepare. Dime osi mo invite pou al dan so festin ansam avek lerwa.
5.13: Me tousala pa fer mwa plezir, tanki mo pou trouv sa Zwif la, Mardose, pe travay dan lakour pale.”
5.14: So fam, Zeres, ek so bann kamarad ki la, dir li: “Dime gramatin, fer aranz enn safodaz. Kan to pou al dan festin avek lerwa, dir li fer pandi Mardose. Koumsa, to ava amize lespri trankil apre.” Sa konsey la fer Amann plezir e li fer aranz safodaz la.

6.1: Sa mem swar la, lerwa pa pe gagn somey. Li donn lord pou amenn liv arsiv kot finn ekrir bann evennman rwayom. Li fer lir liv la pou li ekoute.
6.2: Dan pasaz ki zot pe lir, lerwa tande kouma Mardose ti denons konplo ki Bigtann ek Teres, de ofisie lakour rwayal, ti fer pou asasinn li.
6.3: Lerla, lerwa dimande: “Ki loner e ki rekonpans finn donn Mardose pou seki li finn fer?” Bann serviter ki la reponn: “Nanye pa finn fer pou li.”
6.4: Lerwa dimande: “Kisannla ki dan lakour pale la?” Amann ti finn fek arive. Li finn vini pou koz ar lerwa lor size Mardose. Amann anvi fer pandi li.
6.5: Bann serviter dir lerwa: “Amann ki dan lakour.” Lerwa dir zot: “Fer li rantre.”
6.6: Amann rantre e lerwa dimann li: “Ki kapav fer pou enn dimoun ki mo anvi onore?” Letan Amann tann sa kestion la, li dir dan limem: “Kisannla lerwa pou anvi onore plis ki mwa?”
6.7: Alor, Amann dir lerwa: “Pou sa dimoun ki lerwa anvi onore la,
6.8: fer amenn linz rwayal ki lerwa finn deza mete. Fer amenn osi enn seval ki lerwa finn deza monte. Met enn kouronn rwayal lor so latet.
6.9: Donn linz rwayal la ek seval la pli gran ofisie lerwa. Fer ofisie la abiy sa dimoun ki lerwa anvi onore la. Fer ofisie la sarye sa dimoun la partou, lor seval, lor laplas piblik e fer li kriye for-for pou ki tou dimoun tande: ‘Ala kouma Lerwa rekonpans enn dimoun ki li anvi donn loner.’”
6.10: Lerwa dir Amann: “Degaze, al pran bann linz la ek seval la. Al fer kouma to finn dir pou Mardose, sa Zwif ki travay dan lantre pale la. Pa bliye okenn detay ki to finn dir.”
6.11: Amann ekzekit lord lerwa. Li pran linz ek seval la. Li abiy Mardose e kondir li lor laplas piblik. Li kriye for-for: “Ala kouma Lerwa rekonpans enn dimoun ki li anvi donn loner.”
6.12: Apre sa, Mardose retourn dan so pos travay. Me Amann degaze rant so lakaz avek lasagrin ek so latet kouver.
6.13: Letan Amann rakont so fam, Zeres, ek so bann konseye tou seki finn ariv li, bannla dir li: “Si to finn perdi lafas divan Mardose, ki enn Zwif, abe to pa pou reysi konbat kont li. Pena zes, li pou fini twa.”
6.14: Zot ankor pe koze letan ofisie lerwa vinn sers Amann anvites, pou amenn li dan festin ki Ester finn prepare.

7.1: Lerwa ek Amann al fer fet avek Ester.
7.2: Lor deziem zour, letan ki zot pe amize, bwar-manze, lerwa re-dimann Ester: “Ki to oule mo fer pou twa, larenn Ester? Dir mwa to dezir. Mem si to dimann mwa lamwatie mo rwayom, mo pou donn twa.”
7.3: Larenn Ester reponn: “Si mo finn gagn to faver, mazeste, e si sa fer twa plezir, ala seki mo dimann twa: sov mo lavi ek sov lavi mo pep osi.
7.4: Bannla finn vann mo pep ek mwa osi. Asterla, zot pou touy nou, fini nou net. Si ti zis vann nou kouma bann sinp esklav, mo ti pou res trankil; parski sa pa ti pou vo lapenn ki mo deranz twa.”
7.5: Lerwa dimann Ester: “Kisannla e kot li ete sa dimoun ki finn pretann pou fer sa la?”
7.6: Ester dir li: “Amann sa! Limem nou lennmi ek nou adverser, sa move dimoun la!” Amann gagn extra per divan lerwa ek larenn.
7.7: Lerwa kit festin dan enn gran koler, e li al dan zardin pale. Amann remarke ki lerwa finn fini deside pou fer touy li. Akoz sa li res lamem e sipliy larenn pou pa touy li.
7.8: Letan lerwa retourn dan lasal kot pe fer festin, Amann ti finn zet so lekor lor sofa kot Ester ete. Letan lerwa trouv sa, li dir: “Anplis, sa boug la anvi viol larenn divan mwa, dan mo prop lakaz?” Anmemtan ki lerwa pe dir sa, bannla kouver figir Amann.
7.9: Lerla Arbona, enn parmi bann ofisie ki pe asiste lerwa, dir: “Zisteman, Hamann finn fini prepar safodaz pou pandi Mardose ki finn sap lavi lerwa par so bann parol. Safodaz la divan lakaz Hamann e li fer 25 met oter.” Lerwa dir: “Pandi li lor lamem.”
7.10: Bannla pandi Amann lor safodaz ki li ti finn prepare pou Mardose. Apre sa, koler lerwa kalme.

8.1: Sa mem zour la, lerwa Zerses donn larenn Ester tou dibien ki Amann, lennmi bann Zwif, ti posede. Mardose vinn prezant limem divan lerwa, parski Ester ti finn explik lerwa ki Mardose ete pou li.
8.2: Lerwa donn Mardose so bag ki li ti finn repran ar Amann. Lerla, Ester nomm Mardose responsab pou zer bann dibien Amann.
8.3: Apre sa, Ester re-al koz avek lerwa. Li tom dan so lipie anlarm. Ester sipliy lerwa pou sov bann Zwif dan sa plan diabolik ki Amann ti finn konplote kont zot la.
8.4: Lerwa tir baton rwayal pou Ester,
8.5: e Ester remet li dibout divan lerwa. Li dir: “Si sa fer lerwa plezir e si mo finn gagn so faver; si li panse ki seki mo pe dir, bon, e ki mo gagn so lakor, fer enn lord ofisiel sorti. Sa lord la pou kennsel tou sa bann let ki Amann, garson Amedata, enn Agazit, ti ekrir pou donn lord touy bann Zwif dan tou so bann provins.
8.6: Kouma eski mo pou kapav get sa katastrof ki pe vinn lor mo pep la? E kouma mo pou kapav siport lamor bann ki parey kouma mwa?”
8.7: Lerla, Lerwa Zerses dir larenn Ester ek Zwif Mardose: “Get sa, mo finn donn Ester pouvwar pou kontrol dibien Amann. Zot finn pandi li akoz li ti konplote pou touy bann Zwif.
8.8: To kapav ekrir seki to oule dan faver bann Zwif, lor nom lerwa. Stanp li avek bag lerwa, parski pa gagn drwa sanz enn lord ki ekrir lor nom lerwa e ki stanpe avek so bag.”
8.9: Zot konvok bann sekreter lerwa dan trwaziem mwa. Sa mwa la apel Sivann, e sa pase lor so venn-trwaziem zour. Zot ekrir enn lord ki Mardose dikte zot, pou tou bann Zwif, bann fonksioner, gouverner ek gran ofisie bann provins depi Lenn ziska Kous # 8:9 Ena tradiksion met “depi Lenn ziska Letiopi”. . Ena antou 127 provins, e finn ekrir sakenn dapre so manier ekrir ek so langaz. Bann Zwif osi gagn dekre la dan zot prop lekritir ek langaz.
8.10: Zot ekrir bann let la lor nom lerwa Zerses. Apre, zot stanp bann let la ar so bag e avoy zot par bann mesaze lor seval ki vinn depi lekiri rwayal. Zot ale lor vites.
8.11: Dan sa let la, lerwa donn permision bann Zwif pou defann zot lavi. Zot gagn drwa detrir, touye ek exterminn ninport ki dimoun avek zarm dan ninport ki provins ki rod atak zot, zot fam ek zot bann zanfan. Zot gagn drwa osi pou kokin dibien sa bann dimoun la.
8.12: Zot gagn drwa fer sa dan enn sel zour dan tou bann provins lerwa Zerses; lor treziem zour, douziem mwa, ki mwa Adar.
8.13: Zot avoy kopi sa let la dan tou provins pou donn tou dimoun. Let la vinn enn dekre kot bann Zwif bizin prepar zot pou vanz kont zot bann lennmi.
8.14: Bann mesaze degaze mont lor zot seval pou al kit bann let la kouma lerwa finn komande. Finn tir sa dekre la dan kapital Siz.
8.15: Mardose sorti kot lerwa avek linz rwayal kouler ble ek blan. Ena enn kouronn lor so latet. Li finn met osi enn manto an-lin kouler mov. Bann abitan Siz exprim zot lazwa.
8.16: Bann Zwif finn retrouv enn lalimier ek lakontantman. Zot ena lazwa ek loner pou Mardose.
8.17: Dan sak provins kot lord lerwa ale, ena bel lakontantman parmi bann Zwif. Zot organiz repa ek fet. Anplis, boukou dimoun dan pei dir ki zot Zwif parski zot per ki bannla atak zot.

9.1: Lor treziem zour, dan douziem mwa, ki mwa Adar, bizin exekit lord ek lalwa lerwa. Lennmi bann Zwif ti sipoze gagn pouvwar lor zot sa zour lamem. Me tousala finn sanze. Bann Zwif finn gagn pouvwar lor bann seki pe anvi detrir zot.
9.2: Bann Zwif rasanble dan tou zot bann site, partou-kote, dan bann provins lerwa Zerses pou atak bann seki pe anvi detrir zot. Personn pa kapav reziste zot parski lepep antie pe gagn per.
9.3: Tou ofisie dan bann provins, bann reprezantan lerwa ek bann gouverner, mem bann ofisie rwayal, zot tou dan kote bann Zwif parski zot per Mardose.
9.4: Mardose ena boukou pouvwar dan sato lerwa. So repitasion fane partou anmemtan ki li pe vinn pli pwisan.
9.5: Akoz sa, bann Zwif finn kapav touy zot lennmi ar lepe. Bann Zwif koup-koup zot, detrir zot ek fer seki zot anvi ar bann seki ayir zot.
9.6: Dan site Siz, bann Zwif touy 500 dimoun.
9.10: dis garson Amann, garson Amedata, lennmi bann Zwif. Me zot pa tous dibien bannla.
9.11: Sa mem zour la, bann la fer lerwa kone komie dimoun finn mor dan site Siz.
9.12: Lerwa dir ar larenn Ester: “Dan site Siz, bann Zwif finn touy 500 dimoun ek osi dis garson Amann. Ki zot kapav finn fer dan lezot parti bann provins? Ki to dezire aster? Seki to dimande mo pou akord twa. Ki kiksoz to anvi gagne ankor? To dezir pou ekzose.”
9.13: Ester dir: “Si lerwa dakor, dime, les bann Zwif ki dan Siz azir dapre lord ki ti ena zordi ek fer pandi dis garson Amann lor poto.”
9.14: Lerla, lerwa donn lord pou ekzekit seki Ester finn dimande. Zot tir enn dekre dan Siz e zot pandi dis garson Amann.
9.15: Bann Zwif ki dan Siz rasanble ankor enn fwa lor katorziem zour mwa Adar. Zot touy 300 dimoun dan Siz; me zot pa tous dibien bannla.
9.16: Bann Zwif ki dan bann lezot provins, zot osi zot rasanble pou defann zot lavi kont bann lennmi. Zot touy 75,000 parmi bann ki ayir zot; me zot pa tous dibien bannla.
9.17: Sa pase lor treziem zour mwa Adar, e zot repoze lor katorziem zour. Sa zour la vinn enn zour fet ek lazwa.
9.18: Bann ki dan Siz, rasanble treziem ek katorziem zour. Zot repoze lor kinziem zour. Zot fer sa zour la vinn enn zour fet ek lazwa.
9.19: Me bann Zwif ki res dan bann vilaz, andeor lavil, fete lor katorziem zour. Li enn konze kot sakenn avoy so kamarad nouritir ankado.
9.20: Mardose not tousala e li avoy let tou bann Zwif ki dan bann provins lerwa Zerses. Bann seki pre ek bann seki lwin.
9.21: Li dimann zot gard katorziem zour mwa Adar ek so kinziem zour osi, sak lane,
9.22: kouma bann zour kot bann Zwif finn sape depi lame zot bann lennmi. Li enn mwa kot zot laper ek tristes finn sanze pou vinn lakontantman. Zot bizin fer sa de zour la vinn bann zour fet kot zot partaz nouritir ek donn kado bann seki pli pov.
9.23: Koumsamem bann Zwif finn adopte, dan zot koutim, seki Mardose finn dimann zot fer dan so let.
9.24: Amann, garson Amedata ki ti enn Agazit, lennmi tou bann Zwif, ti finn konplote pou detrir zot. Li ti finn tir sor pou kone ki ti pli bon zour pou fer sa.
9.25: Me, Ester finn vinn divan lerwa. Lerla, finn donn lord par ekri pou ki konplo Amann kont bann Zwif retourn lor limem. Finn pandi limem ek so bann garson lor poto.
9.26: Akoz samem sa bann zour la apel Pourim, ki vinn depi mo ‘Pour’. Akoz tou seki ti finn ekrir dan sa let la ek akoz tou difikilte ki zot finn gagne ek tou seki finn ariv zot,
9.27: bann Zwif aksepte pou gard sa de zour la kouma enn koutim. Zotmem, zot bann desandan ek tou bann seki aksepte pou vinn Zwif, san zame rate, toulebanane, zot pou respekte sa de zour la kouma ti ekrir dan let la.
9.28: Sak zenerasion bizin rapel sa bann zour la. Dan sak fami, provins ek site, zame bann Zwif, e mem zot bann desandan, bizin aret fer memwar sa de zour Pourim la.
9.29: Larenn Ester, tifi Abiel, ansam avek Zwif Mardose, donn zot plin lotorite par ekri, pou konfirm deziem let konsernan Pourim.
9.30: Zot avoy let pou swet lape ek sekirite tou bann Zwif dan toule 127 provins lerwa Zerses.
9.31: Zot donn lord pou fer bann zour Pourim la respekte dan lepok ki bizin kouma Zwif Mardose ek larenn Ester finn dir. Parey kouma zot finn met lalwa pou zotmem ek zot bann desandan pou gard karem ek fer zot dey.
9.32: Bann lord larenn Ester fixe sa bann pratik la e tousala finn ekrir dan liv.

10.1: Lerwa Zerses fors tou bann abitan pei ek seki andeor dan bann zil pou pey tax.
10.2: Tou so bann gran aksion pouvwar ek pwisans finn ekrir dan liv arsiv lerwa Medi ek Pers. Zistwar lor ki manier Lerwa finn donn Mardose merit ek promosion, osi finn ekrir dan sa liv la.
10.3: Mardose segon dan bann ran pouvwar; Apre lerwa, vinn limem. Li ena boukou pouvwar parmi bann Zwif. Li popiler e bann Zwif bien kontan li. Mardose travay pou bienet so pep e li fer tou pou sekirite tou zot bann desandan.

1.1: Bienere sa dimoun ki pa ekout konsey bann ki fer lemal, ki pa swiv sime dimoun ki fer pese, ki pa asiz ar dimoun vantar.
1.2: Okontrer li gagn plezir dan lalwa LESEGNER, e lanwit-lizour li medit lor so lansegnman.
1.3: Li kouma enn pie ki pous danbor dilo, ki raport so fri dapre so sezon e so fey res toultan ver. Sa dimoun ere la li toultan prospere.
1.4: Me bann dimoun move pa koumsa; zot kouma lasann lapay ki balye par divan.
1.5: Bann move dimoun pou kondane dan zizman, bann ki fer pese pa pou rant dan lasanble lepep Bondie.
1.6: LESEGNER protez e gid lavi dimoun ki zis, me bann ki fer move pou zwenn lapert ek lamor.

2.1: Kifer bann nasion pe rod deklans enn deboulman pou nannye? Kifer bann pep pe konplote dan vid?
2.2: Zot bann lerwa lor later pe prepar lager, zot bann dirizan pe vinn ansam kont LESEGNER e kont lerwa ki li finn konsakre.
2.3: Zot dir, “Anou kas lakord zot regn; plis ki sa, anou eklat zot lasenn. “
2.4: LESEGNER ki pe asiz lor so tronn lao dan lesiel pe riye e pran zot pou enn bann boufon.
2.5: Li averti zot dan so gran lakoler, e laflam so lakoler fer zot tranble.
2.6: Li dir zot, “Mwa ki finn swazir mo lerwa, mo finn instal li lor Sion, montagn sakre. “
2.7: Lerwa dir, “Les mo anons zot deklarasion LESEGNER. Li finn dir mwa, ‘Zordi, zour to kouronnman, to finn vinn mo garson e mwa mo finn vinn to Papa.
2.8: Nek dimann mwa e tou bann nasion pou vinn pou twa; nek dimande, e later antie pou vinn to rwayom.
2.9: Lerla to va diriz zot avek lafors ki ena dan enn feray e kas-kas zot kouma gargoulet ki fer ek later.’ “
2.10: Alor, zot ki bann lerwa, servi lasazes; zot ki dirizan lor later, fer atansion.
2.11: Obeyir LESEGNER ar boukou respe; exprim zot lazwa, avek tranbleman.
2.12: Met zot azenou divan li. Pa bliye so lakoler anflame vit e zot kapav zwenn lamor lor sime. Bienere tou dimoun ki mars ar li e ki gagn so proteksion.

3.1: SEGNER, mo ena lennmi partou! Zot boukou, ki pe lev kont mwa!
3.2: Zot koz enn ta lor mwa, zot dir, “Pena sime Bondie delivre li. “
3.3: Me twa, SEGNER, to touzour boukliye ki protez mwa; to sov mo loner, to relev mo latet.
3.4: Mo kriye osekour for for mem ver LESEGNER e li reponn mwa depi so montagn sakre.
3.5: Aswar mo alonze, mo dormi anpe; gramatin mo leve; LESEGNER la, li mo sekirite.
3.6: Mem si enn larme mil dimoun anserkle mwa sa pa fer mwa per.
3.7: O SEGNER, lev twa! Sov mwa, mo Bondie! Kalot mo bann lennmi, grenn ledan bann ki fer lemal.
3.8: O SEGNER, twa ki amenn delivrans. Devers to benediksion lor to pep.

4.1: Reponn mwa kan mo priye twa. Bondie tomem mo lazistis. Kan mo ti dan detres to finn liber mwa. Montre to bonte, ekout mo lapriyer.
4.2: E zot, dimoun inportan, komie letan ankor zot pou mepriz mo laglwar? Komie letan ankor zot pou atase ar mansonz, e galoup deryer bann kiksoz initil?
4.3: Pa bliye ki LESEGNER finn met apar pou limem dimoun ki fidel, e LESEGNER tann mwa kan mo dimann so led.
4.4: Pa les lakoler fer zot tom dan pese; aswar lor zot lili, reflesi lor la e gard silans.
4.5: Ofer LESEGNER sakrifis ki bizin e met tou zot konfians dan li.
4.6: Boukou dimoun pe dir, “Kisannla kapav fer nou trouv nou boner? “ SEGNER, fer lalimier to prezans briy lor nou.
4.7: To finn met dan mo leker plis lazwa ki bannla ena kan zot rekolt ek zot divin finn depas kantite.
4.8: Mo dormi trankil, mo somey pezib, parski to tousel O SEGNER vey lor mo sekirite.

5.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer, e tann mo douler kriye.
5.2: Twa mo Bondie, mo Lerwa, ekout mwa kan mo kriye twa, se twa ki mo priye.
5.3: SEGNER, boner gramatin to tann mo lavwa; kouma soley leve mo prepar tou pou twa # 5:3 Enn lot posibilite: kouma soley leve mo ofer twa mo sakrifis; oubien, mo ofer twa mo lapriyer. e lerla mo atann.
5.4: To pa enn Bondie ki pran plezir dan lemal; seki fer lemal peyna plas kot twa.
5.5: Bann vantar pa pou tini dibout divan twa; to deteste move dimoun.
5.6: To detrir bann manter, SEGNER, to ayir bann kriminel ek bann voler.
5.7: Akoz labondans to gran lamour infini mo pou kapav rant dan to lakaz, bes mo latet dan direksion to Tanp sakre, e avek gran respe mo pou azenou.
5.8: SEGNER, twa ki zis, gid mwa, ena boukou ki pe kasiet pou atak mwa. Tir tou bann obstak ki ena lor sime tonn montre mwa pou swiv.
5.9: Pa kapav fer konfians seki sorti dan labous mo lennmi; zot lespri ranpli ar destriksion; zot lagorz kouma tonbo ouver; zot lalang servi pou tronp dimoun.
5.10: Bondie, deklar zot koupab; fer ki zot prop konplo devir zot anbalao; pous zot andeor to prezans akoz zot bann pese parski zot finn revolte kont twa.
5.11: Me tou ki konfie zot ar twa pou gagn to proteksion; zame zot pou fini sante ar sa lazwa la; protez bann ki kontan to nom, akoz twa zot kriye ar lazwa.
5.12: Wi, twa, SEGNER, to beni bann ki obeyir twa, to gran lamour anvlop zot e protez zot parey kouma enn boukliye.

6.1: SEGNER, mem to ankoler, pa kondann mwa; malgre to gran koler, pa pini mwa.
6.2: Pitie mwa, SEGNER, parski mo finn deperi net; geri mwa SEGNER parski tou mo lezo pe tranble.
6.3: Mo lekor ek mo lespri dan tourman, ziska kan, O SEGNER, ziska kan?
6.4: Retourne, SEGNER, vinn sov mwa; akoz to lamour infini vinn sov mo lavi.
6.5: Dan lemond lemor, dimoun pa rapel; ki pou kapav selebre twa laba?
6.6: Soufrans ek lapenn pe fini mwa; touleswar mo dra tranpe e mo lili inonde ar mo larm.
6.7: Mo lizie finn vinn feb telman sagrin finn gonfle li; mo nepli trouv kler telma mo ena adverser.
6.8: Tire ale, zot ki bann trafikan lemal! Mo SEGNER finn tann mo soufrans;
6.9: LESEGNER finn ekout mo siplikasion, LESEGNER finn akeyir mo lapriyer.
6.10: Mo ennmi pou zwenn defet ek imiliasion; enn sel kou zot pou rekile, kouver ar laont.

7.1: SEGNER mo Bondie, mo vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; bann persekiter pe pourswiv mwa; sov mwa, delivre mwa.
7.2: Sinon, kouma lion, zot pou desir-desir mwa, trenn-trenn mwa, e personn pa pou vinn delivre mwa.
7.3: SEGNER mo Bondie, si mo finn mal azir, si mo lame finn komet enn krim;
7.4: si mo finn trayir enn kamarad; si mo finn fer ditor mo ennmi san rezon;
7.5: alor, les mo ennmi pourswiv mwa e may mwa, les li zet mwa ater, pil lor mwa, e les mo kadav pouri dan lapousier.
7.6: Lev twa, SEGNER, montre to koler! Dres kont violans mo ennmi; Revey twa, twa ki finn etabli drwatir.
7.7: Rasanble bann pep otour twa e depi lor to tronn lao diriz ek ziz zot.
7.8: SEGNER, twa ki ziz lor tou dimoun, ziz mwa dapre mo drwatir, ziz mwa dapre mo lintegrite.
7.9: O Bondie, twa ki lasours drwatir, twa ki konn ziz nou panse ek nou santiman, detrir lemal bann move dimoun e fer bann dimoun ki drwat vinn pli for.
7.10: Bondie mo boukliye protekter e li sov seki obeyir li.
7.11: Bondie enn ziz ki fer zistis, enn Bondie ki montre so koler kont lemal toulezour.
7.12: Si move dimoun pa repantir Bondie pou fit so lepe e redi difil so lark;
7.13: li finn arm so fles pou li vize, li finn prepar so bann zarm mortel, bann fles anflame.
7.14: Gete kouma move dimoun akous lemal; zot met ba dezord e fer lelvaz desepsion.
7.15: Zot fouy enn trou, zot fer li bien fon; zot tom piktet dan trou ki zot finn fouye zotmem.
7.16: Zot move lintansion vinn zot prop pwazon; dan zot prop figir, zot zarm malsin eklate.
7.17: Mo pou rann gras LESEGNER pou so drwatir. Mo sant grander nom LESEGNER Pli Lao.

8.1: SEGNER, twa ki nou Segner, To nom li manifik partou lor later! To plas to laglwar pli ot ki lesiel.
8.2: Par labous bann zanfan ek tibaba to finn batir to lafors kont to bann ennmi, pou ferm labous bann adverser e seki rod lit kont twa.
8.3: Kan mo admir lesiel, travay ki to lame finn fer, kan mo get avek admirasion lalinn ek zetwal ki to finn met anplas,
8.4: ki valer imin ena pou ki li dan to panse? Ki enn sinp kreatir imin ete, pou to pran li otan kont?
8.5: Pourtan to finn fer li inpe mwins ki Bondie. To finn kouronn li ar laglwar ek loner.
8.6: To fer li gouvern lor travay to lame; to finn fer li siperyer ki lezot kreatir:
8.7: troupo bef ek mouton, e mem bann zanimo sovaz,
8.8: zwazo dan ler, pwason dan dilo, tou seki ale vini dan losean.
8.9: SEGNER, twa ki nou Segner, to nom li bien gran partou lor later!

9.1: Mo pou loue to grander, SEGNER, ar tou mo leker; mo pou rakont tou mervey ki to finn fer.
9.2: Akoz twa mo pou dan lazwa. Mo pou sant to gran nom, Bondie Pli Lao.
9.3: Mo ennmi kapitile ek rekile; zot tom sek, zot mor divan twa.
9.4: To finn defann mo drwa, finn fer zistis pou mwa; depi to tronn to donn zizman ki drwat.
9.5: To finn kraz bann nasion infidel; e to finn detrir bann move dimoun, zot nom finn efase pou toultan.
9.6: Nou ennmi nepli existe; to finn plati zot lavil e personn pa pou rapel zot.
9.7: Me LESEGNER pou regne pou toultan; depi so tronn bien ferm li pou pronons zizman.
9.8: E li ziz lemond antie dapre drwatir; e li garanti lazistis pou tou bann pep.
9.9: LESEGNER protez bann ki pe soufer dominasion; li donn sekirite kan maler pe tape.
9.10: Bann ki konn to nom, SEGNER, met tou zot konfians an twa parski zame to abandonn seki rod to sekour.
9.11: Anou sant louanz pou LESEGNER ki regne depi Zerizalem. Anou rakont so bann mervey parmi bann pep!
9.12: Bondie ki galoup deryer bann asasin, li rapel zot viktim; li pa bliye lavwa ki exprim soufrans bann malere.
9.13: SEGNER, ena pitie! Gete kouma mo soufer akoz mesanste mo ennmi! Twa ki tir mwa dan latrap lamor, SEGNER,
9.14: e ki permet mwa dibout divan lepep Zerizalem pou rakont zot kifer mo sant to louanz. Mo lazwa li gran parski to finn sov mwa.
9.15: Bann nasion finn tom dan trou ki zot finn fouye zotmem; zot finn dres enn latrap e zotmem ki finn rant ladan.
9.16: LESEGNER finn revel limem par zizman ki li finn fer; e move dimoun finn tas dan zot prop piez.
9.17: Bann move dimoun e bann nasion ki bliye Bondie zot tou finn fini dan lemond bann mor.
9.18: Bann ki dan lebezwin pa pou toultan pas mizer; e bann ki soufer povrete, zot lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
9.19: Lev twa, SEGNER! Pa les personn gagn laviktwar! Fer amenn bann nasion infidel divan to tronn e donn to zizman kont zot.
9.20: Fer zot per e respe twa, SEGNER; Fer zot tou bien konpran ki zot zis bann imin.

10.1: Kifer to res lwin ar nou, SEGNER? Kifer pa trouv twa dan moman detres?
10.2: Avek arogans move dimoun persekit bann pov; zot may bannla dan zot latrap.
10.3: Move dimoun li fier so prop move dezir; dimoun gourman li modi LESEGNER e li peyna respe pou li.
10.4: Dan so arogans move dimoun pa pran Bondie kont; dan so panse peyna plas pou Bondie.
10.5: Move dimoun reysi tou saki li fer. Li pa konpran lazistis divinn, sa tro lwin pou li e li mepriz so ennmi.
10.6: Li dir ar limem, “Peyna nannye ki kapav bouz mwa! Problem ek traka? Zame zot pa pou tous mwa! “
10.7: So labous ranpli ar malediksion; li modi, li koz manti, li menase; anba so lalang ena parol blesan ek mesanste.
10.8: Li kasiet pre ar bann vilaz san defans e atann so ler pou touy inosan; dan kasiet li espionn so viktim;
10.9: li res dan kasiet parey enn lion, li vey so ler pou atake; li ris bann pov, li trenn zot dan so piez.
10.10: Bann viktim san defans pa sape e zot tom dan so pouvwar.
10.11: Dan so panse move dimoun dir, “Bondie pa pran kont; so figir tourn lot kote, zame li pou trouve. “
10.12: Lev twa, SEGNER! Lev to lame pou pini zot, Bondie; pa bliye bann ki pe soufer!
10.13: Kifer move dimoun mepriz Bondie? Li dir, “Bondie pa pou demann mwa rann kont. “
10.14: Tousa pa vre! To bien trouv tou. To kone ena problem ek soufrans e to pran tou dan to lame. Bann ki feb ek san defans zot remet zotmem dan to lame. To finn toultan vinn osekour orfelin.
10.15: Kas lerin move dimoun ki viv dan pese; grenn zot mesanste ziska pa res nannye.
10.16: LESEGNER, limem Lerwa pou leternite. Bann ki priye lezot bondie pa pou ena plas dan pei LESEGNER.
10.17: SEGNER, to tann dezir bann ti dimoun, to pou ekout bann feb e donn zot kouraz.
10.18: To pou rann zistis an faver bann ki pe gagn kraze kouma orfelin; koumsa bann zans ordiner pou aret sem laterer.

11.1: LESEGNER, limem mo sekirite! Abe kouma to kapav dir mwa, “Anvole kouma zwazo, al kasiet lor montagn
11.2: parski move dimoun pe prepar zot zarm, zot finn plas zot fles dan ark, zot kasiet dan nwar, zot pe viz leker bon dimoun.
11.3: Kan fondasion lasosiete pe vir anbalao, dimoun ki viv drwat, ki li kapav fer? “
11.4: LESEGNER li dan so tanp sakre; LESEGNER so tronn li dan lesiel. Li sirvey tou bann imin partou e li examinn zot.
11.5: LESEGNER teste tou dimoun, so bon kouma so move. Li deteste bann ki servi violans.
11.6: Lor bann move dimoun li pou vers labrez ek souf anflame; enn labriz kouma dife, samem ki li pou gard pou zot.
11.7: Parski LESEGNER limem drwatir, li kontan bann aksion ki zis, bann ki viv drwat pou viv dan so prezans.

12.1: Vinn sekour nou, SEGNER! To bann dimoun lwayal finn disparet; dimoun onet ek fidel, pa trouv zot mem.
12.2: Dimoun partou nek koz manti; zot flate ar doub langaz pou tronp zot prosin.
12.3: Ki LESEGNER bous zot labous ki ranpli ar flatri! Atas zot lalang arogan ki dir,
12.4: “Ar parol dimiel nou lalang, nou gagn seki nou‘le. Nou labous dir seki nou anvi, e personn pa kapav aret nou. “
12.5: LESEGNER dir, “Parski bann pov pe soufer; bann oprime pe plor zot maler, Mwa mo pou leve, mo pou donn zot proteksion ki zot bizin. “
12.6: Nou fer konfians promes LESEGNER, so parol kler ek prop kouma larzan, enn metal presie ki finn pirifie set fwa dan dife laforz.
12.7: Twa, SEGNER, to gard to parol, protez nou touzour kont sa kalite move dimoun la.
12.8: Bann move dimoun pe rode partou, e partou koripsion pe gagn plis valer.

13.1: SEGNER, komie letan ankor to pou bliye mwa? Pou touzour? Komie letan ankor to pou tourn ledo ar mwa?
13.2: Komie letan ankor mo pou kourbe ar traka? Komie letan ankor lapenn pou nway mo leker lanwit-lizour? Komie letan ankor mo ennmi pou dominn lor mwa?
13.3: O SEGNER mo Bondie, reponn mo lapel! Refer mo lizie briye ar lasante; sinon zot pou ferme ar somey lamor;
13.4: sinon mo ennmi pou dir, “Mo pli for ki li, “ mo bann adverser pou dan lazwa si mo tonbe.
13.5: Mwa mo fer konfians to gran lamour fidel pou mwa; mo leker ranpli ar lazwa parski to finn sov mwa.
13.6: Mo pou kontinie sant pou LESEGNER parski li finn toultan bon anver mwa.

14.1: Bann inbesil panse dan zot leker, “Pou mwa, peyna Bondie! “ Zot koronpi; zot fer bann krim orib; peyna enn osi ki fer dibien.
14.2: LESEGNER depi lesiel lao pe obzerv limanite anba pou gete si ena dimoun ki posed lasazes; si ena dimoun ki pe rod ador Bondie.
14.3: Me zot tou finn perdi sime; zot tou zot dan koripsion. Peyna enn sel ki mars dapre drwatir, mem pa enn sel.
14.4: Bann ki fer lemal, zot pa konpran? Zot devor mo bann fidel kouma zot devor manze, e zot pa invok nom LESEGNER?
14.5: Me biento zot pou tranble ar freyer parski Bondie li avek seki obeyir li.
14.6: Bann move dimoun, zot rod devir plan ti-dimoun pov me zot bliye ki LESEGNER limem protekter bann pov.
14.7: Mo priye ki liberasion Izrael pou vinn depi oter Sion. Desandan Zakob, lepep Izrael pou dan gran lazwa kan LESEGNER fer zot retrouv zot dibien.

15.1: SEGNER, kisannla gagn drwa rant dan to Tanp? Kisannla gagn drwa viv lor Sion, to Montagn Sakre?
15.2: Dimoun ki san repros, ki fer seki drwat, ki koz vre depi enn leker sinser,
15.3: ki pa difam personn, li pa fer so kamarad ditor e li pa fann rimer lor so prosin;
15.4: li mepriz bann ki fer lemal, me li onor seki respekte LESEGNER; li gard so parol mem si sa kapav kout li bien ser.
15.5: Li pa pret larzan lor lintere; e zame li pa pran gous pou akiz bann inosan. Bann ki viv onet koumsa zame pa pou tonbe.

16.1: Protez mwa, Bondie; tomem mo sekirite.
16.2: Mo dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo Segner; mo pa ena pli gran boner ki twa. “
16.3: Dan sa pei la, bann ki swiv Bondie zot nob ek bon! Mo ena afeksion pou bann dimoun koumsa.
16.4: Bann ki galoup deryer lot bondie, zot pou miltipliye zot traka; Mo pa pou partisip dan zot sakrifis disan; mo refiz pronons zot nom.
16.5: SEGNER, tomem mo pli gran partaz, mo destin; mo lavenir ansekirite dan to lame.
16.6: Kado to donn mwa parey enn terin manifik; li enn par ki fer mwa gran plezir.
16.7: Mo loue LESEGNER parski li konsey mwa; mem aswar mo leker averti mwa.
16.8: LESEGNER li toultan dan mo lespri; li toultan la koste ar mwa, mo pa pou konn defet.
16.9: Akoz tousa mo leker ranpli ar gratitid ek boner e mo viv dan lape ek sekirite.
16.10: To pa abandonn mwa dan lamor. To pa les lamor aval to fidel.
16.11: To toultan montre mwa bon sime lavi; kan to la, mo lavi ranpli ar lazwa; dan to prezans ena boner pou touzour.

17.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer ki demann lazistis; tann mwa ki pe apel osekour; pa ignor enn lapriyer onet.
17.2: Ki mo zizman li sorti kot twa, parski to trouv ki bon, ki drwat.
17.3: Si to examinn fon mo leker; si pandan lanwit to vey mwa, si to teste mwa, to pa pou trouv okenn blam kont mwa. Mo labous zame dir move kiksoz
17.4: kouma lezot fer; mo prefer ekout to konsey ek evit sime violans.
17.5: Mo finn toultan mars lor sime ki to finn trase e zame mo pa finn derape.
17.6: Mo apel twa O Bondie parski mo kone to pou reponn mwa; mo sipliy twa ekout mwa ar pasians, ekout parol ki mo pe dir twa.
17.7: Montre mwa to gran lamour fidel, twa ki ofer proteksion bann ki rod sekour kot twa; zot sap dan lame bann agreser.
17.8: Protez mwa kouma trezor pli presie devan to lizie; kasiet mwa dan lonbraz to lezel
17.9: kont move dimoun ki rod fer mwa dimal, kont ennmi ki pe antour mwa.
17.10: Zot leker ros, san okenn pitie, e zot labous ranpli ar larogans.
17.11: Zot lasas mwa; kot mo bouze zot otour mwa; zot pe vey lokazion pou fer mwa manz lapousier.
17.12: Kouma lion zot pare pou desir-desir mwa. Parey enn zenn lion zot pe atann dan kasiet pou sot lor mwa.
17.13: O SEGNER, lev twa! Dibout divan zot, ranvers zot! Servi to lepe kont move dimoun pou sap mo lavi.
17.14: Protez mwa kont sa kalite dimoun la, ki rasazie ar ramas dibien olie fer lebien; fer ki zot zanfan ek tizanfan ranpli zot vant ziska zot rasazie.
17.15: Mwa, akoz lazistis, mo pou trouv twa divan mwa; e kan soley leve, to prezans ranpli mwa ar lazwa.

18.1: Mo kontan twa, SEGNER! Tomem mo lafors.
18.2: LESEGNER, limem mo sitadel, mo veritab fortres, mo liberater, mo Bondie, sitadel kot mo santi mwa ansekirite, boukliye ki protez mwa, ki defann mwa, ki sov mwa.
18.3: Mo apel LESEGNER osekour, ki merit tou louanz! E li delivre mwa kont mo ennmi.
18.4: Danze lamor ti pe fer mo letour; gro vag destriksion ti pe roul ver mwa.
18.5: Danze lamor ti antour mwa, bann tom ti pare pou aval mwa.
18.6: Dan mo detres mo kriye LESEGNER, mo ti dimann mo Bondie vinn ed mwa. Depi dan so tanp li ti tann mo soufrans; mo lavwa finn ariv ziska li.
18.7: Lerla later ti tranble ek bouze; fondasion montagn sakouye ek vibre parski Bondie ti bien ankoler.
18.8: Lafime ti pe sorti par so nene; depi so labous, laflam ki griy partou, ti akonpanye par labrez anflame.
18.9: Li ti deroul lesiel kouma enn tapi, e li desann lor later lor enn gro niaz nwar.
18.10: Li ti mont lor enn seribin, li ti anvole, li ti plane lor lezel divan.
18.11: Enn lanvlop marenwar ti kasiet li e bann niaz nwar epe gonfle ar dilo ti kouver li.
18.12: Enn lalimier bien for ti divan li, lagrel ek labrez anflame ki ti pers bann niaz.
18.13: Lavwa LESEGNER ti eklate kouma loraz e lavwa Bondie Pli Lao ti rezone partou.
18.14: Li lans so bann fles e so bann ennmi sove, ar enn filwar zekler li ti fer zot galoup andezord, disparet.
18.15: SEGNER, to koler kouma siklonn, ler to exprim to menas e to laraz li fer fon lamer paret, li met fondasion later touni.
18.16: LESEGNER ti desann net depi lao e ti tir mwa depi kot mo ti pe nwaye.
18.17: Li ti liber mwa, kas mo lasenn, parski mo ennmi ti tro for, mo adverser tro pwisan.
18.18: Zot ti profit mo maler pou atak mwa me LESEGNER ti vinn defann mwa.
18.19: Li ti tir mwa dan danze, ti liber mwa, e ti sov mwa parski li ti kontan mwa.
18.20: LESEGNER rekonpans mwa dapre mo drwatir; li beni mwa parski mo lame prop.
18.21: Mo finn touzour swiv sime LESEGNER e zame mo pa finn tourn mo ledo ar mo Bondie.
18.22: So bann lalwa toultan divan mwa, e mo pa finn dezobeyir so bann instriksion.
18.23: Li kone ki peyna okenn blam kont mwa, e ki mo pran boukou prekosion pou pa fer pese.
18.24: Li rekonpans mwa dapre mo drwatir me osi parski li trouve ki mo lame prop.
18.25: SEGNER to fidel ar seki montre limem fidel; to montre to san repros ar seki san repros;
18.26: Ar seki sinser, to montre ki to sinser, me ar move dimoun to montre to pli malin.
18.27: To sov ti-dimoun ki konn imiliasion, to abes bann ki ranpli ar lorgey.
18.28: SEGNER mo Bondie, to lalimier mo lavi, to ekler mwa dan teneb.
18.29: Grasa twa mo kapav fer fas enn latroup gerye; ar to lafors mo kapav fransi enn miray.
18.30: Sa Bondie la, li plis ki parfe; LESEGNER so parol ena valer e kouma enn boukliye li protez seki rod so proteksion.
18.31: LESEGNER tousel ki Bondie! Bondie tousel kapav defann nou.
18.32: Limem ki donn mwa lafors e montre mwa sime ki sir.
18.33: Kouma serf dan vale ek lor montagn li montre mwa galoupe san tonbe.
18.34: Li antrenn mwa pou konba, mo lebra kapav redi enn ark an bronz.
18.35: To finn donn mwa to boukliye ki sov mwa; to lame drwat finn soutenir mwa; to bonte finn rann mwa for.
18.36: To finn donn mwa plis lespas pou mo kapav avanse, sa finn anpes mwa tonbe.
18.37: Mo finn pourswiv mo ennmi ziska mo finn zwenn zot; mo finn lager ar zot ziska mo finn fini zot;
18.38: mo finn koup-koup zot, fors zot larg lekor; e kot mo lipie, zot tonbe dan ladefet.
18.39: To nouri mo kouraz pou konba, pou fer mo ennmi pliye devan mwa.
18.40: To fer mo ennmi sove ale; mo‘nn detrir mo bann adverser.
18.41: Zot dimann sekour me personn pa tann zot; zot rod koudme LESEGNER me li pa reponn zot;
18.42: mo kraz zot ziska zot vinn lapousier ki divan sarye ale; mo kraz zot kouma labou lor sime.
18.43: To finn protez mwa kont dimoun rebel, e to finn swazir mwa kouma lerwa diferan nasion; dimoun ki mo pa ti kone, zordi form parti lepep ki mo pe dirize.
18.44: Pep etranze akeyir mwa kouma zot lerwa; kouma zot tann mo koze, zot aksepte obeyir mwa;
18.45: zot kouraz fonn; zot tranble letan zot kit zot fortres.
18.46: Mo SEGNER li vivan! Mo loue mo Bondie solid! Mo loue Bondie ki finn sov mwa!
18.47: Limem ki donn mwa laviktwar kont mo ennmi; Limem ki fors bann lezot nasion aksepte mo regn;
18.48: tomem ki protez mwa kont ennmi. To finn ed mwa ena viktwar lor bann adverser, e to finn delivre mwa kont dimoun violan.
18.49: Pou tousala, SEGNER, mo pou dir to grander parmi bann nasion ki pa konn twa; e for-for mo pou sant to louanz.
18.50: Bondie donn laviktwar lerwa ki li finn swazir; li montre so gran lamour infini pou lerwa ki li finn konsakre, pou David ek so desandan pou toultan.

19.1: Lesiel revel klerman laglwar Bondie! Travay so lame proklame par zetwal lao dan lesiel.
19.2: Sak zour rakont sa lot zour ki vini; lanwit deklar lot lanwit sa nouvel la.
19.3: Pena diskour, pena parol pou dir, pa tann okenn lavwa.
19.4: Malgre sa zot mesaz travers partou; zot lavwa vwayaz ziska finfon later. Dan lesiel Bondie finn ranz enn lakaz pou soley;
19.5: kouma nouvo marye, li leve, li sorti dan lasam, kouma enn atlet anform li galoup so parkour ziska aswar.
19.6: Li komans depi les, li al ziska lwes, so saler sof partou.
19.7: Lalwa LESEGNER li parfe; li donn nouvo lafors pou viv. Temwaniaz LESEGNER li valab toultan, li donn sazes bann dimoun sinp.
19.8: Instriksion LESEGNER li drwat ek zis, li ranpli leker ar lazwa. Komandman LESEGNER bien kler li ouver nou lizie.
19.9: Respe pou LESEGNER li bien bon, li valab pou toultan. Zizman ki LESEGNER rande li vre, e zot touzour zis.
19.10: Zot pli presie ki lor, ki boukou lor rafine; li ena plis douser ki dimiel pli dou ki dimiel ki fek koule.
19.11: Zot donn mwa, to serviter, gran konesans e kan mo obeyir zot mo gagn rekonpans.
19.12: Kisannla kapav trouv so prop febles? Pardonn mwa bann erer ki mo pa pe trouve.
19.13: Protez mwa to serviter kont larogans; ki sa pa dominn mwa. Lerla mo pou san repros, e inosan konsernan bann move ditor.
19.14: Fer ki parol mo labous e meditasion mo leker zot akseptab devan twa, O SEGNER, tomem mo protekter ek mo liberater.

20.1: Mo priye ki LESEGNER reponn ou kan ou dan lapenn! Ki Bondie, ki nou anset Zakob ti priye, protez ou.
20.2: Mo priye ki li avoy ou so led depi Tanp sakre e beni ou depi montagn Sion.
20.3: Ki li aksepte tou ou bann ofrand e ki ou sakrifis fer li plezir.
20.4: Mo priye ki li donn ou seki ou bizin e ki li fer ou bann plan realize.
20.5: Nou pou kriy nou lazwa pou partaz ou laviktwar, nou pou loue nou Bondie ar bann banyer pou selebre ou triyonf. Mo priye ki LESEGNER realiz tou ou dezir.
20.6: Mo sir aster ki LESEGNER pou donn laviktwar so lerwa ki li finn konsakre; Bondie pou reponn lerwa depi so sanktyer dan lesiel e par so pwisans pou donn li laviktwar.
20.7: Ena ki krwar dan saryo ki servi pou lager; ena ki krwar dan pwisans so seval, me nou, nou fer konfians LESEGNER nou Bondie.
20.8: Bann ki krwar dan saryo ek dan seval pou pliye ek pou tonbe me nou, nou pou leve e nou pou tini dibout.
20.9: SEGNER, donn lerwa laviktwar. Reponn nou letan nou apel twa!

21.1: SEGNER, lerwa dan lazwa parski to finn donn li lafors; li pe selebre parski to finn donn li laviktwar.
21.2: To finn satisfer dezir so leker, to pa finn refiz seki li finn dimande.
21.3: To finn beni so lavi ar boukou benediksion, e lor so latet to finn plas enn kouronn lor fin.
21.4: Li ti dimann twa lavi e to finn donn li lavi ki dire pou touzour.
21.5: So laglwar li gran parski ena to lame laviktwar ladan; to finn donn li repitasion ek mazeste.
21.6: To finn beni li pou toultan; e to prezans ranpli li ar lazwa.
21.7: Lerwa finn met so konfians dan LESEGNER, e akoz lamour infini Bondie Pli Lao nannye pa pou bouz lerwa kot li ete.
21.8: To lame pou sezi tou to bann ennmi; to pwisans pou sezi bann ki ayir twa.
21.9: Kan to aparet to pou anflam zot kouma dibwa sek dan four; LESEGNER so lakoler pou anglouti zot e dife pou devor zot.
21.10: Okenn zot desandan pa pou sape; zot zanfan pou efase parmi limanite.
21.11: Mem si zot konplot lemal kont twa e prepar enn move kou, zot pa pou reysi
21.12: parski to zarm ki viz zot li redoutab e li pou fer zot zet zarm, sove ale.
21.13: Lev twa SEGNER, montre to pwisans! Nou, nou pou sante ek nou pou loue to pouvwar.

22.1: Bondie, mo Bondie, kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Dan dezespwar mo kriye osekour, me to sekour pa vini.
22.2: Mo Bondie, lizour mo sipliy twa ed mwa, me san repons; lanwit mo kriye, mo pa gagn okenn repo.
22.3: Pourtan tomem sel Bondie ki Sin; to lor to tronn, omilie louanz lepep Izrael.
22.4: Nou anset ti met zot konfians total dan twa; zot ti fer twa konfians e to ti delivre zot.
22.5: Zot ti sipliy twa vinn ed zot, e to ti sov zot; zot lafwa ti dan twa e zame zot ti regrete.
22.6: Me mwa, pa kapav dir mo enn imin; mo kouma enn lever; bann dimoun insilte mwa, lepep rezet mwa.
22.7: Tou dimoun mepriz mwa, mok mwa; zot boufonn mwa, zot fer grimas.
22.8: Zot dir, “Get li! Li fer konfians LESEGNER! Kifer to Bondie pa vinn delivre twa? Si li kontan twa kifer li pa vinn ed twa?”
22.9: Pourtan Bondie, twa ki ti ed mwa travers lakousman; twa ki ti poz mwa ansekirite pre kot leker mo mama.
22.10: Depi mo nesans finn konfie mwa dan to lame; depi dan vant mo mama tomem mo Bondie.
