22.11: Bondie, pa res lwin ar mwa. Traka ek danze pe koste. To tousel kapav ed mwa.
22.12: Mo ennmi pe antour mwa kouma toro feros; kouma toro ki sorti Basann zot pe fons otour mwa.
22.13: Zot mizo ouver kouma lion afame ki pou desir mwa bout par bout.
22.14: Mo lafors pe ale, pe koule kouma dilo; tou bann lezo dan mo lekor finn disloke net, e mo leker kouma lasir, li pe fonn dan mwa.
22.15: Mo labous sek; mo lalang tas ar mo pale; mo lagorz amare. Koumadir to finn larg mwa dan lapousier lamor!
22.16: Bann lisien pe tom lor mwa; enn geng kriminel inn anserkle mwa, zot pers mo lame mo lipie.
22.17: Mo finn vinn lapo-lezo, tou mo lezo deor; dimoun fixe zot regar lor mwa;
22.18: mo ennmi pe lager pou gagn mo linz; zot tir lakoutpay.
22.19: Me twa, SEGNER, pa res lwin ar mwa! Vini vit, vinn sov mwa, twa mo lafors!
22.20: Anpes lepe mo ennmi pran mo lavi; sov mwa dan grif bann lisien;
22.21: anpes lion devor mwa; protez mwa kont korn bann toro sovaz. To finn reponn mwa!
22.22: Mo pou rakont tou dimoun tou seki to finn fer; dan nou lasanble mo pou sant to louanz.
22.23: Zot tou ki respekte ek ador LESEGNER, donn li laglwar! Zot tou desandan Zakob, donn li tou loner! Zot tou pep Izrael, ador li avek reverans!
22.24: Li pa abandonn ni mepriz bann malere; zame li pa bliye zot douler. Li pa detourn so regar, li toultan reponn lapel dimoun pov ki dimann led.
22.25: Tomem lasours mo louanz dan gran lasanble bann fidel; mo pou akonplir mo promes devan tou bann ki ador twa.
22.26: Pou ena boukou manze pou bann pov; bann ki pe rod LESEGNER pou loue li. Ki LESEGNER donn zot tou boner ek prosperite pou toultan.
22.27: Ziska finfon later, zot tou pou rapel e zot tou pou retourn ver LESEGNER. Bann fami diferan tribi ek nasion pou prostern devan li ek ador li.
22.28: Limem SEGNER siprem ki diriz liniver.
22.29: Tou bann ki ris pou fer fet e pou ador Lesegner; seki pe desann dan lapousier lamor, seki pakapav gard lavi, pou bes latet divan so grander.
22.30: Zenerasion fitir pou servi li; enn zenerasion pou rakont enn lot grander nou Segner.
22.31: Zanfan ki pa‘nkor ne enn zour pou tann dir, “Lesegner ti defann e protez so pep.”

23.1: LESEGNER limem mo berze; akoz sa mo pa mank nannye.
23.2: Li amenn mwa repoze dan patiraz lerb tann; li gid mwa kot rwiso dilo trankil,
23.3: pou mo regagn lavi; li kondir mwa lor bon sime pou loner so nom.
23.4: Mem kan mo travers vale bien som, parey lamor nannye pa fer mwa per parski to toultan la koste ar mwa, ar to baton berze to protez mwa.
23.5: To dres latab pou mwa divan mo bann adverser. To vers delwil parfime lor mo latet pou resevwar mwa ar loner, e to plin mo koup ziska li deborde.
23.6: Mo kone ki to bonte ek to lamour pou akonpagn mwa toulezour mo lavi, e mo pou res dan lakaz mo SEGNER osi lontan ki mo viv.

24.1: Lemond ek tou seki ena ladan zot pou LESEGNER; later ek tou seki viv lor la zot‘si pou li.
24.2: Li finn konstrir tousala lor lak souterin; li finn etabli fondasion dan lili losean.
24.3: Kisannla gagn drwa mont lor montagn LESEGNER? Kisannla gagn drwa rant dan so Tanp sakre?
24.4: Bann ki zot lame prop ek zot leker kler, ki pa priye idol e ki pa fer promes dan vid.
24.5: Dimoun prop gagn benediksion LESEGNER; Bondie so Sover pou rekonet ki li zis.
24.6: Sa bann bon dimoun la zot mars ver Bondie e zot viv dan prezans Bondie ki Zakob adore.
24.7: Bann portay! Ouver angran zot batan. Ouver bann batan laport ansien, pou les Lerwa dan tou so laglwar rantre.
24.8: Kisannla sa gran Lerwa la? LESEGNER, for ek pwisan, Limem SEGNER ki viktorye dan konba.
24.9: Bann portay! Ouver angran zot batan. Ouver bann batan laport ansien, pou les Lerwa viktorye rantre.
24.10: Kisannla sa gran Lerwa la? LESEGNER, ki pli pwisan ki tou. Limem Lerwa ki ena tou laglwar!

25.1: O SEGNER, mo ofer twa lapriyer e adorasion.
25.2: Mo Bondie, mo met mo konfians an twa. Pa les mwa gagn laont; pa les mo ennmi gagn laviktwar lor mwa.
25.3: Bann ki kont lor twa pa pou tom dan laont; Zot pou tom dan laont, bann ki trayir san okenn rezon.
25.4: SEGNER, montre mwa to bon sime; ansegn mwa swiv to parkour.
25.5: Gid mwa dan to laverite e ansegn mwa parski tomem Bondie ki sov mwa. Mo kont lor twa toulezour mo lavi.
25.6: Pa bliye, SEGNER, konpasion ek lamour infini ki to finn donn nou depi komansman.
25.7: Pa rapel mo bann erer ek bann pese zenes; me dapre to lamour infini, rapel mwa akoz to bonte, SEGNER.
25.8: Parski LESEGNER li bon ek li drwat, li ansegn bann peser ki sime ki bon.
25.9: Ar li dimoun pa vantar zot aprann seki drwat parski li montre zot so bon sime.
25.10: Ar lamour infini ek fidelite li gid dimoun ki gard so lalians e ki obeyir so instriksion.
25.11: Akoz to nom, SEGNER, pardonn mo bann tor, zot grav.
25.12: Bann ki ena reverans pou LESEGNER li pou montre zot ki sime bizin swiv.
25.13: Zot pou viv dan prosperite e zot zanfan pou posed later.
25.14: LESEGNER ena lamitie pou seki obeyir li e li konfirm so lalians ar so bann fidel.
25.15: Mo tourn ver LESEGNER pou gagn so led e li toultan sap mwa dan bann piez.
25.16: Tourn ver mwa, SEGNER, ena pitie pou mwa, parski mo tousel ek mo dan lapenn.
25.17: Langwas finn miltipliye dan mo leker, liber mwa dan mo detres.
25.18: Pran kont mo detres ek mo soufrans, efas tou mo bann pese.
25.19: Nek gete ki kantite ennmi ki otour mwa e gete kouma zot ayir mwa avek violans.
25.20: Protez mwa, sov mwa; anpes mwa tom dan laont. Zis to tousel ki kapav garanti mo sekirite.
25.21: Fer ki lonete ek drwatir prezerv mwa parski ar lesperans mo kont lor twa.
25.22: Bondie, liber lepep Izrael dan so tourman!

26.1: SEGNER proklam mo inosans parski mo finn viv enn lavi san repros, e mo finn met mo konfians dan LESEGNER, konfians ki pa bouze.
26.2: Examinn mwa, teste mwa, SEGNER, examinn mo lespri ek mo santiman.
26.3: To lamour infini gid mo pa, to fidelite diriz mo lavi.
26.4: Mo pa frekant dimoun malonet, ni mars ar bann ipokrit;
26.5: mo deteste bann ki viv dan pese e mo evit koste ar bann move dimoun.
26.6: Mo lav mo lame pou montre mo inosans; mo mars dan lapriyer otour to lotel, SEGNER.
26.7: Mo sant sante remersiman e rakont for-for tou bann mervey ki to finn fer.
26.8: O SEGNER, mo kontan lakaz kot to viv; e landrwa kot to laglwar li prezan.
26.9: Pa tret mwa parey dimoun ki dan pese; pa pran mo lavi kouma pran lavi bann kriminel;
26.10: zot lame ranpli ar trafik malprop; zot lame drwat pare pou aksepte gous.
26.11: Me mwa, mo viv enn lavi san repros; ena pitie, delivre mwa!
26.12: Mo lipie repoz lor fondasion solid; dan bann gran lasanble mo pou loue LESEGNER.

27.1: LESEGNER, limem mo lalimier; limem mo sover. Mo pena pou per personn. LESEGNER protez mwa kont tou danze; mo pena pou tranble devan personn.
27.2: Kan move dimoun atak mwa pou fer mwa ditor, mo bann adverser e bann ennmi zot ki kogne; zot ki tonbe.
27.3: Mem kan enn larme antour mwa mo leker pa per nannye; mem si lager deklare kont mwa mo lafwa res ferm.
27.4: Mo finn dimann LESEGNER enn sel zafer; zis enn zafer, pa plis: permet mwa viv dan lakaz LESEGNER pou touzour; permet mwa get avek admirasion magnifisans LESEGNER; e dimann li gid mwa.
27.5: Kan letan dir vini li pou gard mwa ansekirite dan so Tanp; li pou kasiet mwa anba so latant; li pou plas mwa ansekirite dan enn landrwa bien ot.
27.6: Lerla mo pou gagn laviktwar lor mo ennmi; dan lazwa san limit mo pou ofer sakrifis dan so Tanp e mo pou sant louanz e zoue lamizik pou LESEGNER.
27.7: Ekout mwa SEGNER, letan mo apel twa; ena pitie pou mwa, reponn mwa.
27.8: Mo leker dir, “Tourn twa ver LESEGNER!” Ver tomem ki mo tourne pou adore, SEGNER.
27.9: Pa tourn to ledo ar mwa! Pa abandonn to serviter fidel avek koler; to finn toultan soutenir mwa; pa rezet mwa, pa abandonn mwa, Bondie mo Sover.
27.10: Mama-papa kapav abandonn zanfan me LESEGNER li pou toultan akeyir mwa, so zanfan.
27.11: Montre mwa SEGNER, seki bizin fer; ed mwa pran bon sime ki peyna obstak, parski mo ena boukou ennmi.
27.12: Pa larg mwa dan grif mo ennmi ki servi mansonz bann fos temwin pou menas mwa avek violans.
27.13: Mwa mo sir mo pou trouv bonte LESEGNER isi dan sa lavi la.
27.14: Fer konfians LESEGNER. Gard lafwa, pa perdi kouraz. Atann LESEGNER ar konfians.

28.1: Ver twa, SEGNER, mo apel osekour! Tomem mo sitadel, pa refiz ekout mwa. Si to gard silans mo pou kouma bann ki desann dan trou lamor.
28.2: Pran mwa kont ler mo apel osekour; tann mo detres ler mo lev lame lao dan lapriyer ver to Tanp ki sin.
28.3: Pa met mwa dan mem pagne ar move dimoun ki viv dan lemal, bann ki ena disik dan labous me fiel dan leker.
28.4: Pini zot pou zot move aksion, e dapre lemal ki zot finn fer; pini zot pou tou malpropte ki zot fer; e dapre seki zot merite.
28.5: Zot pa pran okenn kont travay LESEGNER, ni aksion ki so lame finn fer. Akoz samem li pou demolir zot e zame li pou rebatir zot.
28.6: Mo loue to nom SEGNER! LESEGNER finn tann mo lapriyer.
28.7: LESEGNER protez mwa, li defann mwa; mo finn met mo konfians dan li. Li ed mwa e li met lazwa dan mo leker. Ala kifer mo sant kantik pou dir li mersi.
28.8: LESEGNER limem lafors so pep; li fortres ki sov lerwa ki li finn konsakre.
28.9: SEGNER sov to pep e beni to dibien personel. Vinn zot berze e pran zot swin aster, pli divan e toultan.

29.1: Donn LESEGNER, zot bann kreatir lesiel, donn LESEGNER so laglwar ek so pouvwar.
29.2: Donn LESEGNER laglwar ki so nom merite, ador LESEGNER ki sin, ler li paret dan so mazeste.
29.3: Lavwa LESEGNER rezone lor lamer; Bondie laglwar rezone kouma toner, LESEGNER rezone lor tou bann losean.
29.4: Lavwa LESEGNER ranpli ar pwisans. Lavwa LESEGNER ranpli ar mazeste.
29.5: Lavwa LESEGNER frakas bann pie, pie pli for ki ena dan Liban;
29.6: Li fer montagn Liban sot-sote kouma ti vo; e montagn Ermon sot-sote kouma ti toro.
29.8: Lavwa LESEGNER fer dezer tranble, mem dezer dan Kades tranble.
29.9: Bann gran pie tranble ar lavwa LESEGNER; tou fey dan lafore grene. Lerla adorater LESEGNER kriye, “Glwara twa Bondie. “
29.10: LESEGNER lor so tronn dominn tou bann losean. LESEGNER limem lerwa eternel.
29.11: LESEGNER donn lafors so pep, ki LESEGNER beni so pep e donn li lape.

30.1: Mo proklam to grander, SEGNER, parski to finn sov mwa e to finn anpes mo ennmi imilie mwa.
30.2: O SEGNER, mo Bondie, mo ti kriye osekour e to ti geri mwa;
30.3: SEGNER to remont mwa pou lamor pa anglouti mwa. Mo ti pe al ver trou lamor me to ti redonn mwa lavi.
30.4: Zot tou bann fidel sant louanz LESEGNER! Selebre so nom ki sin, e dir li mersi.
30.5: So koler tengn vit me so bonte li permanan. Si aswar larm kapav koule gramatin lazwa briye.
30.6: Mo ti santi momem ansekirite e mo ti dir, “Mo pa pou konn defet.”
30.7: SEGNER, to ti bien bon anver mwa; to proteksion ti kouma enn sitadel lor montagn. Me ler to ti tourn to ledo ar mwa mo ti gagn bien per.
30.8: Ver twa mo ti kriye osekour, SEGNER; mo ti sipliy lesegner,
30.9: “Ki lavantaz ena dan mo lamor, si mo desann dan lafos lamor? Eski lapousier pou sant to laglwar? Eski zot kapav proklam to fidelite?
30.10: SEGNER, ekout mwa! Pran mwa kont! Ed mwa SEGNER! “
30.11: To finn fer mo tristes vinn enn ladans ki exprim lazwa; to finn efas mo sagrin e plonz mwa dan boner,
30.12: pou ki mo leker loue twa, e pa gard silans! Bizin sant to grander. SEGNER, twa ki mo Bondie, mo pa pou aret dir twa mersi.

31.1: Mo vinn ver twa, SEGNER, pou dimann proteksion; pa les mwa tom dan laont; dan to fidelite, delivre mwa.
31.2: Ekout mo lapriyer; vinn sekourir mwa vit. Tomem sitadel ki protez mwa; tomem fortres ki sov mwa.
31.3: Twa ki mo sitadel ek mo fortres gid mwa e montre mwa bon sime.
31.4: Anpes mwa tom dan piez ki finn plase pou mwa, parski tomem mo proteksion kont danze.
31.5: Mo finn met mo lavi dan to lame; to delivre mwa, SEGNER, Bondie fidel.
31.6: To ayir bann ki ador fos bondie; mwa, mo met tou mo konfians dan LESEGNER.
31.7: Mo selebre lazwa ek boner dan to lamour infini parski to konn mo soufrans ek traka ki pe kraz mwa.
31.8: To finn anpes mo ennmi may mwa; to finn kas mo lasenn, to finn donn mwa laliberte.
31.9: SEGNER, ena pitie pou mwa parski mo dan tourman; mo lizie bien fay parski mo larm finn bril li; mo lekor antie feb ek mo fatige;
31.10: Gro sagrin finn rwinn mo lasante e larm pe ris mwa ver lamor. Mo bann tor finn afebli mwa e mo lezo pe deperi.
31.11: Mo ennmi, sirtou mo prop vwazin mepriz mwa; bann ki konn mwa zot per mwa; kan zot trouv mwa, zot sove al kasiet.
31.12: Dimoun finn fini bliye mwa, koumadir mo finn fini mor; mo initil kouma lasiet ki finn brize.
31.13: Mo tann mo ennmi pe mirmire; dife lor mwa partou kote. Zot pe tir plan kont mwa; zot pe konplote pou touy mwa.
31.14: Me mo met tou mo konfians an twa, O SEGNER; mo dir, “Twa ki mo Bondie. “
31.15: Mo bann zour dan to lame; protez mwa kont mo ennmi; ed mwa kont seki pe persekit mwa.
31.16: Ki lalimier to prezans briy lor mwa, to serviter; sov mwa dan to lamour infini.
31.17: Pa les mwa tom dan laont, SEGNER, parski mo finn kriye ver twa; me ki move dimoun konn laont, les zot koule an silans dan trou lamor.
31.18: Ferm zot labous dan silans lamor! Zot ki bann gran manter insolan ek arogan ki zet labou lor dimoun ki viv drwat.
31.19: Li vreman gran sa bonte ki to rezerve pou dimoun ki ena respe pou twa! Devan lizie tou dimoun to montre to bonte pou bann ki fer twa konfians.
31.20: To prezans garanti zot sekirite e anpes zot tom dan piez bann konploter; dan labri kot to finn kasiet zot, insilt zot ennmi pa pe reysi fer zot dimal.
31.21: Tou louanz pou LESEGNER! Li merveye, manier li ti donn mwa so lamour infini ler ennmi ti pe anserkle mwa pou atake!
31.22: Mo ti dezanpare ek trouble, mo ti krwar Bondie ti finn abandonn mwa. Me li ti tann mwa ler mo kriye osekour.
31.23: Ador LESEGNER zot so bann fidel! LESEGNER protez bann krwayan; Li pini bann vantar, ki pou pey doub.
31.24: Pa bes lebra; pa perdi kouraz zot tou ki finn met zot lesperans dan LESEGNER.

32.1: Bienere sa dimoun ki so ofans efase, ki so pese pardone!
32.2: Bienere bann dimoun lor ki LESEGNER pa met okenn sarz, e LESEGNER deklare ki pena frod dan so leker.
32.3: Kan mo pa ti konfes mo pese sa ti ronz mwa lanwit-lizour, mo ti deperi.
32.4: Lanwit-lizour to lame ti koriz mwa; mo lafors koumans fonn kouma laroze ler soley leve.
32.5: Lerla mo ti desid pou konfes mo pese ar twa; pa ti kasiet okenn fot. Mo dir, “Mo bizin konfes mo pese avek LESEGNER. “ E twa to ti pardonn mwa.
32.6: Akoz sa tou to bann serviter fidel bizin priye twa kan problem leve; kan inondasion pe fons lor zot, zot kone zot ena to proteksion.
32.7: Tomem mo sanktyer; twa ki protez mwa ler siklonn pe tape, e bann sante lor to delivrans pou partou otour mwa.
32.8: Mo pou ansegn twa e montre twa ki sime bizin pran; Mo pou gid twa e konsey twa.
32.9: Pa fer teti kouma seval ek bourik ki zis konpran kravas ek brid; lerla nannye pa pou ariv twa.
32.10: Lasoufrans pe atann bann ki fer lemal me bann ki met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot proteze par so lamour infini.
32.11: Zot ki viv dan drwatir, dans avek lazwa dan LESEGNER! Kriye zot lazwa, zot ki ena leker drwat.

33.1: Tou ki viv dan drwatir sant for-for zot lazwa dan LESEGNER. Li bon sant so louanz tou dimoun ki obeyir li.
33.2: Dir mersi LESEGNER ar lagitar; selebre li ar lamizik lor sitar.
33.3: Sant sante ki zorey pa‘nkor tande; zwe bann instriman ar talan e kriy zot lazwa.
33.4: Parol LESEGNER zot vre; tou seki li fer, zot parfe dan so fidelite.
33.5: LESEGNER kontan tou seki drwat ek zis; So lamour infini prezan partou lor later.
33.6: LESEGNER ti kree liniver par so parol; par souf so labous li ti donn nesans soley, lalinn ek zetwal.
33.7: Li ramas tou dilo dan enn sel plas; li met tou bann losean dan enn ladig imans.
33.8: Later antie bizin ador LESEGNER! Tou bann abitan dan lemond bizin ena gran respe divan li!
33.9: Li pronons parol, li kree lemond; Li donn lord, liniver pran nesans.
33.10: LESEGNER kas plan bann diferan popilasion; Li anpes zot realiz zot bann proze.
33.11: Me LESEGNER so plan li res valab toultan; so proze li res vivan eternelman.
33.12: Enn nasion li ere kan LESEGNER limem so Bondie, enn pep li bienere si LESEGNER finn swazir li kouma so prop dibien.
33.13: Depi lesiel LESEGNER get limanite anba;
33.14: depi so tronn lao li obzerv tou bann abitan lor later.
33.15: Limem ki ti form zot leker e li kone tou seki zot fer.
33.16: Enn lerwa pa gagn lager zis parski so larme gran ek for; enn solda pa gagn laviktwar zis parski li fizikman for;
33.17: bon seval pa ase pou amenn laviktwar; zis so lafors pa ase pou sov so kavalie.
33.18: LESEGNER vey lor bann ki ena respe pou li; bann ki fer konfians so lamour infini.
33.19: Li anpes lamor koste e li nouri zot, mem kan lafaminn pe fer ravaz.
33.20: Avek lespwar nou atann lor LESEGNER; li protez nou e li ed nou.
33.21: Limem ki donn lazwa ki dan nou leker, nou ena konfians dan Bondie ki sin.
33.22: SEGNER, donn nou toultan to lamour infini parski nou lespwar li zis dan twa.

34.1: Toultan mo pou remersie LESEGNER; zame mo pa pou aret sant so louanz.
34.2: Mo pou loue li pou tou seki li finn fer; bann ki dan soufrans, ekout mwa e ki lazwa ranpli zot leker.
34.3: Ansam ar mwa anou proklam grander LESEGNER; anou sant ansam laglwar LESEGNER.
34.4: Mo ti dimann LESEGNER vinn ed mwa e li ti reponn, li ti balye prop tou mo bann angwas.
34.5: Bann ki fer li konfians zot dan bien; zot pena laont lor zot figir.
34.6: Enn malere kriy osekour; LESEGNER finn tann li, e finn sov li dan tou so detres.
34.7: So bann anz kanp otour bann ki respekte LESEGNER, e li sov zot.
34.8: Goute e gete konbien LESEGNER li bon. Bienere bann ki swazir so proteksion.
34.9: Zot tou zot bizin onor LESEGNER parski bann ki obeyir so instriksion zame pa pou mank nannye.
34.10: Bann dimoun pwisan kapav konn lafin ek laswaf, me bann ki obeyir LESEGNER pou toultan gagn seki zot bizin.
34.11: Vini zenes, koste kot mwa; les mo montre zot kouma respekte LESEGNER.
34.12: To anvi viv bien? To anvi viv lontan dan lazwa?
34.13: Alor aret koz lemal; aret koz manti.
34.14: Evit lemal e fer dibien; fer zefor pou ki lape fleri partou.
34.15: LESEGNER protez bann ki dan bon sime e li ekout zot douler;
34.16: LESEGNER deteste bann ki dan lemal e ler zot mor zot disparet dan memwar bann dimoun.
34.17: Bann ki dan bon sime apel osekour, LESEGNER tann zot, li tir zot dan zot langwas.
34.18: LESEGNER li toultan pre ar seki pe perdi kouraz; li replant lespwar kot lespwar finn mor.
34.19: Dimoun ki obeyir Bondie fer fas boukou traka me LESEGNER delivre li dan tousala;
34.20: li vey lor tou lezo dimounla, pa enn sel pou brize.
34.21: Lemal li detrir bann ki fer lemal; bann ki ayir bon dimoun zame zot pou sape.
34.22: LESEGNER pou toultan sov so pep; bann ki al ver li pou gagn so proteksion e pa pou gagn kondanasion.

35.1: SEGNER, atak bann ki pe atak mwa; lager ar seki lager ar mwa.
35.2: Met to larmir e pran to lepe pou vinn ed mwa.
35.3: Servi to lans ek to lars kont ennmi ki pe pourswiv mwa. Dir mwa, “Momem ki pou sov twa. “
35.4: Fer bann ki rod touy mwa zwenn defet ek laont; fer bann ki konplote kont mwa oblize sove dan konfizion;
35.5: fer ki divan balye zot kouma lapay ler mesaze LESEGNER tay deryer zot;
35.6: fer zot sime vinn nwar ek glisan ler mesaze LESEGNER tay deryer zot.
35.7: San okenn rezon zot finn met latrap pou may mwa; San okenn rezon zot finn fouy trou profon pou piez mwa.
35.8: Me larwinn pou kraz zot avan zot realize; zot pou may dan zot prop piez e fini dan trou ki zot finn fouye.
35.9: Lerla mo pou dan lazwa akoz LESEGNER, e dan gran boner, parski LESEGNER finn sov mwa.
35.10: Ar lazwa dan leker mo pou dir for-for, “SEGNER, peyna to segon! To anpes seki for fer dominer ar seki feb; To anpes bann ris kraz seki pov.”
35.11: Bann fos temwin leve kont mwa; zot interoz mwa lor zafer ki zame mo finn fer.
35.12: Pou dibien ki mo fer, zot rann mwa lemal; zot tou abandonn mwa.
35.13: Me kan zot ti dan douler, mo ti met linz dey; mo ti zene ek priye. Mo ti azenou pou priye,
35.14: kouma mo ti pou fer pou enn kamarad ouswa enn frer. Mo ti kourbe ar sagrin koumadir mo mama ti mor.
35.15: Me kan mwa mo kogne mo tonbe, zot bien riy mwa, dan lazwa zot rasanble kont mwa; bann vwayou ki mo mem pa rekonet maltret mwa san pitie.
35.16: San pitie zot boufonn mwa kouma bann tilespri; zot grins zot ledan pou montre zot laenn.
35.17: Komie letan ankor to pou les zot fer mwa mizer? Defann mwa e sov mo lavi; aras mo lavi dan grif lion.
35.18: Mo pou remersie twa dan gran lasanble; mo pou dir to louanz omilie lafoul.
35.19: Pa les mo ennmi selebre laviktwar lor mwa, Pa les bann ki ena zis laenn dan leker gagn lamizman dan mo maler.
35.20: Zot pa ena okenn koze lor lape, zot pas zot letan fer fos akizasion lor dimoun ki viv trankil dan pei.
35.21: Zot ouver zot labous angran, zot dir, “Nou kone ki to ti fer!”
35.22: O SEGNER, to finn bien trouv tousala; pa gard silans. Pa res lwin ar mwa, Segner!
35.23: Lev twa, Bondie, pou fer zistis pou mwa; Revey twa, Segner, pou defann mwa mo drwa!
35.24: Twa ki vre drwatir, SEGNER, mo Bondie, proklam mo inosans; pa les mo lennmi pran plezir dan mo soufrans.
35.25: Pa donn zot porte pou dir, “Aster nou finn avoy li manze pou toultan. Samem nou ti‘le. “
35.26: Bann ki kontan kan mwa mo soufer ki zot konn laont ek konfizion; Bann ki reklam viktwar lor mwa ki zot antoure ar laont ek dezoner.
35.27: Bann ki dezir trouv lazistis dan mo faver ki zot kriye ar boner ek lazwa; zot pou dir ek redir, “LESEGNER, limem pli gran. Li trouv plezir dan boner so serviter! “
35.28: E mwa mo pou proklam to drwatir e sant to louanz toutlazourne.

36.1: Dan mo leker mo mazinn koze move dimoun ki dir, “Mo pa trouve kifer bizin tranble divan Bondie. “
36.2: Zot telman flat zotmem ki zot pa rekonet zot fot, ni deteste zot pese.
36.3: So labous plin ar kalomni ek mansonz; li tourn so ledo ar lasazes, li aret fer dibien.
36.4: Li tir plan pou fer ditor kan li pe alonze lor so lili; li angaz limem pou swiv move sime, li pa rezet lemal.
36.5: SEGNER, to lamour infini al tous lesiel, to fidelite mont ziska bann niaz.
36.6: To drwatir li pli ot ki montagn pli ot; to lazistis gran ek profon kouma losean. SEGNER, to prezerv dimoun ek zanimo.
36.7: Bondie, to lamour infini samem nou pli gran trezor; anba to lezel tou dimoun santi zot ansekirite;
36.8: dan labondans to lakaz, to konble zot ar manze, zot bwar dan larivier to bonte.
36.9: Tomem lasours lavi e to lalimier ekler nou lavi.
36.10: Donn to lamour dimoun ki rekonet to grander e lazistis bann ki ena leker drwat.
36.11: Pa permet bann fezer kraz mwa anba zot lipie, e pa les lame move dimoun sas mwa.
36.12: Get laba! Bann move dimoun pe manz lapousier. Peyna zot releve.

37.1: Pa les move dimoun fatig to latet; pa bizin zalou dimoun malonet.
37.2: Vit-vit zot pou sek kouma lerb ki griye ar soley; kouma fey ver vit-vit zot fletri.
37.3: Fer konfians LESEGNER e fer dibien; viv ansekirite lor later ki LESEGNER finn donn twa.
37.4: Si to rod to boner dan LESEGNER li pou donn twa dezir ki ena dan to leker.
37.5: Donn LESEGNER to lavi, met to konfians dan li, e li pou ed twa;
37.6: to drwatir pou briye kouma soley levan, e to lazistis kouma soley midi.
37.7: Gard silans divan LESEGNER, atann avek pasians; pa fatig to lespri ar sikse bann move dimoun ki paret pe reysi ar zot move plan.
37.8: Pa les lakoler oubien traka fatig twa; sinon to kapav mal fini.
37.9: Bann ki pratik lemal pou elimine, bann ki finn met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot pou posed later.
37.10: Ankor enn tigit letan bann ki fer lemal pou disparet; rode kouma ou rode, ou pa pou trouv zot.
37.11: Bon dimoun pou erit later e zot pou viv enn lavi prosper ek pezib.
37.12: Bann move dimoun fer konplo kont bon dimoun e zot grins zot ledan ar laenn.
37.13: Sa fer LESEGNER riy zot, li kone zot pou zwenn zot lafin vit-vit.
37.14: Bann move dimoun fit kouto, prepar zarm pou touy bann pov e bann malere; pou asasinn bann ki viv lavi drwat;
37.15: me zot prop zarm pou fini zot e zot zarm pou kas bout par bout.
37.16: Sa ti trezor ki enn bon dimoun posede la, li vo plis ki tou larises ki tou bann modi posede.
37.17: Zarm bann ki fer lemal pou brize, me LESEGNER soutenir bann ki viv drwat.
37.18: LESEGNER konn lavi bann ki obeyir li e zot pou posed sa pei la pou touzour.
37.19: Kan move sezon vini, zot pa pou soufer; kan lafaminn rantre, zot pa pou mordefin.
37.20: Me bann ki fer lemal pou mor; ennmi LESEGNER pou perir kouma fler sovaz dan soley; zot pou disparet kouma lafime dan koudvan.
37.21: Move dimoun kontan pran prete me zame li ranbourse; bon dimoun li zenere e li kontan partaze.
37.22: Kan LESEGNER beni ou, ou pou okip later; me si li modi ou, pa pou ena plas pou ou okenn plas.
37.23: LESEGNER gid nou lor bon sime e li protez bann ki swiv drwatir.
37.24: Si zame enn bon dimoun tonbe vit-vit LESEGNER pou ed li leve.
37.25: Aster mo vie; mo finn viv bien lontan; e zame, ou tande, zame mo finn zwenn enn fidel ki LESEGNER finn abandone; zame mo finn trouv so bann zanfan mandie dipin.
37.26: Touletan li zenere e li ed lezot e so zanfan zot enn benediksion pou li.
37.27: Rezet lemal e fer dibien, zot pou kontinie viv lor later promiz
37.28: parski LESEGNER kontan drwatir e li pa abandonn so serviter fidel. Zot gagn so proteksion toultan me desandan move dimoun pou perdi tou.
37.29: Bann ki swiv bon sime pou posed later e viv lor la pou toultan.
37.30: Parol ki bon dimoun koze li ena sazes ek zistis.
37.31: Dan profon so leker li gard lalwa Bondie e nannye pa kapav fer li tonbe.
37.32: Move dimoun vey bon dimoun dan kwin lizie e vey moman pou touy inosan;
37.33: me LESEGNER pa pou les lemal fer ravaz ouswa les bann inosan pey pou koupab dan zizman.
37.34: Met lespwar dan LESEGNER e ekout so konsey; li pou donn ou loner vinn propriyeter ou later; parkont bann move dimoun pou perdi tou.
37.35: Mo ti konn enn move dimoun ki ti enn dominer; li ti dominn lezot, ondire enn gro pie lafours.
37.36: Inpe pli tar ler mo ti pas dan mem landrwa so bout pa ti trouve. Rod li partou. Introuvab!
37.37: Pran kont bon dimoun; get konportman dimoun drwat. Dimoun ki travay pou lape li ena desandan;
37.38: bann ki dan pese, enn zour pa enn zour, zot fini net. Zot pa kit nannye deryer zot.
37.39: LESEGNER sov bann dimoun drwat e li protez zot kan zot dan difikilte.
37.40: Li ed zot, li delivre zot. Li delivre zot dan grif bann ki fer lemal, li sov zot, parski zot finn al rod sekour kot li.

38.1: SEGNER, mem to ankoler, pa kondann mwa; malgre to gran koler, pa pini mwa.
38.2: To bann fles finn pers-pers mwa, to lame finn abat lor mwa.
38.3: Akoz to koler, mo ena douler partou; akoz mo pese, maladi fann dan tou mo lezo.
38.4: Mo pe nwaye dan kaskad pese; fardo la tro lour pou sarye.
38.5: Akoz mo prop betiz mo blesir santi pi, pe fer infeksion;
38.6: mo korde ar douler, toutlazourne mo dan lapenn.
38.7: Lafiev pe bril mwa; pena lasante dan mo lekor.
38.8: Mo pena lafors. Mo kas-kase. Mo leker pe soufer, mo nek plegne.
38.9: Segner, to kone ki mo bann dezir ete. To tann mwa plegne ar douler;
38.10: mo leker bat for-for; mo gagn febles e mo trouv som.
38.11: Kamarad ek vwazin pa koste ar mwa akoz mo infeksion; mem mo fami pa frekant mwa.
38.12: Seki anvi touy mwa, pe met piez partou; bann ki pe rod fer mwa ditor, menas pou kas-kas mwa; zot pas zot letan konplote.
38.13: Mo kouma bann sourd, nepli tann bien; mo lalang amare, pa kapav koze.
38.14: Mo kouma enn dimoun ki nepli tande, mo pakone ki pou reponn.
38.15: Mo finn met mo lespwar an twa, SEGNER; twa Segner, mo Bondie, to pou ekzos mo lapriyer.
38.16: Mo priye, “Pa les mo ennmi gagn lokazion riy mwa; pa donn zot sans rezouir kan mo glise ek tonbe. “
38.17: Mo lafin bien pre; douler fer mwa korde.
38.18: Mo konfes mo fot mo regret mo pese.
38.19: Mo bann ennmi paret bien for. Parmi, boukou ayir mwa san rezon.
38.20: Bann ki retourn lemal pou lebien akiz mwa parski mwa mo finn swazir bon sime.
38.21: Pa abandonn mwa, SEGNER; Mo Bondie pa res lwin ar mwa.
38.22: Pa tarde pou ed mwa, Segner, mo Sover.

39.1: Mo ti dir, “Mo pou fer atansion seki mo fer; atansion mo fer pese ar seki mo dir; dan prezans move dimoun mo pa pou dir nannye. “
39.2: Mo ti ferm mo labous mem kan ti ena bon kiksoz pou dir. Me mo douler ti ogmante
39.3: e traka ti touf mwa. Plis mo reflesi, plis mo lespri trouble; mo oblize dimande,
39.4: “SEGNER, komie letan mo pou viv? Dir mwa komie letan reste. Lerla mo pou kone ki lavi bien kourt.”
39.5: Bann zour ki ena pou viv larzer lame. Mo lavi antie pa reprezant gran soz pou twa. Lavi dimoun li zis enn ti labriz,
39.6: dimoun ale vini kouma enn lonbraz. Tou seki nou fer pa vo nannye; nou ramas enn fortinn me pakone kisannla pou erite.
39.7: Asterla, SEGNER, ki ena pou mo atann? Mo finn met mo lesperans an twa.
39.8: Delivre mwa dan tou mo bann pese, pa les bann tilespri sikann mwa.
39.9: Mo ferm mo labous! Refiz koze! Mo kone ki twa ki finn azir koumsa.
39.10: Aret tap lor mwa! To bann kou pe tir mo lavi.
39.11: To koriz ek disiplinn bann imin pou zot pese, to ronz zot trezor kouma enn insek ronz enn fri. Lavi dimoun li zis enn ti labriz.
39.12: Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER; tann mo douler kriye; vinn ed enn malere ki pe soufer. Kouma tou mo bann anset, mo enn etranze, mo vizit kot twa li bien kourt.
39.13: Donn mwa inpe repi, pou mo regagn enn sourir, avan mo gran depar.

40.1: Mo ti atann, atann mem, sekour LESEGNER; Li ti ekout mwa e li ti tann mwa kriye.
40.2: Li ti tir mwa depi dan trou lamor; fer mwa sap dan marekaz san fon, li ti poz mo lipie lor enn baz solid, danze napa koste, la kot mo marse.
40.3: Li ti montre mwa enn nouvo sante; montre mwa sant louanz Bondie. Boukou pou konpran, pou montre respe, e pou met zot konfians dan LESEGNER.
40.4: Bienere bann ki fer konfians LESEGNER, zot ki rezet idolatri ou ki refiz swiv bann fos bondie.
40.5: Zot vremem boukou, SEGNER, mo Bondie, bann mirak ek bann mervey ki to finn fer pou nou. Peyna to segon! Mo anvi rakonte, rakonte mem, me konte fini, ankor ena mervey pou rakonte.
40.6: To pa bizin ofrand ek sakrifis; to finn donn mwa zorey pou tande. To pa bizin sakrifis ki bril zanimo ouswa sakrifis pou lav pese.
40.7: Lerla mo dir, “Ala mo la Bondie! Dan liv sakre mo trouv seki finn ekrir pou mwa.
40.8: Mo ena boukou plezir obeyir to volonte, Bondie. Mo finn grav to lalwa dan mo leker. “
40.9: Dan lasanble kot to pep ti reyni mo ti fer deklarasion ki LESEGNER finn sov nou. Nannye pa pou fer mwa aret proklam for-for sa laverite la;
40.10: mo pa finn gard nouvel to delivrans la zis pou mwa. Mo finn koz ki to fidel e ki to sov nou, mo pa finn kasiet to lamour infini e to lwayote dan lasanble tou bann fidel.
40.11: Pa refiz mwa to konpasion, SEGNER, ki to lamour infini ek to laverite toultan protez mwa.
40.12: Traka partou otour mwa, tro boukou pou konte. Mo bann pese finn anvayir mwa, zot anpes mwa trouv kler. Zot plis ki seve lor mo latet zot fer mwa perdi kouraz.
40.13: Sov mwa, SEGNER, SEGNER, degaze ed mwa.
40.14: Ki bann ki pe rod mo lamor plonz dan laont ek konfizion; bann ki dezir trouv mo maler, fer zot konn defet ek imiliasion;
40.15: bann ki sikane ek moke fer zot gout defet e zot labous ferme.
40.16: Bann ki vinn ver twa, donn zot lazwa ek boner! Bann ki kontan twa kouma zot Sover, pou toultan dir, “LESEGNER pli gran ki tou! “
40.17: Mo feb ek pov, Segner, me zame to finn bliye mwa. Tomem mo sover, mo liberater, mo Bondie, pa tarde pou ed mwa!

41.1: Bienere dimoun ki pran kont ek ed bann pov kan zot dan difikilte, LESEGNER pou delivre zot.
41.2: LESEGNER protez ek gard zot vivan; zot ere lor later. To pa abandonn zot dan lame zot ennmi.
41.3: LESEGNER pou pran zot swin ler zot malad e refer zot vinn fringan.
41.4: Mo ti konfese, “Mo finn fer pese kont twa SEGNER; pardonn mwa e donn mwa gerizon.”
41.5: Bann ki deteste mwa zot kalomnie mwa; zot souete ki mo mor e ki mo nom disparet.
41.6: Mem bann ki rann mwa vizit zot pa sinser; zot vinn tir linformasion e lerla zot fann rimer.
41.7: Tann zot pe mirmire dan zorey zot vwazin! Zot pe priye ki mo fini mal.
41.8: Zot dir, “Li pa pou sape ar sa maladi la! Peyna li sape sannfwala!”
41.9: Mem mo meyer kamarad - mo ti kapav met lame dan dife pou li; nou ti partaz tou - li mars ar bannla aster.
41.10: Me twa, SEGNER, par pitie redonn mwa lasante e lerla mo fer mo ennmi peye.
41.11: Mo kone ki to ena afeksion pou mwa, parski mo ennmi pa finn gagn viktwar lor mwa.
41.12: To finn relev mwa akoz mo lintegrite, to pou gard mwa dan to prezans eternelman.
41.13: Glwara twa SEGNER, Bondie Izrael, aster, pli divan ek toultan. Amenn! Amenn!

42.1: Parey kouma serf rod dilo kler larivier, mwa mo rod to prezans, mo Bondie.
42.2: Mo swaf pou Bondie, Bondie vivan. Kan mo pou kapav rant dan to lakaz pou prezant mwa devan twa, pou ador twa?
42.3: Lanwit-lizour mo plore; zis larm ki plin mo vant. Letansa mo bann ennmi persiste dir, “Kot to Bondie ete?”
42.4: Mo leker segne ler mo rapel lepase kan ansam dan lafoul nou ti al ver lakaz Bondie; kan mo ti pe gid laprosesion lor bon sime. Nou ti telman ere letan nou ti pe sant for-for nou rekonesans ek nou lazwa!
42.5: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie parski mo pou loue li ankor, mo Protekter e mo Sover.
42.6: La kot mo ete an-exil, mo leker soufer alor mo repans twa,
42.7: la kot kouran, vag ek kaskad dilo depi Montagn Ermon ek Mizar devers dan Larivier Zourdin e vir-vir mwa anbalao.
42.8: Lizour LESEGNER donn mwa so lamour infini touletan pouki aswar mo kapav sant louanz mo Bondie e priye li, limem mo lavi.
42.9: Mo dir Bondie, mo protekter, “Kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Kifer mo bizin kontinie soufer persekision mo lennmi? “
42.10: Mo soufer ziska mo lezo fermal, kan bann adverser insilte mwa, kan zot persiste dir, “Kot to Bondie ete? “
42.11: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie parski mo pou loue li ankor, mo Sover e mo Bondie.

43.1: O Bondie, pran mo par; proklam mo inosans, defann mwa kont bann dimoun infidel; delivre mwa dan grif bann manter ek move dimoun.
43.2: Tomem Bondie ki mo protekter! Kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Kifer mo bizin kontinie soufer persekision mo lennmi?
43.3: Avoy to lalimier ek to laverite; fer zot gid mwa lor sime ki amenn nou ver Sion, montagn sakre, e dan to Tanp kot to reste.
43.4: Lerla mo pou al divan to lotel, O Bondie, twa ki lasours mo boner. Ar sitar mo pou sant to louanz, O Bondie, mo Bondie!
43.5: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie e kontinie loue li, mo Sover e mo Bondie.

44.1: Ar nou prop zorey nou finn tande, Bondie, nou grandimoun finn rakont bann gran mirak ki to ti fer dan zot lepok, letan lontan:
44.2: kimanier to ti depouy bann nasion ki swiv zidol pou donn to pep zot later; kimanier to ti pini bann pep infidel pou fer epanouir pep ki ti swiv twa.
44.3: Pa kapav dir ki to pep ti gagn pei ar lafors zot lepe; zot pa ti gagne akoz zot larme ti for. Zot ti gagne grasa to pwisans ek to lafors; zot ti gagne par lalimier to prezans, parski to kontan zot.
44.4: Tomem mo lerwa e mo Bondie; se twa ki donn laviktwar to pep;
44.5: grasa twa nou ennmi gagn defet; grasa twa nou kraz nou adverser.
44.6: Mo pa fer konfians mo zarm; pa mo lepe ki pou donn mwa laviktwar.
44.7: Me to kraz nou ennmi; to kouver nou adverser ar laont.
44.8: Akoz sa nou pou sant to louanz e nou touzour pou dir twa mersi.
44.9: Pourtan to finn rezet nou ek imilie nou; to nepli mars ar nou bann larme.
44.10: To les bannla bat nou; to les nou ennmi depouy nou.
44.11: To les nou kouma mouton dan labatwar; to les zot dispers nou lwin, parmi lezot nasion.
44.12: To finn vann nou pou dipin-diber, koumadir nou pa vo nannye.
44.13: Nou enn size insilt parmi lezot nasion. Ala zot sikane! Ala zot riye!
44.14: Partou nou enn size ki fer riye; nou ennmi boufonn nou, mepriz nou.
44.15: Lanwit-lizour mo maler li divan mwa, ek laont kouver mo fron
44.16: letan mo tann insilt e blasfem parski bann ennmi pe rod tir vanzans.
44.17: Tousala finn ariv nou. Pourtan nou pa finn bliye twa! Pourtan nou pa finn kas lalians ki existe ant twa ek nou!
44.18: Nou leker pa finn bliye twa, nou pa finn kit larout ki to finn trase.
44.19: To finn kraz nou dan dezer, pei zanimo sovaz; to abandonn nou dan marenwar.
44.20: Si koumadir nou ti bliye nou Bondie e priye enn bondie etranze
44.21: to ti pou may nou anplin parski to konn nou panse profon.
44.22: Akoz nou lamour pou twa, pe trenn nou kouma mouton, pe amenn nou labatwar.
44.23: Ayo Segner, leve! Kifer to pe dormi? Leve! Pa abandonn nou!
44.24: Pa zwe kasiet ar nou! Pran kont nou soufrans ek nou douler!
44.25: Nou finn tom angran dan lapousier; nou pe ranpe dan later.
44.26: Lev twa, vinn ed nou! Sov nou akoz to lamour infini.

45.1: Mo leker deborde ar zoli parol ler mo konpoz sa poem la pou mo lerwa. Parol poetik koule kouma lank dan plim enn ekrivin ki konn so metie.
45.2: Parmi tou bann zom, ala ou gayar segner! Ou stil koze ena elegans. Alor Bondie finn toultan beni ou.
45.3: O lerwa pwisan, met lepe dan sintir e montre ou grander ek ou pouvwar.
45.4: Kouma enn gran lerwa, mars ver laviktwar pou defann laverite, limilite e lazistis. Ou pwisans pou demontre bann gran aksion.
45.5: Ou fles pwint transpers leker ou ennmi; bann tribi tom dan ou lipie.
45.6: Rwayom ki Bondie finn donn ou li pou regne pou toultan. Ou diriz ou pep dan lazistis;
45.7: ou kontan lazistis; ou deteste seki move. Akoz sa Bondie, ou Bondie, finn swazir ou, e finn aroz lor ou latet delwil benediksion, lonksion ki okenn lezot lerwa pa finn resevwar.
45.8: Ou linz parfime ar parfin rar, lalwes e kanel; bann artis diverti ou dan sato dekore ar lor ek ivwar.
45.9: Bann fi-doner ki dan lakour rwayal zot bann prinses renome; adrwat ou tronn ou bieneme pe diboute; so linz ek so bizou garni ar meyer lor ki existe.
45.10: Nouvel marye, ekout mwa bien! Bliye ou nasion ek ou fami.
45.11: Lerwa atire par ou bote; akoz li ou segner, rann li loner e obeyir li.
45.12: Lepep Tir pou donn ou boukou kado; bann ki ena fortinn pou fer tou pou fer ou plezir.
45.13: Laprinses dan sato! Get kouma li zoli! So manto brode ar difil lor.
45.14: Bann fi-doner finn akonpagn li, amenn li kot lerwa; so manto manifik li kouler larkansiel.
45.15: Lazwa ek boner akonpagn prosesion rwayal.
45.16: O segner lerwa, ou bann garson pou kontinie ou regn; ou pou fer zot vinn bann prins lor antie later.
45.17: Mo sante pou fer ou nom seleb zenerasion apre zenerasion, ziska lafin letan tou bann pep pou sant ou laglwar.

46.1: Bondie, limem nou protekter, lasours nou lafors; kan difikilte pe kraze partou Li touzour la pou ed nou.
46.2: Akoz sa nou pa per kan later tranble ouswa kan montagn al fonn dan fon lamer;
46.3: nou peyna pou per mem kan lamer leve ek kime e li sakouy montagn avek violans.
46.4: Ena enn larivier ki amenn lazwa dan lavil Bondie, dan lakaz ki pli sin, lakaz Bondie Pli Lao.
46.5: Bondie omilie so lavil ki pa pou konn destriksion; letan soley leve, li fini la pou donn sekour.
46.6: Bann tribi tranble; bann rwayom degringole; Bondie koze kouma toner, later fonn.
46.7: LESEGNER Toupwisan li toultan ar nou! Bondie ki Zakob ti priye limem nou protekter.
46.8: Vini, vinn get avek admirasion grander LESEGNER; vinn get ravaz ki li finn fer lor later.
46.9: Li finn aret lager ki ena partou dan lemond; kas-kas bann zarm anmorso e bril lekipman militer dan enn gran dife.
46.10: “Arete “li dir “e rekonet ki momem Bondie; pa bliye, mo regn lor tou nasion; mo regn lor liniver. “
46.11: LESEGNER Toupwisan Li toultan ar nou! Bondie ki Zakob ti priye limem nou fortres.

47.1: Tou dimoun lemond antie tap lame for-for! For-for anou sant louanz Bondie avek lazwa!
47.2: LESEGNER, Bondie Pli Lao li redoutab li enn gran lerwa lor later antie.
47.3: Li soumet bann pep anba nou pouvwar, li met bann nasion anba nou kontrol.
47.4: Li finn swazir enn patrimwann pou nou, parski li kontan nou, fierte Zakob.
47.5: Bondie monte parmi aklamasion, LESEGNER monte ar son tronpet.
47.6: Sant louanz Bondie, sante! Sant louanz nou lerwa, sante!
47.7: Bondie lerwa antie later; sant enn psom pou loue li.
47.8: Bondie regn lor tou bann nasion; li asiz lor so tronn sakre.
47.9: Tou bann dirizan lezot nasion rasanble avek lepep Bondie ki Abraam ti priye. Tou pouvwar lor later pou Bondie limem ki pli lao ki tou.

48.1: LESEGNER li gran, e li merit louanz dan lavil nou Bondie, lor montagn sakre.
48.2: Li bien ot e inpresionan, li donn lazwa dan lemond antie, montagn Sion, dan extrem Nor, lavil gran lerwa.
48.3: Bondie parmi bann sitadel dan lavil finn montre limem enn sekirite garanti.
48.4: Bann sef tribi ansam ar zot larme fer lalians pou atak montagn Sion
48.5: me ler zot trouv li dres divan zot, zot sezi, zot panike, zot sove-ale.
48.6: Lerla tranbleman trap zot, enn douler kouma madam ki pe gagn tibaba;
48.7: parey kouma pirog balote dan siklonn.
48.8: Nou finn deza tande aster nou finn trouve ar nou de lizie, dan lavil LESEGNER Toupwisan, dan lavil nou Bondie, ki li finn etabli pou touzour.
48.9: Andan to Tanp, Bondie, nou medit lor to lamour infini.
48.10: Nou tann to louanz, parey kouma to nom, partou lor later. To lotorite ranpli ar zistis.
48.11: Montagn Sion viv dan lazwa; bann vilaz dan Zide konn enn gran boner akoz to bann zizman.
48.12: Fer letour Zerizalem kont so bann tour,
48.13: admir so ranpar, mars atraver so sitadel, pou zot kapav rakont zot zanfan ek tizanfan.
48.14: Bondie, li nou Bondie pou toultan, li pou gid nou pou touzour.

49.1: Ekout sa tou dimoun! Ouver zorey zot tou, abitan later!
49.2: Ki ou gran, ki ou piti; ki ou ris, ki ou pov.
49.3: Mo pou dir zot klerman parol lour ar sazes; anplis, mo leker pou exprim bann konesans profon.
49.4: Mo pou bien ekout proverb, mo pou devwal explikasion zedmo ar sitar.
49.5: Kifer mo bizin trakase letan traka leve, ler mo ennmi antour mwa,
49.6: sa bann ki fer konfians zot trezor, e fer fezer parski zot ris?
49.7: Personn pa kapav pey ase pou sov lavi enn lot; pena pri ki kapav donn Bondie kouma ranson pou lavi,
49.8: lavi, ofet, li pena pri, personn pa kapav peye pou sov so lavi;
49.9: personn pa ena ase kas pou evit lamor, oubien evit trou lamor.
49.10: Get bann saz. Lamor pa kit zot. Mem zafer pou so inbesil kouma so idio. Oblize kit fortinn deryer.
49.11: Se zot tom ki vinn zot lakaz permanan; se laba ki zot pou pas leres letan malgre kan zot ti vivan zot ti ena terin par arpan.
49.12: Grander, fortinn, pa anpes dimoun zwenn lamor. Kouma ninport ki zanimo, kan nou ler vini bizin ale.
49.13: Get ki ariv bann fezer ki krwar dan zot prop lafors! E ki trouv plezir dan zot prop diskour.
49.14: Zot al ver lamor kouma mouton. Lamor pou diriz zot kouma zot berze. Bann vantar koumsa desann dan trou lamor lor vites e laba zimaz ki zot ti ena li disparet, lemond lamor ki vinn zot lakaz.
49.15: Me mo Bondie pou sov mwa dan pouvwar lamor, wi, li pou delivre mwa pou limem.
49.16: Kan enn dimoun vinn ris, kan fortinn so fami grosi, pa les sa fatig ou latet.
49.17: Kan li mor li pou oblize les so trezor par deryer li pa pou sarye so fortinn ar li letan li ale.
49.18: Mem si dan sa lavi la enn dimoun ziz limem ere - apretou, dimoun felisit twa kan to prospere -
49.19: li oblize al rezwenn so bann anset ki pa pou trouv lalimier ankor.
49.20: Grander, fortinn, pa anpes dimoun zwenn lamor. Kouma ninport ki zanimo, kan nou ler vini bizin ale.

50.1: LESEGNER, Bondie Toupwisan, ouver so labous pou koze; Li koz ar lemond antie, depi soley leve ziska soley kouse.
50.2: Bondie briye depi Sion, so gran lavil parfe ki bengn dan bote.
50.3: Nou Bondie pe vini, pa krwar so demars trankil! Divan li enn gran laflam ki devor tou; otour li enn siklonn violan pe balye tou.
50.4: Li ordonn later ek lesiel vinn dibout temwin pou get kouma li ziz so pep.
50.5: Li dir, “Rasanble mo pep fidel; rasanble bann ki finn fer enn lalians ar mwa atraver ofrand ek sakrifis.”
50.6: Liniver pe proklame ki Bondie Li bon ek zis e limem pli gran ziz.
50.7: “Mo pep, ouver zorey parski Mo ena zafer inportan pou dir zot; Mo pou denons Izrael! Mwa ki Bondie, zot Bondie,
50.8: Mo pa pe kritik zot akoz zot sakrifis oubien akoz zot ofrand ki devan mwa toulezour.
50.9: Pa krwar mo bizin gro-gro toro ouswa bouk bien-bien gra.
50.10: Pa bliye ki tou zanimo dan karo, dan patiraz ouswa dan lafore zot tou pou mwa;
50.11: zanimo dan lezer kouma lor later zot tou pou mwa.
50.12: Ler mo fin mo pa bizin zot manze. Tou seki ena dan lemond zot pou mwa!
50.13: Zot krwar mwa mo bizin laviann toro ouswa disan kabri?
50.14: Ofer Bondie enn sakrifis aksiondegras. Onor zot promes ki zot finn fer ar Bondie Toupwisan.
50.15: Kan zot dan dife, apel mwa e mo pou vinn sov zot. Lerla zot sant mo louanz. “
50.16: Lerla Bondie koz ar bann move dimoun, “Kiserti zot resit mo instriksion? Kiserti zot koz lor mo lalians?
50.17: Kan zot refiz mo konsey; e zot rezet mo parol.
50.18: Kan zot zwenn voler, zot fer kamarad ar li; zot frekant dimoun ki komet adilter.
50.19: Zot parol pese koule fasilman; zot koz boukou manti.
50.20: Zot dir foste lor zot prop frer; zot trenn garson zot mama dan labou.
50.21: Ler zot ti fer tousala mo pa ti dir nannye. Akoz sa zot ti krwar mo parey kouma zot. Aster mo pou akiz zot, e zot pou konn laverite.
50.22: Ekout mwa bien, bann ki bliye Bondie, sinon mo desir zot anmorso. Pa krwar ki pou ena kikenn pou tir zot dan dife!
50.23: Mo bizin zis zot rekonesans. Sel sakrifis ki ena valer pou mwa. Obeyir mwa e mo pou sov zot. “

51.1: Ena pitie pou mwa, Bondie, dan to gran lamour infini. Dan to gran mizerikord efas tou mo pese.
51.2: Lav mwa, retir tou mo bann fot, pirifie mwa, retir mo bann pese.
51.3: Mo rekonet mo bann tor; mo bann pese touzour divan mo lizie.
51.4: Kont twa, kont to tousel ki mo finn fer pese, e mo finn al fer seki to konsider lemal. To ena rezon trouv mwa koupab santans ki to prononse, li zis.
51.5: Mo finn ne dan pese; depi dan vant mama mo dan pese.
51.6: To kontan laverite dan profon nou leker; ansegn mwa to sazes dan profon mo panse.
51.7: Efas mo pese e mo pou vinn prop; netway mwa e mo pou vinn pli blan ki lanez.
51.8: Fer mwa regagn lazwa ek boner; e ki lezo ki finn kas-kase retrouv zot lazwa.
51.9: Aret get mo bann pese efas tou bann fot dan mwa.
51.10: Bondie, kree an mwa enn leker pir ek prop renouvel an mwa enn lespri nouvo ek lwayal.
51.11: Pa avoy mwa lwin ar twa; pa ras to lespri sin ki dan mwa.
51.12: Redonn mwa lazwa ki enn peser gagne kan to sov li; donn mwa enn lespri dobeisans, pou soutenir mwa.
51.13: Alor mo pou ansegn bann peser to bon sime e zot pou retourn ver twa.
51.14: Kot ena disan verse, sov mwa, Bondie, Bondie mo liberater, e mo pou dir for-for ki tomem vre drwatir.
51.15: Segner, rann mwa laparol pou ki mo kapav sant to louanz.
51.16: Mo kone ki to pa pe rod sakrifis; pa mem enn sakrifis zanimo ki nou brile net.
51.17: Sakrifis ki Bondie oule, li enn leker brize. Bondie akeyir enn peser leker brize ki finn repanti.
51.18: Sion bizin to bonte; ed li e rekonstrir miray Zerizalem.
51.19: Apre sa to pou aksepte vre sakrifis, nou ofrand e nou bann sakrifis konple, lerla pou kapav sakrifie bann toro lor lotel dan to Tanp.

52.1: Kifer to fer vantar, gran misie? Enn zourne to vantar mem lor bann mesanste.
52.2: To tir plan pou fer ditor; to lalang fite kouma razwar. To invant koze fos
52.3: e li kler to prefer lemal olie lebien; to prefer mansonz plis ki laverite.
52.4: To servi parol pou bles dimoun! To kontan tronp dimoun.
52.5: To pa pou sape ar Bondie; li pou detrir twa pou toultan; li pou tir twa par kole depi to lakaz li pou derasinn twa depi later bann vivan.
52.6: Ler dimoun ki viv drwat trouv sa, zot pou gagn per; apre ki zot pou koumans gagn riye.
52.7: Zot pou dir, “Get li do! Li pa ti pe dir ki li pa bizin proteksion Bondie? Li pa ti pe dir ki se so fortinn ki ti pou sov li? Li pa ti krwar ki so boner li dan mesanste?”
52.8: Me mwa mo kouma enn pie zoliv dan Tanp Bondie; mo finn fer konfians so lamour infini pou leternite.
52.9: Bondie, mo pou touzour dir twa mersi pou tou seki to finn fer; dan lasanble bann fidel mo proklam to grander parski to vreman bon.

53.1: Bann inbesil panse dan zot leker, “Pou mwa, peyna Bondie!” Zot koronpi; zot fer bann krim orib; peyna enn osi ki fer dibien.
53.2: Bondie depi lesiel lao pe obzerv limanite anba pou gete si ena dimoun ki posed lasazes; si ena dimoun ki pe rod ador Bondie.
53.3: Me zot tou finn perdi sime; zot tou zot dan koripsion. Peyna enn sel ki mars dapre drwatir, mem pa enn sel.
53.4: Bann ki fer linzistis, zot pa konpran? Zot devor mo bann fidel kouma zot devor manze, e zot pa invok nom Bondie?
53.5: Me zot pou tranble ar enn gran freyer, enn freyer ki zame pa finn kone. Ennmi ki antour twa, Bondie pou eparpiy zot lezo partou kote; zot pou konn laont, parski Bondie finn rezet zot.
53.6: Mo priye ki liberasion Izrael pou vinn depi oter Sion. Desandan Zakob, lepep Izrael pou dan gran lazwa kan Bondie fer zot retrouv zot dibien.

54.1: Bondie, sov mwa par to nom; rann zistis dan mo faver par to pwisans.
54.2: Ekout mo lapriyer, Bondie; tann parol ki mo pe dir.
54.3: Enn group dimoun insolan pe atak mwa; bann dimoun swaf disan pe vinn pou touye. Zot pa pran Bondie kont ditou.
54.4: Bondie limem mo sekour; LESEGNER limem mo soutien.
54.5: Li pou tourn zot lemal kont zotmem. Dan to fidelite, fini zot.
54.6: SEGNER, avek enn bon leker mo pou ofer sakrifis; mo pou dir twa mersi parski sa li bon.
54.7: Parski li finn delivre mwa dan mo detres. Dan laviktwar mo get defet mo bann ennmi.

55.1: Bondie, ekout mo lapriyer! Pa tourn ledo ar mo siplikasion!
55.2: Tann mo petision e donn mwa enn repons; mo bann traka pe fini mwa.
55.3: Mo ennmi pe kriye for kont mwa, bann ki fer lemal pe insilte mwa. Zot vers tourman lor mwa; zot atak mwa ar zot lakoler.
55.4: Mo leker finn sere andan, lafreyer lamor finn tom lor mwa.
55.5: Lafreyer ek tranbleman anvayir mwa, gro frison pe trap mwa.
55.6: Alor mo dir, “Si mo ti ena lezel kouma zwazo mo ti pou anvole pou rod lape dan enn landrwa trankil;
55.7: mo ti pou bat mo lezel pou al kasiet lwin dan dezer.
55.8: Lor vites mo ti pou al rod refiz kot rafal siklonn pa ti pou tous mwa. “
55.9: Segner met konfizion dan langaz mo ennmi, brouy zot; parski mo trouv violans ek konfli dan lavil.
55.10: Lanwit kouma lizour zot fer so letour lor so miray; partou dan pei ena violans ek dezord;
55.11: krim ek masak rant partou; dominer ek koripsion pa kit laplas piblik.
55.12: Si enn ennmi ti pe insilte mwa, mo ti pou siporte; si enn rival ti lev kont mwa, mo ti kapav evit li;
55.13: me twa, ki mo egal, ki azir koumsa, mo konpagnon, mo prop kamarad,
55.14: nou ki ti partaz lamitie ansam, nou ti al Tanp ansam pou priye Bondie.
55.15: Ki lamor tom lor mo bann ennmi par sirpriz; ki zot desann vivan dan trou lamor, akoz zot lakaz ek zot leker plin ar pese ek mesanste.
55.16: Mo kriye Bondie osekour, e LESEGNER vinn sov mwa.
55.17: Gramatin, midi, aswar mo rakont mo douler ek mo soufrans. Li pa pou fer sourd ar mo lapriyer.
55.18: Li liber mwa, mo sin e sof dan mo lalit kont mo ennmi, mem si zot enn lafoul kont mwa.
55.19: Bondie, ki lerwa dan leternite, pou tann mwa e li pou imilie mo ennmi parski zot refiz sanze e zot pena respe pou Bondie.
55.20: Seki yer ti mo kamarad intim finn atak so kamarad, li pa finn konn gard so promes.
55.21: So parol ti dou kouma dimiel me ti ena fiel dan so leker pou lager. So parol ki ti paret kouma lapomad ti anverite enn kouto ki bien fite.
55.22: Depoz to fardo lor LESEGNER e li pou rekonfort twa parski zame li abandonn dimoun ki viv drwat.
55.23: Twa Bondie, to pou pini asasin ek manter e zot pou rant dan trou lamor kan zot ankor zenn. Mwa, mo finn met mo konfians an twa.

56.1: Pran pitie, O mo Bondie, dimoun pe pourswiv mwa; toulezour mo ennmi pe atake, pe kraz mwa;
56.2: bann ki kont mwa persekit mwa touletan; zot enn kantite sa bann arogan ki pe atake la.
56.3: Kan mo gagn per, mo met mo konfians dan twa.
56.4: Mo sant louanz Bondie parski li gard so parol; mo met mo konfians dan Bondie; mo peyna okenn freyer. Ki enn imin ordiner kapav fer kont mwa?
56.5: Gramatin-tanto zot parol bles mwa; zot nek panse kouma pou fer mwa ditor.
56.6: Zot vinn ansam, dan kasiet zot louk mwa, zot vey mo bann mouvman, e zot atann pou touy mwa.
56.7: Bondie, pa les zot sape pou zot krim, ar to lakoler zet zot anba.
56.8: Twa to kone komie mo finn soufer; To finn gard enn kont mo sagrin ek mo larm. Dan to gran liv to pa finn gard enn kont?
56.9: Zour mo dimann to led mo ennmi oblize kile. Mo kone ki LESEGNER li ar mwa, li lor mo kote.
56.10: Dan Bondie - mo loue so parol - dan LESEGNER - mo loue so parol -
56.11: dan Bondie mo met konfians; mo peyna lafreyer. Ki enn imin ordiner kapav fer kont mwa?
56.12: Bondie, mo pou ofer twa seki mo ti promet; mo pou ofer mo sakrifis remersiman
56.13: parski to finn anpes lamor kokin mwa ale e to finn anpes mwa tonbe, pou ki mo kontign mars divan Bondie dan so lalimier ki donn lavi.

57.1: Pran pitie, Bondie, pran pitie. Mo vinn rod proteksion kot twa. Anba to lezel mo ansekirite ziska ki maler kouma siklonn pase.
57.2: Mo sipliy Bondie Pli Lao, Bondie, ki donn mwa tou.
57.3: Depi so tronn dan lesiel li pou ekout mwa e li pou sov mwa e bann ki persekit mwa pou kouver ar laont. Bondie pou montre so lamour infini ek so fidelite.
57.4: Kouma lion feros mo ennmi finn antour mwa; mo antoure ar zanimo sovaz; zot ledan fite kouma zarm destriksion; zot lalang fite kouma razwar.
57.5: Bondie, montre to grander ki depas lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.
57.6: Mo ennmi finn instal enn file; dezespwar fer mwa pliye; zot finn met enn piez lor mo sime me grasa twa zot finn tom ladan zotmem.
57.7: Avek lasirans dan mo leker, Bondie, avek lasirans dan mo leker, mo pou zwe lamizik, mo pou sant to louanz.
57.8: Leve, revey twa, mo leker! Leve sitar ek lagitar! Mo sante pou fer soley leve.
57.9: Mo pou remersie twa, Segner, parmi lepep; mo pou dir to grander parmi bann nasion.
57.10: To lamour infini li mont ziska lesiel; to fidelite al ziska bann niaz.
57.11: Bondie, montre to grander ki depas lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.

58.1: E zot bann kreatir dan lesiel eski zot zizman li korek? Eski zot ziz dimoun ar zistis?
58.2: Non. Zot lespri ranpli ar lemal e zot responsab violans ek krim dan lemond.
58.3: Move dimoun lor lapant pese depi dan vant mama; e depi zot nesans zot nek konn koz manti.
58.4: Kouma serpan zot lalang plin ar venin; kouma kobra zot zwe sourd
58.5: pou pa tann lavwa donter serpan, pou pa ipnotize par zot lamizik.
58.6: Bondie, grenn zot ledan, aras krok bann zenn lion, O SEGNER;
58.7: fer zot disparet kouma dilo dan kanal; kraz zot kouma move lerb dan lale.
58.8: Kouma kourpa, zot disparet dan lagli; kouma mor-ne ki zame trouv soley.
58.9: Avan mem ki dife lapay sof zot marmit, lakoler Bondie pou fer zot anvole kouma lapousier.
58.10: Dimoun ki viv drwat pou aplodi ler bann dan pese pe pey ser. Zot lipie pou tranp dan disan bann kriminel.
58.11: Dimoun pou dir for-for, “Vremem, dimoun ki viv drwat pe gagn rekonpans; vremem, ena enn Bondie ki zize lor later! “

59.1: Bondie, delivre mwa dan lame mo ennmi; protez mwa kont bann ki atak mwa.
59.2: Delivre mwa kont bann ki pratik lemal; sov mwa dan lame bann asasin.
59.3: Get zot laba! Zot fite pou touy mwa; dimoun danzere finn konplote kont mwa, san ki mo finn fer okenn pese, SEGNER,
59.4: mo peyna okenn tor, me zot prese pou atak mwa. Pa ferm lizie lor mo detres; vinn ed mwa.
59.5: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, tomem Bondie Izrael, leve pou to pini bann nasion; peyna pitie pou bann tret ki amenn maler.
59.6: Touletanto zot vinn angroup; zot irle kouma lisien anraze e zot rode partou dan landrwa.
59.7: Tann zot zoure! Tann zot menase! Zot lalang kouma razwar; zot krwar personn pa tande.
59.8: Me twa, SEGNER, to riy zot; to trouv tou bann nasion ridikil.
59.9: Tomem mo lafors, mo regar tourn ver twa. Tomem mo sitadel, gran Bondie.
59.10: Mo Bondie dan so lamour infini pou mars ar mwa; li pou permet mwa trouv defet mo lennmi.
59.11: Pa touy zot parski sinon mo pep pou bliye vit. Fer zot balote par to pouvwar ek abes zot, Segner nou boukliye.
59.12: Sak fwa zot koze, zot labous ranpli ar pese; les zot tom dan latrap zot prop vantardiz. Parski zot zoure, modi, koz manti,
59.13: bril zot ar to lakoler; exterminn zot net. Lerla lemond antie pou konpran ki Bondie gouvern Izrael.
59.14: Touletanto mo ennmi retourne, kouma lisien zot zape, zot rode partou dan lavil.
59.15: Kouma lisien afame zot rant partou pou kokin manze e ler zot pa gagn ase zot grogne, zot irle.
59.16: Mwa mo pou kontinie loue to lafors; toulegramatin mo pou sant to lamour infini bien for. Tomem mo protekter, mo refiz kan difikilte pe rod touf mwa;
59.17: Twa ki mo lafors mo pou sant pou twa. Tomem mo Bondie, mo sitadel, ki ena lamour infini pou mwa.

60.1: Bondie, to finn abandonn nou, e nou finn disloke. To ankoler ar nou; asterla, relev nou latet.
60.2: To finn fer later tranble e partou vant later finn ouver; nou sipliy twa konble bann fant ek fose parski tou pe grene.
60.3: To pe fer to pep soufer gran douler; nou pe balote kouma soular ar divin.
60.4: To finn donn bann fidel enn banyer kouma enn signal pou ki zot sove divan bann fles ki atake.
60.5: Servi to pouvwar pou sov nou; ekzos nou lapriyer pou ki pep ki to kontan gagn delivrans.
60.6: Depi so Tanp sakre Bondie ti dir, “Ar mo pouvwar mo pou diviz Sikem e partaz vale Soukot.
60.7: Galaad li pou mwa, Manase osi; Efraim samem mo elmet; Zide li sinbol mo pouvwar rwayal.
60.8: Mo pou servi Moab kouma mo kivet; Mo pou zet mo savat lor Edom pou fer kone mo dibien sa. Mo kriye laviktwar lor bann Filistin.”
60.9: Kisannla pou amenn mwa dan lavil bien proteze? Kisannla pou gid mwa lor sime Edom?
60.10: Vremem to finn abandonn nou? To pa pou mars ar nou ver laviktwar?
60.11: Twa, Bondie, ed nou kont nou ennmi! Lafors imin peyna gran valer.
60.12: Kan Bondie mars ar nou laviktwar li dan nou lame parski li pou kraz nou ennmi.

61.1: Ekout mwa kriye twa, O Bondie; tann mo lapriyer!
61.2: Depi dan bout later mo kriye twa, mo dekouraze, mo dezespere. Kondir mwa lao, dan enn oter, ki tro ot pou mwa.
61.3: Tomem mo protekter, enn latour solid kont mo adverser.
61.4: Les mo viv dan to lakaz pou toultan; donn mwa proteksion anba to lezel.
61.5: Bondie, to finn tann promes ki mo finn fer e to finn donn mwa enn par dan benediksion ki to donn bann ki onor twa.
61.6: Azout boukou lane dan lavi nou lerwa; fer ki li viv bien lontan.
61.7: Fer ki so regn dire pandan lontan ankor parski to finn beni li. Ki to fidelite ek to lamour prezerv li.
61.8: Mo pou selebre to louanz toultan, sak zour mo pou onor mo promes.

62.1: Zis kot Bondie tousel ki mo trouv trankilite. Zis li tousel kapav sov mwa.
62.2: Li tousel mo protekter ek mo sover; li mo fortres; nannye pa pou sekwe mwa.
62.3: Pandan komie letan ankor zot pou atak enn dimoun, zot sey zet li anba, kouma enn miray feb, enn baraz ki so poto kase?
62.4: Zot anvi zet li depi so plas doner kot li finn asize; zot kontan invant koze mansonz; ar zot labous zot donn benediksion, dan fon zot leker nek ena malediksion.
62.5: Zis kot Bondie ki mo trouv trankilite; li tousel kapav donn mwa mo lespwar.
62.6: Li tousel mo protekter ek mo sover; li mo fortres; nannye pa pou sekwe mwa.
62.7: Mo delivrans ek mo loner zot dan lame Bondie; Limem mo gran protekter ek mo refiz.
62.8: Zot ki la, fer Bondie konfians touletan; dir li seki ena lor zot leker. Bondie enn labri pou protez nou.
62.9: Nou, dimoun, nou zis enn ti souf respirasion; ki nou gran ki nou tipti nou pa vo gransoz; met nou lor balans e nou pa pez nannye ditou; nou pli leze ki enn ti labriz.
62.10: Pa met konfians dan violans; pa met lespwar dan lamone kokin; mem kan larises pe ogmante pa met konfians ladan.
62.11: Enn koze ki Bondie finn dir, Plis ki enn fwa mo finn tande, ki tou pouvwar pou li.
62.12: Segner, to osi enn Bondie damour, ki rekonpans sakenn dapre so aksion.

63.1: Bondie, tomem mo Bondie, kouma soley leve, mo leker rod twa. Mo dezir to prezans. Mo lekor an-antie ena swaf to prezans; kouma later desese rod dilo.
63.2: Pandan lontan mo finn get twa dan sanktyer pou ki mo kapav admir to pouvwar ek to laglwar.
63.3: To lamour infini ena plis valer ki lavi mem; akoz sa mo pou sant to louanz.
63.4: Tank mo ena lavi mo pou loue twa; mo lev lame lao pou glorifie to nom.
63.5: Kouma dan enn gran fet avek pli bon repa, mo pou rasazie. Avek lazwa mo sante pou selebre to grander.
63.6: Kan mo pe alonze lor lili mo pa aret pans twa; toutlanwit mo medit lor twa
63.7: parski twa to finn toultan ed mwa. Dan lonbraz to lezel mo sante, ranpli ar lazwa.
63.8: Mo may ar twa ar tou mo leker e to lame pwisan protez mwa.
63.9: Bann ki pe rod mo lamor pou fini dan profonder later.
63.10: Zot pou zwenn lamor dan lager e zanimo feros pou devor zot kadav.
63.11: Lerwa pou trouv so lazwa dan Bondie. Bann ki fer serman dan nom Bondie, zot pou loue li; bann ki kontan koz manti pou oblize ferm labous.

64.1: Bondie! Ekout mo lapriyer! Mo bann ennmi teroriz mwa; sov mwa!
64.2: Protez mwa kont konplo ki move dimoun fer ansekre e kont bann ki fer lemal ki rasanble kont mwa.
64.3: Zot fit zot lalang kouma razwar e zot langaz blesan li kouma fles ki touye.
64.4: Depi dan kasiet zot tir lor bann inosan, zot tire san averti, san okenn freyer.
64.5: Zot ankouraz zot kamwad pou fer vilin travay; zot bien kalkile kot zot pou kasiet zot lak e zot dir, “Personn pa pou kone.”
64.6: Zot prepar enn move kou e zot dir, “Nou krim li pou parfe!” Difisil pou konpran leker ek lespri dimoun!
64.7: Me Bondie larg so fles lor zot e enn par enn zot tonbe.
64.8: Li pou detrir zot akoz zot koz gra. Bann ki trouv sa pou sakouy latet, pou mok zot.
64.9: Lafreyer pou trap tou par lagorz; zot pou rakont gran travay Bondie e medit lor aksion ki li fer.
64.10: Bon dimoun pou dan lazwa LESEGNER. Dimoun drwat pou rod zot refiz kot li e zot pa pou aret sant so louanz.

65.1: O Bondie, li nou devwar sant to grander dan Sion e pa bliye nou promes
65.2: parski to ekzos nou lapriyer. Dimoun sorti partou vinn ver twa.
65.3: Nou bann fot pez lour lor nou, me twa to pardonn tou.
65.4: Bienere seki to finn swazir, seki to finn akeyir dan to sanktyer. Nou pou rasazie ar bon kiksoz dan to lakaz, ki nou gagne dan to Tanp sakre.
65.5: Par bann aksion manifik to reponn nou ar delivrans, Bondie nou Sover, tomem lespwar dimoun lor antie later, ziska dimoun lot kote dilo.
65.6: Ar to lafors to plas montagn kot bizin. To deborde ar pwisans.
65.7: To kalme laraz lamer, to apez tapaz vag; to tengn lakoler lepep.
65.8: Bann dan bout later res bet par to travay grandioz. Tou dimoun lor later kriye zot lazwa depi enn kwin ziska lot.
65.9: To montre to lamour pou later e to aroz li. To nouri later, to fer li vinn fertil. Larivier Bondie ranpli ar dilo; to fer later raport manze. Ala kouma to fer sa:
65.10: To aroz later laboure ar bon kantite dilo; to aplati bann boul later, to fer later respire pou ki zenn pous kapav pouse.
65.11: Tout long lane to bonte ranpli nou gardmanze; kot to pase ena labondans.
65.12: Patiraz ranpli ar zanimo; flan kolinn ranpli ar lazwa;
65.13: laplenn kouver ar mouton; karo plin ar dible. Partou lanatir sante ar lazwa dan leker.

66.1: Sant louanz Bondie avek lazwa tou dimoun ki lor later;
66.2: sant laglwar so nom; donn li laglwar.
66.3: Dir Bondie, “Tou seki to fer, zot extraordiner. To lafors sitan gran ki to ennmi kapitile e tranble divan twa.
66.4: Tou dimoun lor later tom azenou divan twa; zot sant to louanz, zot beni to nom.”
66.5: Vinn gete seki Bondie finn fer! Vinn admir so explwa pou bann dimoun!
66.6: Li ti fer lamer sek pou ki nou bann anset kapav traverse. Anou selebre so explwa.
66.7: Par so pwisans so regn eternel e li vey lor tou nasion. So ennmi pa pou kapav dres kont li.
66.8: Tou dimoun, zot bizin dir mersi nou Bondie. Sant so louanz for-for!
66.9: Li finn prezerv nou lavi e li pa finn les nou tonbe.
66.10: To finn teste nou, Bondie; parey kouma bizoutie pirifie larzan ar dife.
66.11: To ti les nou rant dan piez; to ti met gro fardo lor nou ledo.
66.12: To ti les nou ennmi pil lor nou; to ti les nou travers dife ek debordman me to finn met nou dan enn landrwa anabondans.
66.13: Mo pou ofer sakrifis konple dan to Tanp; mo pou donn ofrand kouma mo ti promet.
66.14: Mo pa pou bliye promes mo ti dir ler mo ti dan detres.
66.15: Mo pou ofer sakrifis zanimo gra! Ler mouton, toro ek bouk brile lafime pou mont ziska lesiel.
66.16: Vinn ekout mwa zot tou ki ena lakrint Bondie e mo pou dir zot seki Bondie finn fer pou mwa.
66.17: Mo ti sipliy li vinn ed mwa; mo ti sant so louanz.
66.18: Si mo ti gard pese dan mo leker, Lesegner pa ti pou vinn ed mwa.
66.19: Me Bondie ti ekoute, li ti tann mwa e li ti ekzos mo lapriyer.
66.20: Mo loue Bondie parski li pa ti rezet mo siplikasion; li pa ti repran so lamour infini.

67.1: Bondie, akord nou so lagras, e beni nou; ki lalimier so prezans briy lor nou,
67.2: pou ki partou lor later zot konn to sime pou ki tou bann nasion rekonet ki tomem Sover.
67.3: Ki bann pep loue twa, O Bondie! Ki tou bann pep loue twa!
67.4: Ki tou bann nasion sant lazwa dan zot leker parski to gouvern bann pep avek lazistis e to gid tou bann nasion lor bon sime.
67.5: Ki bann pep loue twa, O Bondie! Ki tou bann pep loue twa!
67.6: Later finn raport plin rekolt; Bondie, nou Bondie, finn beni nou.
67.7: Bondie pou kontign beni nou; e tou bann pep partou lor later pou onor li.

68.1: Ler Bondie drese so ennmi fane; bann adverser tire, zot sove divan li.
68.2: Kouma lafime voltize dan divan, zot fonn parey; parey kouma lasir fonn dan dife bann infidel disparet dan prezans Bondie.
68.3: Dimoun drwat dan lazwa; zot selebre zot lazwa dan prezans Bondie, zot ranpli ar boner.
68.4: Sant louanz Bondie; ar bann kantik prepar so larive; pa bliye ki li vwayaz lor enn niaz. So nom: SEGNER - anou selebre nou lazwa divan li.
68.5: Bondie ki viv dan so Tanp sakre li okip orfelin kouma enn papa, e li protez bann vev.
68.6: Bann ki pa ena personn, li donn zot enn fami; li permet prizonie regagn liberte. Me bann ki dan pese pou toultan zwenn tase dan karo brile.
68.7: Bondie, kan to ti gid to pep to ti mars divan li atraver dezer
68.8: later ti tranble e lesiel ti aroz partou pou anons larive Bondie ki ti aparet lor Sinai, pou prepar lantre triyonfal Bondie Izrael.
68.9: Ler lapli toransiel tonbe later koumans reviv;
68.10: to lepep ti konstrir zot vilaz. To bonte zenere ti donn bann pov zot neseser.
68.11: Lesegner ti donn so instriksion enn lafoul bann fam ti transmet so mesaz:
68.12: “Bann lerwa ek zot larme pe sove! Zot pe sove!” Bann fam dan vilaz ti partaz dibien ki finn sezi:
68.13: ti ena kolonb fabrike ar larzan; zot lezel briye ar lor. (Kifer bann kapon ti kasiet dan lekiri olie lager kont ennmi?)
68.14: Kan Bondie Toupwisan ti derout bann lerwa lanez ti tom lor Montagn Zalmon.
68.15: Get kouma li gran Montagn Basann, enn gran montagn ar so plizier some!
68.16: Kifer depi oter sa bann some la to get ar mepri Montagn Sion kot Bondie finn desid pou konstrir so pale sakre? Samem rezidans LESEGNER pou leternite.
68.17: Ar mil milie saryo pwisan, milie lor milie, Lesegner desann depi Sinai ziska landrwa sakre.
68.18: To mont dan oter; to ti amenn bann prizonie ar twa; to resevwar don bann dimoun, mem bann ki rebel kont twa, SEGNER Bondie.
68.19: Nou loue Lesegner ki sarye nou fardo lanwit-lizour; Limem Bondie ki sov nou.
68.20: Nou Bondie, li enn Bondie ki donn delivrans; BONDIE # 68:20 Yahweh BONDIE Lesegner Lesegner, ki sap nou dan lamor.
68.21: Bondie pou sirman kraz latet so ennmi; pini bann long seve ki persiste viv dan zot krim.
68.22: Lesegner finn dir, “Mo pou al sers zot ennmi depi oter Basann; Mo pou al tir zot depi dan profonder losean
68.23: pou ki zot lipie tranp dan bannla zot disan; e mem lalang bann lisien pou gagn zot par.”
68.24: O Bondie, tou dimoun finn trouv to lamars triyonfal; nou tou temwin laprosesion mo Bondie mo Lerwa ler li rant dan so Tanp.
68.25: Santer divan, mizisien deryer, bann tifi ki zwe tanbourin omilie:
68.26: “Remersie Bondie dan gran lasanble. Remersie LESEGNER zot ki zot rasinn dan Izrael. “
68.27: Dabor Benzamin rantre ar so ti tribi; apre bann dirizan Zide, sakenn ar so group; lerla bann sef Zeboulon ek Naftali.
68.28: Montre nou to pwisans, Bondie, pouvwar ki to servi pou ed nou.
68.29: To Tanp dominn Zerizalem laba mem kot bann lerwa depoz kado kot to lipie.
68.30: Met Lezip dan so plas, zanimo sovaz omilie rozo. Menas sa bann nasion ki parey troupo toro ar zot zenis. Fer zot bes latet e rekonet to grander, e depoz zot bann don larzan. Bann ki nek rod lager, exil zot dan rekwin lwintin.
68.31: Lerla anbasader pou vinn ver twa depi Lezip; bann Etiopien pou lev lame lao pou priye twa.
68.32: Sant for-for grander Bondie, zot tou, bann diferan pep dan lemond; sant louanz Lesegner.
68.33: Limem ki travers lesiel depi komansman ziska aster. Tann so lavwa pli for ki loraz.
68.34: Proklam partou grander Bondie; li regne dan Izrael; li ena pouvwar ziska lesiel.
68.35: Nou tou inpresione ler Bondie sorti andeor so Tanp. Limem Bondie Izrael! Li donn lafors ek pouvwar so pep. Nou loue Bondie!

69.1: Bondie, sov mwa! Dilo pe tous mo manton;
69.2: mo lipie pe fons dan labou parski dan fon tou finn vinn mou; mo pe perdi pie e bann vag ot pe vinn nway mwa.
69.3: Mo finn fatige kriye osekour e mo lagorz sek ek amare. Mo lizie finn vinn feb afors mo pe atann Bondie.
69.4: Bann ki ayir mwa san rezon zot pli boukou ki seve lor latet. Mo ennmi koz manti lor mwa; zot for, e zot pe konplote pou touy mwa. Zot ti oule mo rann seki zame mo ti kokin.
69.5: To konn bien, Bondie, tou erer ki mo finn fer; to konn bien kouma mo ti bet.
69.6: Pa les mo erer fer dimoun ki esper dan twa gagn laont, O Segner BONDIE Toupwisan! Pa les mo febles fer dimoun ki ador twa perdi loner, O Bondie, Souvrin Izrael!
69.7: Mo finn aksepte insilt ek kalomni akoz twa; laont ek imiliasion kouver mwa.
69.8: Personn pa konn mwa parmi mo bann frer dan vilaz; mo enn etranze parmi garson mo mama dan mo prop lakaz.
69.9: Lamour pou to lakaz devor mwa kouma laflam; bann insilt ki avoy lor twa tom lor mwa.
69.10: Ler mo plore ek zene la osi zot insilte mwa.
69.11: Mo met linz dey bann la rakont zistwar foutan lor mwa.
69.12: Bann ki asiz dan lantre vilaz koz kont mwa, e bann soular sant sante boufon lor mwa.
69.13: Me mwa, SEGNER, mo priye twa. Bondie, dan letan ki twa to trouv bon, reponn mwa, dan labondans to lamour infini, twa ki fidel pou sov nou.
69.14: Anpes mwa koul dan labou; protez mwa kont mo ennmi; pa les dilo bwar mwa.
69.15: Pa les debordman nway mwa, ris mwa dan fon ouswa may mwa dan trou lamor.
69.16: Reponn mwa, SEGNER, dan to lamour infini; dan to mizerikord tourn ver mwa.
69.17: Pa kasiet to figir, get to serviter, mo dan gran lapenn, reponn mwa!
69.18: Koste pre ar mwa, sov mwa, liber mwa, mo ena ennmi.
69.19: To kone kouma zot pe insilte mwa; kouma zot zet labou lor mwa, dezonor mwa. To bien konn mo bann ennmi.
69.20: Kalomni kas mo leker, dezespwar trap mwa par lagorz. Mo ti rod sinpati, peyna personn! Mo ti rod konsolasion me dan vid!
69.21: Ler mo ti fin mo ti gagn pwazon pou manze; ler mo ti gagn swaf zot ti donn mwa vineg pou bwar.
69.22: Letan zot dres latab divan zot ar bon repa, ki sa vinn zot piez, e seremoni ansam ar zot invite vinn enn latrap.
69.23: Tengn lalimier dan zot lizie! Kabos zot ledo ar douler!
69.24: Vers to koler lor zot; fer to malediksion pini zot.
69.25: Devid zot vilaz net e pa les personn res vivan dan zot lakaz.
69.26: Zot martiriz bann ki to finn pini; zot tortir bann ki finn blese.
69.27: Gard enn kont tou zot pese; pa ena okenn pitie pou zot.
69.28: Efas zot nom dan liv lavi. Pa kont zot parmi bann zis.
69.29: Mo pe soufer, mo dan lapenn; par to sekour, Bondie, sov mwa.
69.30: Mo pou loue nom Bondie par enn kantik; mo pou proklam so grander avek aksiondegras.
69.31: LESEGNER pou plis kontan sa ki bann sakrifis zanimo, plis ki enn toro ar so korn ek so sabo.
69.32: Kan bann ki pe soufer trouv sa zot pou kontan; bann ki zot leker pe rod Bondie pou regagn kouraz.
69.33: LESEGNER ekout dimoun ki bizin led e li pa bliye so pep ki dan prizon.
69.34: Zot tou, bann kreatir lesiel, later, lamer, loue Bondie.
69.35: Li pou sov Zerizalem e rekonstrir bann lavil dan Zide. So pep pou viv laba, zot pou pran posesion later la.
69.36: Desandan so bann serviter fidel pou erit sa later la e bann ki kontan LESEGNER pou viv ere laba.

70.1: Sov mwa Bondie! Ed mwa SEGNER!
70.2: Ki bann ki pe rod mo lamor plonz dan laont ek konfizion; bann ki dezir trouv mo maler, fer zot konn defet ek imiliasion;
70.3: bann ki sikane ek moke fer zot gout defet e zot labous ferme.
70.4: Bann ki vinn ver twa, donn zot lazwa ek boner! Bann ki kontan twa kouma zot Sover, pou toultan dir, “Bondie pli gran ki tou! “
70.5: Mwa mo feb ek pov; donn mwa to sekour Bondie! Tomem mo sekour, mo liberater; SEGNER, pa tarde pou ed mwa!

71.1: SEGNER, mo finn vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; pa les mwa zame konn laont.
71.2: Parski tomem ki drwatir ed mwa, sekour mwa. Ekout mo lapriyer e sov mwa.
71.3: Tomem refiz ek fortres landrwa kot mo toultan kapav vini; to finn desid pou sov mwa, tomem mo proteksion, mo sitadel.
71.4: Bondie, anpes move dimoun fer mwa ditor; anpes kriyote ek lemal fer mwa soufer.
71.5: Segner, tomem mo lespwar; depi ki mo zenn, mo konfians li an twa.
71.6: Depi mo nesans mo depann lor twa, twa ki ti tir mwa dan vant mo mama. Toultan mo pou sant to louanz.
71.7: Boukou dimoun finn vey kouma mo viv parski to finn toultan protez mwa.
71.8: Toutlazourne mo loue twa e mo proklam to laglwar.
71.9: Pa rezet mwa aster ki mo finn vinn vie; pa abandonn mwa aster ki mo nepli for.
71.10: Mo bann ennmi pe koz kont mwa; bann ki vey mwa pe konplote.
71.11: Zot dir, “Bondie finn abandonn li; anou lasas li, may li; personn pa pou donn li koudme.”
71.12: Bondie, pa res lwin ar mwa. Mo Bondie, vit-vit vinn ed mwa.
71.13: Fer dimoun ki akiz mwa tom dan laont; bann ki rod bles mwa tom dan dezoner ek imiliasion.
71.14: Mo pou toultan met mo lespwar dan to pouvwar; mo pou loue twa plizanpli for.
71.15: Mo pou rakont to drwatir, toutlazourne mo pou koz lor tou seki to finn fer pou sov nou mem si mo pa bien konpran tou.
71.16: Mo pou vinn rakont to bann explwa, Segner BONDIE, e mo pou proklam to lazistis, zis lor twa tousel.
71.17: Depi mo zanfan to finn ansegn mwa e malgre mo laz mo kontinie rakont tou to bienfe.
71.18: Aster ki mo finn vinn vie, ki mo seve finn vinn blan pa abandonn mwa Bondie. Les mwa proklam to lafors ar zenerasion ki pe vini, e rakont to pwisans ar bann zenerasion fitir.
71.19: To drwatir, Bondie, mont lao dan lesiel. To finn fer bann gran mirak; peyna to segon, Bondie.
71.20: Mem si to finn avoy traka ek soufrans lor mwa mo kone to pou redonn mwa lavi. Mo kone to pou relev mwa, remont mwa depi profonder later.
71.21: To pou ogmant mo loner, e to pou rekonsol mwa.
71.22: Mo pou sant to louanz ar laarp; mo pou sant to fidelite, mo Bondie. Ar mo sitar mo pou sant to louanz, Bondie ki Sin, ki Izrael adore.
71.23: Mo pou kriye mo lazwa ler mo zwe pou twa; avek tou seki mo ete, mo pou sant to grander parski to finn sov mwa.
71.24: Touletan mo pou koz lor to drwatir parski bann ki ti rod fer mwa ditor finn kouver ar laont ek dezoner.

72.1: Bondie, montre lerwa kouma zize dan drwatir; fer garson rwayal konpran ki to lazistis ete
72.2: pou ki li regne lor lepep dan lazistis e gouvern bann oprime dan ladrwatir.
72.3: Fer ki bann montagn raport prosperite e bann kolinn amenn lazistis tou dimoun.
72.4: Montre lerwa kouma pas zizman pou ki bann pov pa soufer; edik li pou ki li ed bann feb e anpes explwater fer dominer.
72.5: Ki lerwa viv lontan, zenerasion apre zenerasion, tanki soley briye, tanki lalinn ekler nou aswar.
72.6: Fer lerwa vinn parey kouma lapli ki rafresi later, parey kouma gro lapli ki fer karo vinn fertil.
72.7: Ed li pou ki drwatir fleri pandan so regn e ki ena prosperite tanki lalinn eklere.
72.8: Li pou regn lor enn lamer ziska enn lot, li pou gouvern depi Efrat ziska dernie bout later.
72.9: Bann tribi dan dezer pou rekonet so pouvwar; so ennmi pou depoz zarm dan zot defet.
72.10: Lerwa dan Lespagn ek alantour pou montre respe ar bann kado, lerwa Seba ek Saba pou rekonet so lotorite par bann prezan.
72.11: Tou bann lerwa pou prostern divan li, tou bann tribi pou servi li.
72.12: Lerwa donn sekour bann pov ki vinn get li ek bann malere gagn so led.
72.13: Li pitie bann pov ek bann feb; li sap lavi bann ki bizin led.
72.14: Li anpes dominer fer bann feb ek pov pas mizer parski pou lerwa tou lavi imin ena valer.
72.15: Bondie, donn lerwa enn long lavi! Fer ki depi Seba lingo-dor vinn ver li; fer ki dimoun fer lapriyer pou li touletan; fer ki benediksion Bondie toultan lor li.
72.16: Fer ki so rwayom gagn lakoup rekor; fer ki karo ek vale donn manze ankantite kouma lor bann montagn Liban. Fer ki bann lavil ranpli ar dimoun kouma karo ranpli ar lerb.
72.17: Fer ki lerwa so nom res dan nou memwar; fer ki so repitasion dire osi lontan ki lalimier soley. Tou bann pep pou konn benediksion par li, e zot pou deklar li bienere.
72.18: Nou tou, anou loue LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael! Li tousel kapav fer mirak extraordiner.
72.19: Anou sant so laglwar eternelman! Ki so laglwar ranpli liniver. Amenn! Amenn!

73.1: Vremem Bondie toultan bon ar Izrael e ar bann dimoun ki ena leker kler.
73.2: Me mwa, mo ti manke glise; mo ti pou perdi ekilib ek tonbe,
73.3: parski mo ti anvi pran plas bann vantar letan mo trouv bann move dimoun pe prospere.
73.4: Zot pa konn douler; zot for, zot bien portan.
73.5: Zot pa soufer kouma nou soufer; zot pa gagn traka kouma lezot.
73.6: Akoz sa zot expoz zot vantardiz koumadir enn bizou; zot violans anpandan lor zot kouma enn manto;
73.7: zot boufi ar lagres, zot lizie sorti gro, e zot latet plin ar plan mesanste.
73.8: Zot sikann dimoun e koz move koze; zot fezer e zot tir plan pou fer dominer.
73.9: Zot labous insilte Bondie dan lesiel e zot lalang kritik tou lor later.
73.10: Akoz sa lepep tourn ver zot, ek bwar parol ki zot verse anabondans.
73.11: Zot dir koumsa, “Kot Bondie pou kone? Eski Pli Lao la konn kiksoz li?”
73.12: Ala kouma bann dan lemal ete. Trankil-trankil zot pe ogmant zot rises.
73.13: Savedir pou nannye mo‘nn res prop. Pou nannye mo‘nn lav mo lame pou montre mo inosans.
73.14: Mo finn soufer toutlazourne; toulegramatin mo konn pinision.
73.15: Si mo ti vremem pans koumsa, e azir kouma bannla mo pa ti pou to serviter fidel, mo ti pou trayir fami Bondie.
73.16: Mo ti sey konpran problem la me pa ti fasil.
73.17: Fode mo ti rant dan to Tanp, lerla mo ti konpran ki pou ariv bann ki dan pese.
73.18: To met zot lor terin glisan; zot glise, tonbe, destriksion atann zot.
73.19: Enn sel kout, fini! Enn gran ravaz! Zot fini bien mal, zot lafin orib.
73.20: Kouma enn rev ki fonn ar soley gramatin, zot volatilize ler to dres divan zot, O Segner.
73.21: Ler mo ti ena leker dan lapenn, ler mo santiman ti blese,
73.22: mo ti enn veritab inbesil ki pa ti pe konpran twa, Bondie.
73.23: Me mo pou toultan res koste ar twa e mo kone to pou trap mo lame.
73.24: To pou gid mwa ar bon konsey e alafin to pou akeyir mwa ar boukou loner.
73.25: Apart twa mo peyna personn dan lesiel! Si mo ena twa ki lezot mo bizin lor later?
73.26: Mo lekor ek mo lespri kapav febli me mo vre lafors se mo Bondie. Apart li, mo trezor eternel, mo pa bizin personn.
73.27: Bann ki abandonn twa pou fini mal; To pou detrir bann ki fer tret ar twa.
73.28: Mwa mo kone kouma li bon kan nou pre ar Bondie; Mo finn swazir Lesegner BONDIE # 73:28 Lesegner Yahweh pou protez mwa; mo pou proklam tou to bann bienfe.

74.1: Ayo Bondie, kifer to abandonn nou pou toultan? Kifer to ankoler kont nou, troupo dan to patiraz?
74.2: Rapel to pep ki tomem to ti swazir lontan, bien lontan. To ti kas zot lasenn lesklavaz pou fer zot vinn to prop posesion. Rapel Montagn Sion kot lontan to ti viv.
74.3: Vinn get demolision partou; nou ennmi finn kraz tou dan to Tanp.
74.4: Andan to Tanp to ennmi finn kriye laviktwar; zot finn met zot pavyon pou fer twa vwar.
74.5: Zot finn netway partou koumadir bisron pe koup pie dan lafore.
74.6: Zot finn defons travay artistik dan pano dibwa ar lars ek teti;
