74.7: zot finn kraz tou dan Tanp e zot finn alim dife. Zot finn profann landrwa sakre kot nou priye twa.
74.8: Zot ti anvi fini nou net; zot ti bril tou bann landrwa lapriyer dan nou pei, landrwa sakre kot ti zwenn ar Bondie.
74.9: Bann sinbol sakre finn elimine; inn nepli ena okenn profet. Personn pakone komie letan sa pou dire.
74.10: Pandan komie letan ankor nou bann ennmi pou boufonn twa, nou Bondie? To pou les zot insilte twa eternelman?
74.11: Kifer to pa‘le ed nou? Kifer to gard to lebra krwaze?
74.12: Me depi komansman letan se twa Bondie ki finn nou Lerwa, e ki finn toultan sov nou dan detres.
74.13: Ar to lafors sirnatirel To ti separ lamer pou fer sime; To ti kraz latet bann mons losean;
74.14: To ti eklat latet Leviatan, mons malefik, e donn zanimo dezer manz so lekor.
74.15: To ti fer dilo sourse e koule dan larivier; To ti fer bann flev profon vinn sek enn kou.
74.16: To ti kree lizour ek lanwit; To ti plas soley ek lalinn dan zot plas;
74.17: To ti desinn frontier later; To ti fer lete ek liver.
74.18: Me pa bliye, SEGNER, ki to ennmi pe boufonn twa; pa bliye zot peyna lafwa e ki zot mepriz to nom.
74.19: Pa abandonn to kolonb dan grif bann zanimo sovaz, sirtou pa zame bliye to pep ki pe soufer.
74.20: Pa bliye to lalians ki to ti fer ar nou! Violans ranpli dan tou kwin ek rekwin nwar.
74.21: Pa les bann oprime soufer imiliasion; permet bann dimoun pov e bann ki bizin led loue twa.
74.22: Bondie, lev twa! Defann to lintere! Pa bliye! Bann ki pa ena lafwa kritike e boufonn twa gramatin-tanto.
74.23: Pa bliye e rapel bien! To ennmi fer enn ta tapaz, to adverser pe touzour kriye mem.

75.1: Mersi Bondie, mersi! Nou selebre to nom, parski li pros ar nou. Dimoun rakonte toultan bann mirak extraordiner ki to finn fer.
75.2: Bondie dir, “Ler zizman, mwa ki deside. Mo zizman pou baze lor drwatir.
75.3: Mem si tou kreatir vivan pou tranble, mem si later pou sakouye, Mo pou tini so bann kolonn anplas.
75.4: Mo averti bann fezer, “Aret fer zot fezer. “ Mo dir bann move dimoun, “Aret fer vantar.
75.5: Aret fer fanor, e koz ar linsolans! “
75.6: Grander pa sorti dan les ou dan lwes; dan lenor ou dan lesid.
75.7: Bondie, limem ki ziz Siprem; li kondann enn, li relev enn lot.
75.8: LESEGNER tini dan so lame enn koup ranpli ar divin bouyant, bien melanze ar zepis. Li devid li dan lagorz bann move dimoun, fors zot aval tou ziska dernie gout.
75.9: Mwa mo pa pou aret koz lor grander Bondie ki Zakob ti adore; mo pa pou aret sant so louanz.
75.10: Li pou detrir pouvwar bann ki pratik lemal e grandi pouvwar bann ki pratik lebien.

76.1: Tou dimoun dan Zide konn Bondie; dan Izrael, ena gran respe pou so nom.
76.2: So lakaz li dan Zerizalem; Li viv lor Montagn Sion.
76.3: Dan so Tanp li detrir zarm ek larsenal so ennmi.
76.4: Get kouma to gran, Bondie, get kouma to inpresionan ler to desann montagn kot to finn konkerir to adverser.
76.5: Bann brav solda ennmi finn perdi tou e aster zot finn rant dan zot dernie somey. Mem pa enn parmi zot pou kapav servi so lafors.
76.6: Ler to ti menas zot O Bondie ki Zakob ti adore, seval ek kavalie ti tom sek.
76.7: Twa, to redoutab, twa. Kisannla kapav res insansib kan to lakoler exploze?
76.8: Depi dan lesiel to ti pronons to zizman; lemond ti tranble; silans ti konple
76.9: ler, twa Bondie, to ti dibout pou etablir zizman pou ed bann ki ti pe sibir dominasion.
76.10: Mem lakoler dimoun pou fer to laglwar pli gran, bann ki sap dan sa lakoler la pou vinn antour twa.
76.11: Donn LESEGNER to Bondie seki to ti promet li; tou dimoun dan tou nasion ofer li zot ofrand, pou sa Bondie pou ki zot ena lakrint la.
76.12: Li fer bann prins vantar bes latet; li terifie bann gran lerwa lor later.

77.1: Mo kriye for, “Bondie ed mwa!” Mo kriye for e Bondie tann mwa.
77.2: Kan lavi pa fasil mo priye e rod sekour Lesegner; toutlanwit mo lev lame lao pou priye; me mo pa gagn rekonfor.
77.3: Ler mo pans Bondie, mo soupire; ler mo fer meditasion, dekourazman sezi mwa.
77.4: Aswar to pa les mo lizie ferme; traka anpes mwa koze.
77.5: Mo mazinn lepase; souvenir letan lontan.
77.6: Toutlanwit mo reflesi; mo medite e ala seki vinn dan mo latet:
77.7: “Eski Lesegner finn rezet nou pou toultan? Eski zame li pa pou favorab anver nou ankor?
77.8: Eski so lamour infini pou nou finn mor? Eski li finn ramas so promes pou debon?
77.9: Eski Bondie finn aret montre konpasion? Eski so lakoler finn ferm so leker?”
77.10: Apre mo dir momem, “Seki fer mwa plis dimal se kikfwa Bondie Pli Lao nepli servi so pouvwar dan nou faver.”
77.11: Mo pou rapel bann gran explwa LESEGNER; mo pou rapel tou bann mirak to ti fer;
77.12: mo pou medit lor tou seki to finn fer; mo pou reflesi lor tou to bann gran explwa.
77.13: Tou seki to fer Bondie, li sin. Eski ena lot bondie osi gran ki nou Bondie?
77.14: To tousel Bondie ki fer bann aksion etonan, ki ti montre tou bann tribi to gran pouvwar
77.15: ki to ti servi pou sov to pep, desandan Zakob ek Zozef.
77.16: Ler lamer ti trouv twa, Bondie, ler lamer trouv twa, li ti krake; profonder losean ti tranble.
77.17: Bann niaz ti devers lapli kouma toran partou; loraz ti kraz baraz dan lesiel; zekler kouma fles ti alim partou.
77.18: Loraz ti roule ar enn son asourdisan; zekler to avoye ti ekler lemond; later ti gagn sok e li ti tranble.
77.19: To fer to sime atraver lamer, to fer enn pasaz atraver profon lamer, me okenn plas pa ti ena to tras.
77.20: To ti gid to pep kouma enn troupo atraver Moiz ek Aaron.

78.1: Ekoute mo pep, ekout mo lansegnman. Ekout bien seki mo ena pou dir!
78.2: Mo pou servi parabol pou mo koze, mo pou explik bann parol ki ena sekre, ki sorti bien lontan,
78.3: ki nou finn tande, ki ti kone, ki nou grandimoun ti rakont nou.
78.4: Nou pa pou kasiet sa nou bann zanfan; nou pou koz sa ar zenerasion ki pe vini, tou bann mervey LESEGNER, e so pouvwar, e bann aksion extraordiner ki li finn akonpli.
78.5: Li finn donn so instriksion desandan Zakob, li finn etabli Lalwa pou lepep Izrael. Li ti dir nou bann anset ansegn so Lalwa ar zot bann zanfan
78.6: afin ki konesans la li transmet depi enn zenerasion ziska enn lot zenerasion ki pa‘nkor ne.
78.7: Koumsa nouvo zenerasion pou met zot lespwar dan Bondie, toultan rapel so travay e obeyir so komandman.
78.8: Fale pa zot vinn kouma zot gran dimoun lontan ki ti teti ek dezobeisan, parski zot leker pa ti ferm, e zot lwayote ti mins anver Bondie.
78.9: Tribi Efraim, arme ar zarm pwisan, zot sove ler lager eklate.
78.10: Zot bliye zot lalians ar Bondie; zot refiz obeyir so lalwa.
78.11: Zot bliye tou seki li finn fer; zot bliye bann mirak ki zot ti trouve ar zot de lizie.
78.12: Divan lizie zot bann zanset Bondie ti fer bann gran mirak dan Zoan dan Lezip.
78.13: Li ti ouver enn pasaz dan lamer e fer zot pase; dilo ti diboute lor de kote, kouma de miray.
78.14: Anplinzour li ti servi enn niaz pou gid zot; aswar li ti servi enn lalimier dife.
78.15: Li ti fann ros an de dan dezer e li ti fer dilo sourse depi profonder later.
78.16: Enn rwiso ti sorti dan ros e dilo ti koule kouma larivier.
78.17: Zot pa ti aret fer pese kont Bondie e dan dezer zot ti revolte kont seki Pli Lao.
78.18: Zot ti rod teste so lafors. Zot ti insiste gagn manze pou satisfer zot lanvi.
78.19: Zot koz kont Bondie ler zot dir, “Eski Bondie kapav donn nou manze dan dezer?
78.20: Vremem li ti tir dilo dan ros, me eski li kapav donn nou dipin? Eski li kapav donn nou laviann pou manze?”
78.21: LESEGNER ti amer ler li ti tann zot rabase. So lakoler ti anflame kont Zakob, so lakoler ti monte kont Izrael,
78.22: parski zot pa ti ena konfians dan li e zot ti nepli krwar ki li pou sov zot.
78.23: Pourtan li ti komann niaz lao, li ti ouver laport lesiel
78.24: pou les lamann tom lor zot, plin zot vant ar lagrin dible ki sorti dan lesiel.
78.25: Bann imin ti manz nouritir ki anz manze e Bondie ti donn zot tou an abondans.
78.26: Li ti fer divan Les leve dan lesiel; par so pwisans li ti fer divan Lesid soufle;
78.27: li ti avoy laviann, osi abondan ki lapousier, e otan zwazo kouma disab lor laplaz,
78.28: ki ti tom omilie kot zot ti kanpe, partou otour zot lakaz.
78.29: Tou dimoun ti rasazie ar manze; zot ti satisfe. Bondie ti donn zot seki zot ti oule.
78.30: Me avan ki zot resi satisfer zot dezir, manze ti ankor dan zot lagorz,
78.31: lakoler Bondie lev kont zot, li ti touy bann zom pli for, bann meyer zenn Izrael tonbe.
78.32: Pa krwar sa ti sanz zot! Zot ti kontinie zot pese. Zot ti kontinie pa krwar dan so aksion manifik.
78.33: Enn kout soufle, Bondie ti tengn zot lavi e zot lavi ti fini dan lafreyer.
78.34: Sak fwa li ti touy de-trwa, leres ti vinn ver li; zot ti repanti e zot ti priye Bondie.
78.35: Lerla zot ti koumans rapel ki Bondie ti zot protekter; ki Bondie Pli Lao ti toultan delivre zot.
78.36: Zot ti flat Bondie ar zot labous, zot lalang ti koz manti ar li.
78.37: Zot pa ti lwayal ar Bondie; zot ti fini bliye zot lalians ar li.
78.38: Me Bondie ti ena konpasion pou so pep; li ti pardonn zot pese e li pa ti avoy lamor lor zot. Plizier fwa li ti tini so lakoler e li ti kontrol so laraz.
78.39: Li ti rapel zot febles parski zot ti zis bann imin mortel ki ti kouma enn ti labriz ki soufle avan li tengn net.
78.40: Komie fwa dan dezer zot ti met so lotorite odefi; komie fwa zot ti ranpli so leker ar sagrin.
78.41: Tanzantan zot ti teste Bondie, zot ti provok Bondie ki Sin, ki Izrael adore.
78.42: Zot ti bliye so gran pwisans, zot bliye zour ki li ti delivre zot depi zot ennmi;
78.43: e li ti fer so bann aksion etonan dan Zoan dan Lezip.
78.44: Larivier dilo ti vinn larivier disan, akoz sa bann Ezipsien pa ti kapav bwar;
78.45: enn niaz mous ti desann lor zot ar maladi; enn larme krapo ti rann zot lavi bien difisil.
78.46: Sotrel ti detrir plantasion; prodwi zot travay ti fini ar sotrel.
78.47: Lagrel ti touy karo rezin; pie fig sovaz ti griye ar freser.
78.48: Lagrel ti touy zanimo; bann troupo ti viktim lafoud.
78.49: Bondie larg enn koler intans lor bannla, detres, laraz, ek ostilite - enn gran group anz avek enn mision destriksion.
78.50: Li pa ti kontrol ditou so laraz; li pa ti epargn personn lamor, me li ti les lapes fer so travay destriksion.
78.51: Li ti touy premie garson dan sak fami dan Lezip.
78.52: Apre sa, li ti diriz so pep pou sorti laba kouma enn troupo, kouma enn bon berze li gid zot atraver dezer.
78.53: Li ti amenn zot ver sekirite e zot lafreyer ti disparet. Parkont bann vag lamer ti monte, al kraz lor ennmi lepep.
78.54: Li ti amenn zot dan so domenn sakre, lor montagn ki li ti konkerir.
78.55: Li ti sas bann nasion divan zot, li ti partaz later la ar bann tribi Izrael sakenn so par, pou konstrir zot lakaz.
78.56: Me zot ti teste Bondie Pli Lao, zot rebel kont li e pa obeyir so komandman.
78.57: Zot pran move sime parey kouma zot bann anset. Zot ti parey kouma enn zarm kase ki kapav fer tret.
78.58: Zot ti provok li letan zot servi landrwa sakre bann payin. Zot fer li ankoler letan zot al apre bann zidol.
78.59: Bondie ti nepli kapav tini; li ti rezet so pep net.
78.60: Li ti abandonn so tabernak dan Silo ki limem ti swazir pou li kapav viv parmi nou bann imin.
78.61: Li ti les ennmi pran kofre sign so pwisans, so laglwar e so mazeste ti al an kaptivite.
78.62: Li ti sitan ankoler ki li ti les ennmi touy so pep.
78.63: Zennzan ti mor dan lager; zennfi pa ti resi konn sante maryaz.
78.64: Bann pret ti sibir lamor violan e zot vev pa ti mem kapav fer dey.
78.65: Finalman Lesegner leve, kouma kikenn ki sorti dan somey, kouma enn dimoun ki sort dan soulezon.
78.66: Li bat so ennmi ki oblize sove, li imilie zot; zot tom dan laont pou touzour.
78.67: Me li ti rezet desandan Zozef; Li pa ti swazir tribi Efraim.
78.68: Li ti prefer tribi Zide e Montagn Sion ki li ti extra kontan.
78.69: Se dan sa plas la ki li ti konstrir so Tanp parey kouma so lakaz dan lesiel. Anplis li ti fer li telman solid ki li ti pou reziste ravaz letan.
78.70: Answit li ti swazir David kouma so serviter; li ti tir li dan patiraz
78.71: kot li ti pe vey so troupo e ti fer li vinn lerwa Izrael, berze lepep Bondie.
78.72: David ti okip zot avek enn leker san repros, e li ti diriz so pep ar boukou talan ek sazes.

79.1: Ayo Bondie, bann nasion ennmi finn anvayir to patrimwann; zot finn viol pirte to Tanp sakre e zot finn detrir Zerizalem.
79.2: Zot ti ofer kadav to bann serviter kouma manze pou votour; kadav to bann fidel ti nouri zanimo feros.
79.3: Zot ti fer disan to pep koule kouma dilo; partou otour Zerizalem, e personn pa ti la pou anter lemor.
79.4: Nou enn size insilt pou bann vwazin, zot mok nou, zot sikann nou.
79.5: O SEGNER, ziska kan? To pou ankoler pou toultan? To lakoler zame li pa pou tengn?
79.6: Diriz to lakoler kont bann tribi ki pa krwar dan twa; bann rwayom ki pa rekonet to nom.
79.7: Pa bliye! Zot ki finn devor to pep, Zakob; zot ki finn detrir so pei.
79.8: Pa pini nou pou pese ki nou anset ti komet; ena konpasion pou nou, nou lespwar finn tom bien ba.
79.9: Ed nou, Bondie, twa ki nou Sover, pou laglwar to nom; liber nou e pardonn nou pou laglwar to nom.
79.10: Pa les bann lezot nasion dir, “Kot zot Bondie ete?” Fer bann nasion kone, divan nou lizie, kouma to vanz disan to bann serviter fidel.
79.11: Ekout bann prizonie kriye-plore; ar to gran lafors liber bann ki dan koulwar lamor.
79.12: O Segner, fer to ennmi pey set fwa pli ser bann insilt ek kalomni ki zot ti devers lor twa.
79.13: Lerla, nou, to pep, mouton dan to troupo pou remersie twa eternelman e pou sant to louanz depi isi ziska leternite

80.1: Ekout nou, Berze Izrael, twa ki gid bann desandan Zozef kouma enn troupo. Lor to tronn, lao bann seribin, revel twa
80.2: devan bann tribi Efraim, Benzamin ek Manase. Servi to lafors e vinn sov nou.
80.3: Redonn nou nou lafors lontan, O Bondie! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.
80.4: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, komie letan ankor to pou refiz ekout lapriyer to pep?
80.5: To finn met sagrin dan nou lasiet manze e to finn ranpli nou goble ar larm.
80.6: To les nou vinn lasours dispit ar bann nasion vwazin; to pe les nou ennmi insilte nou.
80.7: O Bondie Toupwisan, redonn nou nou lafors lontan! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.
80.8: To ti amenn enn boutir rezin depi Lezip; to ti farous bann lezot tribi pou plant li dan zot later.
80.9: To ti netway enn bout terin pou permet li pouse. So rasinn ti rant dan profonder later e li ti fane partou.
80.10: So lonbraz ti tale partou lor kolinn; so bann brans ti depas mem bann gran pie sed.
80.11: Li ti kontinie peple ziska Mediterane, ale mem ziska larivier Efrat.
80.12: Kifer to finn kraz so miray protekter? Aster ninport kisannla ki pase kapav kokin rezin;
80.13: koson maron vinn fer ravaz ladan, e toutsort zanimo sovaz manz so bourzon.
80.14: Get nou kote, O Bondie Toupwisan! Depi lao, get ki pe ariv nou; vinn sov sa lavign la.
80.15: Vinn sov to pie rezin ki to ti plante; zenn pie rezin ki zordi finn vinn sitan for grasa to swin.
80.16: Bann ennmi finn met dife ar li, zot finn koup li. Diriz to lakoler kont zot e detrir zot.
80.17: Prezerv ek protez lepep ki to finn swazir; nasion ki to finn fortifie pou grandi.
80.18: Alor nou pa pou kit twa ankor, redonn nou lavi e nou pou invok to nom.
80.19: Redonn nou nou lafors lontan, O SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.

81.1: Anou sant nou lazwa pou Bondie, nou lafors; avek lazwa anou loue Bondie ki Zakob ti adore.
81.2: Larg lamizik, tap nou tanbour; fer lagitar ek sitar sant zoli melodi.
81.3: Soufle tronpet, soufle bigoul pou demar festival nouvel-linn, e letan plenn-linn, e pou festival.
81.4: Sa enn lalwa dan Izrael; enn instriksion Bondie ki Zakob ti adore.
81.5: Li ti donn sa lalwa la lepep Izrael kan li ti atak Lezip. Enn lavwa, ki zame mo finn tande avan, dir,
81.6: “Mo finn tir fardo lor zot zepol; mo finn tir pwa lour dan zot lame, finn depoz li anba.
81.7: Kan zot ti dan difikilte, zot ti dimann mo led mo ti reponn depi dan berso loraz. Mo ti teste zot kan mo ti fer lasours Meriba sek.
81.8: Ayo mo pep, ekout mo avertisman; Izrael, si selman to ti kapav ekout mwa!
81.9: Fode pa ena bondie etranze parmi zot. Pa ador enn lot ki mwa.
81.10: Mwa mo LESEGNER to Bondie; Mwa ki ti tir zot depi Lezip. Ouver zot labous e mo pou plin zot vant.
81.11: Me mo pep ti aret ekoute; Izrael ti refiz obeyir mwa.
81.12: Akoz sa mo ti les zot fer zot teti e debrouy zot difil kouma zot ti oule.
81.13: Si selman mo pep ti ekout mwa; si selman zot ti obeyir mo instriksion.
81.14: Vit-vit mo ti pou detrir zot ennmi; lor vites mo aneanti bann ki rod fer zot ditor.
81.15: Bann ki ayir LESEGNER pou kourbe ar lafreyer divan li, zot pinision pa pou ena finision.
81.16: Me mo pep ti pou manz meyer dible; e ti pou bwar meyer dimiel sovaz.”

82.1: Konsey Siprem Lesiel an renion e Bondie pe prezide; dan lasanble segner lesiel li donn so zizman.
82.2: “Ziska kan zot pou kontign donn zizman bankal, e kontign pran par bann ki lor move sime?
82.3: Defann drwa bann pov ek bann orfelin; donn lazistis bann ti-dimoun ek bann ki peyna nannye.
82.4: Vinn osekour bann feb ek bann pov. Tir zot dan lame bann move dimoun. “
82.5: Zot pa konn nannye, zot pa konpran nannye, zot pe mars ataton dan lobskirite koripsion, e fondasion later pe sakouye.
82.6: Mo finn dir zot, “Zot bann ti bondie dan lesiel. Zot dan famiy Bondie Pli Lao, zot tou;
82.7: e pourtan, zot pou fini kouma bann mortel; zot lavi pou fini kouma ninport ki sinp sef lor later. “
82.8: Vini Bondie, vinn ziz nou liniver, tou bann nasion pou twa, anba to lotorite.

83.1: Bondie, pa res dan silans koumsa, Pa res trankil, san fer nannye, O Bondie!
83.2: Get laba! To ennmi pe azite, e bann ki ena laenn pou twa pe organiz revolt.
83.3: Zot pe konplote kont to pep; zot pe prepare ansekre kont bann zanfan ki to bien kontan.
83.4: Zot pe dir, “Anou detrir zot kouma enn nasion; anou efas Izrael lor map. “
83.5: Zot tom dakor e zot marye pike kont twa.
83.6: Bann Edom, bann Ismaelit, bann Moab, bann zanfan Agar,
83.7: bann Gebal, bann Amon, bann Amalek, Filistia ek bann zabitan Tir finn fer koalision.
83.8: Bann Asirien, enn alye for bann Amon ek bann Moab, desandan Lot, finn vinn donn enn koudme li osi.
83.9: Tret zot kouma to ti tret bann Midianit, bann Sisera ek bann Zabin kot larivier Kison.
83.10: To ti dezarm zot dan Enndor e to ti les zot kadav vinn fimie lor later.
83.11: Fini zot bann sef kouma to ti fini Oreb ek Zeeb; exterminn zot dirizan kouma to ti exterminn
83.12: Zeba ek Zalmouna ki ti dir, “Nou pou akapar later Bondie pou nou. “
83.13: Bondie, fer zot fane kouma lapousier, kouma lapay ki divan sarye.
83.14: Parey kouma dife detrir lafore; kouma laflam alim flan montagn
83.15: fer zot sove, ale ar to ravaz tanpet; terifie zot ar to rafal siklonn.
83.16: Kouver zot ar laont, O SEGNER ziska zot oblize rekonet to grander.
83.17: Fini zot dan imiliasion ek lafreyer pou toultan e fer ki zot mor dan dezoner.
83.18: Fer zot realize ki se twa ki SEGNER e zis twa ki Pli Lao lor liniver.

84.1: SEGNER Toupwisan, konbien mo kontan to Tanp merveye!
84.2: Mo pli gran dezir se viv ladan; viv ansam ar twa dan to Tanp, SEGNER. Mo lekor ek mo lespri ki dan lazwa sant ver Bondie vivan.
84.3: Get kouma mwano finn gagn enn ti plas, ek irondel finn ranz zot nik dan to Tanp pou ki zot tibaba grandi pre kot twa, SEGNER Toupwisan, mo Lerwa, mo Bondie.
84.4: Bienere bann dimoun ki viv dan to lakaz; ki kontign sant to louanz lanwit-lizour.
84.5: Zot bienere bann ki tir zot lafors dan lasours to lafors; bann ki fite pou fer pelerinaz ziska Montagn Sion.
84.6: Ler zot travers vale Baka ki toultan konn lasesres, dilo koumans sourse partou e premie gro lapli plin bann basin.
84.7: Amizir zot marse, zot lafors grandi, pou prezant devan Bondie ki pli pwisan ki tou lezot segner lor Montagn Sion.
84.8: Ekout mo lapriyer SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan! Ekoute, Bondie ki Zakob ti adore!
84.9: Beni nou lerwa, nou boukliye, beni lerwa ki to finn konsakre.
84.10: Enn zourne dan to Tanp li vo plis ki mil zourne dan enn lot landrwa; preferab mo enn portie divan lakaz Bondie ki viv dan lakaz bann move dimoun.
84.11: Wi, LESEGNER Bondie, li nou lalimier, nou boukliye protekter ki beni nou ar bonte ek loner. Zame li refiz donn nou seki meyer si nou viv enn lavi san repros.
84.12: SEGNER Toupwisan, nou leker ranpli ar lazwa parski nou finn met nou konfians an twa.

85.1: SEGNER, to finn deza montre to zenerozite anver nou later; To finn deza donn Izrael so prosperite;
85.2: To finn deza pardonn pese to pep, to finn efas tou zot bann fot.
85.3: To finn met dekote to mekontantman e tini to lakoler intans.
85.4: O Bondie nou Sover, fer nou for ankor enn fwa, e aret get nou ar lizie traver!
85.5: Eski to pou toultan mekontan ar nou? Eski to lakoler zame pa pou tengn?
85.6: To pa pou redonn nou lavi, pou ki to pep retrouv so lazwa an twa?
85.7: Montre nou to lamour infini, O SEGNER, sov nou!
85.8: Mo pe ekout seki LESEGNER Bondie pe dir; li pe promet nou, so pep, lape si nou pa retom dan nou vilin manier.
85.9: Nou kone ki li pou sov bann ki onor li e so laglwar pou toultan la dan nou pei.
85.10: Lamour infini ek fidelite pou mars lame dan lame; Drwatir ek lape pou existe kotakot.
85.11: Lwayote imin pou monte depi later e drwatir Bondie pou desann depi lesiel.
85.12: LESEGNER pou donn nou prosperite e nou later so rannman pou extra bon.
85.13: Drwatir pou mars divan LESEGNER pou prepar sime pou li.

86.1: SEGNER, ekout mwa e ekzos mo lapriyer. Mo pov, mo feb e mo san resours.
86.2: Prezerv mo lavi parski mo to serviter lwayal. Protez ek sov to serviter ki finn met so konfians dan twa.
86.3: Tomem mo Bondie! Pitie mwa, Segner. Mo priye twa lanwit-lizour.
86.4: Donn to serviter lazwa, Segner, parski mo tourn ver twa dan mo lapriyer.
86.5: Segner, to ranpli ar bonte ek pardon; to lamour infini peyna born pou dimoun ki kriye twa.
86.6: Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER; ekout mwa ki pe sipliye twa.
86.7: Kan maler tom lor mwa, mo kriye twa parski mo kone to reponn mwa.
86.8: Peyna lot bondie ki twa, Segner; peyna lot ki kapav fer seki to finn fer.
86.9: Tou bann nasion ki to finn kree pou vinn ver twa pou prezant zot respe; zot pou glorifie to nom.
86.10: Tomem pli gran e to finn fer bann mervey; Peyna lot bondie ki twa, to tousel Bondie.
86.11: SEGNER, aprann mwa ki bizin fer e mo pou swiv to laverite, montre mwa kouma servi twa ar devouman e mo pou ena gran respe pou to nom.
86.12: Mo pou sant to grander ar sinserite, O Segner mo Bondie; mo pou glorifie to nom pou touzour.
86.13: To lamour infini pou mwa li depas tou! To finn tir mwa dan trou lamor.
86.14: O Bondie, enn larme vantar pe fons lor mwa; enn geng vwayou pe rod mwa pou touye. Sa bann la pa pran Bondie kont.
86.15: Me twa, Segner, to enn Bondie konpatisan e bienveyan, To ena gran pasians, to ranpli ar lamour infini ek fidelite.
86.16: Tourn ver mwa. Ena pitie pou mwa. Donn to serviter to lafors; sov mwa, zanfan to servant.
86.17: Montre enn sign ki to kontan mwa; koumsa mo ennmi pou gagn laont ler zot trouv sa, parski twa, SEGNER, to finn sekour mwa, to finn konsol mwa.

87.1: LESEGNER ti konstrir so lavil lor montagn sakre;
87.2: plis ki ninport ki lot plas dan Izrael li kontan so lavil Zerizalem.
87.3: Bann parol ranpli ar laglwar pe koze lor twa, lavil Bondie.
87.4: “Mo pou mansionn Lezip ek Babilonn kan mo fer lalis bann nasion ki obeyir mwa; Mo pou azout bann Filistia, bann Tir, ek bann Etiopi.”
87.5: Lor Sion li pou dir, “Sa enn la, sa lot la, zot tou finn ne laba “ parski Bondie Pli Lao ki konsolid li.
87.6: LESEGNER pou fer enn lalis tou bann pep, e pou dekrete ki zot tou finn ne laba.
87.7: Tou dimoun danse ek sante, “Sion limem lasours tou benediksion.”

88.1: SEGNER Bondie, mo Sover, toutlazourne mo kriy osekour; toutlanwit mo priye twa.
88.2: Ekout mo lapriyer ki devan twa, tann mwa kriye osekour.
88.3: Traka pe ranpli mo lavi; lamor pe koste kot mwa.
88.4: Mo lor lalis bann ki ena enn lipie dan tom, mo parey enn dimoun ki nepli ena lafors.
88.5: Mo koumadir kikenn ki finn abandone dan rwayom lamor; mo kouma bann solda mor ki finn zet dan fose, kouma kikenn ki to finn bliye net, ki to finn koupe net ar zot.
88.6: To finn rezet mwa dan fon trou lamor, dan finfon marenwar.
88.7: To lakoler pez lour lor mwa, kouma gro-gro vag li kraz mwa.
88.8: To finn fer mo bann kamwad abandonn mwa; aster zot get mwa ar degou. Miray otour mwa, mo peyna sime sorti;
88.9: soufrans ek larm finn febli mo lizie. SEGNER, toulezour mo sipliy twa; mo lev lame ver twa pou dimann led.
88.10: Eski to fer mirak pou dimoun mor? Eski dimoun mor leve pou sant to louanz?
88.11: Eski dan tom, kadav koz lor to lamour infini? Eski dan landrwa destriksion, lamor koz lor to fidelite?
88.12: Eski dan nik marenwar to mirak vizib? Eski dan lemond san memwar to bonte reyone?
88.13: SEGNER, mo pe dimann twa ed mwa; toulegramatin mo sipliy twa.
88.14: Kifer to bous to zorey? Kifer to get lot kote?
88.15: Depi mo zanfan mo pe soufer; souvan mo pas pre ar lamor; mo finn sibir laterer ki to inpoze, mo dan dezespwar.
88.16: Dife to lakoler kraz mwa; to violans fini mwa.
88.17: Toutlazourne zot bar mwa partou kouma debordman; lor tou kote zot fons lor mwa san pitie.
88.18: Mo bann meyer kamwad finn fini abandonn mwa; zis marenwar epe ki koste ar mwa.

89.1: SEGNER, mo pou touzour sant to lamour infini; mo pou servi mo lavwa pou proklam to fidelite ar zenerasion fitir.
89.2: Mo kone ki to lamour infini li etabli pou toultan; ki to fidelite li eternel ek permanan kouma lesiel.
89.3: To ti dir, “Mo finn fer enn lalians ar enn dimoun ki mo finn swazir. Ala ki mo finn promet mo serviter David,
89.4: ‘Lor tronn pou ena toultan to desandan; dinasti David pou dire eternelman.‘”
89.5: Bann kreatir dan lesiel sant bann mervey ki to fer; bann anz dan zot lasanble sant to fidelite, O SEGNER.
89.6: Peyna personn dan lesiel ki kouma twa; parmi bann kreatir dan lesiel peyna ki konparab ar twa.
89.7: Tou kreatir lesiel per Bondie; zot tou respe Bondie ki redoutab.
89.8: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, personn peyna lafors kouma twa; to fidelite li toultan prezan, O SEGNER.
89.9: Se twa ki kontrol losean pwisan e zis twa ki kapav kalme lakoler bann vag.
89.10: Se twa ki ti kraz latet Raab # 89:10 Dapre vie zistwar babilonien Raab enn mons losean ki reprezant dezord ek lemal kouma enn karkas; se to lafors san born ki ti fer to ennmi manz lapousier.
89.11: Lesiel pou twa, later osi li pou twa; lemond e tou seki ena ladan - twa ki finn kree zot.
89.12: To finn kree lenor, to finn kree lesid; Montagn Tabor ek Ermon sant to grander dan lazwa.
89.13: To pouvwar li bien gran, to lafors li san limit.
89.14: To rwayom finn konstrir lor drwatir ek lazistis; lamour ek fidelite prezan dan tou seki to fer.
89.15: Bienere bann ki priye twa ar zoli sante; bann ki viv dan lalimier to prezans, SEGNER.
89.16: Grasa twa zot viv lazwa toutlazourne, e zot redrese dan louanz akoz to lazistis.
89.17: Tomem ki donn zot laglwar par to pwisans; grasa to bonte ek to lamour nou finn gagn laviktwar.
89.18: O SEGNER, to finn swazir nou protekter; Bondie ki Sin ki Izrael adore, nou lerwa depann lor twa.
89.19: Dan enn vizion to ti dir bann profet “Mo finn donn pouvwar enn zom for; parmi lepep mo finn swazir enn lerwa.
89.20: Mo finn met mo serviter David lor tronn e mo finn beni so latet ar delwil sakre.
89.21: Lafors mo lame pou toultan akonpagn li, pouvwar mo lebra pou rann li bien for.
89.22: So ennmi pa pou ena viktwar lor li; move dimoun pa pou kapav imilie li.
89.23: Mo pou kraz so ennmi e detrir bann ki deteste li.
89.24: Mo fidelite ek mo lamour infini pou avek li, me plis ki sa, li pou toultan sorti vinker akoz mo nom.
89.25: Lotorite so lame pou lor bann lamer, lotorite so lame drwat pou lor tou larivier.
89.26: Li pou dir mwa, ‘Tomem mo Papa, mo Bondie, mo protekter ek mo Sover.’
89.27: Mo pou fer li vinn mo premie-garson, pli gran parmi bann pli gran lerwa.
89.28: Mo pou toultan fidel anver li; mo pou respekte mo lalians ar li.
89.29: So dinasti pou dire osi lontan ki ena lesiel; so desandan pou toultan asiz lor tronn.
89.30: Me si so desandan dezobeyir mo lalwa; si zot abandonn mo instriksion;
89.31: si zot bliye mo lansegnman e pa respe mo bann komandman,
89.32: lerla mo pou fer zot peye pou zot pese. Mo pou fer zot soufer pou ditor ki zot finn fer.
89.33: Pa krwar ki mo pou aret kontan David; ki mo pou kas promes mo fidelite.
89.34: Non! Mo pa pou renie mo lalians ar li; Mo pa pou rezet okenn promes ki mo finn fer ar li.
89.35: Promes ki mo finn fer li, lor mo nom sakre, zame mo pou fer fos ar David.
89.36: So tronn pou toultan ena eritie; mo pou vey so rwayom tanki soley briye;
89.37: tanki ena lalinn, touzour la, solid, enn temwin permanan dan lesiel.”
89.38: Me to ankoler ar lerwa ki to finn swazir; to finn abandonn li, to finn les li tonbe.
89.39: To finn kas lalians ar to serviter lwayal e to finn zet so kouronn dan labou.
89.40: Miray so lavil finn grene; sitadel ek fortres anrwinn.
89.41: Bann pasan pe depouy li; so bann vwazin pe sikann li.
89.42: So ennmi pe triyonfe; bann adverser dan lazwa.
89.43: Zarm nou lerwa konpletman initil; to pe les li perdi lager.
89.44: To finn ras sinbol so pouvwar e so tronn finn devir anbalao lor later.
89.45: To finn fer li vinn vie avan so ler e to finn kouver li ar laont.
89.46: SEGNER, to pou kontinie get lot kote? Pou touzour? To pou les to lakoler kontinie flanbe mem?
89.47: Rapel ki mo lavi bien kourt; To finn kree nou mortel pou nannye ditou.
89.48: Ki dimoun kapav viv san ki li trouv lamor? Ki dimoun kapav sap dan grif lamor?
89.49: Segner, kot to finn met lamour infini ki to ti ena? Kot to finn met bann promes to ti fer David?
89.50: Rapel, Segner, mwa to serviter fidel, mo gagn bann insilt; tou bann lezot nasion modi mwa.
89.51: To ennmi insilte lerwa ki twa to finn swazir, SEGNER. Partou kot li pase li gagn zot insilt.
89.52: Anou loue LESEGNER pou toultan! Amenn! Amenn!

90.1: Segner, se twa ki finn toultan donn nou sekirite.
90.2: Avan kreasion montagn, avan ki to ti fasonn later ek lemond, depi touzour e pour touzour twa ki Bondie.
90.3: To fer dimoun retourn lapousier, to dir, “Imin, retourn kot to sorti! “
90.4: Mil an pou twa li pa pli long ki enn zour ki finn fonn; oubien parey de-trwa ler-tan dan lanwit.
90.5: To balye tousala, parey enn rev ki pase, parey kouma lerb ki ne gramatin,
90.6: li fleri gramatin, grandi pandan lazourne e deperi ek mor aswar.
90.7: To lakoler griye nou; To laraz terifie nou.
90.8: To plas nou bann fot devan twa, dan lalimier to prezans okenn sekre pa sape.
90.9: To lakoler koup-koup longer nou lavi ki tengn kouma enn soupir.
90.10: Nou kapav viv swasanndis-an, katrovin si lasante bon, me se traka ek sagrin ki plin nou lekzistans; bann lane pas vit e nou anvole ale.
90.11: Kisannla finn fer fas lafors to lakoler? To lakoler osi gran ki nou respe pou twa.
90.12: Fer nou konpran kouma lavi kourt; sa kapav ranpli nou leker ar sazes.
90.13: Eski to pou kontinie ankoler ar nou? Pitie nou, SEGNER, montre konpasion.
90.14: Toulegramatin ranpli nou ar to lamour infini; koumsa nou pou kapav sante e konn lazwa toulezour.
90.15: Zordi, Segner, donn nou aster otan lazwa ki sagrin ki nou ti kone yer dan moman douler ek penitans.
90.16: Permet nou dekouver to bann gran aksion; permet nou desandan trouv to pwisans triyonfan.
90.17: O Segner nou Bondie, devers to benediksion lor nou, beni travay nou lame avek prosperite - wi, beni travay nou lame avek prosperite!

91.1: Ninport kisannla ki ena proteksion Bondie Pli Lao, ninport kisannla ki res dan lonbraz Bondie Toupwisan,
91.2: li kapav dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo labri ek mo fortres. Tomem mo Bondie ki mo fer konfians.”
91.3: Li pou protez twa kont latrap bann saser, kont ninport ki epidemi mortel.
91.4: Ar so lezel li pou kasiet twa; anba so lezel to pou ansekirite; so fidelite parey enn boukliye ek enn zarm protekter.
91.5: To nepli pou bizin per danze aswar ouswa bann latak antret dan lazourne
91.6: ouswa bann lepidemi ki atake dan nwar ouswa lemal ki tom lor nou anplinzour.
91.7: Enn milie kapav tom sek koste ar twa, dis mil lor to drwat me twa to pou sape.
91.8: To pou temwin ar to prop lizie kimanier pinision tom lor bann ki ranpli ar pese.
91.9: Wi, SEGNER, tomem mo refiz ek mo proteksion. Twa ki finn fer Bondie Pli Lao vinn to sitadel
91.10: maler pa pou vinn pre ar twa; destriksion pa pou koste ar to lakaz.
91.11: Bondie pou donn lord bann anz pou bar danze e protez twa partou kote.
91.12: Zot pou tini twa lao-lao pou anpes to lipie kogn ar ros.
91.13: San danze to pou mars lor lion ek serpan; kraz latet lion feros e serpan danzere.
91.14: Bondie dir, “Mo pou sov bann ki kontan mwa; Mo pou protez bann ki rekonet mo nom.
91.15: Kan zot dimann led, zot pou gagne; kan zot dan detres, mo pou soutenir zot. Mo pou sov zot, mo pou onor zot.
91.16: Mo pou fer zot viv lontan; e donn zot garanti ki momem zot sover. “

92.1: Li vremem bon dir LESEGNER mersi, pou sant louanz pou to nom, Bondie Pli Lao;
92.2: ler toulegramatin mo proklam to lamour infini; mo deklar to fidelite touleswar,
92.3: akonpanye par lamizik mandolinn ek sitar, ar melodi lagitar.
92.4: Twa SEGNER, to ranpli mo leker ar to bann gran explwa. Akoz tou seki to finn fer, mo sante avek lazwa dan leker.
92.5: SEGNER, to bann explwa zot extra gran; to lespri li extra profon.
92.6: Sa, enn dimoun bet pa kapav sezi, tilespri zame pou konpran sa:
92.7: bann ki viv dan pese zot pouse kouma move lerb; bann ki finn swazir move sime zot kapav prospere me enn zour zot pou fini net.
92.8: Me twa, SEGNER, to siprem pou touzour.
92.9: Nou kone ki to bann ennmi, SEGNER, to bann ennmi pou perir, e bann dimoun ki pratik lemal pou disperse.
92.10: To finn donn mwa lafors enn lelefan; To finn kouronn mwa ar delwil parfime.
92.11: Mo finn trouv defet mo bann ennmi; mo finn tann bann agreser plegne ar douler.
92.12: Dimoun ki obeyir pou prospere kouma palmie; zot pou grandi kouma pie lafours.
92.13: Zot pou kouma bann pie dan verze LESEGNER ki raport zoli fri dan lakour Tanp nou Bondie,
92.14: ki kontign port fri dan zot vieyes e ki toultan ver ek for.
92.15: Tousala montre ki LESEGNER limem lazistis siprem, “li mo ranpar e dan li pena linzistis. “

93.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa, li anvlope par mazeste divinn, LESEGNER ena mazeste ek pwisans kouma enn tinik rwayal. Li finn etabli lemond bien ferm, peyna li bouze.
93.2: To tronn pa konn komansman kouma twa to ti la avan komansman letan.
93.3: Bann vag leve dan losean, O SEGNER, zot leve, zot kriye for-for, zot leve, zot kime ar laraz feros.
93.4: Me LESEGNER so pouvwar pli for ki tapaz lamer, pli pwisan ki vag feros.
93.5: To lalwa li eternel, SEGNER! To Tanp li sakre pou leternite!

94.1: SEGNER, to enn Bondie ki pini; twa, Bondie ki pini, revel tomem!
94.2: Twa ki ziz lemond, lev twa, donn bann vantar seki zot merite.
94.3: O SEGNER, komie letan ankor bann azan lemal, komie letan ankor bann azan lemal pou fer zot fanor?
94.4: Zot devers enn ta parol ar arogans, bann kriminel koz zot krim ar fierte.
94.5: Zot dominn lepep, SEGNER, zot kraz to pep ki to patrimwann.
94.6: Zot touy vev ek bann etranze, zot asasinn bann orfelin.
94.7: Zot dir for-for, “Bondie kaylous; Bondie Izrael pa remarke seki pe pase.”
94.8: Kouma zot bet koumsa? Bann inbesil, kan zot pou konpran?
94.9: Dapre zot, Bondie finn kree zorey me li pa tande? Li‘nn kree lizie me li pa trouv kler?
94.10: Li kriye ar bann nasion me li pa pou pini zot? Limem pli gran profeser me li pa konn nannye?
94.11: LESEGNER kone ki plan ena dan zot latet; li bien okouran ki zot pa vo nannye.
94.12: SEGNER, zot bienere bann ki resevwar to disiplinn; zot bien saz bann ki aprann to lalwa.
94.13: Zot viv dan lape mem kan difikilte partou ziska ki to prepar enn piez pou may bann ki viv par lemal.
94.14: LESEGNER zame pou abandonn so pep; zame li pa pou fer tret ar so dimoun.
94.15: Lazistis pou regne dan lakour e dimoun drwat pou soutenir drwatir.
94.16: Kisannla ti defann mwa kont bann azan lemal? Kisannla ti dibout ar mwa kont bann ki fer lemal?
94.17: Si LESEGNER pa ti soutenir mwa zordi mo ti pou dan lemond gran silans.
94.18: Ler mo ti dir, “Ayo, mo pe tonbe” To lamour infini, SEGNER, ti anpes mwa koule.
94.19: Sak fwa mo ena traka ek problem To konsol mwa pou mo regagn lazwa.
94.20: To pa toler bann ziz koronpi ki fer inzistis vinn legal,
94.21: ki konplote kont dimoun ki viv drwat e avoy inosan dan koulwar lamor.
94.22: Me LESEGNER defann mwa kouma enn fortres; mo Bondie abrit mwa kouma enn rok protekter.
94.23: Li pou pini bann ki viv dan lemal; Li pou detrir zot parski zot viv dan pese. LESEGNER nou Bondie pou detrir lemal.

95.1: Vini tou dimoun, anou sant louanz LESEGNER; Anou kriye for nou lazwa dan Bondie ki nou Sover.
95.2: Anou al divan li ar remersiman ek rekonesans; anou kriye nou lazwa ar kantik louanz!
95.3: LESEGNER li Bondie ki pwisan; limem pli gran Lerwa ki lao tou ti-bondie.
95.4: Li tini profonder later dan so lame, ek some bann montagn, sa ousi pou li.
95.5: Li regne lor lamer ki so prop kreasion; Li regne lor later osi, so lot kreasion.
95.6: Vini! Anou ador li, anou prostern devan li, anou azenou divan LESEGNER, nou Kreater!
95.7: Limem nou Bondie; nou, nou so pep ki li okipe; so troupo ki li pran kont. Ekoute zordi ki li pe dir zot.
95.8: “Pa andirsi zot leker kouma zot anset dan Meriba; pa fer seki bannla ti fer dan dezer Masa.
95.9: Zot ti desid pou teste mo pouvwar malgre ki zot ti kone tou seki mo ti fer pou zot.
95.10: Pandan karant an mo ti degoute ar zot. Mo ti dir, ‘Get kouma zot ena lespri egare; Zot refiz obeyir mo instriksion.’
95.11: Mo ti bien ankoler e mo ti fer serman, ‘Zame zot pou rant dan landrwa kot mo ti pou donn zot mo repo.’ “

96.1: Anou sant enn nouvo sante pou LESEGNER! Tou kreatir dan liniver, sant laglwar LESEGNER!
96.2: Nou sant pou LESEGNER; anou sant so louanz. Toulezour nou anonse ki limem nou Sover.
96.3: Anou anons so laglwar ar tou bann nasion; anons so bann explwa ar tou bann pep.
96.4: LESEGNER li bien gran, li merit ki nou louanz aklam li. Li pli for e pli redoutab ki toulezot ti-bondie.
96.5: Bann bondie ki lezot pep venere zot zis bann idol me LESEGNER limem kreater liniver.
96.6: Li antoure ar laglwar ek mazeste; pouvwar ek bote ranpli so Tanp.
96.7: Donn LESEGNER, zot tou bann pep lor later; donn LESEGNER so laglwar ek so pouvwar.
96.8: Donn LESEGNER laglwar ki so nom merite; amenn zot ofrand e rant dan so Tanp.
96.9: Ador LESEGNER ki sin, ler li paret dan so mazeste; liniver ki li finn kree, tranble devan li.
96.10: Dir tou bann tribi, “LESEGNER limem lerwa. Lemond finn etabli bien ferm, peyna li bouze. Li pou ziz tou dimoun ar drwatir.”
96.11: Lesiel montre to lazwa! Later exprim to boner! Ki lamer gronde, avek tou saki viv ladan;
96.12: bann karo ek tou seki pouse ladan, les zot boner exploze. Bann pie dan lafore pou sante ar lazwa
96.13: zot pou sant devan LESEGNER akoz li pe vini, li vini pou regn lor later. Li pou regn lor lemond avek lazistis lor bann pep selon laverite.

97.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa! Later dans ar lazwa! Tou bann lil atraver losean, montre zot kontantman!
97.2: Niaz ek marenwar epe anvlop li; so regn gouverne par drwatir ek lazistis.
97.3: Enn laflam mars divan li, e bril bann ennmi otour li.
97.4: Zekler ekler lemond e kan later trouv sa, li tranble.
97.5: Montagn fonn kouma lasir dan prezans LESEGNER, devan Lesegner, monark liniver.
97.6: Lesiel anons so drwatir e tou bann pep trouv so laglwar.
97.7: Bann ki ador idol gagn onte; bann ki fer vantar ar zot idol initil; tou bann divinite, prostern zot devan li.
97.8: Lepep Sion tann sa e li dan lazwa e bann lavil dan Zide pe selebre akoz to zizman, O Bondie.
97.9: SEGNER, tomem ki Pli Lao lor later antie; tomem pli eleve ki tou bann ti-bondie.
97.10: LESEGNER kontan bann ki deteste lemal; li protez lavi so bann fidel; li aras zot dan lame bann ki pratik lemal.
97.11: Lalimier ekler lavi dimoun drwat; lazwa aroz bann leker drwat.
97.12: Zot tou ki viv drwat, montre zot lazwa dan LESEGNER. Glorifie so nom ki sin.

98.1: Anou sant enn nouvo sante pou LESEGNER ki finn fer bann explwa merveye! Zis ar so pouvwar ek so lafors sakre li finn sorti viktorye.
98.2: LESEGNER ti anons so laviktwar e li ti revel so lazistis devan tou bann nasion.
98.3: Li ti rapel so lamour infini e so fidelite anver lepep Izrael. Lemond antie temwin laviktwar nou Bondie.
98.4: Later, larg lavwa pou dir zot lazwa dan LESEGNER; kriye zot lazwa ar bann sante ek lamizik.
98.5: Sant grander LESEGNER ar lagitar; zwe sitar ek bann zoli melodi.
98.6: Servi tronpet e servi son kor pou selebre lazwa devan Lerwa, LESEGNER.
98.7: Ki lamer gronde, avek tou saki viv ladan; lemond avek tou so abitan.
98.8: Tap zot lame, bann larivier imans; bann montagn, sant zot lazwa ansam
98.9: dan prezans LESEGNER ki pe vini pou gouvern lemond. Li pou gouvern lemond dan lazistis, e bann pep avek drwatir.

99.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa; lepep partou tranble. Li asiz lor so tronn pli lao ki bann seribin; e liniver antie emerveye.
99.2: LESEGNER li gran dan Sion; li lao tou bann pep.
99.3: Tou dimoun selebre to nom ki gran e formidab. Lesegner li sin!
99.4: O Lerwa Toupwisan, to kontan seki drwat; to finn etabli lord, drwa e zistis dan Izrael.
99.5: Anou exalte LESEGNER nou Bondie; anou azenou devan so marspie pou ador li. Vremem li sin!
99.6: Moiz ek Aaron ti parmi so bann pret, e Samiel ti parmi bann ki ti priye li. Zot ti dimann sekour LESEGNER e li ti reponn.
99.7: Depi niaz ki ti drese kouma enn kolonn, li ti koz ar zot; zot ti ekout so konsey ek instriksion.
99.8: O SEGNER nou Bondie, to ti ekout lapriyer to pep. To ti enn Bondie ki pardone, mem si to donn pinision ler zot fer fot.
99.9: Anou exalte LESEGNER nou Bondie; e ador li lor so montagn sakre. LESEGNER nou Bondie, li sin.

100.1: Liniver antie, sant for zot lazwa pou LESEGNER!
100.2: Ador LESEGNER dan lazwa; vinn dan so prezans avek zoli kantik.
100.3: Rekonet ki LESEGNER, limem Bondie. Li finn kree nou e nou pou li; nou so pep, so troupo dan so patiraz.
100.4: Rant dan lale tanp ar rekonesans ek remersiman; rant andan lakour so Tanp ar kontantman. Dir li mersi e loue so nom.
100.5: LESEGNER li vremem bon; so lamour infini li eternel; so fidelite kontinie pou touzour.

101.1: Mo pou sant lwayote ek lazistis, e mo pou sant li pou twa O SEGNER.
101.2: Mo pou viv enn lavi san fot. Kan to pou vinn ver mwa? Mo pou viv enn lavi prop san repros dan lakaz kot mo gouverne.
101.3: Mo pa pou toler ki lemal vinn dan mo prezans. Mo deteste aksion bann ki renie Bondie; mo pa pou frekant zot, ni aksepte zot aksion.
101.4: Mo pa pou fer nannye malonet e mo pou refiz tou tranzaksion ar lemal.
101.5: Mo pou detrir ninport kisannla ki an sekre fer plan mesanste kont so prosin; mo pa pou toler bann vantar ek arogan.
101.6: Mo pou soutenir bann ki res fidel ar Bondie e pou ena plas pou zot dan mo sato. Zis bann ki onet dan zot manier viv pou gagn drwa servi mwa.
101.7: Bann ki pratik tronpri pa pou ena plas dan mo lakaz; ipokrit ki servi mansonz pa pou ena plas dan mo prezans.
101.8: Zour apre zour boner gramatin mo pou detrir move dimoun dan pei; move dimoun pa pou ena plas dan lavil LESEGNER.

102.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer; ekout mwa kriye mo detres.
102.2: Kan mo bizin led, pa tourn to ledo kan mo dan detres; ekout mo lapriyer, pa tarde pou reponn mwa.
102.3: Kouma lafime mo lavi pe disparet e mo lekor pe konsome dan dife.
102.4: Mo kouma lerb sek ki kraze dan later e manze mo nepli anvi manze.
102.5: Mo plegne for-for; mo finn vinn lapo-lezo.
102.6: Mo kouma enn zwazo sovaz dan dezer; enn ibou dan rwinn abandone.
102.7: Dormi mo pa dormi; mo kouma enn zwazo soliter tousel lor enn twa lakaz.
102.8: Toulezour mo ennmi provok mwa; pe servi mo nom pou zet malediksion.
102.9: Akoz to mekontan ek ankoler ar mwa lasann finn ranplas mo dipin,
102.10: e larm plin mo goble. To finn balye mwa dan kwin.
102.11: Mo lavi pase kouma lonbraz aswar, mo kouma lerb sek.
102.12: Me twa SEGNER, tomem monark siprem eternel; sa, enn lasenn zenerasion zame pou bliye.
102.13: To pou drese e montre pitie pou Sion; ler finn vini pou montre li to faver; wi, vremem so ler finn vini aster.
102.14: Bann ki kontan twa zot osi kontan li mem si li finn konn destriksion; zot ena boukou sagrin pou li mem si zordi Sion li anrwinn.
102.15: Bann nasion zot respe LESEGNER; bann lerwa lor later ena reverans pou li.
102.16: LESEGNER pou rekonstrir Sion e li pou montre so laglwar.
102.17: Li pou tann soufrans so pep abandone e li pou ekzos zot lapriyer.
102.18: Dan lintere zenerasion fitir, anou ekrir sa, koumsa bann ki pa ankor ne kapav enn zour sant so louanz:
102.19: depi lao dan so sanktyer LESEGNER ti get anba; depi lesiel lao li ti get later,
102.20: pou li tann bann prizonie pe kriye zot soufrans, pou li liber bann ki ti dan koulwar lamor.
102.21: Akoz sa nou pou onor so nom dan Sion; nou pou loue li dan Zerizalem
102.22: kan dimoun partou kote zwenn e bann rwayom osi, pou ador LESEGNER.
102.23: LESEGNER finn afebli mwa, mem mo ankor zenn; li finn tay longer mo lavi.
102.24: Lerla mo dir, “Bondie, pa pran mo lavi asterla, mo ankor zenn; Twa, ki viv depi touzour e pou touzour! “
102.25: Lontan-lontan to ti kree fondasion later e ar to prop lame to ti fer lesiel.
102.26: Kan to kreasion disparet twa to pou touzour la; kouma vie sifon zot pou defile ek desire. To sanz zot kouma linz, zot zistwar pou fini lamem.
102.27: Me twa to pa sanze, to lavi pa konn finision.
102.28: Nou to serviter, e nou zanfan pou viv ansekirite, zanfan nou zanfan pou viv anpe dan to proteksion.

103.1: Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER! Ar tou mo leker mo remersie so sin nom!
103.2: Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER! Pa bliye okenn gran bonte ki li finn montre!
103.3: Li pardonn tou to pese; geri to maladi.
103.4: Li ras to lavi dan tom, anpes lamor koste, e li kouronn twa ar lamour ek tandres.
103.5: Li ranpli to lavi ar tou seki bon pou to res for ek zenn kouma enn leg.
103.6: LESEGNER zize dan lintere bann ki soufer dominasion e li donn zot zot drwa.
103.7: Li ti revel so bann plan ar Moiz e lepep Izrael ti trouv so gran explwa.
103.8: Leker LESEGNER li ranpli ar konpasion ek pitie; difisil pou li fer koler parski so lamour infini deborde partou.
103.9: Li pa fer akizasion lor akizasion, e so lakoler osi tengn bien vit.
103.10: Li pa tret nou dapre nou pese, li pa pini nou dapre nou bann fot.
103.11: So lamour infini pou dimoun ki onor li li osi ot ek gran ki lesiel ete konpare ar later.
103.12: Li separ nou ar nou pese parey distans ki ant soley leve ek soley kouse.
103.13: Parey kouma enn papa ena konpasion anver so zanfan LESEGNER ena konpasion anver bann ki onor li.
103.14: Li bien kone kouma ti form nou; li kone ki nou sorti dan lapousier.
103.15: Bann imin zot lavi kouma lerb. Zot grandi ek fleri kouma fler sovaz;
103.16: ler labriz soufle, tou petal grene, personn pa rapel kot so plas ti ete.
103.17: Depi touzour ziska touzour LESEGNER ena enn lamour infini pou bann ki onor li; e so fidelite pou dire pou zanfan zot zanfan;
103.18: so bonte beni dimoun ki respe so lalians e ki obeyir so bann komandman.
103.19: LESEGNER finn plas so tronn dan lesiel; li enn monark siprem ki regne lor tou.
103.20: Zot tou bann anz ki for ek kouraze, ki akonplir so instriksion e ki obeyir parol ki li dir, remersie LESEGNER.
103.21: Tou so bann larme dan lesiel, bann serviter ki ekzekit so volonte, remersie LESEGNER.
103.22: Tou bann kreatir partou dan liniver ki li dirize remersie LESEGNER. Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER.

104.1: Ar tou seki mo ete mo dir mersi LESEGNER! SEGNER mo Bondie tomem pli gran. To abiye ar mazeste ek laglwar,
104.2: lalimier anvlop twa kouma enn manto. To finn kree lesiel kouma enn latant zean
104.3: e to finn ranz to lakaz lor losean seles. To fer bann niaz vinn to kales, e to vwayaz lor lezel divan.
104.4: Divan delivre to mesaz, dife ek zekler ekzekit to lord.
104.5: To finn kree later lor soubasman solid ki nannye pa pou bouze.
104.6: Lor later to finn met enn tapi dilo ki mont ziska some montagn.
104.7: Kan to ti reprimann dilo, li ti retir li; li ti sove ler li ti tann to instriksion kouma loraz.
104.8: Lor vites li mont lor montagn e redesann, al dan vale, dan landrwa ki to ti fer pou li.
104.9: To ti tras frontier ki li pa ti gagn drwa depase; sa ti pou anpes li deborde pou kouver later.
104.10: To finn fer lasours koule dan vale; to finn fer larivier koule ant montagn ek kolinn.
104.11: Koumsa ena ase dilo pou tou zanimo, bann bourik sovaz ti vinn kalme zot laswaf.
104.12: Akote danbor dilo, lor bann pie bann zwazo fer zot nik e kapav tann zot sante.
104.13: Depi lesiel lapli tonbe, aroz kolinn ek montagn e later li rasazie ar bienfe to louvraz.
104.14: To fer lerb pouse dan patiraz; to fer plant pouse pou dimoun servi; pou li prodwir manze pou li viv,
104.15: divin pou fer leker kontan, delwil zoliv pou so lasante e dipin pou li gagn lafors.
104.16: Bann pie dan lafore gagn bien dilo, sirtou bann pie zean ki LESEGNER limem ti plante.
104.17: Laba bann zwazo fer zot nik; bann sigongn fer zot lakaz lor pie sipre.
104.18: Kabri sovaz gagn lavi lor montagn, bann liev kasiet parmi bann ros.
104.19: To finn kree lalinn pou nou kapav kont bann mwa; soley kone ki ler bizin kouse.
104.20: To finn kree lanwit e lobskirite, pou ki zanimo kapav lasas dan nwar;
104.21: bann zenn lion kriye for zot lafin ler zot rod manze ki Bondie finn prepare pou zot.
104.22: Kan soley leve zot retourn dan zot lakav pou repoze.
104.23: Lerla dimoun al okip zot okipasion ziska ki soley kouse.
104.24: SEGNER, to finn fer otan kiksoz extra! Sak kiksoz finn kree par to sazes. Later ranpli ar enn trale kreatir ki to finn kree.
104.25: Get lamer laba, li gran, li profon e li plin ar kreatir, so gran kouma so piti.
104.26: Lao dilo, bann bato navige, anba, Leviatan, mons marin ki to finn kree pou zwe ar li.
104.27: Zot tou depann lor twa pou gagn zot nouritir kan zot bizin.
104.28: To donn zot manze ki nouri zot; kan to ouver to lame, nouritir la plin zot vant.
104.29: Kan to tourn ledo ar zot, zot gagn per; kan to koup zot souf, zot mor e zot retourn dan lapousier kot zot ti sorti.
104.30: Kan to soufle to souf to kree zot e later gagn nouvo lavi.
104.31: SEGNER, to laglwar li eternel! SEGNER, trouv to lazwa dan to louvraz.
104.32: Li zet enn regar lor later e later tranble; li tous montagn e volkan eklate.
104.33: Mo pou sant louanz LESEGNER touletan; tanki mo ena lavi mo pou sant so grander.
104.34: Mo espere ki mo meditasion fer li plezir, parski mo dan lazwa akoz li.
104.35: Ki bann ki dan lemal zot disparet depi later; bann ki nouri pese fini net dan lemond. Ar tou seki mo ete mo dir mersi LESEGNER! Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

105.1: Nou dir mersi LESEGNER, nou proklam so nom! Nou bizin fer tou bann nasion kone tou seki li finn fer.
105.2: Sant pou li, zwe lamizik pou li, rakont tou so bann explwa.
105.3: Rann glwar so sin nom! Bann ki rod LESEGNER pou dan lazwa.
105.4: Tourn ver LESEGNER e rod so pwisans; zame pa aret rod so prezans.
105.5: Rapel bann mervey ki li finn fer, so bann mirak e bann zizman li finn prononse,
105.6: zot tou bann desandan Abraam, zot tou bann desandan Zakob, ki li finn swazire.
105.7: LESEGNER, limem nou Bondie; li gouvern lemond antie.
105.8: Zame li pa finn bliye so lalians ki pou dire eternelman; so promes tini zenerasion apre zenerasion.
105.9: Li pou onor aranzman ki li ti fer ar Abraam; promes li ti fer ar Izaak.
105.10: Li ti konfirm sa ar Zakob kouma enn dekre, ar Izrael kouma enn lalians ki pou tini ziska lafin.
105.11: “Mo pou donn twa pei Kanaan,” li ti dir. “Sa li pou zot; zot par sa.”
105.12: Sa lepok la serviter Bondie ti bien tigit e zot ti bann imigran dan pei Kanaan.
105.13: Zot ale-vini, sorti dan enn rezion al dan lot; sorti dan enn rwayom al dan lot.
105.14: Me Bondie pa ti les personn fer dominer ar zot; li ti donn avertisman bann lerwa:
105.15: “Pa fer ditor mo bann serviter ki mo finn swazire; pa tous mo bann profet.”
105.16: LESEGNER ti avoy lafaminn dan zot pei e ti detrir zot nouritir.
105.17: Li ti avoy kikenn divan-divan; Zozef ti so nom, ti vann li kouma esklav.
105.18: Li ti ena lasenn dan lipie, serk lasie otour so likou
105.19: ziska ki so prediksion vinn vre, ziska ki parol LESEGNER prouve li ena rezon.
105.20: Lerwa Lezip ti fer larg li; lerwa ki ti pe diriz plizier tribi ti rann li so liberte.
105.21: Li ti fer Zozef vinn sef gouvernman ki ti gouvern pei la net;
105.22: li ti gagn drwa donn lord bann ofisie lerwa; li ti ena pouvwar dir bann konseye ki bizin fer.
105.23: Lerla Izrael ti al Lezip Zakob ti viv dan pei Lezip kouma imigran.
105.24: LESEGNER ti donn so bann serviter boukou zanfan; ti fer zot vinn pli for ki zot ennmi.
105.25: Me li ti fer bann Ezipsien ayir so prop pep e zot fer konplo kont so bann serviter.
105.26: Lerla li ti avoy so serviter Moiz ek Aaron ki limem ti swazir.
105.27: Zot ti fer bann sign extraordiner, bann veritab mirak dan Lezip.
105.28: Li avoy marenwar lor pei Lezip me bann Ezipsien refiz ekout so parol.
105.29: Li fer larivier dilo vinn disan e touy tou pwason.
105.30: Ti ena enn invazion krapo; zot ti rant partou, mem dan sato.
105.31: Bondie koze, enn larme mous ki pike, e moustik anvayir pei la.
105.32: Li avoy lagrel olie avoy lapli ek zekler ti eklate partou;
105.33: li detrir plantasion, potaze ek verze; li met bann pie partou plat.
105.34: Kouma li koze, ala enn gran niaz sotrel, sotrel par milion, desann lor pei;
105.35: zot balye tou bann plant prop, pa les nannye deryer zot dan pei.
105.36: Li touy tou bann premie garson dan sak fami Ezipsien, premie prodwi zot lafors.
105.37: Lerla li gid bann Izraelit lor sime liberte, ranpli ar lor ek larzan, parski zot ti for e an bonnsante personn pa ti res deryer.
105.38: Bann Ezipsien ti per zot e bannla ti kontan ler bann Izraelit ti ale.
105.39: Bondie ti plas enn niaz lor so pep pou protez zot; enn dife pou donn zot lalimier aswar.
105.40: Ler zot rod manze li ti avoy zot bann kay, manze pou plin zot vant ti sorti direk dan lesiel.
105.41: Li ti ouver enn ros e dilo kler ti koumans koule e bien vit enn larivier ti pe travers dezer.
105.42: Li ti rapel so promes sakre ki li ti fer ar Abraam, so serviter.
105.43: Alor li ti fer zot sorti Lezip dan lazwa, pep ki li ti swazir ti sante for-for dan lalegres.
105.44: Li ti partaz ar zot later lezot tribi; zot ti pran posesion larises bann lezot pep.
105.45: Koumsa li ti sir ki so pep ti pou gard so komandman, e pou rapel so bann lalwa. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

106.1: Loue LESEGNER! Nou dir mersi LESEGNER parski li bon e so lamour infini li eternel.
106.2: Kisannla kapav rakont tou bann explwa LESEGNER? Kisannla kapav exprim tou so louanz partou?
106.3: Bienere dimoun ki obzerv lazistis, ki pratik drwatir touletan.
106.4: Pa bliye mwa SEGNER, ler to montre faver to pep; pa bliye mwa ler to pe sov to pep.
106.5: Mo ti‘a kontan trouv prosperite to pep e partaz lazwa ek boner lepep Bondie, e partaz fierte lepep ki apartenir a twa.
106.6: Parey kouma nou bann anset nou‘si nou finn fer pese; nou finn partisip dan lemal ek dan pese.
106.7: Nou bann anset dan Lezip pa ti konpran bien to bann explwa extraordiner; zot ti souvan bliye to gran lamour infini e kot Lamer Rouz zot ti revolte kont twa.
106.8: Me li ti sov zot pou loner so nom, pou fer zot rapel so gran pouvwar.
106.9: Li ti donn lord Lamer Rouz e toutswit dilo ti sek; li ti gid so pep ki travers lamer lor later ferm;
106.10: Li ti protez so pep kont bann ki ti ayir zot; li ti sap zot lavi ler ennmi ti atake.
106.11: Ler lamer retourne ennmi ti mor nwaye; pena enn ki ti sape.
106.12: Lerla lepep rapel promes Bondie e zot sant so louanz.
106.13: Me zot memwar kourt; zot bliye vit tou seki li ti fer; zot azir san atann so konsey.
106.14: Dan dezer zot ti anmank e zot ti teste Bondie, zot ti provok li dan sa later arid la;
106.15: e li ti donn zot seki zot ti pe rode me anplis li ti donn zot enn maladi ki fer deperi.
106.16: Dan dezer kot ti kanpe, zot koumans zalou Moiz ek Aaron, serviter lwayal LESEGNER.
106.17: Lerla later ouver e aval Datan e li anter Abiram ek so bann konplis;
106.18: dife desann depi lesiel e bril bann dimoun ki pratik lemal.
106.19: Lor montagn Oreb zot fer enn vodor e koumans ador enn idol;
106.20: zot ranplas laglwar ki Bondie ti donn zot, par zimaz enn ti toro, enn manzer lerb.
106.21: Zot nepli rapel Bondie, zot Sover, ki ti fer bann gran mirak dan Lezip,
106.22: bann aksion etonan lor later Ezipsien, bann mervey terib pre ar Lamer Rouz.
106.23: Kan Bondie menas pou detrir so pep so prop serviter ki li ti swazire, Moiz, ti plas li devan Bondie pou detourn so lakoler e pa detrir zot.
106.24: Lerla zot rezet enn pei merveye parski zot nepli fer konfians promes Bondie.
106.25: Zot ti mirmire anba latant, e zot ti refiz ekout LESEGNER.
106.26: LESEGNER lev so lame pou fer enn serman ki li pou les zot mor dan dezer;
106.27: li pou fann zot desandan parmi bann infidel e les zot mor dan bann pei etranze.
106.28: Dan Peor, lepep Bondie angaz zot dan adorasion Baal; zot manz ofrand ki ti ofer bondie mor.
106.29: Sa manier la ti anflam lakoler LESEGNER e li avoy enn maladi mortel lor zot.
106.30: Me Fineas ti leve pou intervenir, e fleo la ti arete.
106.31: Sa aksion la ti rekonet dan so faver kouma drwatir, ti res dan memwar bann zenerasion pou touzour.
106.32: Kot lasours Meriba dimoun ti fer LESEGNER ankoler e akoz zot Moiz ti gagn bien traka,
106.33: parski zot ti fer li exaspere e li ti pe koze san panse.
106.34: Zot pa ti eliminn bann infidel kouma LESEGNER ti dimann zot
106.35: me zot ti marye ar bann nasion ki pa konn Bondie e ti adopte zot koutim ek zot pratik.
106.36: Lepep Bondie ti ador idol bannla e samem ki ti amenn zot ver destriksion.
106.37: Zot ofer bann idol Kanaan zot prop tifi ek garson kouma sakrifis;
106.38: zot ti touy zanfan inosan e disan inosan ti polie later.
106.39: Zot konportman ti fer zot vinn inpir, zot pratik ti infidel parey kouma prostitision.
106.40: LESEGNER ti bien ankoler ar so pep e li ti degoute ar zot, so prop pep.
106.41: Li ti les zot dan lame infidel e zot ti pe dirize par zot ennmi.
106.42: Zot ennmi ti kontrol zot; zot ti kouma esklav.
106.43: Boukou fwa LESEGNER ti sov so pep me sak fwa zot ti revolte kont li e zot koul dan fon pese.
106.44: Malgre sa li tann zot ler zot kriy osekour e li pran kont zot detres.
106.45: Akoz li kontan zot li rapel so lalians; akoz so lamour infini li ti montre konpasion.
106.46: Li ti adousi leker bann ki ti pe tini zot ankaptivite, e bannla ti ena pitie pou zot.
106.47: Sov nou O SEGNER, nou Bondie, tir nou parmi bann nasion e rasanble nou, pou ki nou kapav remersie twa e loue to gran nom sakre.
106.48: Nou loue LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael; Nou loue li aster ek toultan! Nou tou, anou dir “Amenn!” Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

107.1: “Nou dir mersi LESEGNER parski li bon e so lamour infini li eternel! “
107.2: Zot tou ki LESEGNER finn libere, repet sa, zot ki finn libere dan lame adverser,
107.3: e li finn gid zot lor sime retour depi exil ki zot ti dan les, dan lwes, dan lenor ouswa dan lesid.
107.4: Ena ti perdi sime dan dezer e pa ti kone kot pou pase pou rant dan sivilizasion.
107.5: Zot ti konn lafin ek laswaf e zot ti pe perdi lespwar.
107.6: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.7: Li ti tras enn sime drwat ki ti amenn zot direk anvil.
107.8: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak anfaver limanite.
107.9: Kan gagn swaf li donn dilo; kan gagn fin li donn bon manze.
107.10: Ena ki ti plonze dan marenwar; zot ti ansene dan lamizer
107.11: parski zot ti revolte kont parol Bondie e zot ti rezet lansegnman Bondie Pli Lao.
107.12: Travo forse ti minn zot; zot pa ti kapav tini dibout e ler zot ti tonbe pa ti ena personn pou ed zot.
107.13: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.14: Li ti tir zot dan marenwar, kas zot lasenn.
107.15: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak anfaver limanite.
107.16: Li defons laport metal bronz, e fer baro feray anvole.
107.17: Ena inbesil ki ti pe soufer parski zot pese ti pe pez lour e osi parski zot ti pe patoz dan lemal;
107.18: zot pa ti pe kapav get manze zot ti ena enn lipie dan tom.
107.19: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.20: Par so parol li ti geri zot, li ti anpes zot rant dan trou lamor.
107.21: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak anfaver limanite.
107.22: Zot bizin ofer sakrifis remersiman; ar sante lazwa dir lemond antie grander Bondie.
107.23: Ena ki ti travay marin ki ti gagn zot lavi ar travay abor.
107.24: Zot ti konsian pouvwar LESEGNER e zot ti temwin so bann explwa lor dilo.
107.25: Kouma li donn lord bann rafal koumans soufle e bann vag lor dilo koumans leve.
107.26: Bann bato mont lao lor latet vag e apre desann net anba dan kree profon bann vag. Dan sa kalite siklonn la bann marin ti perdi kouraz;
107.27: zot ti balote kouma soular. Tou zot konesans ek lexperyans ti anglouti.
107.28: Dan zot detres zot ti kriye LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti tir zot dan zot langwas.
107.29: Li ti kalme laraz siklonn e bann vag ti koumans kalme.
107.30: Zot ti ere ki movetan ti pase e LESEGNER ti ramenn zot dan por.
107.31: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak anfaver limanite.
107.32: Zot bizin deklar so grander dan lasanble lepep e sant so louanz divan konsey dirizan.
107.33: LESEGNER fer bann larivier sek e bann lasours nepli larg enn sel gout dilo.
107.34: Li fer later fertil vinn laplenn disel akoz mesanste bann move dimoun ki abit laba.
107.35: LESEGNER plant bann oazis dan dezer; e later desese ranpli ar lasours dilo.
107.36: Li amenn dimoun afame vinn viv la e konstrir sivilizasion pou viv ere.
107.37: Zot sem lagrin, zot plant pie rezin e zot gagn lakoup rekor.
107.38: Li ti beni so pep e ti fer zot gagn boukou zanfan; anplis li ti anpes zot troupo zanimo diminie.
107.39: Kan lepep Bondie ti konn defet e ti sibir imiliasion, dominasion ek soufrans,
107.40: li ti montre bann dimoun nob so mepri. Li ti fer zot perdi sime dan dezer.
107.41: Me li ti sov bann ki bizin led e fer zot fami peple lor vites.
107.42: Kan bann dimoun drwat ti trouv sa, zot ti santi enn gran lazwa me bann dan lemal ti oblize ferm labous.
107.43: Tou bann dimoun saz, zame bliye sa! Zame bliye lamour infini nou SEGNER!

108.1: Mo leker ferm ar konfians, O Bondie! Mo pou sante, mo pou fer melodi ar tou mo leker!
108.2: Leve, twa mo lagitar ek mo sitar! Mo pou fer soley leve.
108.3: Mo pou dir twa mersi, O SEGNER, divan tou bann pep. Mo pou sant to louanz parmi bann nasion.
108.4: To lamour infini depas oter lesiel; to fidelite travers tou bann domenn seles.
108.5: O Bondie, montre to grander dan lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.
108.6: Sov nou ar to lafors; ekout mo lapriyer pou ki lepep ki to kontan gagn so liberasion.
108.7: Depi dan so sanktyer Bondie finn dir, “Pou montre mo pouvwar, mo pou diviz Sikem e mo pou donn mo pep Vale Soukot.
108.8: Mo pou gard pou mwa Galaad ek Manase; Efraim vinn mo kask e Zide vinn mo sinbol rwayote.
108.9: Mo pou servi Moab kouma mo kivet e mo pou lans mo savat lor Edom pou montre ki mwa ki so propriyeter. Mo pou kriye for-for mo laviktwar lor bann Filistin. “
108.10: Kisannla pou amenn mwa dan lavil fortifie? Kisannla pou amenn mwa Edom?
108.11: Eski vremem to finn rezet nou, O Bondie? Vremem to pa pou mars ar nou larme?
108.12: Ed nou, O Bondie, kont nou ennmi; koudme dimoun peyna gran valer.
108.13: Avek Bondie nou pou ranport laviktwar. Li pou kraz nou lennmi.

109.1: Bondie, twa ki mo loue, pa gard silans.
109.2: Move dimoun, ipokrit ek manter, pe atak mwa ar zot lalang mansonz.
109.3: Zot invant zistwar lor mwa e fer mwa ditor san okenn rezon.
109.4: Zot akiz mwa malgre mo kontan zot e mo finn priye pou zot.
109.5: Pou dibien ki mo fer, zot rann mwa par lemal; pou lamour ki mo done, zot rann mwa laenn.
109.6: Swazir enn akizater kont li, swazir enn move dimoun pou debout lor so kote drwat.
109.7: Fer ziz la deklar li koupab lafin so prose; fer ki mem so lapriyer enn ofans kont Bondie.
109.8: Fer lamor zwenn li vit; fer enn lot dimoun gagn so travay!
109.9: Fer so fam vinn vev ek so zanfan orfelin!
109.10: Fer so zanfan vinn mandian e viv dan lari; ki zot al mandie lwin ar zot lakaz anrwinn!
109.11: Fer bann kaser sezi so dibien; fer bann etranze profit so travay!
109.12: Pa les personn montre li zantiyes; pa les personn okip so zanfan kan li mor!
109.13: Pran lavi tou so desandan! Koumsa so nom pou disparet pou toultan.
109.14: Rapel LESEGNER pese so bann anset; zame bliye pese so mama!
109.15: SEGNER, rapel bien tou zot pese me bliye vit zot lekzistans!
109.16: Sa move dimoun la zame li ti fer dibien pou lezot; li ti zis konn fer mizer bann pov e seki peyna nannye, kraz enn malere ziska fini li net.
109.17: Li ti kontan modi lezot. Aster fer li sarye malediksion. Zame li ti demann Bondie beni lezot. Aster les li viv san benediksion!
109.18: Li ti modi lezot koumadir malediksion enn zafer normal; aster fer so prop malediksion tranp so lapo e kouma delwil, rant partou ziska so dan so lezo!
109.19: Fer so prop malediksion kouver so lekor kouma linz e ser so lerin toulezour kouma sang.
109.20: SEGNER, koumsa ki to bizin pini mo ennmi; koumsa to bizin pini bann ki fer mwa ditor.
109.21: SEGNER, mo Segner, ed mwa pou loner to nom; parski to lamour infini telman bon, sov mwa.
109.22: Mo pov; mo enn malere; mo blese dan profonder mo leker.
109.23: Mo lavi pase, kouma lonbraz letan aswar aprose; kouma sotrel ki divan siklonn soufle kot li anvi.
109.24: Telman mo pa finn manze, mo zenou pe tranble; mo finn vinn lapo-lezo.
109.25: Kan dimoun trouv mwa zot sikane; zot sekwe latet pou montre zot mepriz mwa.
109.26: Ed mwa, SEGNER, mo Bondie! Parski to lamour li infini, sov mwa!
109.27: Fer mo ennmi kone ki twa ki finn azir ki twa, SEGNER, to mars ar mwa.
109.28: Mem si bannla modi mwa, twa to beni mwa. Fer bann ki martiriz mwa konn defet e fer mwa, to serviter, gagn enn gran boner.
109.29: Anvlop mo ennmi dan disgras; fer zot met kostim laont.
109.30: Mo pou dir LESEGNER mersi for-for; mo pou koz so grander dan lasanble lepep
109.31: parski li defann bann pov e sov zot kont dominer ki rod kondann zot amor.

110.1: LESEGNER Bondie dir mo segner lerwa, “Asiz la, dan mo kote drwat e atann ziska ki mo fer to ennmi azenou divan to lipie.”
110.2: LESEGNER pou fer ou pouvwar rwayal grandi depi Zerizalem ziska lezot landrwa. Inpoz to lalwa ek to pouvwar lor to ennmi.
110.3: Kan ou desid pou mat ar ou ennmi ou pep pou dibout pou soutenir ou konba. Parey kouma laroze gramatin bann zenes pou vinn ver ou lor montagn sakre.
110.4: LESEGNER ti fer enn serman e li pa pou renie so promes: “Ou pou res so pret pou toultan parey kouma pret Melkisedek.” # 110:4 Zenez 14:18. Ebre 5:6,10; 6:20; 7:3,17,21.
110.5: LESEGNER pe asiz lor ou kote drwat; kan so koler pran li, li rakle bann lerwa.
110.6: Li pou ziz bann nasion, e kadav bann ennmi pou tale lor sandbatay; li kraz bann dirizan partou lor later.
110.7: Nou lerwa pou bwar dilo ki sorti dan lasours; li pou vinn for e li pou relev so latet.

111.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Depi profonder mo leker mo pou dir LESEGNER mersi dan lasanble bann fidel, divan tou dimoun.
111.2: LESEGNER finn fer bann aksion extraordiner; tou dimoun ki admir so bann explwa reflesi lor la.
111.3: Tou seki Lesegner fer reyone ar loner ek mazeste. So drwatir li eternel.
111.4: Li pa les nou bliye so bann explwa extraordiner. LESEGNER ranpli ar bonte ek konpasion.
111.5: Li nouri bann ki rekonet so grander; zame li pa renie so lalians.
111.6: Li finn montre so pep ki kalite pwisan so pouvwar ete ler li konfiske later bann infidel pou donn so prop pep.
111.7: Tou seki li fer, gouverne par fidelite ek lazistis; kapav fer konfians so bann instriksion.
111.8: Zot eternel parski zot baze lor laverite ek drwatir.
111.9: Li ti donn so pep liberasion e ti fer enn lalians eternel ar zot. Li vre Bondie, li sin, li redoutab.
111.10: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER samem komansman lasazes; tou seki pratik sa, montre zot ena bon zizman. Louanz LESEGNER li pou eternel.

112.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Bienere dimoun ki onor LESEGNER, ki obeyir so lansegnman ar plezir.
112.2: Zanfan bon dimoun pou pwisan dan pei, desandan dimoun ki drwat pou resevwar benediksion.
112.3: So fami pou posed dibien ek la rises, e zot drwatir pou res pou touzour.
112.4: Dan marenwar lalimier briye pou dimoun ki drwat, pou dimoun ki zenere, bon ek zis.
112.5: Dimoun ki zenere e ki prete, li pou dan bien, si roul so komers dan enn manier drwat, li pou fer bien.
112.6: Bon dimoun pa konn defet e toultan dimoun pou rapel li.
112.7: Li pa per kan li tann move nouvel; so lafwa li ferm ek solid, li met so konfians dan LESEGNER.
112.8: So leker ferm, li pa per pou nannye; li sir ki li pou get so ennmi dan defet.
112.9: Li bien zenere, li ed bann malere, e so drwatir res pou touzour; li pou ena pouvwar e dimoun pou respekte li.
112.10: Kan bann azan lemal trouv sa, zot ankoler; zot grinse, lor vites zot disparet; zot lespwar disparet pou toultan.

113.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, loue, loue nom LESEGNER.
113.2: Ki nom LESEGNER gagn tou louanz, depi aster ek pou toultan.
113.3: Depi soley leve ziska soley kouse loue nom LESEGNER.
113.4: LESEGNER gouvern lor tou bann nasion, e so laglwar depas lesiel.
113.5: Kisannla parey kouma LESEGNER nou Bondie ki lor so tronn bien lao,
113.6: verse pou get lesiel ek later?
113.7: Li tir bann pov dan lapousier; li tir bann malere dan salte.
113.8: Li fer zot vinn konpagnon bann prins, bann prins ki gouvern so pep.
113.9: Li donn enn lakaz bann madam ki pa kapav gagn zanfan e li beni zot ar nesans zanfan. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

114.1: Kan lepep Izrael ti kit Lezip, kan desandan Zakob ti kit sa pei etranze la
114.2: Zide ti vinn sanktyer Bondie e Izrael ti vinn Bondie so prop propriete.
114.3: Ler lamer trouv sa, ala li sove! Larivier Zourdin rekile.
114.4: Montagn sot-sote kouma kabri, kolinn sot-sote kouma mouton.
114.5: Ki ti ariv twa lamer pou to sove koumsa? Ki ti ariv twa Zourdin pou to rekile?
114.6: Twa montagn, kifer to ti sot-sote kouma kabri? Twa kolinn, kifer to ti sot-sote kouma mouton?
114.7: Tranble, twa later, dan prezans LESEGNER, dan prezans Bondie ki Zakob adore,
114.8: ki fer ros vinn basin dilo, ki fer granit koule kouma lafontenn.

115.1: SEGNER, zis twa ki merit laglwar; zis twa, pa nou, parski twa ki lasours lamour infini e fidelite.
115.2: Kifer bann nasion dimande, “Kot zot Bondie, zot? “
115.3: Nou Bondie, limem viv dan lesiel e li fer tou seki li anvi fer.
115.4: Bannla zot bondie fabrike ar metal kouma lor ek larzan par lame imin.
115.5: Zot ena labous me zot pa kapav koze; zot ena lizie me zot pa trouv kler.
115.6: Zot ena zorey me zot pa tande; zot ena nene me zot pa santi loder.
115.7: Zot ena lame me zot pa santi nannye; zot ena lipie me zot pa kapav marse; okenn son pa sorti dan zot lagorz.
115.8: Bann artizan ki fabrik idol e met zot konfians dan metal, pou vinn parey kouma zot idol ki zot finn fabrike.
115.9: Twa pep Izrael, met to konfians dan LESEGNER. Limem to protekter ek to sekour.
115.10: Zot, bann pret dan tanp Lesegner, met zot konfians dan lame LESEGNER. Limem zot protekter ek zot sekour.
115.11: Zot tou ki respekte LESEGNER, met zot konfians dan LESEGNER. Limem zot protekter ek zot sekour.
115.12: LESEGNER rapel ki nou ete e li beni nou; li pou beni lepep Izrael, li pou beni bann desandan Aaron.
115.13: Li pou beni tou dimoun ki respekte li, ti-dimoun kouma grandimoun.
115.14: SEGNER donn zot boukou zanfan; parey pou zot desandan!
115.15: Ki LESEGNER beni zot, LESEGNER ki finn kree later ek lesiel.
115.16: Lesiel, sa li lesiel LESEGNER me li finn donn limanite later pou li viv.
115.17: Dimoun mor pa loue LESEGNER; ni bann ki desann dan lemond gran silans.
115.18: Me nou, nou remersie LESEGNER aster, pli divan ek toultan. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

116.1: Mo kontan LESEGNER parski li finn tann mo lapriyer ek mo siplikasion.
116.2: Li ekout mwa avek atansion mo pou invok li osi lontan ki mo viv.
116.3: Lamor ti pe fer mo letour pou anvlop mwa; tom ti pe ouver angran pou aval mwa. Traka ek lafreyer ti pe sezi mwa par lagorz.
116.4: Alor mo kriye LESEGNER par so nom, “SEGNER, sov mwa, SEGNER! “
116.5: LESEGNER li bon ek zenere; Bondie ranpli ar konpasion.
116.6: LESEGNER protez dimoun feb; kan mo ti tom bien ba, li ti sov mwa.
116.7: Mo lespri trankil, mo retrouv mo repo, parski LESEGNER finn fer dibien pou mwa.
116.8: To ti sov mwa, anpes lamor kokin mwa ale; to ti souy mo larm, to ti anpes mo lipie konnye,
116.9: pou ki mo mars dan prezans LESEGNER dan lemond bann vivan.
116.10: Mo lafwa ti res ferm mem kan mo ti dir, “Mo finn fini net, aster!”
116.11: Mo ti telman boulverse mo ti dir, “Bann imin, zot tou manter.”
116.12: Ki bon kiksoz mo kapav donn LESEGNER pou remersie li pou tou so bienfe?
116.13: Mo pou prezant enn ofrand - divin, dan koup delivrans e mo apel LESEGNER par so nom pour dir mersi.
116.14: Dan lasanble kot so pep reyni mo pou onor tou mo bann promes anver LESEGNER.
116.15: LESEGNER resanti douler, kan so bann fidel mor.
116.16: Mwa mo to serviter, SEGNER; mo servi twa parey kouma mo mama ti fer. To finn kas lasenn ki ti atas mwa.
116.17: Mo pou ofer enn sakrifis remersiman, mo apel LESEGNER par so nom pour dir li mersi.
116.18: Dan lasanble kot so pep reyni mo pou onor tou mo bann promes anver LESEGNER,
116.19: dan lakour Tanp LESEGNER omilie Zerizalem. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

117.1: Tou bann nasion, anou sant louanz LESEGNER! Tou bann pep, anou sant so grander!
117.2: So lamour infini li bien gran pou nou e fidelite LESEGNER li eternel. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

118.1: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski li vremem bon, so lamour infini li eternel.
118.2: Twa pep Izrael, dir for-for, “So lamour infini li eternel. “
118.3: Bann desandan Aaron dir, “So lamour infini li eternel. “
118.4: Nou tou ki ador li, anou dir, “So lamour infini li eternel. “
118.5: Kan mo ti dan detres, mo ti kriye LESEGNER e li ti tann mo lapriyer e li ti liber mwa.
118.6: LESEGNER li ar mwa mo pa per nannye; kisannla kapav tous mwa?
118.7: Grasa led ki LESEGNER donn mwa mo trouv defet mo bann ennmi.
118.8: Preferab met nou lavi dan lame LESEGNER, ki fer konfians enn imin.
118.9: Preferab met nou lavi dan lame LESEGNER, ki fer konfians bann dirizan imin.
118.10: Tou bann nasion ti fini antour mwa; grasa pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.11: Zot ti fons lor mwa partou kote; grasa pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.12: Zot ti desann lor mwa kouma enn niaz mous zonn me lor vites zot tengn kouma dife dan pikan; grasa pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.13: Enn latak feros ti bouskil mwa, pou sey zet mwa anba, me LESEGNER ti ed mwa.
118.14: LESEGNER ti fer mwa vinn for ek pwisan, limem mo Sover.
118.15: Ekout bann sante laviktwar ek delivrans sorti depi dan latant lepep Bondie: “Lafors LESEGNER finn trionfe!
118.16: Se so pwisans ki finn donn nou laviktwar - Lafors LESEGNER finn trionfe!”
118.17: Non, mo pa pou mor; okontrer mo pou viv mo lavi pou mo rakont bann mervey ki LESEGNER finn realize.
118.18: Li finn pini mwa severman pou mo erer me li pa finn detrir mwa.
118.19: Ouver laport Tanp ki rezerve pou bann fidel; mo pou al andan pou dir mersi LESEGNER.
118.20: Samem laport LESEGNER; bann dimoun drwat kapav rant andan.
118.21: Mo dir twa mersi parski to finn reponn mwa, tomem mo Sover.
118.22: Ros ki mason ti rezete, zordi li ros prinsipal ki pe tini soubasman.
118.23: Sa li plan LESEGNER; pli merveye ki sa peyna!
118.24: Zordi se zour ki LESEGNER finn fer; nou tou ere; anou selebre lazwa sa gran zour la.
118.25: Delivre nou, SEGNER, delivre nou! O SEGNER, nou sipliy twa, donn nou sikse!
118.26: Ki Bondie beni seki rant isi dan nom LESEGNER. Depi dan so Tanp, nou partaz so benediksion ar zot.
118.27: LESEGNER, limem Bondie; li finn donn nou so lalimier. Trap bann ramo dan zot lame, komans prosesion festival, e fer letour lotel.
118.28: Tomem mo Bondie, mo sant to louanz. Tomem mo Bondie, mo pou proklam to grander.
118.29: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski vremem li bon, so lamour infini li eternel.

119.1: Bienere bann ki amenn enn lavi san repros, ki viv dapre lalwa LESEGNER.
119.2: Bienere bann ki swiv so instriksion, ki obeyir li ar sinserite profon dan zot leker.
119.3: Zame zot pa fote; zot swiv sime ki li finn trase.
119.4: To finn donn nou to instriksion ki nou bizin obeyir zot san fot.
119.5: Mo priye ki mo kondir mwa dan enn manier ferm pou ki mo reysi swiv to bann regleman.
119.6: Si mo swiv tou to komandman lerla mo pa pou gagn laont.
119.7: Ler mo konn apresie valer to regleman ki zis, mo pou rann glwar to grander ar sinserite.
119.8: Mo pou obeyir to lalwa; zame pa abandonn mwa.
119.9: Kimanier enn zennom kapav res prop dan lavi? Li bizin obeyir to lansegnman.
119.10: Ar tou mo leker mo rod twa; anpes mwa dezobeyir to komandman.
119.11: Mo prezerv to parol dan mo leker pou mo pa fer pese kont twa.
119.12: Mo sant to louanz O SEGNER; montre mwa to regleman.
119.13: Mwa mo pou repete for-for tou bann desizion ki to finn donn nou.
119.14: Mo ena boukou lazwa kan mo obeyir to komandman plis ki lazwa ki enn dimoun ena ki posed enn rises enorm.
119.15: Mo etidie to bann instriksion e fixe mo regar lor sime ki to montre mwa.
119.16: To bann lalwa donn mwa satisfaksion; to parol finn grave dan mo memwar.
119.17: Pran mwa, to serviter, bien kont pou ed mwa viv enn lavi ki obeyir to parol.
119.18: Ouver mo lizie pou ki mo dekouver bann laverite merveye ki kasiet dan to bann lalwa.
119.19: Mo sezour lor later li kourt; pa kasiet mwa to bann komandman.
119.20: Sak moman mo leker brile ar inpasians pou to bann instriksion.
119.21: To repros bann ki fer zot fanor, bann modi ki dezobeyir to instriksion.
119.22: Protez mwa kont zot mepri ek zot insilt parski mwa mo respekte to lord.
119.23: Bann dirizan zwenn pou konplote kont mwa me mwa mo prefer etidie to lansegnman.
119.24: To leson donn mwa plezir; zot bann konseye ki ouver mo lespri.
119.25: Mo par ter, mo anba dan lapousier; selon to parol, fer mwa reviv.
119.26: Mo ti konfes saki mo finn fer, mo bann erer e to ti reponn mwa; montre mwa to regleman.
119.27: Ed mwa pou konpran to bann exizans, e mo pou medit lor to bann aksion manifik.
119.28: Sagrin pe pins mo leker; donn mwa lafors dapre to parol.
119.29: Anpes mwa pran move sime e dan to bonte, ansegn mwa to lalwa.
119.30: Mo swazir pou swiv twa avek fidelite; mo pran bien kont sazes to zizman.
119.31: Mo finn aprann to lansegnman O SEGNER, pa fer mwa gagn laont.
119.32: Mo swiv sime to komandman ar boukou lazwa parski to fer mo konesans grandi.
119.33: SEGNER, montre mwa lespri to regleman e mo promet mo pou obeyir zot toultan.
119.34: Fer mwa konpran to lalwa e mo pou swiv li; mo pou grav li dan mo leker.
119.35: Gard mwa dan lobeisans to bann instriksion parski zot donn mwa boukou boner.
119.36: Olie fer mwa anvi vinn ris, ranpli mo leker ar dezir pou obeyir to lalwa.
119.37: Pa les mwa tante par zafer san valer; fer mwa viv dan to sime.
119.38: Onor promes ki to ti fer mwa, to serviter, - samem promes ki to fer ar dimoun ki obeyir twa.
119.39: Protez mwa kont insilt ki teroriz mwa; parski sazes to zizman li bon.
119.40: Mo dezir ekout to lord; par to drwatir fer mwa reviv.
119.41: SEGNER, montre mwa konbien to kontan mwa e sov mwa kouma to ti promet.
119.42: Koumsa mo pou kapav fer fas bann ki insilte mwa parski mo met mo konfians dan to parol.
119.43: Ed mwa pou koz laverite toultan parski mo lespwar li dan to zizman.
119.44: Mo pou toultan obeyir to lalwa aster, pli tar, ziska leternite.
119.45: Mo pou viv enn lavi dan parfe liberte parski mo fer tou pou ekout to konsey.
119.46: Mo pou dir bann lerwa ki to instriksion ete e mo pa pou onte pou fer sa.
119.47: Mo santi mwa dan bien kan mo pe obeyir to komandman parski mo telman kontan to parol.
119.48: Mo respekte ek kontan to lansegnman e mo pou medit lor to bann exizans.
