119.49: Rapel promes ki to ti fer mwa, to serviter; sa ti ranpli mwa ar lespwar.
119.50: Malgre mo soufrans mo ti gagn soulazman parski to promes ti redonn mwa lavi.
119.51: Bann vantar finn bien fer foutan ar mwa me mo pa finn abandonn bann prinsip to lalwa.
119.52: Mo rapel klerman to bann zizman dan lepase parski zot donn mwa kouraz ek lape, O SEGNER.
119.53: Kan bann ki fer lemal viol to lalwa, lakoler bwi dan mwa.
119.54: Ninport kikote mo viv kouma enn etranze lor later mo konpoz kantik pou sant to bann lansegnman.
119.55: Mem dan lanwit mo pans twa, SEGNER, e mo pou obeyir to lalwa.
119.56: Kan mo pran kont to mesaz lerla ki mo gout veritab boner.
119.57: Mo pa bizin nannye apart twa, O SEGNER; mo fer serman mo pou obeyir to parol.
119.58: Mo sipliy twa ar sinserite, montre mwa to bonte kouma to ti promet.
119.59: Mo finn examinn mo konportman e mo pe retourn ver to bann exizans.
119.60: San perdi letan mo swiv to instriksion lor vites.
119.61: Malgre bann azan lemal finn instal piez lor mo sime mo pa pou bliye to lalwa.
119.62: Omilie lanwit mo leve pou selebre twa pou to zizman ki drwat.
119.63: Mo solider ar bann ki ador twa e ki obeyir to instriksion.
119.64: SEGNER, liniver ranpli ar to lamour infini; gid mwa atraver to lansegnman.
119.65: To finn onor to parol, SEGNER, e to finn fer dibien pou to serviter.
119.66: Donn mwa sazes ek konesans parski mo fer konfians to komandman.
119.67: Avan to ti imilie mwa, mo ti egare me aster mo gard to parol.
119.68: To bon e to leker li gran! Ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.69: Malgre ki ena dimoun fezer ki finn rakont zistwar lor mwa, mwa ar leker kler mo swiv to instriksion.
119.70: Sa bann la zot pa konpran nannye; me mwa, mo trouv boukou plezir dan to lalwa.
119.71: To pinision finn fer mwa boukou dibien; li finn fer mwa konpran to leson.
119.72: Lalwa ki to prononse, samem meyer pou mwa, li vo plis ki tou bann trezor dan lemond.
119.73: To ti kree mwa, to finn fasonn mwa; nouri mo lespri pou mo konpran to bann komandman.
119.74: Bann ki respekte twa pou kontan ler zot trouv mwa parski mo finn met mo lesperans dan to parol.
119.75: Mo kone ki to bann zizman zot baze lor drwatir, SEGNER, e to ti ena rezon pou imilie mwa dan to fidelite.
119.76: Konsol mwa ar to lamour infini, kouma to finn promet mwa, to serviter.
119.77: Ena pitie pou mwa e mo pou kontinie viv parski mo kontan to lalwa.
119.78: Fer bann gran-nwar dekonserte pou zot bann fos akizasion lor mwa; dan mo kote, mo pou medit lor to bann instriksion.
119.79: Fer bann ki respekte twa vinn ver mwa pou ki zot konn to bann lord.
119.80: Ed mwa pou respekte to lansegnman kouma bizin pou anpes mwa sibir imiliasion dan defet.
119.81: Mo epwize telman mo atann to delivrans, mo finn met mo lespwar dan to parol.
119.82: Mo lizie pe trouv som telman mo atann to promes; mo dir momem, “Kan to pou konsol mwa?”
119.83: Mo santi mwa initil koumadir mo enn touk perse; pourtan zame mo pa finn bliye to bann lansegnman.
119.84: Komie letan mo pou bizin atann? Kan to pou pini bann ki persekit mwa?
119.85: Bann gran-nwar ki pa respekte to lalwa finn plas bann piez partou lor mo sime.
119.86: To bann instriksion ranpli ar laverite. Mo ennmi pe persekit mwa san okenn rezon - ed mwa!
119.87: Bannla ti pre pou fini mwa, mo manke trouv lamor, me mo pa finn abandonn to lansegnman.
119.88: Ar to lamour infini, prezerv mo lavi, pou ki mo kapav obeyir lord ki to done.
119.89: To parol, O SEGNER, li eternel li fixe pou toultan dan lesiel.
119.90: To fidelite li dire zenerasion apre zenerasion; to finn met later dan so plas e li res stab.
119.91: Par to lord tou kiksoz finn tini ziska zordi, e kouma bon serviter, zot ekout twa.
119.92: Si to lalwa pa ti lasours mo lazwa depi lontan mo douler ti pou fini touy mwa.
119.93: Zame mo pou ignor to bann instriksion parski grasa zot mo ankor vivan.
119.94: Mo lavi dan to lame! Sov mwa! Mo finn toultan fer tou pou respekte to instriksion.
119.95: Bann ki pratik lemal pe veye pou touy mwa me mwa mo pou kontinie medit lor to ansegnman.
119.96: Mo kone ki mem kiksoz parfe ena so limit me to komandman li pena limit.
119.97: O komie mo kontan to lalwa! Lanwit-lizour mo medit lor to lalwa.
119.98: To komandman grave dan mo latet; akoz sa mo ena plis sazes ki mo ennmi.
119.99: Parfwa mo konpran plis ki profeser parski mo toultan pe medit lor to lansegnman.
119.100: Mo lespri pli for ki lespri bann grandimoun parski mwa mo obeyir to instriksion.
119.101: Mo finn evit konportman malsin parski mo krwar dan to parol.
119.102: Mo pa finn bliye okenn to bann regleman parski twa ki mo profeser.
119.103: To parol zot extra dou pli dou ki dimiel.
119.104: To instriksion fer mwa vinn saz akoz sa mo deteste move konportman.
119.105: To lalwa li enn lalanp ki ekler mo sime; enn far ki diriz mwa dan nwar.
119.106: Mo fer serman mo pou onor mo promes pou obeyir to bann instriksion ki baze lor drwatir.
119.107: Mo douler, SEGNER, li atros; redonn mwa lavi selon to parol.
119.108: Aksepte mo lapriyer aksiondegras, SEGNER, e ansegn mwa to bann leson.
119.109: Mo toultan pe pran risk ar mo lavi me zame mo pa finn bliye to lalwa.
119.110: Bann ki pratik lemal ti met piez partou lor mo larout; malgre sa mo ti refiz dezobeyir to lansegnman.
119.111: To bann exizans finn grave dan mo lespri pou leternite; zotmem ki met lazwa dan mo leker.
119.112: Mo pou kontinie obeyir to volonte pou touzour, ziska lafin net.
119.113: Mo deteste bann ki ezite pou swiv twa me mwa, mo kontan to lalwa.
119.114: Tomem mo protekter, mo sover; mo fer konfians to parol.
119.115: Sort divan mwa ale, zot tou serviter lemal! Mwa mo respekte komandman mo Bondie.
119.116: Donn mwa lafors kouma to ti promet pou ki mo viv; pa desevwar mo lesperans.
119.117: Ar to soutien mo pou ansekirite e mo pou kontinie met to bann instriksion anpratik.
119.118: To kondann bann ki dezobeyir to instriksion parski bann plan fos ki zot fer pa servi nannye.
119.119: To tret bann move dimoun lor later kouma salte akoz sa mo kontan to bann regleman.
119.120: Mo rekonet ki mo per twa, mo mem gagn frison; e mo gagn per to bann zizman.
119.121: Mo finn fer tou seki mo krwar bon ek korek; pa abandonn mwa dan grif bann opreser.
119.122: Promet mwa ki to pou ed to serviter; pa les bann gran-nwar fer dominer ar mwa.
119.123: Mo lizie ki res ouver, zot fatige rod to sekour; zot kontign rod delivrans ki to promet.
119.124: Donn mwa zis seki to lamour infini komande e ansegn mwa to bann regleman.
119.125: Mwa mo zis to serviter; ekler mo lespri pou mo aprann ek konpran to ansegnman.
119.126: SEGNER, finn ler pou to pas alaksion parski dimoun pe dezobeyir to lalwa.
119.127: Mo vreman kontan to komandman plis ki lor, plis ki lor pli fin ki ena.
119.128: Alor san ezite mo swiv tou to bann instriksion e mo deteste larout mansonz.
119.129: Tou to bann lansegnman zot merveye; alor ar tou mo leker mo met zot anpratik.
119.130: Kan dimoun dekouver to parol sa li ekler zot lavi e bann ignoran trouv lizour.
119.131: Telman mo anvi bwar to bann komandman ki mo labous res gran ouver.
119.132: Vinn ed mwa, akord mwa to gras, kouma to fer ar tou dimoun ki kontan twa.
119.133: Dapre to parol, diriz mo pa pou mo pa tonbe; pa les lemal devir mo lavi.
119.134: Tir mwa dan latrap opreser pou ki mo lib pou obeyir to instriksion.
119.135: Fer lalimier to prezans briy lor mwa, to serviter, e ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.136: Mo larm koule kouma robine kan mo trouv dimoun dezobeyir to lalwa.
119.137: SEGNER, tomem lasours drwatir e to lalwa li zis.
119.138: To bann instriksion zot baze lor drwatir ek lazistis, zot ranpli ar fidelite.
119.139: Lakoler anflam mo lespri akoz mo ennmi bliye to parol.
119.140: To promes finn pas tout eprev. Sa mo lavi sa, mo pli gran trezor!
119.141: Mem si mo pa inportan e lezot mepriz mwa zame mo tourn ledo ar to lansegnman.
119.142: To drwatir li eternel e to lalwa li laverite pou tou letan.
119.143: Traka ek tourman trangle mo lekzistans me to lalwa ranpli mo leker ar lazwa.
119.144: To bann instriksion zot drwat pou leternite; ekler mo lespri, koumsa mo kapav viv.
119.145: Ar sinserite mo dimann to led; reponn mwa SEGNER e mo pou fer tou seki to regleman dir.
119.146: Mo sipliy twa: sov mwa, e mo pou respekte to bann lord.
119.147: Avan soley leve, mo priye twa pou dimann to led; mo lespwar repoz lor to parol.
119.148: Aswar mo pa dormi pou mo kapav medite, mo medit lor tou to bann lansegnman.
119.149: O SEGNER, akoz to lamour infini, ekout mo lapriyer; e protez mo lavi, dapre to desizion.
119.150: Bann ki persekit mwa avek kriote, zot pe raprose, sa bann la zot bien lwin ar to lalwa.
119.151: Me twa SEGNER, to la koste ar mwa e to komandman li vre pou toultan.
119.152: Bien-bien lontan, mo ti aprann ki to bann instriksion to finn etablir zot pou leternite.
119.153: Pran kont mo douler e sov mwa parski zame mo finn bliye to lalwa.
119.154: Pran mo par e liber mwa; sov mwa kouma to finn promet.
119.155: Bann ki pratik lemal pa pou gagn delivrans parski zot pa rod to bann regleman.
119.156: Me twa, SEGNER, to konpasion li infini; atraver to zizman prezerv mo lavi.
119.157: Mo ena boukou ennmi e boukou persekiter, me zame mo finn abandonn to regleman.
119.158: Kan mo get sa bann tret la mo gagn maloker parski zot pa respekte to instriksion.
119.159: Get mwa kouma mo kontan to lansegnman. Parski to lamour li infini, prezerv mo lavi.
119.160: Laverite samem leker to parol, e to bann zizman ki drwat, zot pou reste pou leternite.
119.161: Bann dimoun pwisan pe atak mwa pou nannye, mwa mo ena gran respe pou to parol.
119.162: To parol donn mwa gran lazwa kouma kikenn ki finn dekouver enn gran trezor.
119.163: Mo ayir ek deteste mansonz, me mo kontan to lalwa.
119.164: Set fwa par zour mo loue twa pou to bann bon zizman baze lor lazistis.
119.165: Bann ki kontan to lalwa zot viv dan lape e nannye pa kapav fer zot tonbe.
119.166: Mo pe atann ki to sov mwa SEGNER, e mo akonplir to bann komandman.
119.167: Mo obeyir to lansegnman ki mo kontan ar enn lamour sinser.
119.168: Mo obeyir to leson ek to instriksion; to lizie trouv tou seki mo fer.
119.169: SEGNER, les mo lapriyer rant dan to prezans; ekler mo lespri dapre to parol.
119.170: Aksepte mo siplikasion vinn dan to prezans e sov mwa kouma to ti promet.
119.171: Mo pou sant to louanz parski to ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.172: Mo pou sant to promes parski to bann komandman li vre ek drwat.
119.173: Res toultan la pou ed mwa parski mwa mo toultan pe swiv to lord.
119.174: Mo gran dezir se ki to sov mwa, O SEGNER, e se to lalwa ki lasours mo boner.
119.175: Protez mo lavi pou ki mo kapav kontinie sant to grander e ed mwa ar to bann instriksion.
119.176: Mo finn egare kouma enn brebi k‘inn perdi sime; vinn sers mwa, to serviter; zame mo finn bliye to bann komandman.

120.1: Dan mo detres, mo ti dimann led LESEGNER e li ti ekout mo lapriyer.
120.2: Sov mwa SEGNER kont lalev manter, kont labous tronper.
120.3: Eh bann manter! Ki Bondie pou fer ar zot? Ki kalite pinision li finn rezerve pou zot?
120.4: Pers zot ar fles fite. Bril zot ar labrez.
120.5: Li vreman malere ki mo viv parmi bann sovaz Mesek, ki mo bizin viv omilie bann barbar Kedar.
120.6: Mo finn viv tro lontan ar dimoun ki kont lape!
120.7: Mwa mo kontan lape, me kan mo koz lape, zot, zot swazir lager.

121.1: Mo get lao lor montagn; kot mo sekour pou sorti?
121.2: Sekour pou vinn depi LESEGNER, ki finn kree later ek lesiel.
121.3: Li pa pou les twa glise, tonbe; to protekter pa pou dormi.
121.4: Protekter Izrael pa kas kou, pa ferm lizie.
121.5: LESEGNER pou vey lor twa; LESEGNER koste ar twa, kouma enn lonbraz ki protez twa.
121.6: Soley pa pou fer twa ditor dan lazourne, ni lalinn pa pou fer twa dimal aswar.
121.7: LESEGNER pou protez twa kont tou danze; li pou prezerv to lavi.
121.8: LESEGNER pou protez twa ler to sorti ek ler to retourne, aster, pli divan ek toultan.

122.1: Mo ti ere ler zot ti dir mwa, “Anou al dan lakaz LESEGNER.”
122.2: Aster ala nou la andan Zerizalem!
122.3: Lavil Zerizalem finn bien konstrir, li form enn linite parfe.
122.4: Isi mem bann tribi viv, bann tribi LESEGNER, isi mem zot monte pou remersie LESEGNER dan fason li ti dir bizin fer.
122.5: Isi mem ki bann lerwa Izrael asize pou fer zistis, lor tronn desandan David.
122.6: Anou priye pou lape dan Zerizalem: “Ki zot konn prosperite, bann ki kontan twa.
122.7: Lape regn dan lavil ek sekirite dan bann pale. “
122.8: Pou bienet mo fami ek konesans mo dir Zerizalem, “Lape beni twa!”
122.9: Pou boner lakaz LESEGNER nou Bondie mo priye pou to prosperite.

123.1: Segner, mo lev mo lizie ver twa, lao ver lesiel kot to diriz tou depi to tronn.
123.2: Kouma enn serviter depann lor so patron e enn servant depann lor so patronn, nou, nou pou kontinie rod to faver, SEGNER nou Bondie, ziska ki to grasie nou.
123.3: Pitie, SEGNER, pitie, nou finn ase gagn maltrete.
123.4: Nou fatige, nou plin, ar bann ris ki mepriz nou, ar bann arogan ki imilie nou.

124.1: Si LESEGNER pa ti mars ar nou - ale, repete O Izrael -
124.2: Si LESEGNER pa ti mars ar nou ler nou ennmi ti pe atak nou
124.3: zot ti pou aval nou vivan dan zot koler ki ti pe sofe kont nou;
124.4: debordman ti pou sarye nou ale, toran ti pou kouver nou partou;
124.5: e nou ti pou nwaye par kouran toransiel.
124.6: Anou remersie LESEGNER ki finn anpes ennmi desir nou ar zot ledan.
124.7: Kouma ti zwazo nou finn reysi sap dan latrap saser; latrap la finn deklinke e aster nou lib.
124.8: Nou sekour sorti depi LESEGNER limem, kreater lesiel ek later.

125.1: Bann ki met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot kouma Montagn Sion ki personn pa kapav sakouye, li res la pou touzour.
125.2: Parey kouma montagn ankadre Zerizalem LESEGNER ankadre so pep aster, pli divan ek toultan.
125.3: Bann dirizan ki swiv lemal pa pou ena pouvwar toultan dan pei ki apartenir ar bann ki viv ladrwatir, sinon dimoun ki drwat pou tranp so lame dan lemal, dan krim.
125.4: SEGNER, montre to bonte ar dimoun ki bon; beni bann ki ena lazistis dan zot leker.
125.5: Kan to sas bann azan lemal, pini osi bann ki finn abandonn bon sime. Ki Izrael beni ar lape!

126.1: Kan LESEGNER ti ramenn nou dan Zerizalem, nou ti krwar nou pe reve.
126.2: Nou labous ti ranpli ar gran riye, nou lalang ti kriye ar lazwa. Ala nou riye la! Nou tann bann lezot nasion dir, “LESEGNER finn fer vremem boukou pou zot.”
126.3: Wi, LESEGNER ti vremem fer boukou pou nou. Akoz samem nou ti ere koumsa.
126.4: SEGNER, redonn nou laglwar ki nou ti ena, parey kouma lapli ranpli larivier sek dan Negev.
126.5: Bann ki sem lagrin dan plantasion ar zot larm, pou fer lakoup dan lazwa.
126.6: Bann ki al dan plantasion avek larm, gro sak semans lor ledo, pou retourne lazwa dan leker, bon rekolt pou sante dan zot pagne.

127.1: Si LESEGNER pa konstrir enn lakaz, travay artizan tourn dan vid; si LESEGNER pa okip sekirite so lavil, bann santinel pou fer senntri dan vid.
127.2: Perdi letan rint nou lekor pou zwenn de bout - leve boner, al dormi tar - parski LESEGNER finn fini okip bienet dimoun ki li kontan letan zot pe dormi.
127.3: Enn zanfan li enn kado LESEGNER; bann zanfan zot enn benediksion.
127.4: Sak garson ki enn zom ena dan so zenes li kouma enn zarm dan lame enn solda.
127.5: Bienere zom ki so artilri ranpli ar zarm, plis li ena, plis li bon pou so defans. Li pa pou konn defet kan li zwenn so ennmi ankour.

128.1: Bienere tou dimoun ki ena respe pou LESEGNER, bann ki swiv sime li finn trase.
128.2: To travay pou ranpli to gardmanze; li donn twa boner ek prosperite.
128.3: To madam dan lakaz pou grandi to fami, li pou kouma enn pie rezin; e to bann zanfan pou parey bann brans zoliv otour to latab.
128.4: Samem benediksion ki pe atann enn dimoun ki obeyir LESEGNER.
128.5: LESEGNER beni twa depi Montagn Sion! Osi lontan to viv to pou temwin prosperite Zerizalem.
128.6: Mo priye ki to viv ase lontan pou get to tizanfan grandi. Ki Izrael beni ar lape!

129.1: Depi mo zenes mo bann lennmi persekit mwa - ale, repete O Izrael -
129.2: “Depi mo zenes mo bann lennmi persekit mwa me zot pa finn gagn laviktwar lor mwa. “
129.3: Zot ti fouy rigol profon dan mo ledo koumadir pe labour later.
129.4: Me LESEGNER, limem vre drwatir, li finn kas lasenn bann ki pratik lemal.
129.5: Mo priye ki tou dimoun ki ayir Sion zot zwenn defet dan laont ek konfizion.
129.6: Ki zot vinn kouma lerb ki pous lor twatir me ki mor avan ki rasinn devlope.
129.7: Move lerb pa ranpli lame enn kouper lerb; li pa ranpli lebra enn ramaser lerb.
129.8: Akoz samem bann pasan ki pase, zame zot pou arete pou dir bann mwasoner, “LESEGNER beni twa; Nou beni twa dan nom LESEGNER!”

130.1: Depi profonder mo dezespwar mo kriye twa, SEGNER.
130.2: O Segner, tann mo lavwa! Ekout mo lapriyer, mo sipliy twa ed mwa!
130.3: SEGNER, si to ti gard enn lalis tou nou pese, kisannla ti pou kapav res dan to prezans?
130.4: Akoz to aksepte pardonn nou, nou dwa twa respe e reverans.
130.5: Ar inpasians mo atann led LESEGNER e mo lesperans li dan so parol.
130.6: Ar inpasians mo pou atann larive Lesegner plis ki gardien-aswar pare pou atann gramatin vini, plis ki gardien-aswar pare pou atann gramatin vini.
130.7: Izrael, met to lesperans dan LESEGNER! Lamour LESEGNER li infini e li ena gran pouvwar pou sov nou.
130.8: Limem ki pou liber so pep Izrael depi tou so bann pese.

131.1: SEGNER, mo leker pa vantar, mo regar pa reflet larogans; Mo pa galoup deryer bel-bel zafer ki tro gran pou mwa.
131.2: Okontrer, mo gard mwa kalm, mo rod trankilite, ki enn zanfan rode dan lebra so mama. Mo parey sa zanfan la, kalm e lespri anpe.
131.3: Izrael, met to lespwar dan LESEGNER aster, taler, pli divan ek toultan!

132.1: SEGNER, pa bliye David; pa bliye komie li ti soufer.
132.2: Li ti fer enn serman devan LESEGNER, li ti fer enn promes Bondie Toupwisan ki Zakob adore,
132.3: “Mo pa pou retourn mo lakaz mo pa pou al dormi lor mo lili;
132.4: mo pa pou les mo lizie ferme ar somey, ni mo popier repoze pou dormi,
132.5: tank mo pa finn gagn enn plas pou LESEGNER, enn lakaz pou Bondie Toupwisan ki Zakob adore.”
132.6: Dan Betleem nou tann koz Kofre ki ti kontenir Lalians, nou ti retrouv li dan laplenn Yaar.
132.7: Nou ti dir, “Anou al dan lakaz LESEGNER; laba anou fer servis adorasion devan so tronn.”
132.8: Lev twa SEGNER, al dan landrwa ki destine pou to repo, amenn ar twa Kofre Lalians, ki montre to gran pouvwar.
132.9: Anvlop to bann pret dan vetman lazistis, e ki to pep fidel kriye ar lazwa.
132.10: SEGNER, akoz to serviter David, pa abandonn lerwa ki twa to ti swazir.
132.11: LESEGNER ti fer enn promes ar David, promes ki li pa pou renie: “Enn to bann garson pou vinn lerwa e li pou regne apre twa.
132.12: Si to bann garson res fidel ar nou lalians e swiv bann instriksion ki mo done, zot zanfan ek zanfan zot zanfan pou vinn lerwa osi lontan ki lavi existe.”
132.13: LESEGNER finn swazir Sion; samem pou vinn so lakaz:
132.14: “Isi ki mo pou viv pou toultan e depi isi mo pou regne; samem mo dezir.
132.15: Mo pou beni Sion avek bann resours anabondans; so bann pov pou gagn manze.
132.16: Mo pou anvlop so bann pret dan vetman delivrans, e so pep fidel pou kriye ek sante dan lazwa.
132.17: Enn parmi desandan David pou vinn enn gran lerwa isi; isi mo pou prezerv regn lerwa ki mo finn swazir kouma enn lalanp alime.
132.18: Lor so ennmi mo pou poz enn linz laont, me lor so latet pou ena enn kouronn ki briye.”

133.1: Ala li zoli la! Sa ki enn plezir sa! Lepep Bondie viv dan larmoni ek lakorite!
133.2: Li parey kouma delwil parfime ki finn verse lor latet, ki koule lor labarb, lor labarb Aaron, ki desann lor kol so manto.
133.3: Li osi parey kouma laroze Montagn Ermon ki desann lor kolinn Sion. Labamem LESEGNER finn promet so benediksion: lavi pou touzour.

134.1: Loue LESEGNER, zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, zot tou ki ofisie aswar dan Tanp LESEGNER.
134.2: Lev lame lao ver sanktyer ler zot priye dan Tanp; sant louanz LESEGNER.
134.3: Ki LESEGNER ki finn kree later ek lesiel, beni twa depi Sion.

135.1: Alelouya! Loue nom LESEGNER! Zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, sant so louanz,
135.2: zot ki debout dan lakaz LESEGNER, dan lakour Tanp nou Bondie.
135.3: Nou selebre LESEGNER parski li bon; nou sant louanz LESEGNER parski li zenere.
135.4: Li ti swazir Zakob pou limem; lepep Izrael kouma so prop trezor.
135.5: Mo kone ki LESEGNER li gran; pli gran ki tou lezot bondie.
135.6: Li kapav fer tou seki li anvi dan lesiel ek lor later, lor lamer ek dan profonder losean.
135.7: Li ris niaz siklonn depi finfon later; li lans zekler pou alim tanpet lapli; li larg rafal depi so prop rezerv.
135.8: Dan Lezip li ti touy bann premie ne, premie ne dimoun kouma zanimo.
135.9: Laba li ti fer mirak ek prodiz kont Faraon ek so bann minis.
135.10: Li ti detrir plizier nasion e li ti touy plizier lerwa pwisan:
135.11: Sihon, lerwa Amorit, Og, lerwa Basann, e tou bann lerwa dan Kanaan.
135.12: Li ti pran zot later pou li donn so pep, ti donn posesion zot later lepep Izrael.
135.13: SEGNER, to pou renome pou toultan; zenerasion apre zenerasion nou pou rapel sa.
135.14: LESEGNER pou fer zistis pou so pep; li pou ena konpasion pou so bann serviter.
135.15: Bann tribi priye bann zidol fabrike ar lor ek larzan; lame imin ki donn zot form.
135.16: Zot ena labous me zot pa kapav koze; zot ena lizie me zot pa trouv kler.
135.17: Zot ena zorey me zot pa tande; zot mem peyna respirasion ki sorti dan zot labous.
135.18: Bann artizan ki fabrik idol, bann ki finn met zot konfians dan idol, pou vinn parey kouma zot.
135.19: Anou loue LESEGNER, pep Izrael! Loue li, zot ki bann pret Bondie!
135.20: Zot bann Levit, loue LESEGNER; zot ki ador li, sant so grander!
135.21: Loue LESEGNER ki lor montagn Sion, lamem kot li reste, dan Zerizalem. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

136.1: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski li bon; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.2: Nou remersie Bondie ki pli gran ki tou bondie; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.3: Nou remersie Lesegner, pli pwisan ki tou segner; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.4: Zis li tousel ki kapav fer bann gran mirak; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.5: Ar so sazes li ti konstrir lesiel; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.6: Li ti kree later lor losean profon; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.7: Li ti kree soley ek lalinn; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.8: Soley li gouverne lizour; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.9: Lalinn ek zetwal zot gouverne aswar; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.10: Dan Lezip li ti touy tou bann garson premie ne; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.11: Li ti gid lepep Izrael pou zot sorti depi Lezip; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.12: So lame for, so lebra solid; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.13: Li fer dilo Lamer Rouz separ an de; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.14: Li ti gid so pep pou travers lamer; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.15: Li ti nway lerwa Lezip ek so larme; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.16: Li ti gid so pep atraver dezer; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.17: Li ti detrir bann lerwa pwisan; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.18: Li ti ranvers bann gran-gran lerwa; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.19: Sihon, lerwa Amorit; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.20: Og, lerwa Basann; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.21: Li ti pran zot later e li donn sa so pep; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.22: Li ti donn tousa Izrael, so serviter; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.23: Kan nou ti imilie, li pa ti abandonn nou; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.24: Li ti tir nou dan prizon nou ennmi; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.25: Li donn manze tou bann kreatir vivan; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.26: Nou remersie Bondie ki Souvrin dan lesiel, so lamour infini li eternel.

137.1: Danbor bann larivier Babilonn nou ti asize; nou larm ti koule ler nou ti rapel Sion.
137.2: Lor pie pepliye danbor dilo nou ti anpandan nou instriman lamizik.
137.3: Nou ennmi konkeran demann nou sante. Nou persekiter demann enn kantik zwaye. Zot dir, “Sant enn sante ki sorti Sion.”
137.4: Kouma kapav sant enn sante pou LESEGNER kan nou dan pei etranze?
137.5: Si zame mo bliye twa Zerizalem, prefer mo lame bliye kouma zwe lamizik.
137.6: Si ena pou bliye twa, si mo nepli konsider twa lasours mo boner, prefer mo lalang amare e mo aret sante.
137.7: Rapel, SEGNER, ki bann Edomit ti fer zour ki Babilonien ti kaptir Zerizalem. Pa bliye ki zot ti pe dir, “Kraz partou! Met tou plat!”
137.8: Zour destriksion Babilonn pou vini. Bienere sa dimoun ki pou fer ar zot seki zot ti fer ar nou
137.9: - trap tibaba pou kraz zot lor ros.

138.1: Mo remersie twa SEGNER ar tou mo leker; mo sant to louanz divan lezot bondie.
138.2: Mo fer fas to Tanp sakre, mo azenou e mo loue to nom pou to lamour infini e to fidelite e parski to finn prouve ki to nom ek to lalwa zot pli ot e pli gran ki tou.
138.3: Kan mo finn dimann to led, to finn reponn; to finn ranpli mwa ar kouraz ek lafors.
138.4: SEGNER, tou bann lerwa dan lemond loue twa parski zot tann parol to labous.
138.5: Zot tou pou sant to bann explwa parski to laglwar li bien-bien gran.
138.6: Mem to lao laba dan lesiel, to okip bann ti-dimoun anba e bann vantar to rekonet zot depi lwin.
138.7: Si mo mars dan ladetres, to fer mwa reviv. To protez mwa kont ennmi redoutab e to pouvwar sov mwa.
138.8: LESEGNER pou onor tou promes li finn fer pou mwa; SEGNER, to lamour infini li eternel. Kontign zoli travay ki to finn koumanse.

139.1: Segner, to finn examinn mwa net e to kone ki mo ete.
139.2: To okouran kan mo asize, kan mo diboute; depi lwin laba to kone ki pase dan mo latet.
139.3: To kone sipa mo pe travay ou si mo pe kas poz; to ena tou konesans lor seki mo pe fer.
139.4: Avan mem mo ouver mo labous, SEGNER, to kone ki mo pou dir.
139.5: To la partou otour mwa e to pouvwar protez mwa.
139.6: To konn mwa dan enn fason parfe, sitan bien, ki li difisil pou konpran tousala.
139.7: Kot kapav al kasiet pou tom andeor to kontrol? Kot mo kapav sove pou mo pa tom dan to prezans?
139.8: Si mo mont dan lesiel to pou laba; si mo tom dan trou lamor, laba osi to pou prezan.
139.9: Si mo anvole, mo al lot kote, kot soley leve, si mo travers lamer pou al dan enn finfon, kot soley kouse,
139.10: to lame pou la pou gid mo pa, to lame drwat pou tini mwa ferm.
139.11: Si mo dir, “Mo sir marenwar pou kasiet mwa, ki lalimier otour mwa pou vinn obskirite, “
139.12: mo sir marenwar pa pou ase nwar pou kasiet mwa e lanwit pa pou ase som. Pou twa lalimier ek marenwar pa fer okenn diferans.
139.13: Se twa kreater sak parti mo lekor; se twa ki finn fasonn mwa dan vant mo mama.
139.14: Mo loue twa parski to finn kree mwa enn vre mervey, tou seki to fer li enn mervey, sa mo bizin rekonet.
139.15: To ti kone letan ti pe form mo bann lezo dan sekre, letan ti pe fasonn mwa dan profonder later.
139.16: To lizie ti trouv mo lekor ki pa ti ankor ena form. To ti fini tras tou mo bann zour avan mem ki mo lizie ti ouver pou trouv premie zour la.
139.17: O Bondie, konbien li difisil pou konn to panse; zot inpozan, telman ena boukou!
139.18: To ena plis plan dan to latet ki lagrin disab lor laplaz; mo pakapav konte; mo leve - mo touzour avek twa.
139.19: O Bondie, si selman to ti kapav fer move dimoun mor, e pous bann dimoun violan lwin ar mwa!
139.20: Zot dir bann kalomni ek mesanste lor twa; zot zet labou lor to nom.
139.21: O SEGNER, mo deteste bann ki ayir twa, zot degoutan bann ki revolte kont twa.
139.22: Mo vremem ayir zot, mo konsider zot kouma mo ennmi personel.
139.23: Examinn mwa, O Bondie pou to dekouver mo leker; teste mwa pou to konn mo panse.
139.24: Gete tomem si ena lemal dan mwa e gid mwa lor sime leternite.

140.1: SEGNER, protez mwa kont bann azan lemal; anpes bann dimoun violan fer mwa ditor.
140.2: Zot nek konplote pou fer lemal e zot touzour pe lev lager.
140.3: Zot lalang ena venin kouma serpan; zot parol sarye pwazon koumadir kobra.
140.4: Protez mwa, SEGNER, kont pouvwar lemal; anpes dimoun violan detrir mwa, bann ki rod met mwa lak.
140.5: Bann dimoun fezer finn instal latrap pou mwa; ar lakord zot finn tal enn file pou may mwa; zot finn met piez partou lor mo sime.
140.6: Mo dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo Bondie!” Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER, mo pe sipliye!
140.7: Twa SEGNER, mo Segner, lafors ki sov mwa, to finn protez mo latet pandan konba.
140.8: SEGNER, pa sede devan dezir bann azan lemal; pa les zot reysi zot proze, sinon zot pou drese dan larogans.
140.9: Pa les mo bann ennmi gagn laviktwar; fer zot move lespri detrir zot prop lavi.
140.10: Fer labrez tom lor zot; fer zot tom dan trou nwar kot peyna sime sorti.
140.11: Anpes bann foser ek manter etabli zotmem dan pei; fer ki maler pourswiv zot san arete.
140.12: Mo kone ki LESEGNER pran par bann pov; li defann drwa bann ki bizin so led.
140.13: Bann ki viv dan ladrwatir pou sant to laglwar; zot pou toultan viv dan to prezans.

141.1: Mo sipliy twa, SEGNER; mo bien bizin to led. Pran mwa kont ler mo rod to led.
141.2: Aksepte mo lapriyer kouma lafime lansan; aksepte mo lame ki leve ver twa parey lofrand aswar.
141.3: SEGNER, met enn gard kot mo labous, enn santinel ant mo de lalev.
141.4: Ed mwa pou reziste tantasion lemal, pou pa pran par dan move pratik ansam ar move dimoun; alor mo pa pou partisip dan zot fet.
141.5: Enn bon dimoun kapav pini mwa, fer mwa repros pou mo prop dibien me mo refiz aksepte faver ar move dimoun parski gramatin-tanto mo fer lapriyer kont zot pese.
141.6: Kan zot bann dirizan pe tom piktet dan presipis, dimoun pou rapel laverite ki mo ti pe dir.
141.7: Parey kouma bisron koup dibwa, fann li, tay-tay li; koumsamem zot lezo pou fane bout par bout toutotour zot tom vid. # 141:5-7 Tex Ebre pa kler ditou lor sa group verse la.
141.8: Me mwa mo lizie fixe lor twa, SEGNER, Souvrin siprem. Donn mwa to proteksion e pa les mwa san defans.
141.9: Protez mwa kont bann latrap zot finn poz lor mo sime; anpes mwa rant dan piez bann ki pratik lemal.
141.10: Fer zot rant dan zot prop latrap letan ki mwa mo travers anliberte.

142.1: Avek tou mo lafors mo dimann LESEGNER ed mwa; avek tou mo lafors mo sipliy LESEGNER.
142.2: Mo rakont li tou mo problem; mo dir li tou mo traka.
142.3: Kan mo nepli ena kouraz, to kone ki mo bizin fer. Lor mo larout, mo ennmi finn instal piez partou.
142.4: Ler mo get otour mwa, mo pa trouv personn pou protez mwa, personn pou donn mwa enn koudme pou kasiet. Personn pa pran kont mo lavi.
142.5: SEGNER, mo sipliy twa vinn ed mwa. Mo dir twa, “Tomem mo protekter; tomem mo trezor lor later bann vivan. “
142.6: Ekout mo lapriyer dezespwar, akoz mo finn afebli. Protez mwa kont mo ennmi; zot tro for pou mwa.
142.7: Tir mwa dan mo prizon pou mo loue to grander. Bann ki obeyir Bondie pou rasanble otour mwa parski to finn azir avek bonte anver mwa.

143.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer! Dan to fidelite ekout mo siplikasion; dan to drwatir reponn mwa.
143.2: Pa fer enn prose kont mwa, to serviter, parski okenn dimoun lor later san repros devan twa.
143.3: Mo ennmi finn pourswiv mwa, finn zet mwa anba, finn kraz mwa. Mo ennmi finn anfons mwa dan lobskirite parey dimoun ki finn mor lontan.
143.4: Mo pe bes lebra; dezespwar pe touf mwa net.
143.5: Mo rapel bien lepase; mo rapel bien to bann explwa extraordiner; mo medit lor louvraz to lame.
143.6: Mo lev lame lao ver twa, dan lapriyer, mo lekor ek mo lespri swaf to prezans parey kouma later desese swaf dilo lapli.
143.7: Ekzos mo lapriyer, SEGNER! Lespwar pe koul dan fon. Pa get lot kote, SEGNER; si to pa pran mwa kont, mo pou fini dan trou lamor.
143.8: Toulegramatin fer mwa konn to lamour infini parski mo finn met mo konfians dan twa. Montre mwa sime ki mo bizin swiv parski mo finn tourn mwa ver twa.
143.9: SEGNER, mo vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; protez mwa kont mo ennmi.
143.10: Montre mwa sime to volonte akoz tomem mo Bondie. Ki to lespri gid mwa avek bonte lor sime ki peyna obstak.
143.11: Prezerv mo lavi, SEGNER, pou loner to nom; par to zistis tir mwa dan mo tourman.
143.12: Parski to kontan mwa, detrir mo ennmi e detrir mo bann adverser, akoz mo to serviter.

144.1: Mo loue LESEGNER, mo protekter! Limem ki prepar mwa pou bann batay, antrenn mwa pou gagn lager.
144.2: Limem mo protekter ek mo boukliye, mo sitadel ek mo liberater, mo boukliye, mo abrit mwa deryer li. Limem ki soumet bann pep sou mo kontrol.
144.3: SEGNER, kifer to pran kont bann imin? Kifer to donn dimoun ordiner enn plas inportan?
144.4: Enn dimoun ordiner li kouma enn ti labriz; bann zour so lavi nek enn lonbraz ki pase.
144.5: O SEGNER, desir kannva lesiel e vinn kot nou; tous bann montagn e fer zot larg lafime.
144.6: Avoy zekler partou e dispers to ennmi; avoy to bann fles e fer zot al kasiet.
144.7: Depi lao avoy to lame pou sekour mwa, delivre mwa dan toran ki bwi ar laraz, tir mwa dan grif bann anvaiser,
144.8: ki zame pa koz laverite, ki lev lame fer serman, me koz manti mem.
144.9: Mo pou sant enn nouvo sante pou twa, O Bondie; mo pou akonpagn mo sante ar sitar pou zwe pou twa,
144.10: twa ki donn laviktwar bann lerwa, twa ki sov David, to serviter.
144.11: Protez mwa kont mo bann ennmi san pitie; tir mwa dan grif bann pep etranze, ki zame pa koz laverite, ki lev lame fer serman, me koz manti mem.
144.12: Fer nou bann garson dan zot zenes grandi kouma bann pie solid; fer nou bann tifi vinn bann kolonn ki ar elegans tini nou sato.
144.13: Ranpli nou grenie ar tou sort kalite manze; fer nou zanimo dan patiraz peple par milie.
144.14: Fer nou vas met ba san problem, san pert, san foskous. Fer lape ek trankilite regne dan nou lavil.
144.15: Bienere pep ki gagn sa kalite benediksion la; bienere pep ki ena LESEGNER pou Bondie.

145.1: Mo pou proklam to grander O Bondie, mo Lerwa; mo pou loue twa aster, pli divan, toultan.
145.2: Toulezour mo pou dir twa mersi; mo pou sant to louanz aster, pli divan, toultan.
145.3: LESEGNER li gran, li merit tou louanz; nou pakapav konpran ni mezir so grander.
145.4: Zenerasion apre zenerasion limanite pou loue to bann aksion; partou zot pou koz lor to bann explwa,
145.5: lor splander to laglwar ek to mazeste. Mo pou medit lor bann gran mervey ki to fer.
145.6: Dimoun pou koz lor to pwisans redoutab, e mwa mo pou proklam to bann explwa.
145.7: Zot pou selebre grander to bonte; ar lazwa zot pou sant to lazistis.
145.8: Leker LESEGNER li ranpli ar tandres ek konpasion; difisil pou li fer koler parski so lamour infini deborde partou.
145.9: LESEGNER ena labonte pou tou dimoun, li ena konpasion pou tou kreatir ki li‘nn kree.
145.10: SEGNER, tou seki to finn kree pou dir twa mersi, e tou bann fidel pou loue twa.
145.11: Zot pou koz lor laglwar to rwayom, e zot pou rakont tou bann mirak ki to finn fer.
145.12: Koumsa lemond antie pou konn to explwa ek laglwar manifik ki to regn ena.
145.13: To regn pou enn regn eternel e to pouvwar rwayal pou dire pou touzour. LESEGNER fidel dan tou so parol, dan tou so aksion li montre so bonte.
145.14: LESEGNER soutenir bann ki pe tonbe e li relev bann ki kourbe.
145.15: Zot tou lev zot lizie ver twa pou gagn zot nouritir kan zot bizin.
145.16: To ouver to lame e tou kreatir rasazie e satisfe.
145.17: LESEGNER, li zis dan tou seki li fer; li zenere dan tou so aksion.
145.18: LESEGNER pre pou ed dimoun ki apel li e ki dimann so led ar sinserite.
145.19: Bann ki onor li gagn seki zot bizin; li tann zot soufrans e li sov zot.
145.20: Li vey lor bann ki kontan li me li detrir bann azan lemal.
145.21: Mo pou toultan loue LESEGNER; tou kreatir ki li finn kree pou loue so sin nom aster, taler, pli divan ek toultan.

146.2: Mo pou sant louanz LESEGNER tank mo ena lavi; mo pou loue mo Bondie ziska lafin mo lavi.
146.3: Pa fer konfians bann dirizan imin; imin pa ena pouvwar pou sov nou.
146.4: Kan zot mor, zot vinn lapousier; sa zour la tou zot plan mor ansam ar zot.
146.5: Bienere dimoun ki trouv sekour dan Bondie ki Zakob ti priye; ki met tou lespwar dan LESEGNER so Bondie,
146.6: ki finn kree lesiel ek later, lamer e tou seki zot kontenir, ki gard so promes avek fidelite,
146.7: ki fer zistis anfaver bann oprime e li nouri tou bann kreatir ki gagn fin. LESEGNER liber bann prizonie,
146.8: LESEGNER fer aveg trouv kler. LESEGNER ed seki finn tonbe pou rediboute; LESEGNER kontan dimoun ki swiv bon sime.
146.9: LESEGNER protez bann imigran ki viv dan nou pei; li relev bann vev ek orfelin me li fer plan bann azan lemal fini anrwinn.
146.10: LESEGNER pou regne pou touzour, O Sion, to Bondie pou regne eternelman. Alelouya, nou loue nou SEGNER!

147.1: Alelouya! Ala li zoli la kan nou sant louanz nou Bondie; pa zis li zoli, li merite ki nou sant enn kantik louanz.
147.2: LESEGNER pe donn Zerizalem enn nouvo lavi; bann exile Izrael pe retourn zot lakaz.
147.3: Li geri zot leker brize, li met pansman lor zot blesir.
147.4: Li finn deside komie zetwal pou ena dan lesiel, e anplis, li finn donn sak zetwal enn nom.
147.5: LESEGNER li gran ek pwisan; so sazes li pena limit.
147.6: Li relev bann feb ki finn kraze; me li zet bann move dimoun anba dan lapousier.
147.7: Anou sant kantik pou loue LESEGNER; nou akonpagn nou sante ar sitar klasik.
147.8: Li fann niaz partou dan lesiel; li prepar lapli pou aroz later e li fer lerb pouse partou.
147.9: Li donn tou zanimo manze; li fer parey pou ti korbo kan zot reklam nouritir.
147.10: Li pa donn gran valer lafors enn seval, e li pena okenn lintere dan vites enn atlet.
147.11: Li prefer bann ki onor li, bann ki fer konfians so lamour infini.
147.12: Glorifie LESEGNER, O Zerizalem! Loue to Bondie, O Sion!
147.13: Li ranforsi sekirite bann laport lantouraz lavil; li beni lepep ki viv dan lavil la.
147.14: Li vey sekirite frontier pei pou ki ena lape, e li donn lasirans enn bon rekolt.
147.15: Li avoy so lord lor later e so parol toutswit galoup ver so destinasion.
147.16: Limem ki fann lanez kouma enn tapi e aroz glason rape partou parey kouma lasann.
147.17: Li fer lagrel grene kouma gravie; ki sannla kapav tini kont sa freser la?
147.18: Li donn lord e lanez fonn; li avoy divan e dilo koule partou.
147.19: Li fer Zakob konn so parol, li dikte so regleman e donn so komandman lepep Izrael.
147.20: Li pa finn azir parey koumsa anver lezot nasion; bannla pa konn lalwa Bondie. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

148.1: Alelouya! Loue LESEGNER depi lesiel, loue li, depi lao laba dan oter.
148.2: Loue li, zot ki so bann anz; loue li, so larme divinn.
148.3: Soley ek lalinn, zot bizin loue li! Bann zetwal ki briye, zot bizin loue li!
148.4: Bann lesiel pli lao ki lesiel, bann dilo pli lao ki lesiel, zot bizin loue li!
148.5: Zot tou ansam, sant laglwar LESEGNER, parski li ti koz enn parol e li ti kree zot;
148.6: dapre so volonte zot ena zot plas permanan dan lespas e zot pakapav al andeor lalwa ki li finn fixe.
148.7: Loue LESEGNER depi lor later, zot bann mons dan lamer, tou seki dan profonder losean,
148.8: mem zekler ek lagrel, lanez ek brouyar, rafal siklonik ki ekzekit so lord, loue li!
148.9: Kolinn ek montagn, pie verze ek pie lafore,
148.10: zanimo domestik ek zanimo sovaz, reptil ek zwazo, zot bizin loue li!
148.11: Bann lerwa lor later ek tou bann pep, prins ek dirizan, zot bizin loue li!
148.12: E zot ousi, bann zennfi ek zennzan, grandimoun ansam ek zanfan.
148.13: Zot tou zot bizin sant grander LESEGNER! So nom tousel pli gran ki tou; so laglwar pli gran ki tou, li dominn later ek lesiel.
148.14: Li finn fer so pep vinn for; aster so bann fidel sant so laglwar; lepep Izrael, zotmem ki pre ar so leker. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

149.1: Alelouya! Sant enn nouvo sante pou selebre LESEGNER; Sant so laglwar dan lasanble so pep fidel.
149.2: Izrael, exprim to boner akoz to Kreater; pep Sion, montre zot lazwa, selebre zot Lerwa.
149.3: Selebre so laglwar avek bann danse, selebre so grander ar lamizik tanbourin ek laarp.
149.4: LESEGNER trouv so boner omilie so pep e li kouronn bann feb ar laviktwar.
149.5: Fer fet pou rann glwar Bondie, zot ki fidel, e pas lanwit dan rezwisans.
149.6: Sant louanz Bondie for-for, e dan zot lame zot tini lepe ki bien fite de kote,
149.7: pou konbat bann nasion, pou pini bann pep,
149.8: pou ansenn zot lerwa, pou atas bann dirizan ar boule feray,
149.9: pou ekzekit santans ki finn prononse lor zot. Samem loner tou bann fidel. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

150.1: Alelouya! Loue Bondie dan so Tanp! Loue li dan lesiel, rwayom so pwisans!
150.2: Loue li pou so bann explwa; loue li dapre so grander siprem.
150.3: Loue li avek son tronpet, loue li avek lagitar ek sitar.
150.4: Loue li ar ravann ek danse, loue li avek laarp ek laflit!
150.5: Loue li ar triyang ek ti sinbal! Loue li avek sinbal sonor.
150.6: Tou bann ki ena souf lavi, loue LESEGNER! Alelouya, anou loue LESEGNER!

1.1: Bann proverb Salomon, garson David, lerwa Izrael.
1.2: Finn ekrir sa bann proverb-la pou ansegn lasazes ek pou donn enn bon ledikasion, pou donn bann bon parol ki ekler lespri,
1.3: pou montre kouma pou viv enn lavi drwat, pou pratik lazistis ek viv onet;
1.4: pou ed bann ignoran pran prekosion, pou donn bann zenes konesans ek kapasite pou reflesi.
1.5: Si kikenn deza saz, les li ekoute kanmem, pou so konesans ogmante; mem si kikenn deza ena disernman, sa pou ed li viv enn lavi drwat;
1.6: li ava aprann bann proverb ek zot sinifikasion; li ava konpran parol bann saz ek zot sans.
1.7: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER, samem komansman konesans; zis bann vantar ki ignor lasazes ek bon ledikasion.
1.8: Mo zanfan, ekout konsey to papa, pa rezet lansegnman to mama.
1.9: Zot pou kouma enn kouronn lor to latet; kouma enn zoli kolie otour to likou.
1.10: Mo zanfan, si move dimoun rod tant twa, pa rant dan zot piez.
1.11: Si zot dir twa: “Vinn ar nou pou atak antret ek pou vers disan; vinn kasiet ar nou pou nou tom lor bann inosan e touy zot par plezir.
1.12: Anou aval zot antie; fer zot rant dan zot tom enn fwa.
1.13: Nou pou vinn ris ar zot bann dibien; nou pou ranpli nou lakaz ar lobze kokin.
1.14: Partner, rant dan nou korom, kan nou kas-fann # 1:14 Partaz kas. , twa osi to pou gagn to par.”
1.15: Mo zanfan, pa mars lor zot sime, evit pran zot larout.
1.16: Zot pe prese pou al fer krim, zot pe degaze pou vers disan.
1.17: Initil to met latrap pou may zwazo, kan zwazo la pe trouv twa.
1.18: Bann move dimoun atak antret; marke-garde, zot prop disan ki pou verse. Zot kasiet pou touy bann inosan, me zot prop lavi ki pou menase.
1.19: Ala ki manier bann ki vinn ris par violans pou fini: rises ki zot gagne dan krim pou pran zot prop lavi.
1.20: Lasazes pe kriye for-for dan lari; So lavwa domine dan bann plas piblik.
1.21: Li pe kriye dan tapaz lavil; Dan lantre lavil, li pe dir:
1.22: “Bann bet, Komie letan ankor zot pou kontan zot betiz? Komie letan ankor bann insolan pou kontign insilte? Komie letan ankor bann inbesil pou ignor konesans?
1.23: Pran kont mo bann repros, mo ava donn twa mo konesans; mo ava grav mo parol dan to leker.
1.24: Kan mo finn apel zot, zot pa finn ekoute; Kan mo finn ouver mo lebra, zot finn vir zot ledo;
1.25: zot pa finn aksepte mo bann konsey; e zot finn rezet mo bann repros.
1.26: Fer atansion! Mwa ki pou riy zot kan zot pou dan maler; Mo pou boufonn zot kan zot pou dan lafreyer.
1.27: Kan panik tom lor zot kouma siklonn, Kan katastrof sezi zot kouma tanpet, Kan traka ek detres anglouti zot,
1.28: lerla, zot pou rod mo led, me mo pa pou reponn; zot pou rod mo sekour, me zot pa pou trouv mwa.
1.29: Parski zot ti ignor konesans, e zot ti refiz respekte LESEGNER .
1.30: Zot finn rezet mo konsey; e zot finn ignor mo bann repros.
1.31: Asterla, zot pou pey konsekans zot betiz, zot pou degout zot lavi ar zot bann move aksion.
1.32: Bann ti-lespri pou mor dan zot mesanste, bann fezer pou detrir ar zot prop lorgey.
1.33: Me seki ekout mo parol, li pou an-sekirite, li pou viv lwin ar maler e dan trankilite.”

2.1: Mo zanfan, pran kont mo parol; gard mo bann instriksion kouma enn trezor.
2.2: Ouver to zorey ekout lasazes, e grav so mesaz dan to leker.
2.3: Wi, kontign sipliye pou to gagn disernman, pa aret insiste pou to gagn konpreansion.
2.4: Mo zanfan, rod lasazes kouma larzan, resers li kouma enn trezor.
2.5: Lerla, to pou konn respekte LESEGNER e vremem, to ava konn Bondie.
2.6: Parski LESEGNER , limem lasours lasazes, so parol donn konesans ek disernman.
2.7: Li enn gran proteksion pou dimoun drwat; li enn boukliye pou dimoun onet.
2.8: Li vey sime bann ki fer lazistis, li protez larout so bann fidel.
2.9: Si to pran kont tousala, lerla, to pou konn ladrwatir ek lazistis, to pou konpran lonette ek bon manier viv.
2.10: Alor, lasazes pou ranpli to leker, konesans pou ranpli to lespri ar lazwa.
2.11: Lerla, to bon rezonnman pou gid twa, to disernman pou protez twa.
2.12: Li pou anpes twa mars lor sime lemal, li pou prezerv twa kont bann manter,
2.13: kont bann ki abandonn sime lazistis, e ki mars dan sime marenwar.
2.14: Zot gagn plezir dan fer pese, ek lazwa dan fer lemal;
2.15: Zot finn swazir sime traver, e zot konportman pa drwat.
2.16: Me twa, pa les twa rant dan siro bann move fam, bann fam move lavi ki anbobinn bon dimoun ar zot parol dou.
2.17: Zot abandonn zot mari marye, e zot pa respekte serman sakre zot maryaz.
2.18: Si to swiv sime so lakaz, to pou al trouv lamor; Si to mars lor so larout, to pou al dan marenwar.
2.19: Seki al kot li, zot gagn sime rantre, me pena sime sorti; zot pa pou kapav retourn dan sime lavi.
2.20: Alor, swiv sime bon dimoun, e imit bann ki pratik lazistis.
2.21: Zis bann dimoun drwat ki pou viv dan nou pei; zis bann dimoun ki lame prop # 2:21 “Lame prop” vedir bann dimoun ki “san repros”. , ki pou res isi.
2.22: Bann malfeter pou bizin lev pake ale; Bann tret pou bizin demenaze.

3.1: Mo zanfan, pa bliye mo lansegnman, dan fon to leker, to ava gard mo bann komannman.
3.2: Koumsa, to pou viv lontan e to pou ere dan to lavi.
3.3: Pa les sinserite ek fidelite kit twa; Atas zot otour to likou; grav zot dan to leker.
3.4: Alor, Bondie ek bann dimoun pou kontan twa, e zot pou estim twa.
3.5: Zame pa krwar ki to enn gran koneser; me fer LESEGNER konfians ar tou to leker.
3.6: Rekonet li dan tou to proze, e li pou ekler to sime.
3.7: Zame pa krwar ki to tro saz; me respekte LESEGNER ek evit lemal.
3.8: Sa pou geri to blesir; sa pou fortifie to lekor.
3.9: Glorifie LESEGNER ar tou seki to posede; ofer li premie rekolt to karo.
3.10: Lerla, to grenie pou garni ar manze; to damzann pou ranpli ar divin.
3.11: Mo zanfan, pa mepriz disiplinn LESEGNER ; pa vir ledo ar so repros;
3.12: parski LESEGNER koriz sa enn ki li kontan-la; parey kouma enn paran koriz zanfan ki li prefere.
3.13: Li ere sa dimoun ki dekouver lasazes la; e ki ena lintelizans pou konpran.
3.14: Seki lasazes donn li, pli presie ki larzan, e so valer pli for ki lor.
3.15: Lasazes pli presie ki bann bizou gran valer, li pli inportan ki tou seki enn dimoun kapav dezire dan so leker.
3.16: Enn kote, li ed nou pou viv lontan; lot kote, li donn nou larises ek loner.
3.17: Li enn gran plezir pou mars lor sime lasazes, so bann santie donn lazwa ek lape.
3.18: Lasazes kouma enn pie ki donn lavi bann ki trap li; bann ki konn gard lasazes, pou apel zot bienere.
3.19: LESEGNER , dan so sazes, finn kre later; avek so konesans, li finn kre lesiel.
3.20: Par so kapasite, li finn fer dilo souterin sourse, e li finn fer niaz devers lapli.
3.21: Mo zanfan, atas twa ar lasazes ek lintelizans; Pa les zot kit twa enn pous.
3.22: Zot pou donn twa enn zoli lavi; zot pou kouma enn kolie gran valer otour to likou.
3.23: Lerla, to sime pou kler ek sir, e to lipie pa pou kogn ar ros.
3.24: Ler to pe alonze, to pa pou gagn per; e lor to lili, to pou dormi trankil.
3.25: Pa bizin per kan tanpet bate; pa trakase kan siklonn kraz lor bann move dimoun.
3.26: LESEGNER pou protez twa; li pou anpes to lipie rant dan piez.
3.27: Zame pa refiz ed bann dimoun ki merite; fer dibien tank to kapav.
3.28: Pa dir to vwazin: “pase plitar,” kan to bien kapav ed li asterlamem.
3.29: Pa tir plan pou fer ditor to vwazin, ki viv pre kot twa e ki fer twa konfians.
3.30: Pa tir lay ar enn dimoun ki zame finn fer twa ditor.
3.31: Pa zalou enn dimoun violan, e pa swiv so manier.
3.32: LESEGNER deteste pese bann dimoun move, me li estim bann ki onet.
3.33: LESEGNER modi fami bann move dimoun; me li beni fami bann ki viv dan drwatir.
3.34: Li mepriz bann vantar ek bann arogan; me li donn so faver bann ki mars dan limilite.
3.35: Bann saz gagn loner ek bon repitasion; Bann vantar fini dan laont.

4.1: Mo zanfan, ekout konsey to paran; fer atansion, e to pou gagn disernman.
4.2: Mo pe donn twa bon konsey; pa les li glise ale kouma dilo lor bredsonz.
4.3: Mwa osi mo ti enn ti-garson pou mo papa; Mo mama ti gat mwa kouma enn zanfan inik.
4.4: Mo papa ti ansegn mwa, e ti dir mwa: “Grav mo bann parol dan to leker; rapel bien mo konsey e to pou viv bien.
4.5: Rod touzour lasazes ek disernman; pa vir ledo ar mo bann parol.
4.6: Pa abandonn lasazes e li pou protez twa; kontan li e li pou vey lor twa.
4.7: Pou to vinn saz, devlop lasazes dan twa; rod disernman, parski li pli inportan ki tou seki to posede.
4.8: Kontan lasazes e to pou vinn inportan. Ser li for, napa large, e to pou gagn loner.
4.9: Lasazes pou kouma enn girland zoli fler lor to fron; li pou kouma enn zoli kouronn lor to latet.”
4.10: Mo zanfan, ekout mwa; pran kont mo parol, e to pou viv lontan.
4.11: Mo finn ansegn twa sime lasazes; mo finn gid twa lor larout ladrwatir.
4.12: Ler to fer demars pou fer kitsoz, laport pou ouver pou twa; ler to fer to proze, pa pou ena baryer lor to sime. # 4:12 Konpar sa verse la avek Zob 18:7.
4.13: Gard dan to memwar lansegnman ki to finn gagne; napa les li sape. Vey li bien, kouma to vey to prop lavi.
4.14: Pa imit bann move dimoun; pa azir kouma bann malfeter.
4.15: Mo piti! Pa frekant zot sime; pran lot direksion, e kontign to larout.
4.16: Bann move dimoun pa kapav dormi tanki zot pa fer lemal; zot pa gagn somey tanki zot pa fer enn dimoun ditor.
4.17: Zot viv ar mesanste kouma zot dipin; zot pran laviolans kouma zot divin.
4.20: Zanfan, pran kont mo parol; ekout bien mo bann konsey;
4.21: gard to lizie fixe lor zot; grav zot dan fon to leker.
4.22: Tou seki met mo bann parol ek mo bann konsey an-pratik, zot pou viv enn bon lavi; zot pa pou met malad dan zot lekor.
4.23: Vey bien bann panse ki sorti dan to leker; samem lasours lavi.
4.24: Pa les mansonz sorti dan to labous; pa les to lalang bate pou koz ninport.
4.25: Fixe to lizie drwat divan twa; pa les to regar fann de kote.
4.26: Get bien kot to met to lipie; lerla, to sir to pa pou kogne.
4.27: Pa devie ni adrwat ni agos; pa koste ar sime lemal.

5.1: Mo zanfan, pran kont mo bann parol sazes; ouver zorey pou ekout mo bann konsey.
5.2: Koumsa, to pou gagn disernman; e bann bon parol pou sorti dan to labous.
5.3: Fer atansion! Enn fam adilter, dan so labous, koumadir ena dimiel; so koze pli dou ki siro.
5.4: Me alafin, li vinn amer kouma mazanbron # 5:4 Mazanbron: Enn plant ki bien amer. ; li fite kouma kouto mousana # 5:4 Kouto mousana: Enn kouto ki koup de kote. .
5.5: Si to swiv li, li pou trenn twa dan lamor; so sime desann direk dan lafos.
5.6: Li pa finn swazir sime lavi; li pa mem kone ki li dan sime perdision.
5.7: Asterla, mo piti, ekout mwa; pa rezet mo konsey.
5.8: Pa koste ar fam move lavi; pa les laport so lakaz tant twa.
5.9: Sinon, to pou perdi to repitasion; e bann dimoun san-pitie pou tir to lavi.
5.10: Lerla, bann etranze ki pou profit to rises; lezot ki pou zwir dibien ki to finn ramase ar to laswer.
5.11: Finalman, kan maladi pou devor to lekor; kan to trouv to lavi pe ale, to pou plengne.
5.12: Lerla, to pou dir: “Kifer mo finn vir ledo ar bann avertisman? Kifer mo pa finn pran kont bann repros?
5.13: Mo finn ignor parol mo bann edikater; mo finn rezet bann instriksion mo profeser.
5.14: Asterla, mo dan bor presipis; mo loner finn rwine dan lasosiete.”
5.15: Dan to lakaz, to fam kouma enn lasours dilo kler ki prop. Pa al bwar andeor! Kot tomem ena enn basin dilo fre; rafresi twa.
5.16: Pa kit to semans dan tou kwin lari; oubien dan bann plas piblik.
5.17: Rezerv to plezir zis pou to fam; pa partaz li avek bann etranze.
5.18: To fam marye, li kouma enn lasours beni; zwir lavi ek trouv to lazwa ar li.
5.19: To fam ena enn bon leker, li enn bote; ki so lekor atir twa, ki so lamour rann twa fou.
5.20: Napa rod plezir ar bann fam move lavi; pa les twa atire ar lekor enn fam ki tronp so mari.
5.21: Pa bliye, LESEGNER trouv tou seki bann imin fer; li okouran tou zot bann aksion.
5.22: Bann malfeter may dan latrap zot prop erer; zot tas dan file zot prop pese.
5.23: Zot pou perdi lavi parski zot mank disiplinn; zot pou al dan perdision parski zot foli tro gran.

6.1: Mo zanfan, si to finn dibout garanti pou enn vwazin, savedir ki to finn donn to parol.
6.2: To prop labous finn piez twa; to prop parol finn koulout twa.
6.3: To finn vinn esklav enn kaser. Alor, ala seki to bizin fer: Pa tike, al get li ek sipliy li.
6.4: Pa les somey trap twa; Pa les to popier vinn lour.
6.5: Galoupe kouma enn serf divan so predater; Ras lavi # 6:5 “Ras lavi”, li enn expresion kreol ki vedir: Galoup vit pou sov to lavi. kouma enn zwazo divan zarm saser.
6.6: Twa ki pares, obzerv enn fourmi; fer kouma li, e to pou vinn saz.
6.7: Enn fourmi pena sef; li pena ni formenn ni patron.
6.8: Pourtan, li ramas manze dan lete; li ranpli so grenie dan bon sezon.
6.9: Ala to pares la! Ziska kan to pou res lor to lili? Kan to pou deside pou fer enn mouv?
6.10: To kas enn ti somey, to fer enn ti lasies; to kas enn poz, to krwaz to lebra.
6.11: Letansa, lamizer pou tom lor twa kouma enn voler. Lafin, laswaf pou atak twa kouma enn bandi.
6.12: Voryen ek malfeter, pas zot letan fann mansonz.
6.13: Zot pez lizie, zot pil lipie, e zot klak ledwa pou anbet zot viktim.
6.14: Zot tir plan modi ar lespri malsin; kot zot pase zot fann dezord.
6.15: Akoz sa, maler pou tom lor zot antret; okenn remed pa pou sap zot lavi.
6.20: Mo zanfan, gard bann komannman to papa; pa bliye bann bon konsey to mama.
6.21: Grav zot touletan dan fon to leker; atas zot otour to likou.
6.22: Kan to marse, zot pou gid twa; kan to dormi, zot pou vey lor twa; e kan to leve, zot pou konsey twa.
6.23: Bann komannman-la kouma enn lalanp dan marenwar; bann lansegnman-la kouma enn lalimier dan lobskirite. Bann repros ek disiplinn pou ouver sime lavi pou twa.
6.24: Zot pou protez twa kont fam move lavi; Zot pou prezerv twa kont bann parol dimiel fam adilter.
6.25: Pa les to leker atire ar so bote; Pa les twa gate ar so regar.
6.26: Enn prostitie kapav donn twa so lekor pou enn bouse manze; me avek fam enn lot zom, to kapav perdi to lavi.
6.27: Si kikenn sarye labrez dan so pos, eski so linz pa pou pran dife?
6.28: Si kikenn mars lor dife, eski so lipie pa pou brile?
6.29: Li parey pou enn zom ki dormi ar fam so prosin; si li fer sa, so konsekans pou bien ser.
6.30: Kan kikenn kokin, zis pou kalme so lafin, nou pa tro blam li;
6.31: me si proprieter may li, so santans sever. Li pou konfiske tou seki li posede.
6.32: Me enn zom ki komet adilter, li finn perdi larezon; kan li fer sa, li detrir so prop lavi.
6.33: Sa zom-la pou gagn bate, e so repitasion pou gate; touletan li pou viv dan laont ek dezoner.
6.34: Enn zom, kan so fam tronp li, li zalou e li ankoler; lerla, so vanzans pou terib.
6.35: Li pa pou aksepte dedomazman; okenn kado, ser kouma li ser, pa pou tengn so koler.

7.1: Mo zanfan, pa bliye mo parol; gard mo bann komannman dan profon to leker.
7.2: Si to gard mo bann komannman, to pou viv lontan; gard mo bann lansegnman kouma to pli gran trezor.
7.3: Gard zot touletan, kouma enn bag dan to ledwa; grav zot lor lardwaz to leker.
7.4: Pran lasazes kouma to prop ser; konsider disernman kouma to meyer kamarad.
7.5: Lasazes ek disernman pou protez twa kont bann fam ki amenn move lavi. Fam adilter ena bann parol dimiel; lasazes ek disernman pou protez twa kont zot.
7.6: Enn fwa, kot lafnet dan mo lakaz, mo pe get deor.
7.7: Mo pe obzerv bann zennzan ale-vini. Zot paret san lexperyans; parmi, ena enn ti zenes san bonsans.
7.8: Li pe pas kot enn lakrwaze. Ayo! Mo trouv li pran sime lakaz enn fam adilter.
7.9: Soley finn kouse, aswar pe vini; pe fer deplizanpli som.
7.10: Mo trouv enn fam koste ar li; so labiyman extra sexi; enn sou laont li pena.
7.11: Li koz for-for ek li san pider. So lipie grate dan lakaz, li pa kapav res anplas.
7.12: Timama dan lari, timama kot bazar; li nek veye dan tou ti kwin lari pou piez bann ti zenes.
7.13: Li may tilom la, li anbras li; e li dir li avek enn lasirans:
7.14: “Mo ti ena enn sakrifis aksiondegras pou ofer; mo finn tini mo promes zordi. Mo ena bon laviann kot mwa # 7:14 Kan ti ofer enn sakrifis aksiondegras, enn parti laviann la ti ofer Bondie. Seki ti ofer sakrifis la ti bizin manz lot parti la. Li ti bizin manz tou, mem zour, oubien lendeme sakrifis-la. Get Levitik 7: 11 - 17. .
7.15: Mo ti pe rod twa partou; to mem ki mo bizin; aster mo finn trouv twa, mo bien kontan.
7.16: Mo finn prepar mo lili avek enn zoli dra; mo dra exotik, an-lin ki sorti Lezip.
7.17: Mo finn parfim mo lili, avek parfin lamir, lalwes ek kanel.
7.18: Vinn ar mwa! Anou dormi ansam ziska gramatin. Les nou profit sa plezir la ansam.
7.19: Pa traka twa, mo mari pa la; li finn al an-vwayaz pou enn long letan.
7.20: Li finn sarye boukou lamone; li pa pou retourne avan plennlinn.”
7.21: Fam-la reysi met tilom dan siro; li atir li ar so bann parol dou.
7.22: Ti zenes-la nek swiv li deswit; li ale, kouma enn bef pe al labatwar, so latet bese koumadir serf pe al rant dan piez,
7.23: ziska ki enn dibwa pwint transpers so lekor. Li kouma enn zwazo ki pe fons dan file; li pa kone ki so lavi andanze.
7.24: Asterla, mo piti, ekout mwa bien; ekout bien sak parol ki mo pe dir:
7.25: Pa les to leker derape lor so sime, pa les to lipie egare dan so lale.
7.26: Boukou finn zwenn tase avan twa; boukou finn trouv lamor, mem si zot ti for.
7.27: Si to rant dan so lakaz, koumadir to finn pas par laport lamor; li amenn twa direk dan lemond bann mor.

8.1: Ekoute! Lasazes pe kriye for-for; disernman pe lev so lavwa.
8.2: Lor bann oter, dan bor sime lor lakrwaze, lasazes pe diboute.
8.3: Dan lantre lavil, divan bann laport, li pe kriye:
8.4: “Ekout mwa, tou imin ki lor later; mo pe lans zot tou enn lapel:
8.5: Zot, bann ti-lespri, aprann gagn disernman; zot ki ankor bet, aprann vinn intelizan.
8.6: Ouver zorey! Ekoute! Tou seki mo pe dir inportan; mo pou pronons bann parol sir.
8.7: Dan mo labous, laverite ki koule; mo lalev deteste tou koze mansonz.
8.8: Mo pe dir zot bann parol laverite; mo pa koz manti ek mo pa tronp dimoun.
8.9: Bann ki ena lespri trouv mo bann parol kler; bann ki ena bon konesans trouv mo koze korek.
8.10: Swazir mo bann lansegnman; zot vo plis ki larzan; swazir osi konesans; li vo plis ki lor pir.
8.11: Mwa, lasazes, mo ena plis valer ki bann bizou; mo pli presie ki tou seki zot kapav dezire.”
8.12: Mwa, lasazes, mo viv avek prekosion; mo devlop konesans atraver boukou refleksion.
8.13: Kan nou respekte LESEGNER , nou deteste lemal. Mwa, lasazes, mo deteste lorgey ek larogans; mo pa siport lemal ek mansonz.
8.14: Mo donn bon konsey ek bon rezonnman, mo ena boukou pwisans ek disernman.
8.15: Grasa mwa, bann lerwa regne; grasa mwa, bann dirizan pas bon lalwa.
8.16: Grasa mwa, bann dirizan gouverne; e bann ziz rann bon zizman.
8.17: Mo kontan seki kontan mwa; e bann ki fer zefor rod mwa, pou trouv mwa.
8.18: Mwa ki donn larises ek loner; mwa ki donn prosperite ek bann dibien ki dire.
8.19: Kado mo done vo plis ki lor, mem lor ki pli bon kalite; mo bann don vo boukou plis ki larzan meyer kalite.
8.20: Mo mars lor sime ladrwatir, lor sime lazistis.
8.21: Mo donn larises seki kontan mwa; mo ranpli zot kof ar trezor.
8.22: LESEGNER ti kre mwa dan komansman; mo premie parmi so bann aksion ki li finn fer, ena bien lontan.
8.23: Ena bien lontan, avan mem ki later ti existe, LESEGNER ti kre mo lekzistans.
8.24: Kan mo ti pran nesans, pa ti ankor ena losean; pa ti ankor ena lasours ek labondans dilo.
8.25: Mo ti la, avan ki ti donn bann montagn zot form; avan ki ti met bann kolinn anplas.
8.26: Li ti kre mwa avan ki li ti kre later ek bann plantasion; e avan ki ti ena premie grin lapousier.
8.27: Kan li ti kre lesiel, kan li ti tras lorizon lor lamer, mo ti la.
8.28: Kan li ti met bann niaz dan lesiel; kan li ti ouver robine lasours dilo, mo ti la.
8.29: Kan li ti tras frontier lamer, anpes li depas so limit; kan li ti plas bann fondasion later, mo ti la.
8.30: Mo ti touzour akote li, kouma enn arsitek; touletan, mo ti fer tou pou fer li plezir; e so prezans ti donn mwa enn gran lazwa.
8.31: Li enn gran plezir viv dan lemond ki li finn kre; li enn gran lazwa viv kot bann imin.
8.32: Asterla, ekout mwa mo bann zanfan: bienere zot, ki mars dan mo sime.
8.33: Ekout mo bann konsey; zame pa rezet bann konsey-la, e zot pou vinn saz.
8.34: Zot bienere, tou dimoun ki ekout mo parol; seki toulezour divan mo laport, e seki touletan dan lantre mo lakaz.
8.35: Sa enn ki aksepte mwa la, li ava viv lontan; e li ava gagn faver LESEGNER ;
8.36: Me dimoun ki rezet mwa, li fer limem dimal; dimoun ki pa kontan mwa, li kontan lamor.

9.1: Lasazes finn konstrir so lakaz; li finn met set kolonn tini li.
9.2: Li finn prepar laviann ek divin; li finn dres so latab pou festin.
9.3: Li finn avoy so bann servant kriye dan bann plas piblik:
9.4: “Zot ki ignoran, vinn par isi! Zot ki ti-lespri, lasazes pe dir zot:
9.5: Vini, vini! Vinn manz mo dipin; vinn bwar divin ki mo finn prepare.
9.6: Aret fer kouma ignoran, e zot pou viv lontan; mars lor sime disernman!”
9.7: Kan to koriz enn insolan, to gagn maltrete; kan to kritik enn move dimoun, to gagn insilte.
9.8: Pa kritik enn insolan; li pou deteste twa. Me si to pas enn remark enn saz, li pou kontan twa.
9.9: Konsey enn saz, e li pou vinn pli saz; ansegn enn dimoun drwat, e li pou vinn pli intelizan.
9.10: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER , samem komansman lasazes # 9:10 Konpar proverb 1:7. ; si to konn Sa Enn ki sin-la, to deza ena bon zizman.
9.11: Wi! Mwa, lasazes ki pe dir sa! Ar mwa, to pou viv pli lontan; to lavi pou vinn pli long par boukou lane.
9.12: Si to saz, twa ki pou gagn lavantaz; me si to viv dan linsolans, to pou bizin pey konsekans.
9.13: Stipidite, li kouma enn fam ki fer tapaz dan vid; li enn ignoran ek li pa konpran.
9.14: Li nek kas poz divan lakaz, oubien kot bazar lor baz.
9.15: Li vey lokazion pou apel bann pasan ki dan zot lokipasion.
9.16: Li dir ar bann ignoran: “Vinn fer enn letour kot mwa!” Li dir ar bann ti-lespri:
9.17: “Dilo ki pa pou twa, so gou pli dou; Manze ki to manz an-sekre gagn pli bon gou.”
9.18: Me so bann viktim pa kone ki laba, kot li, ena lamor ki pe fer letour; bann ki finn rant kot li avan, zot deza dan lemond bann mor.

10.1: Bann zanfan saz fer leker zot paran kontan; zanfan bet fer leker zot paran fermal.
10.2: Rises mal-gagne fer lavi amer; me enn lavi onet tir twa dan piez lamor.
10.3: LESEGNER pa pou les bon dimoun mordefin; me li pou anpes bann malfeter akonpli zot move dezir.
10.4: Lame enn dimoun pares amenn lamizer; me lame enn bon travayer amenn larises.
10.5: Li enn loner pou dimoun ki rekolte dan bon sezon; me li enn laont pou dimoun ki dormi dan sezon rekolt.
10.6: Benediksion pou lor latet bann bon dimoun; me laviolans sort dan labous bann leker sal.
10.7: Souvenir enn bon dimoun rann nou ere. Me kan enn malfeter mor, bien vit nou bliye so nom.
10.8: Dimoun saz ek rezonab ekout bon konsey; me enn bet ki koz ninport fini dan presipis.
10.9: Dimoun onet viv an-sekirite; me bann malonet zwenn tase.
10.10: Dimoun ki pez lizie pou anbet lezot, amenn problem; bann ki pa per pou korize, amenn lape.
10.11: Parol bon dimoun kouma enn lasours ki donn lavi; me parol enn malfeter kasiet boukou violans.
10.12: Laenn alim dife; lamour pardonn erer.
10.13: Bann dimoun intelizan pronons bann bon parol; me bann ki koz ninport merit enn pinision.
10.14: Dimoun ki saz gard konesans kouma enn trezor; me kan ti-lespri koze, larwinn zame lwin.
10.15: Dibien enn ris protez li kouma enn fortres; lamizer enn pov ronz li kouma karya.
10.16: Lapey enn dimoun onet amenn nouvo lavi; lapey enn dimoun malonet servi pou fer pese.
10.17: Seki ekoute kan koriz li, li progrese lor sime lavi; seki zame aksepte so erer, li perdi so sime.
10.18: Seki kasiet laenn dan so leker, li enn manter; e seki fann fos rimer, li enn palabrer.
10.19: Plis to koz boukou, plis to ena risk fer pese; enn saz konn kontrol so lalang.
10.20: Parol enn bon dimoun, li kouma metal presie; lespri dimoun malsin, li kouma enn drom vid.
10.21: Parol bann zis, nouri boukou dimoun; me bann bet mor par zot prop betiz.
10.22: Benediksion LESEGNER amenn larises; me pa latristes # 10:22 Me pa latristes: Ena tradiksion dir: “Zis travay dir pa fer twa vinn pli ris.” .
10.23: Dimoun ti-lespri gagn plezir dan pratik lemal; dimoun ki ena rezonnman gagn plezir dan pratik lasazes.
10.24: Dimoun drwat gagn seki zot dezire; move dimoun gagn seki zot plis per.
10.25: Tanpet vini, move dimoun anvole; me bon dimoun touletan reziste.
10.26: Dimoun pares minn zot anplwayer, parey kouma lafime bril lizie, e vineg fer ledan grinse.
10.27: Dimoun ki respekte LESEGNER pou viv pli lontan; me bann malfeter pou mor avan ler.
10.28: Lespwar bon dimoun donn zot lazwa; move dimoun pena lavenir ditou.
10.29: LESEGNER protez bann bon dimoun ar pwisans; me li detrir bann dimoun ki fer lemal.
10.30: Dimoun drwat pou viv an-sekirite; dimoun traver pou zwenn tase.
10.31: Bann dimoun drwat koz langaz lasazes; me bann ki ena lalang manter pou gagn pinision.
10.32: Parol bann bon dimoun fer plezir; mansonz bann move dimoun fer soufer.

11.1: LESEGNER deteste bann ki fos zot balans; me sa fer li plezir kan servi enn pwa ki zis.
11.2: Lorgey atir dezoner; me limilite atir lasazes.
11.3: Enn bon dimoun mars touzour dan lonette; me enn malonet mor ar so prop mesanste.
11.4: Kan Bondie pou rann so zizman, to rises pa pou sov twa; me lonette ek fidelite kapav prezerv to lavi.
11.5: Enn dimoun onet pratik lazistis e so sime drwat; me enn malonet fouy so prop tom.
11.6: Lonette enn bon dimoun pou sap so lavi; me enn malonet pou may dan so prop piez.
11.7: Kan enn move dimoun mor, so lespwar osi anvole; konfians ki li ti ena dan so rises, disparet kouma lafime.
11.8: Enn dimoun ki drwat ek fidel, pa pou gagn problem; me move dimoun atir traka lor limem.
11.9: Parol move dimoun amenn larwinn lor so prosin; me lexperyans enn saz tir li dan petrin.
11.10: Kan bon dimoun prospere, lepep selebre; e kan move dimoun mor, lepep dir: “granmersi.”
11.11: Bann bon dirizan atir benediksion Bondie, ek pei progrese; me mansonz bann move dirizan devir pei anbalao.
11.12: To bet, si to fer vantar ar to prosin; bann dimoun ki ena disernman kone kan bizin res trankil.
11.13: Enn dimoun palab pou devwal to sekre; enn dimoun sinser merit to konfians.
11.14: Enn nasion san direksion pou tom dan nwar; kan ena boukou bon konseye, laviktwar asire.
11.15: Pa dibout garan pou enn etranze, to pou regrete; to lavi pou pli trankil si to refize.
11.16: Enn zoli fam ki viv bien gagn loner; enn zom debrouyar gagn rises.
11.17: Bann bon dimoun pou gagn zot rekonpans; bann malfeter atir zot prop maler.
11.18: Bann move dimoun travay pou nanye; dimoun ki fer dibien, enn zour pou dan bien.
11.19: Seki res ferm dan sime lazistis pou viv; me seki galoup deryer lemal pou mor.
11.20: LESEGNER deteste bann dimoun ki ena leker sal; me bann ki viv drwat fer li plezir.
11.21: Marke-garde, move dimoun pou gagn pinision; me bon dimoun pa pou konn kondanasion.
11.22: Enn zoli fam ki pena bonsans, so bote kouma enn bizou lor nene koson.
11.23: Enn bon dimoun dezir zis seki bon; enn malfeter atir touzour lakoler lezot.
11.24: Ena ki donn avek bon leker, e zot vinn pli ris; ena ki peng # 11:24 Peng vedir “pa kontan partaze” oubien “pa kontan depanse.” , me zot vinn pli pov.
11.25: Dimoun ki zenere pou prospere; seki donn lezot enn ver dilo, zame pa pou gagn swaf.
11.26: Lepep modi bann komersan ki atann pri monte pou vande; me zot onor marsan ki pa get zis profi.
11.27: Dimoun ki fer dibien gagn faver; me seki pratik lemal gagn maler.
11.28: Seki met zot konfians dan zot rises, zot pou tonbe kouma fey sek; me bann fidel pou prospere kouma enn pie ki so feyaz touzour ver.
11.29: Seki fer so fami soufer, li pou gob ler. Bann ti-lespri touletan pou esklav bann saz.
11.30: Enn bon dimoun, li kouma enn pie ki donn lavi; me laviolans, souvan amenn lamor.
11.31: Si bon dimoun gagn rekonpans lor later, bann malfeter ek bann peser osi pou rekolte seki zot seme.

12.1: Bann dimoun ki anvi aprann, zot aksepte disiplinn; me bann bet pa aksepte repros.
12.2: LESEGNER donn so faver bann bon dimoun; me li kondann bann ki tir plan pou fer lemal.
12.3: Pratik lemal pa garanti sekirite; me dimoun drwat ena stabilite.
12.4: Enn bon fam, li kouma enn kouronn lor latet so mari; enn fam infidel, li kouma enn kanser dan lezo so mari.
12.5: Dimoun onet ena touzour bon lintansion; konsey enn malfeter met dimoun dan perdision.
12.6: Parol bann move dimoun kouma bann piez mortel; me parol dimoun drwat amenn delivrans.
12.7: Move dimoun fini mal, li pa les okenn tras; me fami dimoun drwat res bien solid.
12.8: Enn dimoun intelizan gagn ladmirasion; dimoun leker sal zame pou ena rezon.
12.9: Preferab res sinp e travay pou roul lakouzinn; olie met dan zar, me vant pe kriy lafaminn.
12.10: Bon dimoun okip bien zot zanimo; me move dimoun maltret seki pou zot.
12.11: Enn planter ki travay dir, so grenie ranpli; enn inbesil perdi letan ar tou seki initil.
12.12: Move dimoun rod rises mal-gagne; me bon dimoun zame mank manze.
12.13: Move dimoun pieze ar zot prop mansonz; dimoun onet konn evit maler.
12.14: Kan travay bien, gagn bon lapey; kan koz bon parol, gagn sikse.
12.15: Dimoun vantar touletan krwar zot ena rezon; me dimoun saz touletan ekout bon konsey.
12.16: Bann inbesil ankoler vit; me bann saz kontrol zot lemosion.
12.17: Enn temwin ki koz laverite amenn lazistis; mansonz enn move temwin nouri linzistis.
12.18: Parol anler fer dimal kouma lepe; me parol reflesi amenn gerizon ek lape.
12.19: Enn parol laverite res pou touzour; me enn parol mansonz res zis pou enn zour.
12.20: Ena mesanste dan leker bann dimoun ki fer lemal; me ena lazwa dan leker bann dimoun ki fer lape.
12.21: Bann dimoun ki drwat viv dan leboner; me bann malfeter antoure ar maler.
12.22: LESEGNER deteste dimoun manter; me li apresie dimoun sinser.
12.23: Dimoun edike pa fer palab; me bann bet etal zot betiz lor latab.
12.24: Dimoun ki travay dir pou gagn pouvwar; me bann pares pou vinn esklav.
12.25: Traka dan leker fer twa dekouraze; me enn bon parol fer twa soulaze.
12.26: Enn dimoun drwat donn bon konsey so prosin; me sime enn move dimoun amenn li dan petrin.
12.27: Bann dimoun pares pena nanye pou roti; me dimoun ki travay dir, touletan ena kitsoz pou kwi.
12.28: Lor sime ladrwatir, to pou viv lontan; me lor sime lemal, to pou mor kouma perdan.

13.1: Enn zanfan saz ekout konsey so papa; me enn vantar refiz rekonet so erer.
13.2: Bon dimoun rekolte fri so bon parol; bann malonet touletan swaf laviolans.
13.3: Fer bien atansion ar seki to dir e to pou prezerv to lavi; seki koz ninport san reflesi, pou zwenn tase.
13.4: Enn dimoun ki pares, so dezir zame abouti. Fer zefor! Travay dir, e tou to dezir pou realize.
13.5: Dimoun onet deteste mansonz; move dimoun fer lezot onte ar zot bann insilt.
13.6: Lonette, li enn proteksion pou bann dimoun drwat; pese bann malfeter amenn zot larwinn.
13.7: Ena ki pena nanye, me zot met dan zar, deklar risar; Ena ki ena fortinn, me zot fer krwar ki zot vant pe kriy faminn.
13.8: Bann ris servi kas pou protez zot lavi; me lavi bann pov zame pa menase.
13.9: Enn dimoun drwat, li kouma enn lalimier ki briye for-for; me enn malfeter, li kouma enn lalanp ki pe tengn.
13.10: Bann arogan nek provok dispit; me bann ki ekout konsey ena lasazes.
13.11: Larises mal-gagne pa pran letan pou evapore; me dibien ki ou ramase kouma gout lapli, pou fini par vinn enn rezervwar ki deborde.
13.12: Kan lespwar tom dan dilo, leker fermal; me kan enn rev realize, leker zwaye.
13.13: Si kikenn rezet enn bon konsey, li ava pey konsekans; me seki respekte komannman Bondie, li ava gagn rekonpans.
13.14: Lansegnman enn saz, li enn lafontenn ki donn lavi; li ed twa evit bann piez lamor.
13.15: Bon rezonnman fer twa gagn respe lezot; bann foser swiv sime perdision.
13.16: Dimoun rezonab reflesi avan azir; enn vantar fer letalaz so lignorans.
13.17: Mesaze foser amenn maler; mesaze fidel amenn bon nouvel.
13.18: Si to refiz aprann, to pou res pov e lezot pou mepriz twa; me si to aksepte koreksion enn profeser, to pou gagn loner.
13.19: Kan enn dimoun realiz so dezir, sa fer li plezir; me enn grannwar prefer res dan nwar.
13.20: Frekant dimoun saz e to pou vinn saz; me si to mars ar dimoun bet, to pou gagn problem.
13.21: Maler pourswiv bann peser; prosperite rekonpans bann fidel.
13.22: Bon dimoun kit leritaz pou tizanfan; larises bann move dimoun fini dan pos bon dimoun.
13.23: Karo abandone kapav donn malere boukou manze; me bann inzis prefer les terin anfris.
13.24: Paran ki pa koriz so zanfan pa kontan li; paran ki kontan so zanfan pa ezite pou koriz li e met li dan bon sime.
13.25: Bon dimoun manze, vant rasazie; move dimoun plengne, vant grogne.

14.1: Enn fam ki saz pran swin so fami; me enn fam bet detrir li ar so prop lame.
14.2: Dimoun ki viv enn lavi onet, respekte LESEGNER ; me seki malonet mepriz li.
14.3: Bann parol enn orgeye kouma enn baton pou bat limem; bann parol ki enn saz protez so lavi.
14.4: Si to pena toro pou labour later, to gardmanze res vid; lafors enn bef fer twa gagn bon rekolt.
14.5: Vre temwin koz laverite; fos temwin nek konn rakont mansonz.
14.6: Bann dimoun vantar zame pou vinn saz; me bann ki intelizan e reflesi, zot aprann vit.
14.7: Pa frekant bann inbesil; dan zot parol pena nanye ki bon.
14.8: Enn dimoun pridan ena lasazes, e li swazir bon sime; me lafoli enn vantar amenn li dan perdision.
14.9: Bann vantar pena laont kan zot fer pese; me bann dimoun drwat rod pardon Bondie.
14.10: Kan to leker dan lapenn, personn pa kone; kan to leker dan lazwa, personn pa kas latet.
14.11: Lakaz move dimoun fasil kraze; me lakaz bon dimoun prospere.
14.12: Fer atansion! Ena sime kapav paret bon, me alafin, to kapav trouv lamor.
14.13: Riye kapav kasiet tristes; kan lazwa vir ledo, lasagrin asize.
14.14: Move dimoun azir mal e zot pey konsekans; bon dimoun fer bon aksion e zot gagn rekonpans.
14.15: Dimoun bet, fasilman rant dan piez; dimoun pridan get bien kot li met so lipie.
14.16: Dimoun saz pran prekosion pou evit problem; ti-lespri tro prese, li bes latet, li rant dan piez.
14.17: Bann ki ankoler vit fer boukou betiz; kan ou anbet dimoun, zot deteste ou.
14.18: Bann bet erit zot betiz; bann intelizan erit konesans kouma enn kouronn.
14.19: Move dimoun pou kourbe divan bon dimoun; bann malfeter pou dimann sarite divan laport bann dimoun drwat.
14.20: Kan to mizer, dimoun vir ledo ar twa, mem to fami pa frekant twa. Me kan to ris, boukou dimoun fer kamarad ar twa!
14.21: Kan to mepriz to prosin ki gagn fin, to fer enn pese; bienere bann ki bon anver bann pov.
14.22: Dimoun ki ena move lintansion swiv sime perdision; dimoun ki ena bon santiman rekolte labonte ek fidelite.
14.23: Travay dir, e to pou gagn bien to lavi; pas to letan palabre, e to pou res dan dife.
14.24: Dimoun saz gagn larises kouma rekonpans; dimoun vantar rekolte divan.
14.25: Enn temwin sov lavi kan li koz laverite; me li enn tret kan li dir mansonz.
14.26: Kan nou respekte LESEGNER , nou sir nou pwin, e nou fami viv dan sekirite.
14.27: Respe pou LESEGNER, li enn lasours lavi; li ed twa evit bann piez mortel.
14.28: Enn gran popilasion fer laglwar enn lerwa; enn lerwa san enn pep pa vo nanye.
14.29: Si to gard to kalm, savedir to saz; si to sap lor kal vit, savedir to bet.
14.30: Kan to lespri trankil, to lekor bien; me kan to zalou, maladi ronz twa andan.
14.31: Kan fer dominer ar dimoun pov, nou insilte zot kreater; me kan pran swin bann pov, nou onor li.
14.32: Move dimoun pou kraze ar zot prop pese; bon dimoun ena lasirans, mem divan lamor.
14.33: Lasazes res dan leker enn dimoun intelizan; me li pa prezan dan leker enn vantar.
14.34: Lazistis fer laglwar enn pei; linzistis fer laont enn nasion.
14.35: Enn serviter intelizan gagn faver lerwa; me enn serviter malonet atir so koler.

15.1: Enn repons dou tengn lakoler; enn koze brit anflam laraz.
15.2: Parol enn saz fer gagn konesans; kan bann bet ouver labous, zis betiz ki sorti.
15.3: Lizie LESEGNER trouv partou; li obzerv seki bon ek seki move.
15.4: Bann zoli parol amenn lavi; koze gra fer leker fermal.
15.5: Enn inbesil pa pran kont konsey so paran; zanfan saz aksepte kan so paran met li dan bon sime.
15.6: Kan nou viv dan drwatir nou rises ogmante; kan nou viv dan pese, maler pou rwinn nou dibien.
15.7: Labous bann dimoun saz repann konesans; me bann dimoun bet ena lespri kokom.
15.8: Lapriyer bon dimoun fer LESEGNER plezir; me li deteste lofrand bann malonet.
15.9: LESEGNER deteste konportman bann move dimoun; me li kontan bann ki azir bien.
15.10: Si to swiv enn move sime, to pinision pou sever; si to deteste repros, to pou zwenn lamor.
15.11: LESEGNER okouran tou seki pase dan lemond bann mor; eski li pa pou kone ki pase dan nou leker?
15.12: Bann insolan pa kontan kan kritik zot; zame zot pa pou dimann konsey enn saz.
15.13: Kan ena lazwa dan leker, pou ena sourir lor lalev; me kan leker fermal, lespri abat.
15.14: Dimoun saz gagn swaf konesans; dimoun bet manz zis so foli.
15.15: Lavi enn pov li pa fasil me kan ena lazwa dan leker, lavi kouma enn fet.
15.16: Preferab gagn tigit, me ena respe pou LESEGNER ; ki gagn boukou avek enn ta traka.
15.17: Prefer manz enn ti repa sinp kot lamour regne; ki enn gran festin ar bann ipokrit.
15.18: Kan dimoun sof vit, dispit pran pouvwar; kan dimoun res kalm, lape gagn viktwar.
15.19: Sime bann pares ranpli ar pikan; me lor sime bann ki onet pena obstak.
15.20: Zanfan saz fer zot paran kontan; move zanfan fer zot paran plore.
15.21: Dimoun bet gagn plezir dan lafoli; dimoun rezonab mars dan enn sime drwat.
15.22: San bon konsey, to proze kapote; boukou bon konseye fer to proze avanse.
15.23: Ala nou kontan kan nou reysi donn enn bon repons; sa fer plezir kan nou koz enn bon parol zis kan bizin.
15.24: Dimoun saz pran sime ki donn lavi, pa sime ki donn lamor.
15.25: LESEGNER detrir lakaz bann orgeye, me li protez propriete bann vev.
15.26: LESEGNER deteste bann move lintansion; me li kontan bann parol amikal.
15.27: Si to galoup deryer larzan mal-gagne, to amenn problem lor to fami; si to pa pran gous, to pou viv lontan.
15.28: Bon dimoun reflesi avan reponn; me labous move dimoun koz zis parol lemal.
15.29: LESEGNER res lwin ar bann move dimoun; me li ekzos lapriyer bann bon dimoun.
15.30: Enn regar amikal fer leker kontan; enn bon nouvel fer nou repran kouraz.
15.31: Dimoun ki ekout bon konsey dan lavi, li ena so plas parmi bann saz.
15.32: Si to ignor bon konsey, to fer tomem ditor; me si to aksepte zot to vinn pli saz.
15.33: Respe pou LESEGNER fer gagn lasazes; limilite ouver laport loner.

16.1: Zom kapav fer bel-bel plan, me LESEGNER ki ena dernie mo.
16.2: Bann imin krwar ki zot pe bien azir; me LESEGNER konn bien ki ena dan zot leker.
16.3: Konfie LESEGNER to travay, li pou realiz tou to proze.
16.4: LESEGNER finn kre tou kiksoz pou enn rezon; mem bann malfeter finn kre pou zot konn zizman.
16.5: LESEGNER deteste larogans; bann arogan pou gagn zot pinision.
16.6: Dimoun ki lwayal ek fidel, so bann pese pardone; me si to respekte LESEGNER , to pou evit fer lemal.
16.7: Si to manier viv fer LESEGNER plezir, li fer to lennmi vinn to kamarad.
16.8: Preferab to gagn enn ti-kas dan lonette, ki gagn boukou kas dan fason malonet.
16.9: Bann imin fer bann plan dan zot leker; me LESEGNER ki deside seki pou arive.
16.10: Si parol enn lerwa inspire par Bondie, so zizman pou touletan korek.
16.11: Balans onet ek mezir zis, zot pou LESEGNER; li finn donn sak pwa so valer.
16.12: Lerwa deteste kan dimoun fer lemal; lazistis fer enn rwayom vinn pli for.
16.13: Lerwa apresie bann koze onet; li kontan dimoun ki koz laverite.
16.14: Enn dimoun saz fer tou pou lerwa res kalm; kan lerwa sap lor kal, lamor lor baz.
16.15: Kan lerwa dan lazwa, lavi briye dan pei; so bonte manifeste, kouma lapli ki rafresi.
