16.16: Rod lasazes plito ki lor; swazir bon rezonnman plito ki larzan.
16.17: Lespri eklere evit pran sime lemal; kan to vey to manier viv, to prezerv to lavi.
16.18: Lorgey amenn destriksion; larogans amenn larwinn.
16.19: Preferab enn lavi sinp parmi bann pov, ki pran par dan rises mal-gagne bann orgeye.
16.20: Pran bien kont seki finn montre twa, to pou konn sixe; fer LESEGNER konfians, to pou ere.
16.21: Dimoun ki ena lespri lasazes ena disernman; pli li koz bon parol, pli lezot ekout li.
16.22: Dimoun ki ena lasazes, li ena enn lasours lavi. Bann bet pou tonbe ar zot prop betiz.
16.23: Enn dimoun saz reflesi avan li koze; so bann bon parol pou konvink lezot.
16.24: Bann bon parol parey kouma dimiel; li adousi lespri e li nouri lekor.
16.25: Fer atansion! Ena sime ki paret bon, me dan so bout, to kapav zwenn lamor.
16.26: Kan enn travayer gagn fin, li bizin travay; si li pa travay, so vant res vid.
16.27: Move dimoun rod tou mwayin pou fer ditor; zot parol kouma enn dife ki devor tou.
16.28: Move lespri fann rimer pou lev lager; palabrer met dibri ant bon kamarad.
16.29: Dimoun violan anbet so prosin; li kondir zot dan sime malsin.
16.30: Atansion! Dimoun ki pez lizie konplot mesanste; seki pez lalev manigans lemal.
16.31: Enn long lavi, li enn rekonpans, enn kouronn laglwar; sa, zis bann dimoun ki azir bien ki resevwar.
16.32: Preferab ena pasians ki pouvwar. Vomie to kontrol tomem ki to sey kontrol enn lavil.
16.33: Ena get oroskop pou konn lavenir; me zis LESEGNER ki desid tou.

17.1: Li meyer manz enn bout dipin sek dan trankilite, ki enn festin dan enn lakaz ranpli ar dispit.
17.2: Enn serviter intelizan ena plis merit ki enn eritie ki ena lespri volaz; sa serviter la pou gagn enn par dan leritaz.
17.3: Nou servi dife pou teste lor ek larzan; zis LESEGNER ki kapav teste nou leker.
17.4: Enn malfeter ekout koze malang; enn manter ekout koze mansonz.
17.5: Si to mepriz bann pov, pa bliye, to pe mepriz zot kreater osi; ena pinision pou seki pran plezir dan soufrans lezot.
17.6: Bann ti-zanfan fer fierte bann granparan; bann paran fer loner zot zanfan.
17.7: Li paret drol kan enn bet koz bon koze; me li ankor pli drol kan enn dirizan koz ninport.
17.8: Ena panse kan zot donn gous koumadir zot pe fer mazik; zot krwar li enn lakle paspartou.
17.9: Si to anvi dimoun kontan twa, pardonn zot erer; si touletan to repros zot erer, to kapav dir bay-bay lamitie.
17.10: Enn ti repros ena plis lefe lor enn dimoun saz, ki san kout baton lor ledo enn bet.
17.11: Move dimoun konn zis fer ninport. Tansion! Mesaze lamor pou vinn tap so laport.
17.12: Li preferab zwenn enn mama lours ki finn perdi so piti, ki afront enn bet ki finn plonze dan so foli.
17.13: Si to rann lemal pou lebien, lemal zame pou kit to lakaz.
17.14: Komansman enn dispit li kouma enn felir dan rezervwar; aret li vit, sinon inondasion.
17.15: LESEGNER pa kontan kan fer inosan pey pou koupab, e kan fer malfeter pas pou sin.
17.16: Ki serti met larzan dan lame enn vantar? Pou li aste lasazes? Non, bonsans mem li pena.
17.17: Enn vre kamarad res fidel dan tou sirkonstans; nou fami la pou partaz nou soufrans.
17.18: Fode latet pa bon pou dibout garan, e pou pey det ou prosin.
17.19: Si to kontan sem diskord, to lavi pou dan dezord; si to orgeye, to pou zwenn tase.
17.20: Enn triser pa pou gagn valer; enn manter pou tom dan maler.
17.21: Paran ki gagn enn zanfan bet, li dan lapenn; zanfan bet met paran dan tourman.
17.22: Si lazwa dan leker, lasante pou meyer; kan traka dan lespri, lekor deperi.
17.23: Kan ziz pran gous, lalwa vinn lous.
17.24: Enn dimoun intelizan gard so regar lor lasazes; enn dimoun bet gard so latet dan niaz.
17.25: Zanfan bet met so papa dan lapenn; li rann lavi so mama amer.
17.26: Li pa bon kan fer inosan pey lamann; li inzis kan met dimoun integ dan prizon.
17.27: Dimoun ki pa koz boukou ena konesans; dimoun ki gard so kalm ena lasirans.
17.28: Mem enn bet ki gard silans pas pou enn saz; kan li ferm labous, li pas pou enn gran malin.

18.1: Dimoun egois rod so prop lintere; li ankoler kan donn li bon konsey.
18.2: Dimoun bet pa sey konpran; li rod montre ki li enn gran tenor.
18.3: Pese amenn laont; kan loner tonbe, mepri pran plas.
18.4: Ena dimoun, zot parol profon kouma losean; zot sazes kler kouma dilo lasours.
18.5: Li pa korek protez koupab; li inakseptab met inosan dan prizon.
18.6: Parol enn bagarer atir dispit, seki rod lager gagn rakle.
18.7: Kan enn vantar koze, li rwinn limem; so parol kouma enn piez pou may limem.
18.8: Ayo palab! To kouma enn gato fondan; to fondan dan pale, to glise, to desann.
18.9: Enn dimoun ki pares, li frer avek destrikter.
18.10: LESEGNER , li kouma enn latour bien solid; kot li, bon dimoun gagn lape ek sekirite.
18.11: Ena dimoun ris ki krwar zot lamone kapav protez zot, zot panse zot rises kouma enn miray fortifie.
18.12: Leker ki ranpli ar lorgey atir katastrof; me limilite atir loner.
18.13: Ekoute avan reponn, sinon to pou pas pou enn bet e to pou onte.
18.14: Kan to moral for, to konbat maladi; me si to moral ba, kouma to pou manz ar li?
18.15: Enn dimoun intelizan touletan anvi aprann; enn saz touletan anvi ekout bon lansegnman.
18.16: Si to anvi zwenn enn dimoun inportan, amenn enn kado valab e laport pou ouver.
18.17: Premie dimoun ki koze divan ziz, paret pe koz vre; me tou sanze kan so adverser koumans kestionn li.
18.18: Kouma pou aret enn dispit ant de dimoun ris dan lakour? Meyer tir lakourtpay pou departaz zot.
18.19: Pa ofans enn frer, li pou bien difisil pou to afront li apre. Dispit ferm leker, kouma verou enn laport an-fer.
18.20: Bon parol enn dimoun ranpli so vant; so zoli diskour rasazie li.
18.21: Lalang ena pouvwar, li kapav amenn lavi ouswa lamor; si to kontan koze, fer tansion konsekans.
18.22: Kan enn zom marye avek enn fam, li trouv so boner; li enn benediksion LESEGNER .
18.23: Bann pov sipliye pou gagn faver; bann ris reponn ar koler.
18.24: Parfwa kamarad vinn kamaron; me enn kamarad sinser, li kapav pli serye ki frer-ser.

19.1: Preferab pov, me onet; ki manter e bet.
19.2: Kan pa pran letan reflesi avan azir, li danzere; kan tro prese, kapav zwenn kogne.
19.3: Ena ki detrir zot lavi ar zot prop erer; apre sa, zot ankoler kont LESEGNER .
19.4: Dimoun ris, touletan gagn boukou nouvo kamarad; dimoun pov perdi so sel kamarad.
19.5: Enn zour, fos temwin pou konn kondanasion; manter pou gagn so pinision.
19.6: Setaki oule gagn faver enn dimoun bon leker; tou dimoun kamarad ar kikenn ki zenere.
19.7: Si dimoun mizer gagn rezete par so prop frer, zize aster kouma so bann kamarad pou fer ar li! Li fer tou pou koz ar zot, me so parol tom dan dilo.
19.8: Aprann gagn lasazes e to pou viv ere; viv ek disernman e to pou prospere.
19.9: Enn zour, fos temwin pou gagn seki li merite; bann manter napa pou sape.
19.10: Li drol kan enn dimoun bet viv dan lix; me li pli drol kan enn serviter diriz so sef.
19.11: Dimoun rezonab kontrol so koler; kan li pardonn lezot, li gagn plis loner.
19.12: Kan lerwa ankoler tou dimoun gagn per; me so bonte kouma laroze ki rafresi lerb ver.
19.13: Zanfan malelve met papa dan traka; enn fam ki pa aret dispite, li kouma enn tiyo ki perse.
19.14: Enn dimoun kapav erit lakaz ek larzan ar so paran; me enn fam intelizan, li enn benediksion LESEGNER .
19.15: Si to pares, si to kontan dormi, pa rod manze kan vant grogne.
19.16: Obzerv komannman Bondie e to pou viv bien; me si to rezet so parol to pou trouv lamor.
19.17: Kan to ed bann pov, to pe pret LESEGNER , limem ki pou rekonpans twa.
19.18: Koriz to zanfan kan ankor ena letan; me dan to koler, zame pa swet so maler.
19.19: Enn dimoun violan bizin pey konsekans; sinon, sak fwa li pou refer so violans.
19.20: Si to ekout bann konsey, si to dispoze pou aprann to leson, dousma-dousma to pou vinn saz.
19.21: Dimoun kapav fer boukou proze; me volonte LESEGNER ki pou realize.
19.22: Nou apresie dimoun bon ek sinser; mil fwa to pov ki to manter.
19.23: Respekte LESEGNER e to pou viv bien; to pou viv an-sekirite e maler pa pou koste ar twa.
19.24: Dimoun pares met lame dan lasiet manze, me li tro feb pou met manze-la dan so labous.
19.25: Koriz enn insolan, bann bet pou aprann vinn pridan; montre enn bon dimoun so erer, li pou vinn pli intelizan.
19.26: Zanfan ki bat so papa e rezet so mama, li atir laont ek dezoner.
19.27: Mo zanfan, pa aret aprann; sinon, to pou bliye seki to deza kone.
19.28: Pena lazistis kan fos temwin koz manti pou koulout bon dimoun. Move dimoun nek medit lemal.
19.29: Bann insolan pou gagn kondanasion; bann bet pou gagn pinision.

20.1: Divin fer twa vinn tapazer, lalkol fer twa rod lager; dimoun ki dan soulezon zame vinn saz.
20.2: Kan lerwa ankoler li kouma enn lion ki pe grogne; pa ogmant so koler, to pou fini sis pie anba later.
20.3: Ninport ki fezer kapav lev lager; me li enn loner pou dimoun ki konn evit lager.
20.4: Fermie pares pa prepar karo dan bon sezon; ler rekolt vini, zero plonbaz.
20.5: Panse dan leker enn dimoun, li profon kouma dilo kler anba later; bizin enn lespri fite pou fer li monte.
20.6: Tou dimoun lor later dir ki zot sinser; anverite, pena boukou ki to kapav vremem fer konfians.
20.7: Bienere bann zanfan, si zot paran amenn enn lavi san repros.
20.8: Enn vre dirizan, li enn bon ziz; li konn detekte seki move.
20.9: Personn pa kapav dir ki so konsians kler; personn pa kapav pretann ki li pena pese.
20.10: Kan pwa ek mizir trike, LESEGNER deteste.
20.11: Mem enn zanfan montre ki li ete par so konportman; fasil pou kone si li bon, si li onet.
20.12: LESEGNER finn donn nou lizie pou gete, ek zorey pou ekoute.
20.13: Si to pas letan dormi to pou lor lapay, me to katora # 20:13 Gardmanze. pou plin si to leve, to al travay.
20.14: Kan pri tro ser, kliyan plengne; kan li aste mwin ser, li blage e li dir ki li konn marsande.
20.15: Bann parol konesans pli presie ki boukou lor ek pierpresie.
20.16: Si kikenn ase bet pou garanti det enn etranze, li merite kan ipotek so dibien kouma garanti.
20.17: Manze kokin, li bien dou dan labous, me bien vit li vinn ros anba ledan.
20.18: Swiv bon konsey si to anvi to proze reisi; reflesi bien avan to azir.
20.19: Palabrer pa konn gard sekre. Pa frekant dimoun ki nek blage.
20.20: Si to modi to paran, to lavi pou tengn avan ler, kouma enn lalanp dan lanwit.
20.21: Lamone fasil, mal gagne; li pa pou profit twa plitar.
20.22: Pa pran lalwa dan to lame; met dan lame LESEGNER , limem Ziz.
20.23: LESEGNER pa kontan kan trik balans; li malonet kan fos mizir.
20.24: LESEGNER , limem ki diriz nou pa; akoz sa, souvan nou pa konpran kot nou pe ale.
20.25: Pans bien avan to promet LESEGNER enn lofrand. Pa fer enn serman ki to pou regrete! Li bien danzere!
20.26: Enn bon dirizan kone kisannla ki move; li pou pini zot san pitie.
20.27: LESEGNER finn donn nou enn konsians kouma enn lalanp; li explor nou leker.
20.28: Enn lerwa res opouvwar kan li bon ek onet; so fidelite rann so tronn pli solid.
20.29: Fierte zenes dan zot lafors; me seve blan fer bote gran-dimoun.
20.30: Parfwa bizin gagn bate pou nou manier sanze; souvan bizin gagn dimal pou leker transforme.

21.1: Lespri enn dirizan kouma enn larivier dan lame LESEGNER ; li diriz li kot li anvi.
21.2: To kapav panse ki to ena rezon; me LESEGNER konn bien to lintansion.
21.3: LESEGNER prefer ladrwatir ek lazistis ki enn lofrand.
21.4: Move dimoun ena regar meprizan ek leker arogan; samem ki met zot pese okler.
21.5: Prepar to proze avek swin e to pou gagn sikse; me si to rod al tro vit, to pou zwenn tase.
21.6: Larises ki to gagne kan to koz manti, li atir twa dan lamor e li disparet vit.
21.7: Move dimoun kondane par zot prop violans. Kifer zot refiz sanze?
21.8: Bann malonet mars lor sime traver; dimoun zis swazir sime bien drwat.
21.9: Prefer dormi deor, dan kwin lakaz; ki dan lakaz, ar enn dimoun gran labous.
21.10: Move dimoun pans zis fer lemal; zot pena pitie pou personn.
21.11: Kan vantar gagn pinision, mem ignoran gagn enn leson; me linstriksion grandi konesans enn saz.
21.12: Bondie li zis! Li konn tou seki pase dan lakaz move dimoun; li pou donn zot pinision ki zot merite.
21.13: Si to refiz ekoute kan bann pov kriye, tou zorey pou sourd, ler twa to rod sekour.
21.14: Si to anvi kalme koler kikenn, donn li enn kado an-sekre; si to anvi tengn so laraz, glis enn ti prezan dan so pos.
21.15: Kan lazistis triyonfe, bon dimoun kontan; me bann malfeter gagn per.
21.16: Dimoun ki pa swiv bon sime konesans, bien vit pou rant dan bis lamor.
21.17: Dimoun ki kontan lamizman pou res pov; dimoun ki kontan labwason zame pou vinn ris.
21.18: Kan bann move dimoun rod piez bann bon dimoun, zot invit katastrof lor zotmem.
21.19: Preferab viv dan dezer, ki viv ar enn partner move karakter.
21.20: Dan lakaz enn saz ena bann gran rises; bann dimoun bet gaspiy pou zot sanses.
21.21: Rod touzour labonte ek lazistis e to pou viv lontan; dimoun pou respekte twa e pou onor twa.
21.22: Enn zeneral saz, pou reisi pran enn lavil bien proteze; li pou arive kraz miray sitadel.
21.23: Vey bien to langaz, e problem pa pou vinn dan to lakaz.
21.24: Dimoun ki fier ek vantar, zot insolan; zot azir ek boukou larogans.
21.25: Dimoun pares mor avan zot realiz so dezir; an-efe, so lame lour pou travay later.
21.26: Bann pares pas letan anvi kitsoz lezot; me bon dimoun donn zot kitsoz ek leker kontan.
21.27: Lofrand enn malfeter bien degoutan; sirtou kan li ofer li avek enn move lintansion.
21.28: Bann fos temwin pou disparet; me dimoun ki konn ekoute, li pou kapav temwagne avek sikse.
21.29: Move dimoun fer sanblan zot serye; bon dimoun viv enn lavi exanpler.
21.30: Mem si to ena bann verti kouma lasazes, bon rezonnman, ek disernman, to pa pou kapav defie LESEGNER .
21.31: Nou kapav prepar bann seval pou konba; me zis LESEGNER ki donn laviktwar.

22.1: Enn bon repitasion meyer ki enn gran rises; loner vo plis ki lor ek larzan.
22.2: Ris ek pov ena enn kitsoz an-komin: LESEGNER finn kre toulede.
22.3: Dimoun rezonab trouv problem vini e li pran prekosion; bann ki pa reflesi fons drwat, e zot pey konsekans.
22.4: Mars avek limilite e respekte LESEGNER ; lerla, to pou viv lontan e to pou gagn rises ek loner.
22.5: Ena pikan ek piez lor sime move dimoun; dimoun pridan res lwin ar sa sime-la.
22.6: Montre enn zanfan bon manier viv depi li tipti; li pou met sa an-pratik mem kan li finn vinn vie.
22.7: Dimoun ris dominn lor dimoun pov; bann anprinter vinn esklav bann kaser.
22.8: Kan to sem linzistis, to rekolte maler; e to koler pou anvol dan ler.
22.9: Bann dimoun ki ena bon leker pou gagn benediksion, parski zot partaz zot manze ar bann pov.
22.10: Si to anvi aret enn dispit, met bann insolan deor; lerla, pa pou ena ni lager ni insilt.
22.11: Si to leker prop e si to koz avek bonte, lerwa, limem pou vinn to kamarad.
22.12: LESEGNER veye ki laverite triyonfe e li kas plan bann manter.
22.13: Bann pares res lakaz, zot dir: “Ena enn lion deor pou manz mwa.”
22.14: Bann parol enn adilter, zot kouma enn piez danzere; si to rant ladan, LESEGNER pou ankoler ar twa.
22.15: Li normal ki zanfan fer betiz. Me disiplinn zot! Lerla, zot pou sanze.
22.16: Si to rod vinn ris lor ledo bann pov, e si to donn kado bann ris, enn zour, twa ki pou vinn pov.
22.17: Ouver to zorey e ekout parol dimoun saz; met an-pratik mo bann lansegnman.
22.18: To pou ere, si to gard zot dan to leker, e lor to lalev.
22.19: Mo anvi to met to konfians dan LESEGNER , akoz sa, zordi, mo pe dir twa sa bann parol lasazes-la.
22.20: Pou twa mo finn ekrir trant konsey, bann parol konesans ek sazes.
22.21: Sa bann konsey-la pou fer twa kone ki bon e ki vre; to pou konn donn bon repons kouma enn bon mesaze.
22.22: Pa kokin enn pov zis parski li mizer; e pa kraz kikenn ki pena mwayin pou pran enn avoka.
22.23: An-efe, LESEGNER pou pled pou li e pou konfiske to lavi, kouma to finn konfiske dibien enn malere.
22.24: Pa rant kamarad ar dimoun ki sap lor kal brit-brit; pa frekant dimoun ki sofe pou enn wi, pou enn non;
22.25: parski to kapav vinn kouma li, e may dan enn latrap.
22.26: Pa fer erer donn parol pou garanti det lezot.
22.27: Tansion, si to pa kapav ranbourse, bann la pou vinn tir twa lor to lili e pou pran tou to dibien.
22.28: Pa kokin propriete to vwazin; pa deplas bann born ki to anset finn mete.
22.29: Get bien sa artizan ki fer so travay bien la; lerwa pou angaz li, e li pou nepli bizin travay pou etranze.

23.1: Si to invite pou manze kot enn dimoun inportan, to bizin ena enn bon konportman.
23.2: Si to lapeti feros, konn kontrol twa.
23.3: Pa les twa tante par so bann manze rar; sa kapav rann twa malad.
23.4: Aret touy lekor pou vinn ris; les lasazes gid twa. Lerla, to pou kone kan bizin dir non.
23.5: Apenn to get to larzan dan to lame, li rod sime ale; li met lezel, li mont dan lezer kouma zwazo.
23.6: Refiz al manze kot enn dimoun peng; pa dezir so bann manze rar;
23.7: parski li touletan fer kont. Ar so labous li pou dir twa: “manz ankor, bwar ankor!” Me dan so leker li pa sinser.
23.8: Apre sa, to pou vomi seki to finn manze; lerla, bann parol remersiman ki to finn dir li, pa pou servi nanye.
23.9: Pa gaspiy to bann parol sazes ar enn dimoun san-konpran; koumadir to pe zet dilo lor bredsonz.
23.10: Pa deplas bann vie born; Pa kokin later bann orfelin san defans;
23.11: LESEGNER , zot defanser, li pwisan. Li pou pled zot ka kont twa.
23.12: Grav lansegnman ki to finn gagne dan to leker; ouver to zorey pou ekout bann parol ki donn konesans.
23.13: Pa ezite pou koriz enn zanfan; enn tikout rotin pa pou touy li.
23.14: Okontrer, sa pou ed li e pou tir li dan sime lamor.
23.15: Mo zanfan, si to vinn saz, mo leker pou dan lazwa.
23.16: Mo pou bien fier, kan mo pou tann twa koz bann parol konesans.
23.17: Pa bizin zalou bann move dimoun; respekte LESEGNER sak zour to lavi.
23.18: Lerla, to pou ena enn bon lavenir, e to lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
23.19: Mo piti, ekout mwa e to pou vinn saz; diriz to pa lor sime ladrwatir.
23.20: Pa frekant soular; Pa frekant voras.
23.21: Soular ek voras pou fini lor lapay. Si to nek manze-bwar apre to dormi, biento to pou met kostim goni # 23:21 Kostim goni: Linz move kalite. .
23.22: Ekout to papa ki finn donn twa lavi; pa abandonn to mama kan li dan laz.
23.23: Touletan rod laverite, zame pa rezet li; kiltiv lasazes, linstriksion ek disernman.
23.24: Kan enn zanfan amenn enn bon lavi, so paran ranpli ar lazwa; leker enn paran kontan kan so zanfan saz.
23.25: Fer to paran kontan; donn lazwa to mama ki finn met twa lor later.
23.26: Mo zanfan, fer mwa konfians; swiv mo lexanp dan lazwa.
23.27: Enn prostitie, li kouma enn piez pou twa; enn fam adilter, li kouma enn latrap.
23.28: Li vey lokazion kouma enn voler. Li finn fini kas boukou menaz.
23.29: Kisann-la ki dan traka e pe regrete? Kisann-la nek sipote e dispite? Kisann-la nek gagn dimal pou nanye? Kisann-la so lizie touletan rouz?
23.30: Bann ki touletan dan tavern; bann ki nek bwar melanz.
23.31: Pa les twa tante ar larak; pa les li atir twa ar so kouler ek so lekim; dan labous li bon, li glise, li desann.
23.32: Me alafin to pou konn so refrin, ler li mord twa kouma serpan.
23.33: Maloker pou fer twa trouv zekler; to pou delire, to pou rabase.
23.34: To latet pou vire; to pou balans dekote kouma enn bato dan tanpet.
23.35: To pou dir: “Zot ti bat mwa, me mo pa rapel; mo finn gagn dimal, me mo pa santi. Kan pou gramatin? Mo bizin enn topet pou kas malad latet.”

24.1: Pa rod fer kouma bann move dimoun; pa ni frekant zot.
24.2: An-efe, dan zot panse ena zis violans; zis mesanste ki sorti dan zot labous.
24.3: Ar lasazes nou aranz enn lakaz; ar disernman nou fer li vinn pli solid.
24.4: Avek lexperyans nou ranpli bann lasam ar bann zoli obze valer.
24.5: Enn dimoun saz, li pli siperyer ki enn dimoun for; enn gran servo pli inportan ki zis lafors fizik.
24.6: Si to konn servi to lespri, sa pou ed twa kont to lennmi; kan to ena boukou bon konseye, laviktwar asire.
24.7: Lasazes tro difisil pou enn bet; kan dimoun saz zwenn ansam, bann bet pena nanye pou dir.
24.8: Si touletan to tir plan pou fer lemal, dimoun pou apel twa malfeter.
24.9: Enn malfeter, so program nek fer pese; personn pa kontan enn vantar arogan.
24.10: Si to bes lebra dan letan difisil, savedir to feb.
24.11: Pa ezite pou al sekour enn inosan ki finn kondane amor; sap lavi dimoun ki pe kabose pou al divan bouro.
24.12: Kapav to pou dir: “Mo pa ti kone.” Me, pa bliye, Bondie konn to leker. Li konn tou seki to fer; li pou rekonpans twa dapre to bann aksion.
24.13: Mo zanfan, dimiel bon pou manze; li dou dan labous.
24.14: Konpran mo zanfan, lasazes kouma dimiel pou to nam; kan to ena li, to lavenir asire, e to lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
24.15: Pa fer kouma bann malfeter ki vey lokazion pou atak fami bon dimoun; pa devaliz lakaz dimoun drwat.
24.16: Ninport komie fwa bon dimoun tonbe, li pou releve; me bann malfeter fini dan maler.
24.17: Pa bizin zibile kan to lennmi tonbe; pa sote-pile kan li kogne.
24.18: LESEGNER pa pou kontan kan li trouv sa; e li pa pou pini li.
24.19: Pa kas to latet ar bann move dimoun; pa rod vinn kouma zot;
24.20: parski move dimoun pena lavenir; zot lavi pou tengn vit, kouma lalanp san petrol.
24.21: Mo zanfan, respekte LESEGNER e respekte lerwa; pa rant kamarad ar lennmi LESEGNER , ni ar lennmi lerwa.
24.22: Parski toulede ena pouvwar pou rwinn twa. Personn pa kone ki maler zot kapav fer.
24.23: Ala proverb dimoun saz: Enn ziz pa gagn drwa get ar de lizie.
24.24: Si enn ziz dir enn koupab: “To inosan,” dimoun pou modi li, lepep pou deteste li.
24.25: Me si ziz-la pini bann koupab, li pou gagn loner ek boukou benediksion.
24.26: Enn repons onet, li enn prev lamitie.
24.27: Okip to lakour, prepar to terin avan; apre to kapav aranz to lakaz.
24.28: Pa akiz to vwazin san rezon; pa bizin koz manti.
24.29: Zame pa dir: “Mo pou tret li kouma li finn tret mwa; bate rande pa fer dimal.”
24.30: Mo ti pas kot karo enn pares; kot plantasion enn bet.
24.31: Move lerb ti pe nate partou; pie pikan ti pe fer lalwa; ek miray ti finn grene dan boukou landrwa.
24.32: Mo ti arete, gete, reflesi; leson la ti bien kler:
24.33: Kan kas poz fer somey, kan krwaz lebra repoze,
24.34: lamizer atak twa kouma enn voler, lafin ek laswaf tom lor twa kouma enn bandi.

25.1: Ala ankor plizir proverb Salomon, ki ti kopie par bann skrib Ezekias, lerwa Zida.
25.2: Nou glorifie LESEGNER parski so bann aksion res bann gran mister; nou glorifie lerwa parski li desifre bann mister la.
25.3: Parey kouma nou pa konn oter lesiel ouswa profonder lamer, zame nou pou konn profonder panse enn lerwa.
25.4: Tir verdigri ki kouver larzan, e bizoutie pou kapav fasonn bann obze presie.
25.5: Met tou froder deor dan lantouraz lerwa, lerla, li pou gouvern ar lazistis, e so pouvwar pou grandi.
25.6: Pa fer vantar dan prezans lerwa; pa sey pran plas seki pli gran ki twa.
25.7: Parski li boukou pli bon kan gagn promosion, ki kan perdi grad divan enn sef.
25.8: Kan to finn trouv kiksoz, pa prese pou met zafer lakour. Si to adverser prouve ki to ena tor, lerla, to latet pou bese ar laont.
25.9: Sey regle problem an-prive ar to vwazin; pa bizin devwal sekre personn.
25.10: Dimoun pou akiz twa pou difamasion, e sa pou touzour rwinn to repitasion.
25.11: Enn parol bien kalkile, li kouma enn desin an-or lor enn plato an-arzan.
25.12: Enn bon konsey, li kouma enn zano gran valer pou zorey ki ekoute.
25.13: Enn serviter fidel ek onet soulaz langwas so met, kouma dilo lasours, rafresi bann kouper kann anplin lete.
25.14: Dimoun ki touletan promet kado, me zame pa done, li kouma niaz ek divan ki zame donn lapli.
25.15: Avek pasians, to kapav fer to sef sanz lide; douser dan langaz fer baraz tonbe.
25.16: Si to finn dekouver dimiel, pa fer gourman; manz zis, pou ki to pa gagn maloker apre.
25.17: Pa tro met nene kot to vwazin, sinon, li pou plin ar twa e li pou koumans deteste twa.
25.18: Si to akiz to prosin pou nanye, koumadir to pe atak li ar baton, fles ek lepe.
25.19: Si to fer konfians enn dimoun malonet dan to maler, koumadir to pe manze ar enn ledan bouze, ouswa to pe marse ar enn lipie foule.
25.20: Pa sant bann sante lazwa ar enn dimoun ki dan tristes, li koumadir to pe tir to linz dan freser, ouswa to pe vid lalkol lor enn ple.
25.21: Si to lennmi gagn fin, donn li manze; si li swaf, donn li bwar.
25.22: Sa pou rann li malalez. So latet pou sofe, koumadir ena labrez. Lerla, LESEGNER pou rekonpans twa.
25.23: Divan lenor amenn lapli lete, palab amenn lakoler.
25.24: Prefer dormi deor dan kwin lakaz, ki dan lakaz avek enn partner gran labous.
25.25: Parey kouma dilo fre apez nou laswaf, enn bon nouvel fer nou leker kontan.
25.26: Kan enn bon dimoun kapitile divan enn malfeter, li parey kouma labou dan dilo, ouswa pwazon dan lasours.
25.27: Li pa bon manz tro boukou dimiel; li pa bon osi, kan to rod tro boukou loner.
25.28: Enn dimoun ki pa kontrol so koler, li kouma enn lavil san defans divan lennmi.

26.1: Eski lanez tonbe dan lete? Eski lapli tonbe dan sezon sek? Parey! Loner pa ale ar enn dimoun bet.
26.2: Kouma mwano vir-vire dan lesiel, kouma zirondel tourn-tourne dan lezer, malediksion san fondman pa poz lor personn.
26.3: Enn kravas pou seval, enn baton pou bourik, enn rotin pou ledo enn bet.
26.4: Pa kas latet reponn enn bet; sinon to pou abes twa net.
26.5: Si to reponn enn bet, fer li kone li bet; sinon, li pou pran li pou enn fwet.
26.6: Si to swazir enn bet pou pas to mesaz, koumadir to pe koup to prop lipie; to pe invit traka.
26.7: Enn parol saz dan labous enn bet, li feb kouma lipie enn paralize.
26.8: Si to felisit enn bet, li koumadir to pe met enn ros dan enn fles. Tansion blese!
26.9: Enn proverb dan labous enn bet, li kouma enn kouto dan lame soular.
26.10: Si enn patron anplway enn bet ouswa enn soular, koumadir li pe tir kout fles lor tou dimoun.
26.11: Enn bet ki repet mem betiz, wadir enn lisien ki remanz so vomi.
26.12: Mil fwa to zwenn enn bet, ki to zwenn enn dimoun ki deklar saz.
26.13: Enn pares dir: “Ena enn lion deor! Ena danze partou!”
26.14: Enn laport vire-tourne lor so gon; enn pares vire-tourne lor so lili.
26.15: Enn pares met lame dan lasiet manze, me li tro feb pou met manze-la dan so labous.
26.16: Enn pares krwar ki li pli malin ki bann dimoun ki ena disernman.
26.17: Si to met to nene dan bagar ki pa konsern twa, koumadir to pe trap zorey enn move lisien.
26.20: Kan nepli ena dibwa, dife tengn; kan nepli ena palab, dispit arete.
26.21: Parey kouma sarbon fer labrez ek dibwa nouri dife, enn palabrer nouri laenn ek konfli.
26.22: Parol palab, li kouma enn manze ki finn bien prepare; li fondan dan labous e li fasil pou dizere.
26.23: Lapintir kasiet defo lor dibwa, me zoli parol kasiet mesanste ki dan leker.
26.24: Enn ipokrit kasiet so laenn dan so bann parol dou; me dan so leker, li pe mont enn move kou.
26.25: Kan to lennmi flat twa ar zoli parol, pa krwar li; parski so leker ranpli ar lafoli.
26.26: Li kapav ase rize pou kasiet so laenn, me enn zour, so mesanste pou paret anplin lizour.
26.27: Si to fouy trou pou piez lezot, tomem ki pou tom ladan; si to koumans roul enn gro ros, li pou retourn lor tomem.
26.28: Lalang manter deteste so viktim; kikenn ki met dan siro rwinn dimoun ki li flate la.

27.1: Aret fer grannwar konsernan dime; parski personn pa kone ki kapav arive zordi.
27.2: Pa lev tomem anler, les enn lot flat twa; mem enn etranze kapav felisit twa, me pa fer li tomem.
27.3: Enn ros pez lour, disab osi; me provokasion enn bet pli lour ankor.
27.4: Laviolans fer per, lakoler danzere; me zalouzi pli terib ki toulede.
27.5: Enn kritik fran ek onet li meyer ki enn santiman ki res andan.
27.6: Mem si enn kamarad repros twa kitsoz, to kapav fer li konfians; me si enn lennmi vinn anbras twa, pran kont!
27.7: Kan to vant plin, dimiel osi to pou refize; me kan to afame, mem margoz to pou anvi manze.
27.8: Enn dimoun ki lwin ar lakaz so fami, li kouma enn zwazo ki lwin ar so nik.
27.9: Parfin ek delwil esansiel met lazwa dan leker; me nanye pa bat lamitie enn kamarad sinser.
27.10: Pa rezet to kamarad, ni kamarad to papa. Si to bizin led, pa al rode kot fami reste; enn vwazin akote, pli sir ki enn fami ki res lwin.
27.11: Mo zanfan, viv ar lasazes; to ava met mo leker dan lazwa. Lerla, mo pou ena repons pou dimoun ki kritik mwa.
27.12: Enn dimoun intelizan, li konn evit maler; enn ignoran, nek bes latet fonse. Lerla, li zwenn tase.
27.13: Si kikenn ase bet pou garanti det enn etranze, li merite kan pran so prop dibien pou ranbours det-la.
27.14: Si gramatin boner to lev to vwazin pou dir li bonzour for-for, koumadir to pe insilte li.
27.15: Enn partner ki manz lavi touletan, li kouma lapli ki pa aret tonbe;
27.16: si to sey aret li, koumadir to pe sey aret divan ki soufle, ouswa to pe rod trap delwil dan to lame.
27.17: Feray fit feray; dimoun transform dimoun.
27.18: Si to okip to pie fri, to pou manz so fri; si to okip lintere to patron, to pou gagn loner.
27.19: Get dan laglas, to pou trouv to figir; get dan to leker, to pou trouv to karakter.
27.20: Lamor zame satisfe, pli li gagne li pran. Bann imin osi parey, zame zot satisfe ar seki zot ena.
27.21: Nou konn kalite lor ek larzan atraver dife; nou konn valer enn dimoun atraver so repitasion.
27.22: Ninport ki kantite bate to pou bat enn bet, li pa pou aret fer betiz.
27.23: Get bien lasante to zanimo; pran bien kont to troupo.
27.24: Parski larises, pa dir lontan, kouma regn enn lerwa pa dir touletan.
27.25: Kan to finn fini koup lerb, li repouse; kan to al ramas lerb lor flan kolinn pou nouri to zanimo,
27.26: to bann mouton pou abiy twa, to bann troupo pou permet twa aste later.
27.27: Pou ena ase dile pou nouri twa ek to fami; anplis, to pou kapav nouri to bann serviter ek servant.

28.1: Bann move dimoun sove mem kan pena danze; me bann bon dimoun res brav kouma enn lion.
28.2: Kan enn pei revolte, boukou sef rod pran pouvwar; me kan enn dirizan intelizan ek saz, so pouvwar res solid.
28.3: Kan enn diktater leve ek fer dominer ar bann pov, li kouma gro lapli ki detrir tou rekolt.
28.4: Bann ki rezet lalwa, donn rezon bann malfeter; bann ki respekte lalwa, konbat bann malfeter.
28.5: Move dimoun pa konpran nanye lor lazistis; me bann ki respekte LESEGNER konpran tou.
28.6: Preferab pov, me onet ki ris, me malonet.
28.7: Bann zenes ki ena disernman, zot obzerv lalwa; me seki ena move frekantasion fer so paran onte.
28.8: Bann kaser ki vinn ris lor ledo lezot, pa pou kapav profit zot larzan; enn zour, dimoun ki ed bann pov ki pou erit zot rises.
28.9: Si kikenn pa ouver so zorey pou ekout lalwa, Bondie osi pa pou ekout so lapriyer.
28.10: Tou seki antrenn bon dimoun dan sime lemal, pou tom dan zot prop piez. Me bann dimoun onet pou konn enn lavenir ere.
28.11: Dimoun ris fer sanblan zot saz; me enn pov ki ena disernman, kapav demaske zot.
28.12: Kan bon dimoun gagn laviktwar, lepep selebre; kan move dimoun pran pouvwar, lepep prefer kasiet.
28.13: Seki kasiet so pese zame pou progrese; me seki rekonet so fot e desid pou sanze, so pese pou pardone.
28.14: Bienere dimoun ki gagn per pou fer lemal; me bann leker dir ki pa oule sanze, pou rwine.
28.15: Enn move dirizan ki fer dominer ar lepep malere, li kouma enn zanimo feros anraze.
28.16: Enn lider bet fer dominer pou li vinn ris lor ledo bann pov; me dirizan ki deteste larzan mal-gagne, pou viv lontan.
28.17: Enn dimoun ki ena disan lor so lame, li bizin pey pou so krim ziska li mor.
28.18: Dimoun onet pena pou per nanye; me bann malonet pou tom dan trou.
28.19: Seki travay so later, pa pou mank manze; me seki perdi letan kas poz, pou touzour malere.
28.20: Dimoun onet pou gagn boukou benediksion; me bann ki rod vinn ris tro vit, pou gagn zot pinision.
28.21: Get ar de lizie, li enn move zafer; malerezman, ena ki pran gous pou donn faver.
28.22: Enn dimoun peng galoup deryer larzan; me li pa kone ki maler deryer laport.
28.23: Avek letan, nou pou pli apresie enn remark sinser; ki enn dimoun ki pas diber.
28.24: Zanfan ki kokin so paran e ki dir: “pa enn pese sa,” li pa pli bon ki enn bandi.
28.25: Enn dimoun ki nek rod plin so pos, kre zizani; me seki met so konfians dan LESEGNER pou gagn benediksion.
28.26: Dimoun bet krwar li enn terib; me dimoun saz konn sorti dan danze.
28.27: Seki ed bann pov zame mank nanye; me seki ferm lizie divan lamizer lezot, pou gagn malediksion.
28.28: Kan diktater pran pouvwar, dimoun al kasiet; me kan li mor, boukou bon lider leve.

29.1: Seki touletan rezinbe kan gagn repros, maler pou tom lor li antret. Okenn remed pa pou sap so lavi.
29.2: Kan bann dimoun drwat opouvwar, lepep ena lazwa dan leker; me kan enn diktater gouverne, lepep pas mizer.
29.3: Zenes ki rod lasazes, fer so paran kontan; me zenes ki frekant prostitie, gaspiy tou so larzan.
29.4: Lerwa ki gouvern ar lazistis, fer so pei prospere; me dirizan ki tom dan koripsion, fer so pei rekile.
29.5: Dimoun ki nek met dan siro, pe rod met so prosin dan leto.
29.6: Si to viv dan lemal, to pou may dan to prop piez; me si to viv onet, to pena traka e to kapav selebre dan lazwa.
29.7: Bann bon dimoun rekonet drwa bann pov; bann move dimoun tro bet pou konpran sa.
29.8: Bann konploter, fasil zot soulev enn emet dan pei; me bann saz fer tou pou kalme lakoler lepep.
29.9: Twa ki saz, pa gagn zafer avek enn bet; li pou kriye, zoure ek rikane, e to pa pou trouv okenn solision.
29.10: Bann asasin deteste dimoun onet; me bann zis protez zot.
29.11: Enn dimoun bet sap lor kal brit; enn dimoun saz konn kontrol so lemosion.
29.12: Si enn dirizan ekout palab, tou so lantouraz pou vinn malonet.
29.13: Pov ek opreser ena enn kiksoz an-komin: LESEGNER finn fer toulede trouv soley.
29.14: Enn dirizan ki pa kraz bann pov, li pou regne lontan.
29.15: Disiplinn ek koreksion bien inportan pou edik zanfan; enn zanfan malelve fer so mama onte.
29.16: Kan move dimoun pran pouvwar, krim ogmante; me enn zour zot pou tonbe, e bann bon dimoun pou temwin.
29.17: Disiplinn to zanfan bien, to pou konn lape; zot pou met lazwa dan to leker.
29.18: Kan dirizan pena vizion, lepep pena kontrol; me bienere dimoun ki respekte lalwa Bondie.
29.19: Zis parol pa ase pou koriz enn ti-lespri; li kapav tande, me li pa pou sanze.
29.20: Milfwa to gagn zafer ek enn ignoran, ki to gagn zafer ek enn dimoun ki koze san reflesi.
29.21: Si touletan to donn to travayer tou seki li dimande, enn zour li pou fer grannwar ar twa.
29.22: Dimoun ki sap lor kal vit, li amenn dezord; e dimoun ki sofe vit, li sem diskord.
29.23: Kan to viv ek lorgey, enn zour to pou abese; me si to viv ek limilite, enn zour to pou onore.
29.24: Si to konplis enn voler, to lavi bien amer; to kone Bondie pou pini twa, me to pa kapav devwale # 29:24 Levitik 5 : 1 - 6, kapav ed nou konpran sa verse la pli bien. .
29.25: Si nou per lezot, nou lavi pieze; me si nou fer LESEGNER konfians, nou ansekirite.
29.26: Dimoun rod faver bann ki dan pouvwar; me zis LESEGNER ki donn li seki li merite.
29.27: Bann dimoun onet ay linzistis; me bann malfeter ay dimoun onet.

30.1: Bann parol solanel Agour, garson Yake. Ala seki sa zom la ti dir: Bondie, mo dekouraze! Twa, to pa la! Kouma mo pou viv? # 30:1 Sa fraz la, so Ebre pa kler. Ena tradiksion finn ekrir: “Ala seki sa zom la ti dir ek Ityel, Ityel ek Oukal.”
30.2: Li vre ki mo pli bet ki bann lezot dimoun; mo pena disernman ki lezot ena.
30.3: Mo pena lasazes e mo pa konn nanye lor Bondie.
30.4: Eski kikenn finn deza mont dan lesiel, apre finn redesann? Eski kikenn finn deza may divan dan so pla lame? Eski kikenn finn deza anvlop lamer dan so linz? Kisann-la ki finn mizir later e donn li so limit? Kouma li apele? Kisann-la so zanfan? Si to kone, dir mwa!
30.5: Tou seki Bondie dir, li vre; li enn boukliye pou dimoun ki rod so sekour.
30.6: Pa azout nanye ar parol Bondie, sinon, li pou repros twa e to pou pas pou enn manter.
30.7: Bondie, mo dimann twa zis de kitsoz; akord mwa sa avan mo mor:
30.8: Pa les mwa dir bann foste ek bann mansonz; pa fer mwa vinn ni tro ris ni tro pov. Donn mwa zis manze ki mo bizin pou viv.
30.9: Si mo vinn tro ris, mo kapav bliye twa SEGNER . E si mo vinn tro pov, mo kapav vinn enn voler e dezonor twa, mo Bondie.
30.10: Pa fer palab kont enn travayer ar so patron; sinon, travayer-la pou modi twa, e to pou peye pou sa.
30.11: Ena dimoun ki modi zot papa; e pena respe pou zot mama.
30.12: Ena dimoun ki krwar zot parfe, me anverite, zot sal ar pese.
30.13: Ena dimoun ki ranpli ar lorgey; zot get lezot ar mepri.
30.14: Ena dimoun, koumadir zot ena ledan rekin, ouswa ledan enn zanimo feros. Telman zot dominer, zot oule devor tou bann pov; zot oule fini tou bann malere.
30.17: Zanfan ki mepriz so papa, e dezobeir so mama, korbo pou bek so lizie e votour pou devor so kadav.
30.20: Ala manier enn adilter: Li manze, li souy so labous, e li dir: “Mo pa finn fer nanye demal!”
30.24: Lor later, ena kat kreatir ki bien tipti, me zot bien debrouyar:
30.25: bann fourmi kapav feb, me dan lete, zot konn ramas manze pou letan dir;
30.26: bann daman pena pouvwar, me zot konn aranz zot lakaz dan fant ros;
30.27: sotrel pena sef, me zot deplase kouma solda dan parad;
30.28: sitan bann geko # 30:28 Geko: enn ti-lezar. tipti, to kapav trap zot dan to lame, me pourtan, zot kapav rant dan pale lerwa.
30.32: Si to finn deklar tenor kouma bann bet, si to finn tir plan pou fer lezot dimal, aster, ferm labous, res trankil!
30.33: Kan to bat lakrem dile, to gagn diber; kan to gagn kou lor nene, disan koule; me kan to provok lakoler, to ava gagn lager.

31.1: Ala bann parol solanel ki mama Lerwa Lemouel ti ansegn li:
31.2: Ki mo pou dir twa mo garson? Mo finn met twa lor later; mo ti priye pou gagn twa e mo lapriyer finn exose. Asterla, ekout mwa!
31.3: Pa fini to kouraz ar bann fam; pa depans to kas ar zot; sa manier lamem ki boukou lerwa finn rwine.
31.4: Lemouel, fodepa ki lerwa tom dan lalkol; fodepa dirizan kontan labwason for;
31.5: sinon, dan soulezon, zot pou bliye seki lalwa dir; e zot pou maltret bann pov.
31.6: Donn lalkol dimoun ki pe mor, donn divin dimoun ki dan tristes;
31.7: les zot bwar pou ki zot bliye zot mizer, pou ki zot bliye zot lapenn.
31.8: Vinn portparol bann dimoun san parol; defann bann dimoun ki finn abandone.
31.9: Koz pou zot! Ziz ar lazistis! Pa ezite pou defann drwa bann dimoun mizer.
31.10: Li bien difisil trouv enn fam parfe! Li pli presie ki bann bizou gran valer.
31.11: So mari fer li foul konfians, e zame li pa pou mank nanye.
31.12: Fam-la pou bon avek so mari ziska so dernie souf; zame li pou fer li dimal.
31.13: Li rod bon lalenn ek bon latwal an-lin; li gagn lazwa pou travay ek so lame.
31.14: Li kouma bato marsandiz; li amenn so manze depi lwin.
31.15: Li lev boner gramatin, pou prepar manze so fami; e li organiz travay bann servant.
31.16: Li kone kan kapav aste enn later; ar so prop lamone, li fer plant enn karo rezin.
31.17: Li travay ar kouraz; e zame li pa res nanye-fer.
31.18: Li veye ki so travay fer profi; so lalanp res alime ziska tar dan aswar.
31.19: Li fabrik so prop difil; li tis so prop latwal.
31.20: Li zenere ar dimoun pov; li pa ezite pou ed bann malere.
31.21: Li pa per kan lanez tonbe dan liver; parski, dan so lakaz, tou dimoun ena bon linz.
31.22: Li fabrik dra lili ek molton; bann linz an-lin ki li mete, enn veritab bote.
31.23: So mari ena bon repitasion e li sieze parmi bann lider dan pei.
31.24: Fam la koud linz e li fabrik sintir; li vann zot ar bann marsan.
31.25: Li enn fam for ki tou dimoun respekte; so lavenir asire.
31.26: Li koz avek lasazes; li donn lansegnman avek bonte.
31.27: Li pran bien swin so fami; lapares pa koste ar li.
31.28: So bann zanfan ador li; so mari admir li e felisit li.
31.29: Mari la dir li: “Ena boukou fam ki fer bon travay, me twa, to depas zot enn may.”
31.30: Laparans tronper; labote efemer; me enn fam ki respekte LESEGNER , merit nou loner.
31.31: Rekonpans li pou so louvrwaz; e felisit li anpiblik pou so travay.

1.1: Izai, garson Amoz, ti gagn enn bann vizion konsernan Zida ek Zerizalem. Sa lepok la, Ozias, Yotam, Akaz ek Ezekias, sakenn so tour, ti lerwa Zida.
1.2: Lesiel, ekoute! Later, tande! LESEGNER finn koze: “Mo finn grandi bann garson, mo finn elve zot. Zot, zot finn revolte kont mwa.
1.3: Enn bef konn so propriyeter. Mem enn bourik konn manzwar so met; Me pep Izrael pa oule kone, mo pep napa konpran.”
1.4: Ayo! Maler! Pei ki pe fer pese, pep ki extra koupab, zenerasion malfeter, zot bann garson bann koripter. Zot finn abandonn LESEGNER. Izrael finn mepriz so Bondie. e finn vir ledo ar li.
1.5: Ki serti pini zot ankor? Ki, zot pou kontign rebel mem? Zot latet deza ranpli ar dimal, zot leker pe bat feb.
1.6: Depi lipie ziska latet, nanye pa bon zot finn gagn bate, finn blese, zot bann ple ouver, personn pa finn netwaye, pa finn met bandaz, pa finn swagne avek delwil.
1.7: Zot pei enn dezolasion. Zot bann lavil finn pran dife. Bann etranze pe devor zot plantasion, divan zot. Zot bann karo finn devir anba-lao; tou finn detrir.
1.8: Zerizalem finn res kouma enn ti kabann dan karo rezin, kouma enn ti lakaz tol dan enn karo kokom, kouma enn lavil anserkle.
1.9: Si LESEGNER Toupwisan pa ti les enn ti group parmi nou vivan, nou ti pou parey kouma Sodom, parey kouma Gomor.
1.10: Zot, bann sef Zerizalem, ki kouma bann dirizan Sodom, ekout parol LESEGNER! Zot, ki kouma pep Gomor, ekout linstriksion nou Bondie!
1.11: LESEGNER pe dir: Zot panse mo bizin tou sa bann sakrifis la? Mo finn plin avek bann sakrifis belie, avek lagres bann vo gra! Disan bann toro, bann mouton ek bann bouk, pa fer mwa plezir.
1.12: Kisannla finn dimann zot vinn prezant divan mwa avek lofrand dan zot lame? Pa vinn mars dan mo bann lakour mo Tanp.
1.13: Aret amenn bann sakrifis ki pa servi nanye: lansan, sa enn abominasion pou mwa! Nouvel-linn, saba, bel lasanble lapriyer, mo nepli kapav toler sa bann foste ek sa bann bel-bel fet-la.
1.14: Zot bann nouvel-linn avek zot bann rankont, mo deteste tousala ki pe vinn pou mwa enn fardo ki mo finn fatige sarye.
1.15: Ler zot lev zot lame ver mwa, mo pou kasiet mo lizie pou pa trouve zot. Zot ava fer lapriyer mem, mo pa pou ekoute: zot lame ranpli ar disan.
1.16: Lav zot, pirifie zot, tir divan mo lizie zot bann move aksion, aret fer lemal,
1.17: aprann fer dibien, rod lazistis, anpes dimoun fer dominer, defann bann orfelin, protez bann vev.
1.18: LESEGNER pe dir: “Vini, anou koze. Mem si zot pese kouler disan, li pou vinn blan kouma dile. Si zot ti rouz, kouma fler banane, zot pou vinn kouma lalenn.
1.19: Si zot obeir, bon rekolt, zot pou manze.
1.20: Me si zot refize e zot revolte, se lepe ki pou manz zot.” Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir.
1.21: Get kouma sa lavil ki ti fidel la finn vinn enn prostitie! Sa lavil, ki ti ranpli avek lazistis, avek drwatir, aster la, li ranpli avek asasin.
1.22: To larzan, finn vinn lamone zete. To divin, finn melanze avek dilo.
1.23: To bann prins, enn bann rebel. Zot kamarad ar voler. Zot tou kontan gous, zot galoup deryer rekonpans. Zot pa pran swin bann orfelin. Bann konplint ki bann vev fer, zot napa pran kont.
1.24: Ala kifer, LESEGNER Toupwisan, ki konbat pou Izrael, deklare: “Ayo maler! Mo pou pran mo revans lor mo bann adverser, e mo pou tir vanzans lor mo bann lennmi.
1.25: Mo pou vir mo lame kont twa, mo pou fonn to lamone zete. Mo pou pirifie twa.
1.26: Mo pou fer to bann ziz revini, parey kouma dan komansman. Mo pou fer to bann konseye retourne, parey kouma premie fwa. Lerla, ava apel twa Lavil-Lazistis, Site-Fidelite.”
1.27: Zerizalem pou libere kan li pratik lazistis, bann ki repanti pou gagn delivrans.
1.28: Me katastrof pou bann ki revolte, ki fer pese. Bann seki abandonn LESEGNER, pou mor.
1.29: Wi, zot pou gagn onte akoz zot finn met zot kontantman dan bann pie sakre. Zot pou dekonserte ar sa bann landrwa sakre kot zot finn ador bann fos bondie.
1.30: Wi, zot pou kouma enn pie sakre ki so bann fey finn fane e kouma enn zardin ki pena dilo.
1.31: Seki for, pou vinn kouma dibwa sek. Tou so aksion pou kouma lapay. Zot tou pou brile, e pa pou ena personn pou tengn sa.

2.1: Parol ki Izai, garson Amoz, finn gagne konsernan Zida ek Zerizalem.
2.2: Enn zour, montagn kot lakaz LESEGNER ete pou klase pli gran parmi tou bann montagn. Li pou lev pli ot ki tou kolinn, e tou bann pei pou vinn kot li.
2.3: Boukou pep pou vini, zot pou dir: “Anou ale! Anou al lor montagn LESEGNER. Nou pou mont kot lakaz Bondie Zakob. Li pou montre nou so sime e nou pou mars lor so larout parski lalwa pou sorti dan Sion e parol LESEGNER pou sorti depi Zerizalem.”
2.4: Li pou ziz bann pei. Li pou fer larbit ant boukou pep. Zot pou fer zot lepe vinn bann pios e pou fer zot bann lans vinn bann laserp. Enn pei pou nepli tir lepe kont enn lot pei. Zot pou aret aprann kouma fer lager.
2.5: Vini lakaz Zakob! Anou mars dan lalimier LESEGNER.
2.6: Wi, to finn rezet to pep. To finn rezet lakaz Zakob parski zot finn ranpli avek kitsoz ki sorti dan Les. Zot fer sorselri kouma bann Filistin. Zot lame dan lame ek bann etranze.
2.7: So pei finn ranpli avek larzan ek lor. So bann trezor napa kapav konte. So pei plin avek seval e so bann kales napa kapav konte.
2.8: So pei ranpli avek fos bondie. Zot tom azenou divan travay zot lame. Zot ador seki zot ledwa finn fer.
2.9: Limanite pou ploye. Tou bann zom pou abese: Napa relev zot!
2.10: Al dan lakav! Kasiet dan lapousier, lwin ar koler LESEGNER, lwin ar grander so mazeste.
2.11: Bann zom ki fezer pou bes latet. Bann ki ena lorgey, pou imilie. LESEGNER tousel pou dan laglwar, sa zour la.
2.12: Parski pou ena enn zour pou LESEGNER Toupwisan kont tou bann vantar e bann gran-nwar; tou bann ki rod grander, zot pou imilie.
2.13: Kont tou bann sed Liban ki leve drese e kont tou bann senn Basann.
2.14: Kont tou bann montagn ki drese e kont tou bann kolinn ki leve.
2.15: Kont tou bann sitadel bien ot e kont tou miray fortifie.
2.16: Kont tou bann bato Tarsis e kont tou bann bato marsandiz.
2.17: Bann fezer pou tom azenou e bann ki fer gran-nwar pou imilie. LESEGNER tousel pou dan laglwar, sa zour la.
2.18: Tou bann fos bondie pou disparet.
2.19: Zot pou vinn dan bann kavern e dan bann lakav. Ler li pou leve pou fer later gagn per, zot pou kasiet koler LESEGNER e grander so mazeste.
2.20: Sa zour-la, bann zom pou zet zot bann fos bondie an-arzan e an-or pou lera ek sovsouri manze; pou zet sa bann fos bondie ki zot ti fabrike pou adore.
2.21: Bann dimoun pou kasiet ant bann ros ek dan fant bann falez. Ler li pou leve pou fer later gagn per, zot pou kasiet koler LESEGNER ek grander so mazeste.
2.22: Aret kont lor bann mortel ki ena enn sel souf lavi: ki valer li ena?

3.1: LESEGNER, Bondie Toupwisan, pe retir dan Zerizalem e dan Zida tou resours ek provizion, tou zot stok dipin ek dilo.
3.2: Bann gerye, bann ziz e bann profet, bann deviner e bann ansien,
3.3: bann kapitenn e bann gran dimoun, bann konseye e bann saz, bann mazisien e bann longanis.
3.4: Mo pou fer bann zenes vinn zot bann sef. Bann ti zanfan pou gouvern zot.
3.5: Dimoun pou lager ant zot. Ant vwazin, pou ena bel deboulman. Bann zenn pou lev ar gran dimoun. Bann ti dimoun pou lev ar bann gran-misie.
3.6: Enn zom pou mem trap so frer dan lakaz so papa e pou dir li: “To ena enn manto, abe vinn nou sef alor. Tomem responsab sa bann lakaz kraze la”.
3.7: Sa zour-la, li pou leve pou li dir: “Mo pa enn dokter, dan mo lakaz pena dipin ek manto, napa fer mwa vinn sef lepep.”
3.8: Zerizalem finn maye e Zida finn tonbe. Akoz seki zot dir ek seki zot fer kont LESEGNER, zot pena okenn respe pou so grander ek so pwisans.
3.9: Zot figir mem fini kondann zot. Zot pa per pou tal zot pese parey kouma Sodom, zot pa finn kasiet nanye. Maler lor zot, parski zot finn fer zot prop maler!
3.10: Dir: Bienere seki fer lazistis parski li pou manz fri so bann aksion.
3.11: Ayo maler pou seki fer lemal, parski li pou gagn maltrete dapre so bann prop aksion.
3.12: Ayo mo pep! Bann zanfan pe met dir ar li, bann madam pe dominn li. To bann gid pe kondir twa dan perdision. e zot finn fer twa pran move sime.
3.13: LESEGNER pe leve pou li akize, li finn diboute, pou li ziz lepep.
3.14: LESEGNER vinn ziz bann ansien, so pep avek so bann sef: “Zot finn bril karo rezin. Seki zot finn kokin ar dimoun mizer, li dan zot lakaz.
3.15: Ki drwa zot ena pou kraz mo pep e defigir bann pov?” Ala LESEGNER Toupwisan finn koze.
3.16: LESEGNER dir: “Parski bann tifi Sion, zot alert e zot fer agreab, zot marse tipa-tipa pou fer sonn laklos dan zot lipie,
3.17: LESEGNER pou fer latet bann tifi Sion ranpli ar lagal e pou fer zot fron vinn touni.”
3.18: Sa zour la, LESEGNER pou tir bann akseswar: ti laklos, medayon,
3.20: foular, brasle pou lipie, sintir, parfin ek tabiz
3.24: Enn loder pouritir pou ranplas loder parfin. Dan plas enn sintir, pou gagn enn lakord. Dan plas enn zoli kwafir, latet pou raze. Dan plas enn zoli kostim, pou met enn sak goni. Dan plas zoli-zoli batman, pou ena enn mark fer rouz. Laont sa!
3.25: Zerizalem, to bann zom pou tonbe ar kout lepe. To bann gerye pou mor dan lager.
3.26: Lavil antie pou plengne e pou an-dey, to pou touni, to pou asiz anba.

4.1: Sa zour la, set fam pou trap enn sel zom e zot pou dir: “Nou pou tras nou bouse manze e noumem pou rod nou linz. Selman, les nou zis port to nom. Sap nou dan dezoner.”
4.2: Sa zour-la, seki LESEGNER pou fer pouse, pou vinn loner ek laglwar bann reskape Izrael. Fri later pou vinn zot fierte ek zot loner.
4.3: Seki pou reste dan Sion, e seki ki pou ankor vivan dan Zerizalem, pou apel zot sin. Zot nom pou ekrir dan liv lavi.
4.4: LESEGNER pou soufle enn divan lazistis e enn divan dife pou lav malpropte bann tifi Sion e netway disan Zerizalem ki finn fane.
4.5: Lerla, gran lazourne, LESEGNER pou anvoy lor tou montagn Sion, e lor so lasanble, enn niaz, enn lafime, enn letinsel dife, enn laflam dan lanwit. Partou kote, laglwar LESEGNER pou enn proteksion.
4.6: So laglwar pou enn latant ki donn lonbraz kan soley bat plin. Li pou vinn enn plas pou kasiet e enn proteksion kont loraz ek lapli.

5.1: Les mo sant pou mo bon kamarad, enn sante lamour pou so karo rezin: Mo kamarad ti ena enn karo rezin lor enn kolinn fertil.
5.2: Li finn fouye, li finn tir so bann ros, li finn plant enn zoli pie rezin, e li finn konstrir enn mirador omilie. Anplis, li finn fouy enn preswar. Li ti pe espere gagn bann zoli rezin me li finn gagn zis rezin amer.
5.3: Aster, zabitan Zerizalem, pep Zida, silvouple, port zot zizman ant mwa avek mo karo rezin.
5.4: Ki mo ti kapav fer ankor pou mo karo rezin e ki mo pa finn fer pou li? Mo ti pe espere gagn zoli zoli rezin, abe kifer li finn donn rezin amer?
5.5: Aster mo anvi fer zot kone seki mwa mo pou fer ar mo karo rezin. Mo pou tir so baraz, pou ki bann zanimo devor li, fer enn trou dan so lanklo, pou ki bann-la pil lor li.
5.6: Mo pou fer li vinn enn terin vag. Personn pa pou tay li, kiltiv li. Zepinn ek pikan pou pouse e mo pou donn lord niaz pa les lapli tom lor li.
5.7: Karo rezin LESEGNER Toupwisan, se pep Izrael, e karo ki li bien kontan, se zom ki res dan Zida. Li ti pe esper lazistis, me ki li finn trouve? Linzistis! Li ti pe esper drwatir, me ki linn tande? Malere pe kriye!
5.8: Ayo maler pou bann ki mont lakaz lor lakaz, ki azout karo ar karo ziska nepli res okenn plas, res zis zot tousel abitan dan pei.
5.9: LESEGNER Toupwisan finn fer sa serman-la dan mo zorey: Ala vremem boukou gran-gran, zoli-zoli lakaz pou kraze. Zot pou res vid.
5.10: Parski trwa ektar karo rezin pou donn zis enn ti tono divin, e san kilo dible, pou donn zis dis kilo lafarinn.
5.11: Ayo maler pou bann ki lev boner gramatin, pou galoup deryer boutey, ki kas poz ziska bien tar aswar, pou ki divin resof zot.
5.12: Lagitar, laarp, tanbourin, laflit ek divin dan zot bann program bwar, me par kont, seki LESEGNER fer, sa zot napa pran kont; e kreasion so lame, zot pa trouve.
5.13: Akoz samem mo pep pou konn lexil. Akoz zot pa finn anvi kone. Bann gran-misie aster pe mordefin e so pep pe mordeswaf.
5.14: Akoz samem lagorz lamor finn ouver, li pou ouver so labous an-gran, ankor pli gran. Ki so gran-dimoun, ki so ti-dimoun, zot tou pou desann dan enn bel tapaz.
5.15: Limanite pou ploye, e zom pou abese. Bann vantar pou marse latet bese.
5.16: Pou trouv grander LESEGNER Toupwisan atraver so drwatir, e Bondie Sin pou montre ki li sin atraver so lazistis.
5.17: Bann mouton pou manze parey kouma dan zot bann patiraz, e bann agno pou manz dan bann rwinn # 5:17 Isi tex ebre pa tro kler. So tradiksion difisil. .
5.18: Ayo maler pou bann ki ris lemal avek lakord mansonz e ki pe trenn dan pese kouma lakord diriz enn saryo.
5.19: Zot dir: “Degaze vit-vit fer travay la enn fwa, pou ki nou kapav trouve; Ki proze Bondie Izrael-la realize enn fwa, pou ki nou kapav konn li.”
5.20: Ayo maler pou bann ki pran pa bon pou bon e ki pran bon pou pa bon, bann ki met nwarte dan plas lalimier e lalimier dan plas nwarte. Bann ki fer amer vinn dou, e dou vinn amer.
5.21: Ayo maler pou bann ki krwar ki zot saz, e deklar pli malin.
5.22: Ayo maler pou bann ki gayar pou bwar divin, e sanpion pou melanz labwason.
5.23: Zot pran gous pou larg seki koupab, e pa fer lazistis pou bann inosan.
5.24: Akoz samem zot rasinn pou deperi kouma kadav, parey kouma laflam manz lapay e dife manz lerb sek. Zot bann fler pou fane kouma lapousier parski zot finn rezet instriksion LESEGNER Toupwisan, e zot finn mepriz bann koze Bondie Izrael.
5.25: Akoz samem koler LESEGNER finn anflame kont so pep. Li finn lev so lame kont li. Li finn tap li e bann montagn finn tranble. Zot kadav kouma salte dan milie sime. Akoz tousala, so koler pa finn kalme, so lame ankor lao.
5.26: Li signal enn pep ki lwin e li sifle kat kote later pou apel li. Alala, pep-la pe vini, vit-vit kouma zekler!
5.27: Kot bann-la, personn napa feb, personn napa maye, tonbe, personn napa gagn somey, zot tou zot sintir bien atase, e zot sandalet napa large.
5.28: Zot bann fles finn fite pwint, e tou zot bann ark finn pare pou vize. Bann sabo zot bann souval parey kouma ros, e zot bann larou kouma enn siklonn.
5.29: Zot kriye parey kouma enn lion. Kouma enn ti-lion, zot kriye. Zot grogne, e kan zot finn trap enn viktim, personn pa kapav fer zot larg li.
5.30: Zot pou grogne kont li sa zour-la, parey kouma tapaz lamer. Ler get later, nek ena marenwar ek langwas, lalimier vinn som ar gro-gro niaz.

6.1: Lane ki lerwa Ozias ti mor, mo ti gagn enn vizion. Dan mo vizion, mo finn trouv LESEGNER ki ti pe asize lor enn bel tronn ki ti drese bien ot. So rob ti telman long, li ti ranpli tanp-la.
6.2: Bann anz ti lao li, sakenn ti ena sis lezel: de pou kasiet zot figir, de pou kasiet zot lipie, ek de pou anvole.
6.3: Zot ti pe kriye ant zot: “Sin Sin Sin LESEGNER Toupwisan! Later antie ranpli avek so laglwar”.
6.4: Zot lavwa ti pe fer bann laport tranble lor zot baz, tanp ti ranpli avek lafime.
6.5: Lerla mo dir: “Ayo maler lor mwa! Ala mo finn fini, parski mo enn zom avek lalev inpir! Mo res omilie enn pep avek lalev inpir e mo lizie finn trouv Lerwa LESEGNER Toupwisan.”
6.6: Enn parmi bann anz-la ti anvol dan mo direksion, e dan so lame li ti pran enn labrez avek enn pins depi lor lotel.
6.7: Li finn tous mo labous, e li dir: “Sa finn tous to lalev, to fot fini fonn e to pese efase.”
6.8: Lerla mo finn tann lavwa LESEGNER: “Kisann-la mo pou anvoye? Kisannla pou vinn nou portparol?” Mo reponn: “Ala mo la, anvoy mwa”.
6.9: Li dir: “Ale, al dir sa pep-la: “Zot pou bon tande, tande mem, zot pa pou konpran. Zot pou bon gete, gete mem, zot pa pou kone.”
6.10: Fer leker sa pep-la andirsi, fer zot zorey pa tande, zot lizie pa trouve. Tansion li trouve avek so lizie, e li tande avek so zorey. Pangar so leker konpran, ki li revini, e li geri.”
6.11: Lerla mo dir: “Ziska kan Segner?” Li reponn: “Ziska seki bann lavil devaste, san okenn abitan, e personn dan lakaz. Ziska seki later devaste, vinn enn dezolasion.
6.12: LESEGNER pou pous bann dimoun, e pei la antie pou abandone.
6.13: E mem si enn diziem revini, pou koup li kouma enn gran pie. Li pou kouma enn senn ki bisron finn abat. Res zis so rasinn, e sa rasinn-la, li enn semans ki sin.”

7.1: Lepok Akaz, garson Yotam, ti-garson Ozias ki ti lerwa Zida, Rezinn, lerwa Aram, e Peka, lerwa Izrael, garson Remalyaou, ti atak Zerizalem. Me zot pa finn reisi kaptir li.
7.2: Akaz, desandan David, tann dir ki Aram finn zwenn ar Efraim. So leker tranble, e leker so pep tranble kouma lafore dan siklonn.
7.3: Lerla, LESEGNER dir Izai: “Sorti pou to al zwenn Akaz, twa e Sear-Yasouv to garson, lao laba kot finision kanal ki sort dan rezervwar, lor larout dan landrwa kot abitie lav linz.
7.4: E to pou dir li: “Pran kont, res trankil. Napa gagn per. Pa perdi kouraz divan sa de bout sarbon ki pe fer lafime-la e akoz lakoler Rezinn, Aram e garson Remalyaou.
7.5: Parski Aram, Efraim e garson Remalyaou finn manigans kont twa kan zot finn dir:
7.6: ‘Anou atak Zida. Anou fer li gagn per. Anou kraze, rantre. Nou ava fer garson Tavel vinn so lerwa.’”
7.7: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Pena sime sa arive
7.8: Parski latet Aram se Damas, e latet Damas, se Rezinn; ankor swasann-sink an, e Efraim pou nepli enn pep.
7.9: Latet Efraim se Samari, e latet Samari, se garson Remalyaou. Si zot pa tini ferm, zot pa pou kapav reziste.”
7.10: LESEGNER ti kontign koz ar Akaz:
7.11: “Dimann enn sign pou twa divan LESEGNER to Bondie, swa depi profonder later, ouswa depi oter lesiel.”
7.12: Akaz dir: “Mo pa pou dimann nanye, e mo pa pou teste LESEGNER.”
7.13: Lerla Izai reponn: “Tande, twa lakaz David! Li pa ase ki zot fatig bann zom? Zot bizin fatig mo Bondie osi parey?
7.14: Ala kifer LESEGNER limem pou donn zot enn sign: Ala zennfi la pou ansint. Li pou gagn enn zanfan, enn garson, e li pou apel Emaniel, ki vedir Bondie avek nou.
7.15: Li pou manz lakrem ek dimiel ziska seki li konn rezet lemal e swazir lebien.
7.16: Parski, avan mem ki garson-la konn rezet lemal e swazir lebien, sa later kot sa de lerwa-la pe fer twa per, pou abandone.
7.17: LESEGNER pou fer vinn lor twa, lor to pep e lor lakaz to papa, enn lepok ki zame pa ti ankor trouve depi separasion Efraim avek Zida, lerwa Asour.
7.18: Sa zour la, kan li sifle, LESEGNER pou anvoy bann mous ki lot kote larivier Lezip, e li pou anvoy bann mous dimiel ki dan pei Asour.
7.19: Zot pou vini, e zot tou pou poz dan bann larivier, dan bann ravin e dan fant bann ros, lor bann bwison partou kot ena dilo.
7.20: Sa zour-la, LESEGNER pou raz avek enn razwar ki li finn lwe lot kote larivier avek lerwa Asour: seve, pwal lazam, mem labarb, li pou tire.
7.21: Sa zour la, sakenn pou debat zis avek enn ti vas ek de kabri.
7.22: Prodiksion dile pou telman boukou ki seki reskape dan milie pei pou manz dile kaye ek dimiel.
7.23: Sa zour-la, tou bann landrwa kot ti ena mil pie rezin valer mil pies larzan, pou vinn pikan loulou.
7.24: Pou rantre avek bann fles e avek bann ark parski pei-la antie pou ranpli ar pikan loulou.
7.25: To pou nepli al lor bann montagn kot ti pe pas pios, akoz bann pikan loulou-la: li pou vinn enn landrwa kot bef manze ek mouton traverse.”

8.1: LESEGNER dir mwa: “Pran enn gran tablet e ekrir lorla avek enn kreyon ordiner: Atak antret-degaze kokin.”
8.2: Pran bann temwin ki to kapav fer konfians, pret Ouriya avek Zekaryaou, garson Yeberekyaou.
8.3: Mo finn gagn relasion ar profetes, li finn tom ansint, e li finn gagn enn garson. LESEGNER dir mwa: “Apel li: Maher-Shalal-Hash-Baz,” ki vedir “Atak antret-degaze kokin,”
8.4: parski avan mem ki garson la pou konn dir: “Papa, Mama”, bann la pou fini kokin rises Damas ek Samari divan lerwa Asour.”
8.6: “Sa pep ki finn refiz dilo Siloe ki ti pe koul dousma-dousma la, li finn tranble divan Rason ek garson Remalyaou.
8.7: Akoz samem LESEGNER pe fer kouran larivier ki pwisan-la mont kont li. Sa kouran-la, se lerwa Asour avek tou so laglwar. So laglwar pou monte, partou kot ena bann vale, e pou fransi tou bann rebor larivier.
8.8: Li pou pas dan Zida, li pou deborde, travers partou kote. Li pou mont enn oter kot ena danze. Li pou ouver gran so bann lezel pou protez pei-la antie! Emaniel, Bondie avek nou!”
8.9: Tranble # 8:9 Ena enn dout lor sinifikasion sa mo-la, enn bann lezot tradiksion dir “zwenn ansam”. pep! Gagn per! Tande tou bann pei ki lwin. Pare pou lager, e gagn per.
8.10: Bel bel proze zot fer? Li pou fel. Fer bel-bel plan? Li pa pou marse; parski “Bondie ar nou”.
8.11: Wi, ala kouma LESEGNER finn koz ar mwa, kan so lame finn sezi mwa, e ki li finn averti mwa pou pa swiv sime sa pep-la:
8.12: “Pa bizin apel konplo tou seki lepep apel konplo. Pa bizin per seki fer bann-la per e gagn lafreyer.
8.13: LESEGNER Toupwisan, limem zot pou proklam sin. Limem zot pou gagn per.
8.14: Li pou enn refiz, me li pou osi enn ros ki fer tonbe. Izrael ek Zida, toulede pou kogn ar sa ros-la e zot pou tonbe. Li pou enn file, ek enn piez pou bann abitan Zerizalem.
8.15: Boukou pou bat ar li, pou tonbe, e pou kraze. Zot pou maye, anserkle.”
8.16: Gard temwagnaz-la an sir. Met bann instriksion-la an-sekirite pou mo bann disip:
8.17: “Mo esper dan LESEGNER ki kasiet so figir divan lakaz Zakob, e mo met mo lespwar dan li.
8.18: Alalila: mwa, ek bann zanfan ki LESEGNER finn donn mwa, nou koumadir bann sign e bann sinbol dan Izrael pou LESEGNER Tou Pwisan ki res lor Montagn Sion.
8.19: Enn bann pe dir: “Dimann lespri bann mor, ki koz dousma e ki predir lavenir. Eski li pa normal, ki enn pep dimann konsey so bann bondie, e koz ar bann mor lor nom bann vivan
8.20: pou kone ki bizin fer?” Ala mo pe dir: Bann dimoun ki koz koumsa, zot pa pou trouv lizour.
8.21: Kan zot pou travers pei-la, zot pou akable e afame. Ler zot pou mordefin, zot pou ankoler. Lerla, zot pou modi zot lerwa ek zot bann bondie. Zot pou tourn ver lesiel.
8.22: Apre zot pou get later: Ala zot trouv zis langwas, maler ek marenwar ki fer per.
8.23: Me pou nepli ena marenwar pou bann ki ti dan detres. Lontan, pei Zabilon ek Neftali ti imilie. Dan lavenir, sime ki akote lamer, pei dan les Zourdin ek Galile, distrik bann etranze, pou gagn laglwar.

9.1: Lepep ki ti pe mars dan teneb finn trouv enn gran lalimier. Enn lalimier pe briye pou bann ki ti pe viv lor later marenwar.
9.2: To finn fer nasion-la grandi, to finn miltipliye so lazwa. Zot dan lazwa divan twa parey kouma nou zwaye kan rekolt vini, parey kouma nou kontan kan fer partaz enn trezor.
9.3: Parski pwa ki ti pe pez lor li, fardo lor so zepol, baton so sardar, to finn kas zot kouma kan bann Madianit ti gagn bate.
9.4: Tou bot bann lennmi ki rezone lor later, tou iniform bann solda ki tase ar disan, pou bril zot, dife pou manz zot.
9.5: Enn zanfan finn ne; finn donn nou enn garson. Lotorite pou repoz lor so zepol e so nom Gran konseye, Bondie Toupwisan, Papa pou touzour, Prins lape.
9.6: So pouvwar pou propaze, e lape ki zame napa fini pou vinn lor tronn David e lor so rwayom. Li pou stabiliz so rwayote e pou rann li for, dan lazistis ek drwatir, aster la e pou touzour. LESEGNER Tou pwisan dan so gran pasion ki pou akonpli sa.
9.7: LESEGNER finn anvoy enn parol kont Zakob. Parol-la finn tom lor Izrael.
9.8: Tou pep pou konn sa. Efraim ek abitan Samari ki pe dir avek enn leker ranpli ar lorgey ek arogans:
9.9: “Bann blok finn tonbe, me nou pou konstrir avek bann ros taye. Bann pie sikomor finn koupe, me nou pou ranplas zot avek bann pie sed.”
9.10: Me LESEGNER finn soutenir lennmi Rason kont sa lepep la. Li finn eksit so bann lennmi.
9.11: Aram dan Les, bann Filistin dan Lwes, zot finn devor Izrael avek zot labous. Akoz tousala, so koler pa finn kalme, so lame ankor lao.
9.12: Me pep-la pa finn revinn ver seki ti pe tap li. Li pa finn rod LESEGNER Toupwisan.
9.13: Lerla, LESEGNER finn koup latet ek lake Izrael, brans palmie ek rozo dan enn sel zour.
9.14: Gran dimoun ek dimoun onorab, zot mem latet-la. Profet ki montre kouma koz manti, zot mem lake-la.
9.15: Bann gid sa pep-la finn fer li perdi, e bann ki zot finn gide, finn disparet.
9.16: Akoz samem LESEGNER pou nepli trouv so lazwa dan sa bann zennzan-la. Li pou nepli gagn pitie so bann orfelin ek so bann vev, parski zot tou bann foser e koripter. Tou labous nek koz ninport. Akoz tousala, so koler pa finn fini, so lame ankor leve.
9.17: Vremem, mesanste finn brile kouma enn dife. Li finn devor pikan ek zepinn. Li finn bril bann bwison dan lafore. Enn tourbiyon lafime pe fane partou.
9.18: Akoz debordman koler LESEGNER, later finn brile, e lepep koumadir finn pieze dan dife. Personn napa gagn pitie so frer.
9.19: Zot devor zot kamarad lor kote drwat, me zot gagn ankor fin. Zot devor dan kote gos, me zot pankor rasazie. Zot devor laser zot prop zanfan.
9.20: Manase devor Efraim, Efraim devor Manase. Ansam zot atak Zida. Akoz tousala, so koler pa finn kalme, so lame ankor leve.

10.1: Ayo maler pou bann ki fer bann regleman inzis, pou bann ki ekrir lalwa pou kraz dimoun.
10.2: Zot anpes bann ki feb gagn lazistis, zot pa les bann ti-dimoun dan mo pep viv dapre zot drwa. Zot devaliz bann vev, e zot abiz bann orfelin.
10.3: Ki zot pou fer kan mo pou pini zot? Ler maler pou sort depi lwin pou vini, kot kisann-la zot pou ale pou rod sekour? Kot zot pou les zot bann rises?
10.4: Kouma zot pou fer pou pa mars kat pat ansam avek bann prizonie? E ki manier zot pou fer pou ki zot pa tom ansam avek bann ki finn asasine? Akoz tousala, so koler pa finn kalme, so lame ankor leve.
10.5: Ayo maler lor Asour, limem rotin mo koler. Baton ki dan so lame, ar samem mo pou montre mo laraz.
10.6: Mo pe anvoy li kont enn pei infidel. Kont lepep ar ki mo ti ankoler, mo pe anvoy li. Pou depouy zot e pou pran tou zot dibien. Pou pietinn zot kouma labou dan sime.
10.7: Me li, Asour, li pa ti pe mazinn sa koumsa. So leker pa ti gagn sa panse la, parski li ti pe pans zis pou detrir. Li ti anvi exterminn otan pei ki kapav.
10.8: Li ti pe dir: “Eski li pa vre ki tou mo bann sef bann lerwa?
10.9: Eski li pa vre ki Kalno parey kouma Karkemis? Ki Amat parey kouma Arpad? E ki Samari parey kouma Damas?
10.10: Mo finn kapav met lame lor rwayom bann fos bondie, kot ena plis idol ki kot Zerizalem ek Samari.
10.11: Gete ki mo finn fer kont Samari ek so bann fos bondie. Eski mo pa pou fer parey kont Zerizalem ek so bann stati?”
10.12: Me kan LESEGNER pou fini tou so travay lor montagn Sion e Zerizalem, li pou pini lerwa Asour akoz so gran lorgey e so regar arogan.
10.13: Parski lerwa-la finn dir: “Akoz mo lame li pwisan ki mo finn reisi fer sa. Akoz mo sazes. Parski mo finn azir avek lintelizans. Mo finn anlev bann frontier ant bann pep. Mo finn kokin zot bann trezor. Kouma enn pwisan, mo finn tir bann lerwa lor zot tronn e mo finn zet zot anba.
10.14: Parey kouma nou avoy lame lor enn nik, mo finn pran tou rises bann pep. Kouma nou ramas bann dizef abandone, mo finn ramas tou seki ti lor later; pa enn sel finn bat so lezel, pa enn finn ouver so labek pou dir kiksoz.”
10.15: Eski lars kapav fer vantar ar seki pe servi li? Eski lansar kapav fer gran-nwar ar seki pe servi li? Pena sime enn rotin bouz lebra seki pe lev li; oubien enn dibwa diriz lame seki pe tini li!
10.16: Akoz samem Lesegner, BONDIE Toupwisan pou fer zot bann teritwar gra vinn meg-meg. Zot bote ek zot laglwar pou brile kouma dife bril partou.
10.17: Lalimier Izrael pou vinn enn dife, e so Bondie pou vinn laflam. Li pou brile e pou manz so bann pikan ek so bann rons dan enn sel zour.
10.18: Li pou fini net so bann lafore bien ver ek so plantasion. Li pou kouma enn dimoun malad ki pe deperi.
10.19: Bann pie ki reste dan so lafore sitan pou tigit, ki mem enn zanfan pou kapav kont zot.
10.20: Sa zour la, leres Izrael ek bann ki ti ankor vivan dan lepep Zakob pou aret apiy zot lor bann ki tap zot. Zot pou apiy vremem lor LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael.
10.21: Enn restan pou revini, reskape pep Zakob pou revinn kot Bondie pwisan Izrael.
10.22: Ayo Izrael, mem si to pep ti boukou parey kouma disab dan bor lamer, zis enn ti restan ki pou revini. Destriksion finn deside, lazistis pou deborde kouma larivier.
10.23: Wi, Lesegner, BONDIE Toupwisan finn fini desid pou amenn destriksion dan sa pei-la antie.
10.24: Akoz samem Lesegner, BONDIE Toupwisan pe koze: “Ayo mo pep ki pe res dan Sion, napa gagn per Asour! Li bat twa avek enn baton, li lev so matrak kont twa lor sime Lezip.
10.25: Me ankor enn tigit letan, mo pou aret ankoler kont twa. Mo pou detrir to lennmi.”
10.26: LESEGNER Toupwisan pou lev so fwet kont Lasiri, parey kouma li frap Madian kot montagn Oreb. li pou lev so baton kont lamer, kouma li ti fer kont Lezip.
10.27: Sa zour la, li pou tir sa pwa-la pou lor to zepol. Li pou kraz sa fardo ki lor to likou-la.
10.28: Zot finn ariv lor Ayat, zot finn pas Migron, zot finn les so bagaz Mikmas.
10.29: Zot finn pas dan gorz, zot finn pas lanwit dan Geba, Bann abitan Rama pe tranble, bann ki res Gibea, pei Sail pe sove.
10.30: Abitan Galim, plore for-for, fer atansion Lisha! Reponn li, Anatot!
10.31: Bann abitan Madmena pe sove; bann abitan Gebim pe kasiet.
10.32: Sa zour-la, lennmi pou aret dan lavil Nob, li pou lev koutpwin pou menas montagn Sion, kolinn Zerizalem.
10.33: Ala ki LESEGNER Toupwisan pe koup bann brans avek violans, li pe abat bann pie ki pli gran, li pe zet bann zarb ki pli ot anba.
10.34: Pou koup bann touf lafore kout lars. Bann zoli pie Sed Liban pou tom anba.

11.1: Enn ti brans pou sorti dan tron Zese. Enn ti bourzon pou sorti dan so rasinn.
11.2: Lor li, Lespri LESEGNER pou repoze: Lespri lasazes e disernman, lespri konsey ek lafors, lespri konesans ek lakrint LESEGNER.
11.3: Li pou trouv so linspirasion dan lakrint LESEGNER. Li napa pou zize apre seki so lizie trouve. Li napa pou pran desizion apre seki so zorey tande.
11.4: Li pou ziz bann feb dapre lalwa. Li pa pou get ar de lizie kan li ziz bann pov ki dan pei. So parol, kouma enn baton, pou koriz pei-la. Li pou touy seki move avek lesouf so labous.
11.5: Lazistis pou vinn enn sintir otour so lerin. Fidelite pou antour so laans.
11.6: Loulou pou res avek ti-kabri. Leopar pou dormi pre kot ti-sev. Piti bef ek piti lion pou manz ansam, enn ti garson pou kondir zot.
11.7: Vas avek lours pou gagn mem patiraz. Zot piti pou dormi kotakot. Ki so lion, ki so bef, pou manz lapay.
11.8: Ti-baba pou amiz li lor nik kobra. Ti-zanfan pou met so lame lor lakaz serpan.
11.9: Pa pou ena lemal, pa pou ena destriksion lor mo montagn sin, parski pei-la pou ranpli avek konesans LESEGNER, parey kouma kan lamare monte.
11.10: Sa zour-la, rasinn Zese pou vinn enn signal pou tou bann pei. Bann pep pou rod li, e so lakaz pou konn laglwar.
11.11: Pou arive sa zour la, ki LESEGNER pou lev so lame ankor enn fwa pou liber leres so pep, bann ki res dan Lasiri, Lezip, Patros, Kous, Elam, Sinear, Amat e dan bann zil.
11.12: Li pou donn enn signal pou bann pei, li pou rasanble bann exile Izrael, li pou reini bann ki finn disperse depi Zida pou al kat kote later.
11.13: Zalouzi Efraim pou arete. Bann lennmi Zida pou mor. Efraim pou nepli zalou Zida, e Zida pou nepli persekit Efraim.
11.14: Kote Lwes, zot pou fransi, desann bann kolinn, lor bann Filistin. Ansam zot pou fer piyaz kot bann ki res dan Les. Zot pou anvoy zot lame lor Edom ek Moab. Bann garson Amon pou vinn zot esklav.
11.15: LESEGNER pou fer labe lamer lezip vinn sek. Ar so lame, li pou aret larivier. Par pwisans so lesouf, li pou diviz larivier-la an set lebra. Lerla pou kapav travers zot ar savat.
11.16: Pou ena enn gran larout pou leres so pep ki res dan Lasiri. Parey kouma pou Izrael sa zour kot li ti kit pei Lezip la.

12.1: Sa zour-la to pou dir: “Mo rann twa gras SEGNER parski to ti ankoler kont mwa, me to koler finn kalme, e to finn konsol mwa.
12.2: Alalila, limem Bondie mo sover! Mo ena konfians, e mo nepli tranble parski LESEGNER, limem mo lafors e mo pwisans. Limem ki finn sov mwa.”
12.3: Dan enn gran lazwa, zot pou pran dilo dan lasours delivrans.
12.4: Sa zour la, zot pou dir: “Selebre LESEGNER, proklam so nom, fer konn bann gran kiksoz ki li finn fer dan bann pei. Rapel kouma li gran.”
12.5: Sant enn bann sante pou LESEGNER parski li fer bel-bel kiksoz. Fer later antie konn sa.
12.6: Kriye! Kriy to lazwa, twa ki res lor montagn Sion. Parski Bondie Izrael li gran, e li viv la, akote twa.

13.1: Mesaz pou Babilonn, ki Izai, garson Amoz, finn gagne.
13.2: Lor enn montagn kot pena pie, donn enn signal. Kriy bien for pou bann-la tande, Donn signal, pou ki bann-la kapav vinn kot laport bann nob.
13.3: Momem mo finn donn lord mo bann gerye. Mo finn apel mo bann meyer solda pou zot manifeste mo koler, e pou zot montre mo grander.
13.4: Tande! Bann montagn pe grogne, koumadir enn gran lafoul. Tande! Bann rwayom pe fer tapaz. Bann pei finn rasanble. LESEGNER Toupwisan pe inspekte so larme ki pou al konbat.
13.5: LESEGNER pe sorti dan enn pei bien lwin avek bann zarm so koler, pou fer ravaz partou dan pei.
13.6: Kriye, plore! Parski zour LESEGNER pe koste. Sa zour-la, Bondie Toupwisan la pou fer bel ravaz partou.
13.7: Akoz samem tou bann lame pou afebli, e tou leker bann zom pou fonn.
13.8: Zot pou dan enn gran freyer, kranp ek douler pou trap zot. Kouma enn madam ansint zot pou korde. Sakenn pou get so kamarad, zot pou nepli konpran. Zot figir pou brile ar laper.
13.9: Ala zour LESEGNER pe vini! Pena bare divan so koler ek so laraz. Li pou fer later vinn enn dezolasion. Li pou kraz bann peser.
13.10: Bann zetwal lesiel, ek zot bann konstelasion, pou aret briye. Zot lalimier pou vinn som. Kan zetwal ek lalinn pou aparet, zot lalimier pou nepli briye.
13.11: Mo pou fer liniver antie rann kont zot mesanste. Mo pou fer bann move dimoun rann kont ditor ki zot finn fer. Mo pou aret lorgey bann vantar. Mo pou tengn larogans bann violan.
13.12: Mo pou fer zom vinn pli rar ki lor vennkat kara, pli rar ki lor ki sorti Ofir.
13.13: Akoz samem, mo pou sakouy lesiel, mo pou fer later tranble. Samem zour kot LESEGNER Toupwisan pou sap lor kal, kot so koler pou anflame.
13.14: Lerla sakenn pou retourn kot so pep. Sakenn pou al kasiet dan so pei. Zot pou parey kouma enn serf kan lasas li, parey kouma enn mouton ki personn pa finn okipe.
13.15: Tou dimoun ki nou pou trouve, zot pou transperse ar bann fles. Tou bann ki nou pou kaptire, pou mor kout lepe.
13.16: Zot pou trouv bann-la kraz zot bann zanfan. Zot lakaz pou kraze. Pou viol zot bann madam.
13.17: Mo pou anvoy kont zot bann Med. Sa bann-la, nanye pa kapav kalme zot, pa mem larzan, ni lor.
13.18: Zot bann fles pou touy bann zennzan. Mem bann nouvo-ne napa pou sape. Zot pa pou ena pitie pou zanfan.
13.19: Babilonn, pli zoli rwayom, pli zoli bizou bann Kaldeen, pou vinn kouma Sodom ek Gomor, anbalao akoz Bondie.
13.20: Zenerasion apre zenerasion, zame personn pou nepli res laba. Mem bann nomad, pa pou vinn dres zot latant laba. Mem bann berze, pa pou amenn zot troupo repoze laba.
13.21: Li pou vinn enn baz pou bann zanimo sovaz. Bann sovsouri pou ranpli zot lakaz, bann otris e bann kabri pou dans dan landrwa-la.
13.22: Bann yenn pou kriye dan zot bann latour. Bann sakal pou promne dan zot gran-gran pale. Sa letan-la pre pou vini, li pa pou tarde.

14.1: Wi, LESEGNER pou gagn pitie Zakob. Ankor enn fwa, li pou swazir Izrael. Li pou fer zot repoze lor zot later. Bann etranze pou zwenn ar zot, e zot pou fer enn sel avek lakaz Zakob.
14.2: Lepep etranze pou pran zot e pou ramenn zot dan zot pei. Lor later LESEGNER, bann-la pou vinn serviter e servant dan lakaz Izrael. Li pou met dan prizon bann ki ti fer li vinn prizonie. Li pou gouvern bann ki ti fer dominer ar li.
14.3: Enn zour pou arive kot LESEGNER pou fer twa repoze. Li pou tir twa dan lapenn, langwas ek lesklavaz ki bann-la finn obliz twa viv.
14.4: To pou sant enn sante foutan kont lerwa Babilonn: Ki finn arive ar dominer-la? Kouma so lopresion finn fini?
14.5: LESEGNER finn kas baton bann move dimoun. Li finn kas lotorite bann dirizan
14.6: ki ti pe bat bann pep avek laraz, ki pa ti pe fini bate mem, e ki ti pe dominn bann pep avek boukou violans.
14.7: Later antie pe repoz trankil aster. Bann-la kriy zot lazwa.
14.8: Mem bann pie pe partaz to lazwa. Bann sed ki dan Liban pe dir: “Aster ki to pe repoze, personn napa vinn abat nou.”
14.9: Anba laba dan lemond bann mor, bann la pe tranble akoz to pe vini. Akoz twa, li finn revey bann nam, bann gran sef ki lor later, e tou lerwa bann pei.
14.10: Zot tou zot koumans koze pou zot dir twa: “Twa osi to finn afebli kouma nou, to parey kouma nou.”
14.11: To grander finn desann dan lemond bann mor. Lerla, lamizik to bann sitar ti pe zwe. To matla, enn pouritir e to molton ranpli ar lever.
14.12: Ki finn arive pou ki to tom depi lesiel, twa zetwal briyan, twa garson soley ki ti pe leve? Kouma bann-la finn zet twa anba, twa ki ti pe dominn bann pei?
14.13: Twa ki ti pe dir dan to leker: “Mo pou mont ziska lesiel. Mo pou ris mo tronn pli lao ki bann zetwal Bondie, mo pou asiz lor montagn kot bann bondie reini dan finfon lenor.
14.14: Mo pou mont lao dan niaz. Mo pou parey kouma Bondie Treo.
14.15: Me bann la, finn desann twa dan lemond bann mor; dan fon enn gran fose.”
14.16: Bann ki trouv twa, fixe zot regar lor twa: “Limem sa? Limem ki ti pe fer later tranble la? Li mem ki ti pe fer bann rwayom tonbe la?
14.17: Li finn fer lemond vinn enn dezer. Li ti pe kraz bann lavil. Li pa ti pe les bann prizonie rant kot zot.”
14.18: Tou lerwa bann pei, pou gagn loner repoz dan zot tonbo.
14.19: Par kont twa, bann-la finn zet twa deor, lwin avek to tonbo, kouma enn ninport, o milie bann ki finn masakre, ki finn transperse avek lepe, ki finn desann dan fon lafos. To pou parey kouma enn kadav kan nou mars lor li.
14.20: To pa pou avek zot dan mem simitier parski to finn kraz to pei, to finn touy to pep. Pou bliye nom desandan bann malfeter pou touzour.
14.21: Prepar zot pou touy bann garson pou bann krim ki zot papa finn fer, pangar zot leve pou pran tou later pou zot, pangar zot kouver lemond antie avek lavil.
14.22: Ala seki LESEGNER Toupwisan pe dir: “Mo pou dres kont zot, mo pou efas nom Babilonn, mo pou rey li lor map, li avek so bann zanfan e zanfan so bann zanfan.
14.23: Mo pou fer li vinn enn lakaz tang, enn lamar. Mo pou balye li pou fer li disparet net.” Samem ki LESEGNER Toupwisan pe dir.
14.24: LESEGNER Toupwisan finn fer sa serman la: Seki mo ti ena lintansion fer, vremem samem pou arive. Seki mo finn deside, samem pou deroule.
14.25: Mo pou kraz pwisans Lasiri dan mo pei. Mo pou pil lor li lor mo bann montagn. Mo pou fer li tir pwa ki li finn met lor mo pep, fardo ki li finn met lor so zepol.
14.26: Samem proze ki mo ena kont later antie. So lame finn leve kont tou bann pei.
14.27: Ler LESEGNER Toupwisan finn fer enn proze, kisann-la pou aret sa? So lame finn fini leve pou bate, Kisannla pou bare?
14.28: Lane lamor lerwa Akaz, samem mesaz ki finn proklame:
14.29: Filisti, pa parski baton ki ti pe bat twa finn kase, ki to bizin kontan. Enn viper pou sorti dan kadav sa serpan-la. Dan sa viper-la, enn dragon volan pou sorti.
14.30: Bann ki pli pov pou kouma enn troupo ki gagn bon manze. Bann malere pou gagn repo ek sekirite. Me twa, mo pou touf to rasinn ar lafaminn, e lafaminn-la pou touy tou seki reste.
14.31: Plore laport! Kriye lavil! Tonbe Filisti! Tom net! Depi lenor, enn lafime ape vini. Tou solda finn pare pou konba.
14.32: Ki pou reponn bann mesaze sa pei la? Ala seki pou reponn: “LESEGNER finn poz fondasion Sion. Lamem ki bann pov parmi so pep pou trouv zot proteksion.”

15.1: Ala enn mesaz kont Moab. Gete! Lespas enn lanwit Ar finn kraze, Moab finn devaste. Lespas enn lanwit Kir finn kraze, Moab finn devaste.
15.2: Bann abitan Dibon finn mont dan tanp, lao laba pou zot plore. Lor Nebo e lor Medeba, Moab pe lamante. Tou bann latet finn raze. Tou labarb finn koupe.
15.3: Dan bann sime, zot finn abiy zot ar sak-goni pou montre zot dey. Lor bann twa lakaz e dan bann landrwa piblik, tou dimoun pe plengne, pe plore.
15.4: Esbonn ek Eleale finn kriye. Ziska dan Yaas finn tann zot lavwa. Akoz samem bann gerye Moab pe tranble ar laper. So nam pe tranble, pe dimande ki pou ariv li.
15.5: Mo bien sagrin pou Moab. Bann ki pe sove finn fini ariv Soar pre kot Eglat-Selissia. Pe mont lamontan Lwit, pe plor touzour. Lor sime Oronayim, enn lavwa pe kriye, plore, pe anons destriksion.
15.6: Oazis Nimrim finn vinn enn dezer. Lerb finn sek, gazon finn mor, nepli ena okenn pie.
15.7: Akoz samem, zot finn amenn dibien ki zot finn reysi sove, bann kitsoz ki finn reste lot kote larivier Pie Banian.
15.8: Pe tann kriy osekour otour Moab. Ziska Eglayim ek Beer-Elim, pe tann sa kriye-la.
