44.13: Skilpter dibwa dres enn lakord. Li tras zimaz la ar lakre. Li fer li ar sizo, e li desinn li ar konpa. Li fer li dapre seki zom ete, dapre seki zoli pou zom, pou li res dan enn lakaz.
44.14: Li finn koup bann pie sed. Li finn swazir enn pie senn ek enn lot gran pie. Li finn les zot grandi avek bann lezot pie dan lafore. Li finn plant enn pie pin ki lapli finn fer grandi.
44.15: Servi dibwa la pou alim dife, pou resof li. Alim li pou kwi dipin. Ar samem dibwa-la li fer enn bondie pou priye avek li. Li fer enn idol pou prostern divan li.
44.16: Li ti bril lamwatie dan dife. Lor sa lamwatie la, li roti laviann, li manze, li rasazie. Anmemtan li resof limem e li dir: “A! Mo finn bien sofe e mo pe santi sa dife la.”
44.17: Avek seki reste li fer enn bondie, so idol, e li prostern divan li. Li ador li, li priye li, li dir: “Sap mwa, parski tomem mo bondie.”
44.18: Zot napa kone, zot napa konpran, parski zot lizie pa kapav trouve, e zot leker pa kapav reflesi.
44.19: Pena personn ki reflesi dan so leker, ki ena konesans ek lintelizans pou li dir: “Mo finn bril lamwatie dan dife e mo finn kwi dipin lor labrez. Mo finn roti laviann e mo finn manz li; avek seki reste, mo pou fer enn kiksoz abominab, mo pou prostern mwa divan enn bout dibwa!”
44.20: Li finn met so konfians an enn kitsoz ki kapak vinn lasann. So leker finn fose e finn fer li saye. Li pa pou sov so lavi. Li pa pou dir: “Seki mo ena dan mo lame-la, pa enn kiksoz ki fos sa?”
44.21: Rapel twa sa, Zakob e Izrael, parski tomem mo serviter. Mo finn fasonn twa. To enn serviter pou mwa, Izrael. Zame mo napa pou bliye twa.
44.22: Mo finn efas to bann revolt kouma enn niaz e to bann pese kouma laroze. Revinn ar mwa, parski mo finn liber twa.
44.23: Lesiel, kriye zot lazwa parski LESEGNER finn azir. Kriye, profonder later. Montagn, fer to lazwa eklate! Lafore avek tou so bann pie. Parski LESEGNER finn liber Zakob, li finn glorifie Izrael.
44.24: Ala seki LESEGNER, to sover, pe dir. Limem ki finn fasonn twa depi dan vant to mama. Momem LESEGNER ki finn fer tou kiksoz, ki finn deroul lesiel, fer later vinn ferm. Pa ti ena personn avek mwa;
44.25: ki anpes foste ki bann manter predir arive, e fer bann ki dir lavenir vinn boufon; ki fer bann saz revinn an-aryer e fer zot konesans vinn koz ninport;
44.26: ki konfirm parol so serviter e fer proze so bann mesaze reisi. Ki dir Zerizalem: “Bann la pou abit kot twa”, e bann lavil Zida: “Bann la pou rebatir zot e mo pou relev bann rwinn Zerizalem.”
44.27: Momem ki fer fonder lamer vinn sek, mo pou anpes bann larivier ranpli twa.
44.28: Mo pou dir Siris: “Tomem mo berze!” To pou akonplir tou mo volonte Li pou dir Zerizalem: “Bann la pou rekonstrir twa.” e li pou dir Tanp-la: “Bann la pou poz to fondasion.”

45.1: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir so mesi, Siris. Mo finn pran to lame drwat pou fer bann pei ploye divan twa, e bann lerwa perdi zot pouvwar. Pou ouver divan twa bann laport lavil ki ti ferme.
45.2: Momem ki pou mars divan twa. Mo pou fer montagn vinn plat. Mo pou kas bann laport an-bronz, mo pou kas bann serir feray.
45.3: Mo pou donn twa bann trezor ki ti dan marenwar, bann rezerv ki ti kasiet, pou ki to kone ki momem LESEGNER, ki apel twa par to nom, Bondie Izrael.
45.4: Akoz mo serviter Zakob, e Izrael ki mo finn swazir, mo finn apel twa par to nom. Mo donn twa enn nom; me twa, to napa konn mwa.
45.5: Momem LESEGNER, pena personn kouma mwa. Apar mwa, pena lezot Bondie. Mo pe may twa; me twa, to napa konn mwa.
45.6: Asterla, depi les ziska lwes, tou dimoun pou kone ki pena enn lot kouma mwa: momem LESEGNER, pena lot.
45.7: Mo fasonn lalimier. Mo kree marenwar. Mo fer lape. Mo kree maler. Momem LESEGNER ki fer tousala.
45.8: Lesiel, fer laroze tonbe. Ki bann niaz devers lazistis. Ki later ouver e les delivrans anfler. Ki anmemtan li fer lazistis zerme. Momem LESEGNER ki finn kre tousala.
45.9: Ayo! Maler pou seki rezinbe ar so Kreater. Li enn sinp vaz-later parmi lezot! Eski larzil dir so potie: “Ki to pe fer?” Eski travay ki to finn fer pou dir twa: “To pena lame!”
45.10: Maler pou seki dir so papa: “Ki kalite zanfan to finn fer?” E maler pou seki dir enn mama: “Ki kalite zanfan to finn donn nesans?”
45.11: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir, Bondie Izrael, so kreater: “Zot ki pe poz mwa kestion lor mo bann zanfan. Zot pe donn mwa lord lor louvraz ki mo lame finn fer.
45.12: Momem ki finn fer later e ki finn kre dimoun pou res lor later. Momem ki, ar mo lame finn deroul lesiel, e ki finn donn lord tou bann zetwal.
45.13: Momem ki finn fer Siris leve dan lazistis, e ki pou met drwat tou so bann larout. Limem ki pou rekonstrir mo lavil, e pou fer mo bann deporte revini, san okenn lapey, samem LESEGNER Toupwisan pe dir.
45.14: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Rises Lezip ek komers Kous, bann Sebait, sa bann dimoun ki bien ot la, twa ki pou erite. Zot pou vinn to bann esklav. Zot pou mars deryer twa, zot pou ale ar lasenn. Zot pou prostern divan twa. Zot pou priye twa: “Pena lot Bondie, apar zis seki kot twa-la! Pena lot, pena lot Bondie”.
45.15: Vremem twa to enn Bondie ranpli ar mister, Bondie Izrael nou sover.
45.16: Zot, bann fabrikan idol, zot mars dan laont, zot tou dan imiliasion.
45.17: LESEGNER pou sov Izrael. Pou sov li pou touzour. Zot pou nepli gagn onte. Nepli pou ena okenn laont ek dezoner lor zot ankor.
45.18: Parski ala LESEGNER pe dir, kreater lesiel: “Limem Bondie ki finn fasonn later, ki finn form li e ki finn rann li solid. Li pa finn kree li vid, li finn fasonn li pou ki li abite. Momem LESEGNER, pena personn kouma mwa.
45.19: Mo pa finn kasiet an finfon enn pei pou mo koze; mo pa finn dir desandan Zakob: “Rod mwa dan vid!” Momem LESEGNER ki proklam lazistis, ki anons bann kiksoz vre.
45.20: Rasanble zot, vini! Koste zot tou ansam, bann ki ankor vivan dan bann pep! Zot bann san-konpran, bann ki transport zot bann idol dibwa, ki priy enn bondie ki pa kapav sov zot.
45.21: Rakonte, explik zot ka. Ansam, fer zot reynion. Kisannla ti proklam sa dan lepase. Kisannla ti anons sa, sa lepok la? Pa momem, LESEGNER? Pena lezot Bondie apart mwa. Enn Bondie ki zis e ki kapav sov zot, pena lot apart mwa.
45.22: Zot, ki lot kote later, vire get mwa e zot pou sove, parski momem Bondie, pena lot apart mwa.
45.23: Mo fer serman lor momem, seki sort dan mo labous, samem lazistis. Enn parol ki napa pou sanze: Wi, divan mwa tou zenou pou ploye, tou lalang pou fer serman lor mwa.
45.24: Zot pou dir: “Dan LESEGNER tousel ena lazistis ek lafors.” Tou bann ki ti sofe kont li pou koste kot li, ranpli avek laont.
45.25: Dan LESEGNER bann desandan Izrael pou trouv laviktwar e zot pou loue mwa LESEGNER!

46.1: Bel finn ploye, Nebo pe bes latet. Finn met zot bann stati lor bann kabri ek lezot zanimo. Sa bann stati-la finn vinn enn fardo pou bann zanimo ki fatige.
46.2: Zot finn bes latet, zot finn ploye ansam. Zot pa finn kapav sov sa fardo-la. Zot finn al par zot mem dan kaptivite.
46.3: Ekout mwa, lakaz Zakob, tou seki res dan lakaz Izrael, zot ki mo finn okipe depi dan vant zot mama, zot ki mo finn sarye depi zot nesans.
46.4: Ziska zot vinn vie, mwa mo pou lamem. Ziska zot seve vinn blan, mwa mo pou soutenir zot. Mwa mo pou port zot, mo pou tini zot e mo pou sov zot.
46.5: Avek kisann-la zot pou kapav konpar mwa? kisann-la ki egal ar mwa? Kisannla ki parey kouma mwa?
46.6: Enn bann pe tir boukou lor dan zot pos, e pe pez larzan lor balans. Zot pey enn bizoutie pou li fer enn bondie. Lerla zot bes latet divan sa bondie-la e zot ador li.
46.7: Zot met li lor zot zepol e zot sarye li. Zot depoz li dan so plas. Li tini lamem. Li napa bouze. Kriye limem, li napa reponn. Li pa kapav tir personn dan maler.
46.8: Rapel zot sa e repran kouraz. Pa bliye sa zame, zot, bann peser.
46.9: Rapel zot bann kiksoz ki finn pase depi lontan parski momem Bondie. Pena lezot Bondie e personn pa parey kouma mwa.
46.10: Depi komansman mo rakont seki bizin arive. Lontan davans, mo finn dir bann kiksoz ki pankor vini, mo dir: mo proze pou realize, e tou seki mo oule mo pou fer.
46.11: Mo finn apel enn zwazo rapas depi an les, Mo finn apel enn zom ki sorti dan enn pei bien lwin. Seki mo dir, mo fer. Seki mo finn planifie, mo pou realiz zot.
46.12: Ekout mwa, bann leker orgeye, bann ki lwin ar lazistis.
46.13: Mo pe fer mo lazistis koste. Li pa lwin. Mo delivrans pa pou tarde. Mo pou met dan Sion mo delivrans, dan Izrael, mo laglwar.

47.1: Babilonn, desann, asiz dan lapousier, kit to tronn, vierz Babilonn. Asiz anba, san to tronn, tifi ki dan Kalde. Parski to finn perdi to tit zoli, delika, kokas.
47.2: Pran baba ros kari e kraz lafarinn. Tir to vwal, lev to rob, aret kouver to lazam pou to travers larivier.
47.3: Pou trouv twa touni. Pou trouv to laont. Mo pou tir mo vanzans, personn pa pou sape ar mwa.
47.4: Nou sover, LESEGNER Toupwisan samem so nom, Bondie Izrael, finn dir:
47.5: “Asiz twa. Res trankil. Vinn dan marenwar, tifi ki dan Kalde, parski pou nepli apel twa “Prinses bann rwayom”.
47.6: Mo ti ankoler kont mo pep. Mo ti rezet mo leritaz. Mo finn remet zot dan to lame. To finn tret zot san okenn pitie. To finn fer to fardo pez lour lor sa vie dimoun la.
47.7: To finn dir: “Mo pou enn prinses pou touzour”, to pa finn reflesi tousala dan to leker. To pa finn mazinn lavenir.
47.8: Aster, ekout sa, twa ki kontan lamizman! Twa ki finn asiz trankil, e ki pe dir dan to leker: “Mwa avek mo tousel, mo napa pou res vev, e mo napa pou res koumsa, san zanfan.”
47.9: Sa de kiksoz la pou ariv twa, enn sel kout, enn sel zour: to pou perdi to zanfan, to pou vinn vev, enn kou koumsa zot pou fonn lor twa. Mem si to ena enn kantite formil mazik, mem si to bann travay bien pwisan.
47.10: To finn fer konfians to mesanste, to finn dir: “Personn pa pe trouv mwa”. To sazes ek to konesans ki finn perverti twa e to finn dir dan to leker: “Mwa avek mo tousel”.
47.11: Enn maler pou vinn lor twa. To napa pou konn soley so liberasion. Enn kalamite pou tom lor twa. To napa kapav kas li. Enn kou koumsa, enn devastasion pou fonn lor twa. To napa pou kone.
47.12: Res ar to bann travay mem, avek tou to bann formil mazik. Ar zot, to finn fatig twa depi to zenes. Kikfwa to pou kapav gagn enn profi. Kikfwa to pou fer gagn per.
47.13: To finn fatige ar sa kantite konsiltasion to finn fer la. Ki zot leve pou zot sov twa, bann ki fer kalkil ar lesiel, ki get zetwal, ki fer konn pou sak mwa, bann kiksoz ki pou vinn lor twa.
47.14: Ala zot pou kouma lapay. Dife pou bril zot. Zot napa pou liber zot lavi kan dife pou trap zot. Labrez pou nepli servi pou resof zot, pou nepli servi nanye pou asiz divan dife.
47.15: Koumsa mem bann ki ti pe konsey twa pou fini. Bann ar ki to ti pe trafike depi to zenes, zot pou fane, sakenn so kote. Personn pa pou sov twa.

48.1: Tann sa, Lakaz Zakob, zot ki port sa nom Izrael la, zot ki finn sort dan dilo Zida, zot ki fer promes lor nom LESEGNER, e ki apel Bondie Izrael san ki zot dan laverite ek lazistis.
48.2: Zot ki fier parski apel zot “Bann ki res dan Lavil Sin”. Zot ki apiy lor Bondie Izrael, LESEGNER Toupwisan. Samem so nom.
48.3: Bann kiksoz depi lorizinn, depi sa lepok la, mo ti rakont zot; zot ti sort dan mo labous, mo ti proklam zot. Enn sel kout, mo finn azir e zot finn arive.
48.4: Parski mo ti kone to latet dir, to likou kouma feray, to fron kouma bronz.
48.5: Mo finn rakont twa depi sa lepok la, avan ki sa arive. Mo finn fer twa tande pangar to dir: “Mo idol ki finn fer zot sa, mo stati ek mo gardien lakour ki finn ordonn sa.”
48.6: To finn tande. Aster get tousala: zot pa pou rekonet sa? Zordi mo fer twa tann nouvo kiksoz, ki ti sekre, ki to napa kone.
48.7: Aster la zot finn kree, pa depi lontan sa. Avan lizour leve zordi, zame to pa finn deza tann koz zot. Twa, zame to pa ti tann zot, tansion to dir: “Wi, mo konn zot.”
48.8: Anplis, to pa ti tande. Anplis, to pa ti kone. Anplis, sa lepok la, to zorey pa ti ouver parski mo ti kone kouma vremem to finn fer fos. Depi dan vant to mama, ti apel twa rebel.
48.9: Me akoz momem Bondie, mo tini mo koler. Pou mo loner, mo pou pran pasians ar twa, pou mo pa koup twa.
48.10: Ala mo finn pirifie twa. Pa avek larzan. Mo finn fer twa pas leprev dan enn four lasoufrans.
48.11: Si mo pe azir koumsa se pou momem. Kouma mo pou les mo nom dezonore? Mo napa pou donn mo laglwar enn lot.
48.12: Ekout mwa Zakob, Izrael ki mo finn apele. Momem sa. Momem ki premie, momem ki dernie.
48.13: Mo lame finn poz later. Mo lame drwat finn deploy lesiel. Mwa, mo apel zot, e zot tou dibout ansam.
48.14: Koste zot tou, vini, ekoute. Kisannla parmi zot finn rakont sa? LESEGNER kontan li. Li pou fer seki li anvi ar Babilonn, avek desandans bann Kaldeen.
48.15: Momem sa. Momem ki finn koze, e ki finn apel li. Mo finn fer li vini, e li pou reisi so sime.
48.16: Koste ar mwa e ekout sa: depi komansman mo pa finn kasiet pou mo koze. Ler sa finn arive, mo ti la e aster la LESEGNER finn anvoy mwa avek so lespri.
48.17: Ala seki LESEGNER to sover pe dir, Bondie Izrael: Momem LESEGNER to Bondie. Mo pe fer twa aprann pou to prop dibien. Mwa ki pe kondir twa lor sime ki to pe swiv.
48.18: Si to ti fer atansion ar mo bann komandman, to lape ti pou kouma enn larivier, e to lazistis ti pou kouma vag lamer.
48.19: To desandans li pou kouma disab, e kouma bann lagrin, to bann zenerasion! Napa pou rey to nom, napa pou efas li divan mwa.
48.20: Sort dan Babilonn, res lwin ar bann Kaldeen. Avek enn lavwa ki dan lazwa, rakonte, fer tann sa, fer li sort ziska bout later. Dir: “LESEGNER finn raste so serviter Zakob.”
48.21: Zot pa finn gagn swaf kan li ti amenn zot dan dezer. Li finn fer dilo dan ros koule. Li finn fann ros la, e dilo finn sourse.
48.22: Pena lape, LESEGNER finn dir, pou bann ki move.

49.1: Ekoute, bann zil! Get mwa bien, bann pep ki lwin! LESEGNER finn apel mwa depi avan mo nesans. Depi dan vant mo mama li finn apel mo nom.
49.2: Li finn fer mo labous vinn enn lepe ki koupe. Li finn protez mwa dan lonbraz so lame. Li finn fer mwa vinn kouma enn fles bien fite. Dan so fouro li finn kasiet mwa.
49.3: Li finn dir mwa: “Tomem mo serviter; Izrael, dan twa mo manifeste mo splander.
49.4: E mwa, mo dir: “Mo finn fatig mwa pou nanye. Dan vid mo finn servi mo lafors. Ler gete, mo lazistis kot LESEGNER, mo rekonpans kot mo Bondie.
49.5: Aster LESEGNER finn koze. Li ki finn fasonn mwa depi dan vant mo mama pou vinn so serviter, pou fer Zakob revinn kot li, rasanble Izrael pou li.
49.6: Li finn dir: “Li pa ase ki to vinn mo serviter pou relev bann klan Zakob, e retourn bann ki konsakre dan Izrael. Mo pou fer twa vinn lalimier bann pei, pou to vinn mo liberater ziska dan bout later.
49.7: Ala seki LESEGNER liberater, Bondie Izrael, pe dir seki so nam finn meprize, seki finn vinn enn laont pou bann pei, e enn esklav pou bann dominer: “Bann lerwa pou trouve e zot pou leve, bann prins pou trouve e zot pou prosterne, akoz LESEGNER ki fidel, Bondie Izrael ki finn swazir twa.”
49.8: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Kan ariv ler pou sov twa, mo finn reponn twa; zour liberasion, mo finn sap twa. Mo finn konsakre twa, e mo finn fer twa vinn lalians pou lepep, pou relev pei la, pou partaz bann eritaz ki finn devaste.
49.9: Pou to dir bann prizonie: “Sorti”, bann ki dan marenwar: “Montre zot.” Bann la pou amenn zot troupo manze lor bann sime. Dan tou bann landrwa sek, zot pou gagn enn patiraz.
49.10: Zot pou nepli gagn fin, nepli gagn swaf. Zot pou nepli soufer anba divan ki brile, anba soley, parski seki pitie zot la, pou kondir zot. Li pou kondir zot kot dilo sourse.
49.11: Ar tou mo bann montagn mo pou fer enn sime, e tou mo bann larout pou drese.
49.12: Ala zot la, bann ki sort lwin, bann ki sort depi lenor e ki sort depi lwes, bann ki sort depi pei Sinim.
49.13: Lesiel, kriy zot lazwa! Later, rant dan fiesta! Montagn bat zot sega! Parski LESEGNER finn konsol so pep. Li pran pitie pou so bann pov.
49.14: Sion ti pe dir: “LESEGNER finn abandonn mwa; LESEGNER finn bliye mwa.
49.15: Eski enn madam bliye so ti zanfan? Eski li pena pitie pou garson ki finn sort dan so vant? Mem si li bliye, mwa, mo napa pou bliye twa.
49.16: Lor mo lame mo finn grav to nom, to bann miray touzour divan mwa.
49.17: To bann garson pe degaze vini. Bann ki ti detrir twa e bann ki ti ravaz twa pe al lwin ar twa.
49.18: Lev lizie otour twa pou to gete: zot tou finn rasanble, zot pe vinn kot twa. Lor mo lavi mo deklare: “Zot tou kouma bann bizou ki to pou mete. To pou met zot otour twa kouma enn fianse.”
49.19: Parski to bann rwinn ek to bann landrwa dezole, zot tro tipti aster pou to bann abitan. Bann ki ti pe devor twa pou al bien lwin.
49.20: Zot pou dir ankor dan to zorey, bann garson ki ti pe mank twa: “Sa landrwa la tro tipti pou mwa, fer enn plas pou ki mo reste.”
49.21: Lerla to pou dir dan to leker: “Kisannla finn akous sa bann la? Mo pa ti kapav gagn zanfan e mo ti steril, exile e rezete. E sa bann la, kisann-la finn fer zot grandi? Pandan ki mo ti tousel, sa bann la, kot zot ti ete?”
49.22: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Gete! Mo lev lame ar bann pei, mo dres enn signal pou bann pep: zot pou amenn divan twa to bann garson dan zot lebra, e to bann tifi lor zot zepol.
49.23: Bann lerwa pou to bann papa adoptif, e bann prinses, to bann nouris. Lor later, zot pou prostern divan twa, zot pou les lapousier anba to lipie. E to pou kone ki momem LESEGNER. Bann ki esper dan mwa napa pou regrete.
49.24: Eski pou repran ar enn gerye seki li finn gagne? Eski bann ki finn kaptire pou regagn zot liberte?
49.25: Me ala LESEGNER pe dir: “Nou pou pran prizonie bann gerye. Nou pou liber seki vakabon la finn pran. Momem mo pou rod lager ar bann ki rod lager ar twa. Momem ki pou sov to bann zanfan .
49.26: Bann ki fer twa mizer, mo pou fer zot manz zot prop laser. Zot pou soule ar zot prop disan kouma kan bwar divin nef. Tou dimoun pou kone ki mwa, LESEGNER, momem to sover, e ki seki raset twa se seki Pwisan dan Zakob.

50.1: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Kot papie divors zot mama ki montre ki sanse mo finn rezet li? Ou bien: ar kisann-la mo finn vann zot pou sanse mo pey mo bann det? Wi, akoz zot bann fot ki finn vann zot. Akoz zot bann krim, ki mo finn rezet zot mama.
50.2: Kifer, kan mo finn vini, pa ti ena personn? Kifer, kan mo finn kriye, personn pa finn reponn? Eski mo lame tro kourt pou sov zot? Ki, mo pena ase lafors pou delivre zot? Avek enn sinp menas mo kapav fer lamer sek. Mo fer bann gran gran larivier vinn dezer. Bann pwason gate sitan pena dilo, zot mor deswaf.
50.3: Mo met enn vwal nwar lor lesiel, mo abiy li ar enn sak.
50.4: LESEGNER Bondie finn aprann mwa koze pou ki mo konn amenn enn parol pou rekonfort seki feb. Tou le gramatin li lev mwa, li ouver mo zorey pou mo ekoute kouma enn disip.
50.5: LESEGNER Bondie finn ouver mo zorey, e mwa mo pa finn reziste, mo pa finn zwe sove.
50.6: Mo finn donn mo ledo bann ki tap mwa, e mo lazou bann ki ras mo labarb; mo pa kasiet mo figir divan bann zoure e bann ki pe krase.
50.7: LESEGNER Bondie pou vinn ed mwa, akoz samem mo pa finn abat. Akoz samem mo finn rann mo figir dir kouma ros e mo kone ki mo napa pou gagn onte.
50.8: Seki pe pran mo par, pre kot mwa. Kisannla pou akiz mwa? Anou dibout ansam! Kisannla mo lennmi? Fer li vinn divan mwa!
50.9: Ala LESEGNER Bondie pou vinn ed mwa. Kisannla ki pou kondann mwa? Ala zot tou kouma enn vie linz, kankrela pou manz zot.
50.10: Seki respe LESEGNER, e ekout lavwa so serviter, seki mars dan marenwar, san ki li trouv okenn lalimier, ki li met so konfians dan nom LESEGNER, ki li apiy li lor so Bondie.
50.11: Me zot tou ki alim dife, ki antour zot ar labrez, mars dan laflam zot dife, e lor labrez ki zot finn alime, se par mo lame mem ki sa finn ariv zot: zot pou alonze dan douler.

51.1: Tann mwa, zot ki pe rod lazistis, zot ki pe rod LESEGNER. Gete dan ki ros zot finn taye e dan ki karyer ros zot finn sorti.
51.2: Get Abraam zot papa ek Sara ki finn met zot lor sa later la; parski li ti tousel kan mo finn apel li, mo finn beni li, e mo finn donn li boukou desandan.
51.3: Wi, LESEGNER pou konsol Sion, li pou konsol tou so bann rwinn. Li pou fer so dezer vinn enn zardin Eden, e so laplenn, enn zardin pou LESEGNER. Pou ena lazwa ek kontantman, aksiondegras ek son lamizik.
51.4: Pran kont mo pep! Mo pei, ekout mwa. Parski mo pe amenn enn lansegnman, e mo lazistis pou enn lalimier pou bann pep.
51.5: Mo lazistis finn koste, mo delivrans finn arive. Mo lebra pou diriz bann pep; bann zil pou met zot lesperans dan mwa e zot pou kont lor mo pwisans.
51.6: Lev zot lizie ar lesiel, get anba lor later. Wi, lesiel pou fane kouma lafime, later pou vinn vie kouma enn linz, e so bann abitan pou mor kouma mous. Me mo delivrans pou res pou touzour, e mo lazistis zame pou fonn.
51.7: Ekout mwa, zot ki konn lazistis, pep ki gard mo lalwa dan zot leker. Napa gagn per dezoner bann zom, napa les zot dekouraze par zot bann insilt.
51.8: Parski bebet pou manz zot kouma enn linz, e bann insek pou manz zot kouma lalenn. Me mo lazistis pou reste pou touzour, e mo delivrans pou dire, zenerasion apre zenerasion.
51.9: Leve! Leve! Lebra LESEGNER, servi to lafors. Leve kouma to ti leve letan lontan, pou bann zenerasion dan lepase. Pa tomem ki finn touy Raab, ki finn transpers dragon-la?
51.10: Pa tomem ki finn fer lamer, ek dilo dan gran fonder, vinn sek? Pa tomem ki finn fer enn sime dan fon lamer pou bann ki to finn libere?
51.11: Bann ki LESEGNER finn libere pou revini. Ler zot pou ariv dan Sion, zot pou kriy zot lazwa. Lor zot figir pou ena enn lazwa ki zame pa pou fini. Lazwa ek kontantman pou akonpagn zot, soufrans ek larm pou sove ale.
51.12: Momem to konsolater. Kifer to per bann mortel kouma twa, e bann imin ki pou disparet kouma lerb?
51.13: To bliye LESEGNER to kreater ki finn deroul lesiel, e ki finn poz fondasion later. To pa aret tranble toulezour divan gran koler sa dominer la, kan li met dir pou li kraz partou. Me kot koler sa diktater-la finn ale aster?
51.14: Bann prizonie ki dezespere, biento pou libere. Zot pa pou mor dan trou. Zot pa pou mank dipin.
51.15: Momem LESEGNER to Bondie ki fer lamer azite, ki fer so bann vag kraze. LESEGNER Toupwisan, samem so nom.
51.16: Mo finn met mo parol dan to labous. Dan lonbraz mo lame, mo finn kasiet twa. Pou mo deroul lesiel e pou mo fonn later, pou mo dir Sion: “Tomem mo pep.”
51.17: Leve, leve, diboute, Zerizalem! Twa ki finn bwar dan lame LESEGNER koup so lakoler. Enn kalis, enn koup vertiz ki to finn bwar ziska dernie gout, e ki fer twa balote.
51.18: Parmi to bann zanfan ki to finn met lor later, parmi tou bann zanfan ki to finn grandi, personn pa finn pran to lame pou gid twa.
51.19: Maler finn frap twa de par de: devastasion ek destriksion, lafaminn ek lager, kisann-la pou konsol twa? kisann-la pou redonn twa lespwar?
51.20: To bann garson pe tom san konesans. Zot finn res dormi dan kwin sime. Kouma serf ki finn may dan file saser, zot finn paralize par lakoler LESEGNER, par menas to Bondie.
51.21: Akoz samem, ekout sa, twa ki dan maler, ki finn sou, me pa akoz divin.
51.22: Ala seki LESEGNER Bondie pe dir, to Bondie, defanser to pep: “Ala mo pe repran dan to lame koup ki donn vertiz, sa kalis, sa koup mo koler-la. To pou nepli bwar ladan ankor.
51.23: Mo pou met li dan lame bann ki tourmant twa, bann ki ti pe dir twa: Bes twa! Les nou pase! E to finn kourbe pou fer to ledo vinn enn marspie, enn sime pou ki zot pase.”

52.1: Leve, leve! Abiy twa ar lafors, Sion! Met to bann pli zoli linz, Zerizalem, lavil ki sin, parski bann etranze ek bann inpir pou nepli vinn kot twa.
52.2: Sakouy to lapousier, leve, Zerizalem, twa ki prizonie! Tir bann lasenn lesklavaz dan to likou, tifi Sion, twa ki dan kaptivite!
52.3: Parski ala LESEGNER pe dir: “Finn vann zot pou nanye, pou liber zot san depans enn sou.”
52.4: Parski ala LESEGNER Bondie pe dir: “Dan komansman, se dan Lezip ki mo pep finn desann pou li reste. Alafin, se Lasiri ki finn maltret li.
52.5: Asterla, ki mo pou fer la?” LESEGNER dir: “Zot finn pran mo pep san pey nanye. Bann ki dominn li pe kriy zot viktwar. Zot pa fini sali mo nom toulezour.
52.6: Akoz samem mo pep pou konn mo nom; akoz samem, sa zour la, li pou kone ki mwa ki finn dir: “Ala mo la.”
52.7: Ala zot zoli la, lor bann montagn, lipie sa mesaze ki pe anons lape la! mesaze bon nouvel ki pe anons liberasion, ki finn dir Sion: “To Bondie pe regne”.
52.8: Lavwa to bann gard ki pe veye: zot koz for, ansam zot kriy zot lazwa, parski zot finn trouve ar zot lizie LESEGNER ki revinn dan Sion.
52.9: Ansam kriye, kriy zot lazwa bann rwinn Zerizalem! Parski LESEGNER finn konsol so pep, li finn liber Zerizalem.
52.10: LESEGNER finn ouver gran so lebra sin divan lizie tou bann pei, e ziska dan bout later finn trouv delivrans nou Bondie.
52.11: Ale, ale, sort la ale, napa tous okenn kiksoz ki inpir. Sorti la, pirifie zot, zot ki sarye bann obze sakre pou LESEGNER.
52.12: Asterla, zot pa pou prese pou sorti, zot pa pou ale kouma voler. LESEGNER, limem pe mars divan zot e par deryer, Bondie Izrael pe protez zot.
52.13: Mo serviter pou reysi, li pou drese, li pou leve, li pou gagn bel-bel loner.
52.14: Parey kouma bann pep ti dan dezolasion kan zot ti trouv li, parski li pa ti ena enn figir kouma enn zom, e so laparans pa ti kouma enn imin.
52.15: Parey, bann pei pou dan koler. Divan li, bann lerwa pou res kwak parski zot finn trouv seki personn pa ti rakonte, parski zot finn aprann seki zot pa ti tann dir.

53.1: Kisannla finn krwar seki nou finn tande? Kisannla finn rekonet pwisans LESEGNER?
53.2: Serviter LESEGNER finn pouse divan li kouma enn plant ki finn pran so rasinn dan enn later sek. Li pa ti ena bote, pa ti ena nanye ki zoli pou atir nou regar. So laparans pa ti atir nou.
53.3: Bann zom ti mepriz li, zot ti abandonn li. Enn zom ki finn konn douler; li ti fami ar lasoufrans, kouma kikenn ki nou ignore. Ti mepriz li, nou pa ti mem kas latet ar li.
53.4: Ler gete, nou bann soufrans ki li ti pe sarye, e nou bann douler ki ti lor so ledo. Nou, nou ti pe krwar ki Bondie ti pini li, ki Bondie ti pe bat li e imilie li.
53.5: Zot finn transpers li akoz nou bann krim. Li finn gagn kraze akoz nou bann fot. Se so soufrans ki finn donn nou lape e dan so bann blesir nou trouv nou gerizon.
53.6: Nou tou, nou ti kouma bann mouton, nou ti kouma bann vakabon, sakenn ti pe swiv so prop larout e LESEGNER finn fer tom lor li tou nou bann fot.
53.7: Serviter LESEGNER ti gagn maltrete, zot ti imilie li. Li pa ti ouver labous, kouma enn agno kan amenn li labatwar, kouma enn mouton ki res trankil divan bann ki pou raz li, li napa ouver labous.
53.8: Atraver enn fos zizman, finn ferm li. Kisannla dan so zenerasion ti kas latet kan li ti rezete lor later bann vivan, e kan li ti gagn bate akoz krim so pep?
53.9: Finn fer to tom parmi bann malfeter, so tonbo parmi bann ris, mem si li pa ti fer okenn violans e ki pa ti ena okenn foste dan so labous.
53.10: LESEGNER finn anvi kraz li ar lasoufrans; li finn ofer so lavi kouma enn sakrifis ki amenn pardon, li pou trouv enn desandans, li pou prolonz so lavi, e a traver li, volonte LESEGNER pou akonpli.
53.11: Apre lasoufrans ki li finn traverse, li pou trouv lalimier e li pou gagn rekonpans. Mo serviter, sa enn ki zis-la pou amenn lazistis pou bann pep. Li pou pran lor li zot bann pese.
53.12: Akoz samem mo pou donn li so par parmi bann gran e li pou partaz rises bann lennmi avek bann pwisan, parski li finn donn so lavi ziska lamor, e finn plas li parmi bann kriminel. Ler gete, li ti pe sarye pese bann pep, e li ti pe intersed pou bann kriminel.

54.1: “Kriy to lazwa, twa ki steril. Twa ki zame finn gagn zanfan, kriy for to lazwa. Manifeste to lazwa for for, twa ki pa finn met personn lor sa later-la; parski sa fam ki finn abandone-la pe gagn plis zanfan ki sa fam ki finn marye-la.” Samem ki LESEGNER pe dir.
54.2: Agrandi lespas to latant! depliy latwal kot to reste, napa tini, large! Alonzi to bann lakord, kal bien to bann pike latant
54.3: parski drwat, gos partou to pou ale. To bann desandan pou gagn bann pei an eritaz e zot pou al res dan bann lavil ki ti dan dezolasion.
54.4: Napa gagn per parski to nepli pou gagn onte. Napa santi twa imilie, parski to nepli pou montre to laont; parski to pou bliye laont to zenes, to pou nepli rapel to dezoner kan to finn vinn vev.
54.5: Parski to pou gagn pou mari, LESEGNER ki finn kree twa. LESEGNER Toupwisan, samem so nom. Bondie Izrael, limem to sover. Nou apel li Bondie lor later antie.
54.6: Wi, kouma enn madam abandone, to ti bien dekouraze. Me LESEGNER finn apel twa. LESEGNER pe dir: “Kouma nou kapav rezet enn fam ki nou finn swazir dan nou zenes?
54.7: Pou enn ti letan, mo finn rezet twa; me avek konpasion, mo repran twa avek mwa.
54.8: Dan mo koler, enn lepok, mo ti kasiet mo figir lwin ar twa; me avek enn fidelite eternel, mo finn gagn konpasion pou twa. Mwa, LESEGNER ki pe dir sa, momem to sover.”
54.9: “Parski sa pou deroule kouma lepok Noe, kan mo ti fer serman ki dilo Noe napa pou al partou lor later. Mem parey mo fer serman mo pou nepli ankoler kont twa, mo pou nepli menas twa.
54.10: Mem si bann montagn tranble, bann kolinn sanz plas, mo lamour pou twa zame pa pou sanze e mo pou touzour gard mo lalians lape ki mo finn fer avek twa.” LESEGNER ki ena konpasion pou twa ki pe dir sa.
54.11: “Zerizalem, twa ki dan lasagrin, balote dan siklonn, personn pa pe vinn donn twa lespwar. Mwa mo pou refer twa avek bann pier presie, e mo pou fer to fondasion ar safir.
54.12: Mo pou kouver to bann miray ar ribi, to bann laport ar diaman e tou to bann ranpar pou an-kristal.
54.13: Tou to bann garson pou bann disip LESEGNER, e lape to bann garson pou deborde.
54.14: Lazistis pou rann twa for. To pou res lwin ar lopresion. To pou nepli gagn per, to pou lwin avek lafreyer parski li pou nepli koste kot twa.
54.15: Bann-la pe anvi atak twa? Pa akoz mwa sa. Seki atak twa pou tonbe divan twa.
54.16: Momem ki finn kree forzron ki soufle lor dife labrez pou fer zouti pou servi. Momem osi ki finn kree dimoun ki kapav kas bann zouti-la.
54.17: Tou bann zouti ki pou fabrike kont twa napa pou fer twa nanye. Tou lalang ki pou lev ar twa pou ziz twa, twa to pou kondann zot. Samem leritaz bann serviter LESEGNER. Zot lazistis sort dan mwa.” Samem LESEGNER pe deklare.

55.1: Ola! Zot tou ki gagn swaf, koste kot dilo. Koste, mem si zot pena larzan. Vinn manze, li gratis. vinn bwar divin ek dile, Pena nanye pou peye.
55.2: Kifer depans larzan, aste kitsoz ki pa nouri zot? Kifer fatig zot pou seki pa donn satisfaksion? Ekoute, ekout mwa e manz seki bon. Zot pou gout bon-bon manze.
55.3: Dres zot zorey, koste kot mwa. Ekoute, e zot pou viv. Mo pou fer enn lalians eternel ar zot. Mo pou realiz bann kiksoz ki mo ti promet David.
55.4: Ala mo fer li vinn enn temwin pou bann pep, enn komandan ki donn lord bann pep.
55.5: Gete! To pou apel bann pei ki to napa kone. Bann pei ki to pa kone pou vinn kot twa, akoz LESEGNER to Bondie, Bondie Izrael, ki finn glorifie twa.
55.6: Rod LESEGNER, aster ki li pe les zot trouv li. Kriye li, aster ki li finn koste.
55.7: Ki seki move kit so sime, ki kriminel abandonn so bann move panse. Ki li revinn kot LESEGNER ki pou gagn pitie pou li; revinn kot nou Bondie, parski li pa aret pardone.
55.8: “Mo bann panse napa kouma zot bann panse, e mo bann sime napa kouma zot bann sime.” LESEGNER pe dir.
55.9: “Ena mem distans ant lesiel ek later ki ant zot bann panse e mo bann panse, ant zot bann sime e mo bann sime.
55.10: Lapli ek lanez desann depi lesiel. Zot napa retourn lao avan ki zot finn aroz later. Zot rann li fertil. Zot fer later-la raporte. Zot donn planter la semans ek dipin pou manze.
55.11: Mem manier, mo parol ki sort dan mo labous pa pou revinn kot mwa dan vid san ki li finn fer seki mo oule, e realiz seki mo finn avoy li fer.
55.12: Wi, dan lazwa zot pou ale, e pou ramenn zot dan lape. Bann montagn ek bann kolinn pou kriy zot lazwa divan zot e tou bann pie lakanpagn pou bat lame.
55.13: Dan plas pikan, sipre pou pouse; dan plas move-zerb, lamirt pou pouse. Sa pou donn enn renome LESEGNER, enn sign eternel ki zame napa pou disparet.

56.1: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Gard lalwa e amenn enn lavi drwat, parski mo delivrans pre pou vini, mo lazistis pre pou devwale.
56.2: Bienere sa dimoun ki met sa an pratik; sa zom ki pe persevere, ki pa profann saba, e ki anpes so lame fer seki move.
56.3: Bann etranze ki ador mwa, fode pa zot dir: “Sirman LESEGNER pou tir mwa dan so pep.” Fode pa sa zom ki pa kapav fer zanfan-la dir: “Mo enn pie sek.”
56.4: Parski LESEGNER pe dir: “Bann zom inportan ki obzerv mo saba, ki swazir seki fer mwa plezir, ki respekte mo lalians,
56.5: zot nom pou grave lor miray mo tanp, kouma enn moniman eternel; mo pou donn zot enn nom eternel; ki zame pa pou efase a sa pou ena enn pli gran valer pou zot ki bann zanfan.”
56.6: Bann garson etranze ki atas zot ar LESEGNER pou servi li, pou kontan nom LESEGNER, pou vinn so bann serviter; tou bann ki gard saba san profann li, e ki gard mo lalians,
56.7: mo pou amenn zot lor mo montagn sin, mo pou ranpli zot ar lazwa dan mo lakaz lapriyer. Zot bann sakrifis antie e zot bann ofrand pou gagn mo faver lor mo lotel, parski pou apel mo lakaz “Lakaz lapriyer pou tou bann pep”.
56.8: LESEGNER ki rasanble bann deporte Izrael pe dir: “Mo pou rasanble lezot ar bann ki deza rasanble.”
56.9: Zanimo lakanpagn, vini zot tou pou zot manze. Zot osi parey, bann zanimo lafore.
56.10: Tou bann gardien Izrael aveg; zot napa konn nanye. Zot kouma bann lisien ki pa kapav zape. Zot nek reve, zot res alonze, zot kontan dormi.
56.11: Zot enn bann lisien voras ki touzour gagn fin. Bann berze pa kapav konpran nanye. Zot swiv zot prop larout, sakenn pou li, zot rod zot prop lintere.
56.12: Bann la dir: “Vini, nou pou bwar divin, ziska nou sou, dime pou ankor pli bon ki zordi, pou enn gran zour kot ena labondans!”

57.1: Bann dimoun drwat pe mor san ki personn pe gagn zot traka. Pe touy bann ki fidel. Personn pa konpran. Seki fidel pe vinn viktim bann move dimoun.
57.2: Me lape pou vini. Bann ki mars dan sime drwat pou repoz lor zot lili.
57.3: Vinn la, zot, garson longanis, zot, desandan bann prostitie ek adilter .
57.4: Ar kisann-la zot pe zwe? Ar kisann-la zot pe fer grimas, zot pe tir lalang? Eski zot napa bann zanfan revolte, enn desandans bann manter?
57.5: Zot gagn relasion anba bann pie sakre, anba tou pie ki so fey ver, zot koup likou bann zanfan dan larivier, ant bann ros.
57.6: Parmi bann ros bien poli dan larivier, to ena to par. Sa mem sa, sa mem to rekonpans. Akoz zot, to finn vers bann topet pou to bann bondie, to finn fer to lofrand monte. Eski ar sa bann kiksoz-la ki mo koler pou kalme?
57.7: To finn met to lili lao lor montagn. Lamem ki to monte pou to fer to sakrifis.
57.8: Deryer laport avek so montan, to finn met to plak remersiman. To kasiet mwa pou to tir to linz. To finn monte, to finn fer plis plas lor to lili. To finn pran plezir ar to bann aman, to kontan dormi avek zot e admir zot lekor.
57.9: To finn ranpli twa ar delwil pou to al get lerwa, to finn met boukou parfin. To finn anvoy to bann mesaze bien lwin, fer zot desann ziska lemond bann mor.
57.10: Akoz sa kantite sime-la, to finn fatige, me to pa finn dir: “Ayo, gaspiyaz!” To finn retrouv lafors to lame, akoz samem to pa finn fatige.
57.11: Kisann-la ki finn fer twa gagn per, pou ki to koz manti e pou to nepli rapel mwa; pou to nepli met mwa dan to leker? Sirman akoz sa ki to nepli respekte mwa.
57.12: Me mo pou denons twa e seki to finn fer. Sa pa pou fer twa gagn okenn profi.
57.13: Ler zot kriye osekour, eski zot bann koleksion idol-la pou sap zot? Zot tou, divan pou pous zot, labriz pou trap zot. Me seki rod mo proteksion, pou gagn leritaz later, e li pou gagn mo montagn sin.
57.14: Pou dir: “Ranze, ranze, tras enn sime. Tir tou obstriksion lor sime mo pep.
57.15: Ala seki Bondie Treo, ki so nom sin e ki viv pou leternite, pe dir: “Mwa, Bondie Sin, mo res lao, e osi avek bann dimoun ki dan lapenn, e avek seki finn abese. Tou bann ki finn abese, mo pou fer zot reviv Tou bann ki finn gagn kraze, mo pou redonn zot lavi.
57.16: Mo pa pou touletan res akiz zot mem. Mo pa pou res ankoler mem. Sinon, tou seki mo finn kre pou perdi souf lavi.
57.17: Izrael, mo ti ankoler akoz to perversion, e dan mo laraz, mo finn bat twa. Me to latet dir, e to finn persiste dan to move sime.
57.18: Mo finn trouv to move konportman. malgre sa, mo pou geri twa. Mo pou gid twa. Mo pou remet twa korek, twa ek bann ki an-dey avek twa.
57.19: Mo pou met enn sante louanz dan to labous: Lape! Lape pou seki lwin e pou seki pros, LESEGNER finn dir; e mo pou geri twa.
57.20: Me bann zom ki move, zot kouma lamer ki azite, ki pa kapav kalme, e so bann vag lev lamar ek labou.
57.21: Pena lape pou bann zom ki move, mo Bondie finn dir.

58.1: Kriye avek tou to lafors. Napa tini. Kouma tronpet, fer to lavwa monte pou to rakont mo pep zot bann revolt, lakaz Zakob zot bann pese.
58.2: Zour apre zour, momem ki zot rode. Zot anvi konn mo sime kouma enn pep ki fer lazistis e ki napa abandonn lalwa so Bondie. Zot dimann mwa bann lalwa ki zis. Zot anvi koste ar Bondie.
58.3: “Kifer to napa trouve kan nou fer karem? E to napa trouve kan nou imilie nou?” Zot pe dir. Me gete! Zour zot fer karem, zot tras zot prop lintere, e tir zi zot bann zouvrie.
58.4: Gete! Zot fer karem pou zot diskite e zot lager. Zot fer karem pou zot bate ar koutpwin laviolans. Kan zot gard karem koumsa, zot lapriyer pa ariv ziska mwa.
58.5: Ki, sa kalite karem-la ki mo kontan? eski sa fason-la ki zot pou imilie zot divan mwa? Bes latet divan mwa kouma enn banbou, met linz sak goni e dormi dan lasann, samem ki zot apel karem?
58.6: Gete ki kalite karem mo pli kontan: Kas lasenn bann prizonie linzistis, larg lakord fardo, donn bann oprime zot liberte e kas tou seki rann zot esklav.
58.7: Eski mo pa pli kontan kan to partaz to dipin ar seki gagn fin, e to amenn dan to lakaz malere ki pena lakaz? Kan to kouver enn zom ki touni e ki pena linz? Kan to pa tourn to ledo ar to bann frer?
58.8: Alor, to lalimier pou sorti kouma soley leve gramatin, e to blesir pou sek vit-vit. To lazistis pou mars divan twa, e laglwar LESEGNER pou mars deryer twa.
58.9: Lerla, to pou kriy LESEGNER, e li pou reponn, to pou kriy o sekour, e li pou dir: “Ala mo la!” Si to tir fardo lor zepol lezot, si to aret pwint ledwa e aret fer palab,
58.10: si to donn seki gagn fin seki tomem to oule, e pran kont malere-la; lerla, to lalimier pou leve dan marenwar, to lanwit pou vinn kouma soley midi.
58.11: LESEGNER pou kondir twa touletan. Li pou donn twa manze dan bann landrwa sek, li pou fer to bann lezo vinn for. To pou kouma enn zardin bien aroze e kouma enn lasours so dilo zame napa sek.
58.12: Akoz twa zot pou rekonstrir bann landrwa ki ti devaste depi plizir zenerasion. To pou rebatir bann ansien miray ki ti la depi bann zenerasion pase. Pou apel twa: “Seki repar bann miray kase, ki redres bann larout pou kapav reste.”
58.13: Si to respekte zour saba, e aret rod to lintere dan zour ki sin pou mwa; si to apel saba “Lazwa”, “Zour sakre pou laglwar LESEGNER”, si to glorifie li, to aret to bann trasman, si to aret rod to lintere e aret koz palab;
58.14: lerla, to pou trouv to lazwa ar LESEGNER. Mo pou amenn twa lor mo saryo, lor bann oter later, e mo pou fer twa manz leritaz Zakob to papa. Samem LESEGNER finn dir!

59.1: Non! Lame LESEGNER napa tro kourt pou delivre! So zorey napa tro dir pou li tande.
59.2: Me se zot bann fot ki pe separ zot avek zot bondie. Zot pese finn fer li kasiet so figir lwin ar zot, tro lwin pou li tande.
59.3: Parski zot lame finn tase ar disan, e zot ledwa ranpli ar fot. Zot lalev finn koz manti. Zot lalang finn bate ar seki fos.
59.4: Personn pa port plint dapre lazistis. Personn pa al rod lazistis ar leker drwat. Zot met zot konfians dan vid, zot koz traver. Zot prodir lemal, zot akous maler.
59.5: Dizef serpan, zot finn fer eklo. Zot finn tis latwal zarenie. Seki manz zot dizef, li mor. Dizef ki kraze, enn serpan pou sort ladan.
59.6: Zot latwal napa pou vinn enn linz e zot pa pou kapav kouver ar zot louvraz. Zot louvraz se louvraz lemal, e laviolans dan zot lame.
59.7: Zot lipie galoup kot lemal. Zot prese pou zot fann disan inosan. Zot bann panse bann panse lemal. Kot zot pase, devastasion ek ravaz.
59.8: Zot pa konn sime lape, pena lazistis lor zot larout. Zot bann santie napa drwat. Seki bat mem larout ar zot, pa pou konn lape.
59.9: Ala kifer lalwa finn vinn lwin ar nou, e lazistis napa ariv ziska kot nou. Nou pe esper lalimier, ala marenwar; pe espere pou gagn klarte, me nou pe mars dan nwar.
59.10: Nou pe tatone kouma bann aveg kot enn miray. Kouma dir pena lizie, nou pe tatone. Gran midi, nou pe tom-tonbe koumadir aswar finn vini. Nou koumadir bann mor ki viv ar dimoun ki an bonn sante.
59.11: Nou pe grogne, koumadir bann lours. Kouma bann pizon, nou nek plengne. Nou pe atann lazistis, nanye mem! Nou pe atann nou delivrans, me li res lwin ar nou.
59.12: Parski nou bann krim kont twa, zot boukou. Nou bann pese temwagn kont nou. Wi, nou bann krim divan nou, e nou rekonet nou bann fot.
59.13: Nou revolte, nou koz manti kont LESEGNER, nou aret swiv nou Bondie; nou koz brit, nou fer marday, nou maniganse, nou kalkile dan leker, nou koz manti.
59.14: Lalwa finn gagn pouse e lazistis finn bat karte. Wi, laverite finn tonbe lor laplas piblik, e seki drwat pa finn kapav rantre.
59.15: Laverite finn disparet. Seki res lwin ar lemal pe gagn maltrete. LESEGNER finn trouve ki sa pa bon, parski nepli ena lalwa.
59.16: Li finn trouve ki pa ti ena personn. Li finn sagrin parski personn pa finn intervenir. Lerla so prop lebra finn sov li, e so lazistis finn tini li.
59.17: Li finn met lazistis lor li kouma enn boukliye. Lor so latet, elmet delivrans. Li finn met lor li linz vanzans. Li finn anvlop li ar zalouzi, kouma nou met enn manto.
59.18: Li donn sakenn seki li merite: laraz pou so bann adverser, pinision pou so bann lennmi. Li donn bann zil seki zot merite.
59.19: Depi lwes, zot pou ena respe pou LESEGNER, e ziska les, zot pou respekte so laglwar, parski li pou vini kouma enn larivier, enn kouran ki divan LESEGNER pe pouse.
59.20: “Enn sover pou vinn pou Sion, e pou bann abitan Zakob ki nepli revolte.” LESEGNER deklare.
59.21: “Samem mo lalians ar zot,” LESEGNER finn dir: “Se mo lespri ki lor twa. Se mo bann parol ki mo finn met dan to labous. Zot napa pou al lwin ar to lalev, ek labous to bann desandan, ek labous desandan to bann desandan.” Samem LESEGNER pe dir, aster e pou touzour.

60.1: Dibout! Briye! Parski to lalimier finn arive, e laglwar LESEGNER finn leve pou twa.
60.2: Wi, ala marenwar finn kouver later, e teneb lor bann pep. Lor twa LESEGNER ape leve, e to finn kapav trouv so laglwar.
60.3: Bann pei pou mars dan to lalimier, e bann lerwa, dan klarte to soley ki ape leve.
60.4: Lev lizie otour twa, gete: zot tou finn rasanble, zot pe vinn kot twa. To bann garson sort lwin; zot pe vini, e to pe port to bann tifi lor laans.
60.5: Lerla to pou trouve, e to pou briye. To leker pou vibre, li pou bate ar lazwa, parski bann trezor lamer pou ariv kot twa, rises bann pei pou vinn kot twa.
60.6: To pei pou kouver ar boukou samo. Zenn-zenn troupo depi Madiann ek Efa, Zot tou pou vinn depi Saba, pou amenn lor ek lansan, e pou proklam louanz LESEGNER.
60.7: Tou bann troupo Kedar pou rasanble divan twa. Bann belie Nebayot pou servi twa. Zot pou mont lor mo lotel avek mo faver. Wi, mo pou onor mo zoli Tanp.
60.8: Ki sa bann-la sa? Zot anvole kouma niaz, koumadir bann pizon ki pe al dan zot nik.
60.9: Dan momem, ki bann zil pe espere. Bann bato Tarsis ki divan pou ramenn depi lwin to bann garson, ar zot larzan ek zot lor, akoz nom LESEGNER to Bondie, akoz Bondie Izrael, ki finn glorifie twa.
60.10: Bann garson etranze pou rekonstrir to bann sitadel, e zot bann lerwa pou servi twa. Parski dan mo koler mo ti bat twa, me dan mo lamour mo finn gagn konpasion pou twa.
60.11: To bann laport pou res ouver pou touzour. Lanwit-lizour, napa pou ferm zot, pou ki zot kapav amenn kot twa trezor bann pei e kondir zot bann lerwa.
60.12: Parski pei ek rwayom ki napa servi twa pou detrir, pou devaste.
60.13: Laglwar Liban pou vinn kot twa. Pie sipre, platann ek bwi, zot tou ansam, pou dekor landrwa kot mo tanp ete. Mo pou glorifie landrwa kot mo poz mo lipie.
60.14: Desandan bann ki ti imilie twa, Zot pou koste kot twa, Zot pou vinn kot twa, zot pou kourbe divan twa. Tou bann ki ti mepriz twa, zot pou prostern divan to lipie. Zot pou apel twa: “Lavil LESEGNER”, “Sion ki Sin dan Izrael”.
60.15: Lontan, to ti abandone, air e deteste, e personn napa ti get twa. Me aster, mo pou fer twa vinn enn fierte pou touzour; Enn lazwa, zenerasion apre zenerasion.
60.16: To pou bwar dile bann pei, to pou devor rises bann lerwa. To pou kone ki momem LESEGNER ki pe sov twa, momem to sover ki for dan Zakob.
60.17: Olie bronz, mo pou fer bann-la amenn lor. Olie feray, mo pou fer bann-la amenn larzan. Dan plas dibwa, pou gagn bronz; e dan plas ros, pou gagn feray. Mo pou fer lape pou protez twa, lazistis pou gouvern twa.
60.18: Pou nepli tann koz laviolans dan to pei. Dezas ek ravaz, pou nepli dan to bann frontier. To pou apel to bann miray: “Delivrans”, e to bann laport “Louanz”.
60.19: Soley pou nepli to lalimier, lizour ek klarte lalinn pou nepli donn twa lalimier. LESEGNER pou vinn to lalimier eternel; to Bondie, pou vinn to splander.
60.20: To soley pou nepli kasiet, e to lalinn napa pou disparet, parski LESEGNER pou enn lalimier eternel pou twa, e zour kot to ti an-dey pou fini.
60.21: To pep, zot tou ki fer lazistis, pou gagn later pou touzour. Zot mem lagrin ki mo finn plante, louvraz mo lame pou glorifie mwa.
60.22: Bann ki pli tipti, pou vinn enn group mil dimoun. Bann ki pli feb, pou vinn enn pei bien pwisan. Mwa, LESEGNER, mo pa pou tarde pou realiz tousala dan so lepok.

61.1: Lespri LESEGNER lor mwa parski LESEGNER finn konsakre mwa, pou anons bann pov bon nouvel. Li finn anvoy mwa pou geri bann ki zot leker finn kase, pou proklam liberasion pou bann ki dan kaptivite; e liberte pou bann ki dan prizon.
61.2: Pou proklam enn lane kot LESEGNER pou akord so faver, ek enn zour kot nou Bondie pou pous vanzans, pou konsol tou bann ki an-dey;
61.3: tou bann ki an-dey dan Sion, pou donn zot enn kouronn, dan plas lasann; delwil lazwa, dan plas enn linz dey; enn manto lazwa, dan plas enn lespri dekouraze; pou ki kapav apel zot “Pie Lazistis”, ki LESEGNER finn plante pou montre so laglwar.
61.4: Zot pou rekonstrir bann vie rwinn. Zot pou relev bann vie landrwa kot tou ti fini kraze. Zot pou renouvel bann lavil ki finn tom an rwinn, depi boukou zenerasion.
61.5: Bann etranze pou dibout, pou vey zot bann troupo. Bann ki sort deor, pou labour zot later e zot bann pie rezin.
61.6: Me zot, pou apel zot pret LESEGNER serviter Bondie. Zot pou manz trezor bann nasion, e bann trezor-la pou fer zot fierte.
61.7: Zot nepli pou gagn laont, e zot nepli pou konn dezoner. Dan zot pei, zot larises pou double, e zot lazwa pou dire pou touletan.
61.8: Parski mwa LESEGNER, mo kontan seki drwat. Mo pa kontan vol ek linzistis. Mo pou donn zot rekonpans zot merite, e mo pou fer enn lalians eternel avek zot.
61.9: Pou konn zot bann desandan dan tou bann pei, e zot bann zanfan, omilie bann pep. Tou bann ki pou trouv zot, pou rekonet ki zot enn desandans ki LESEGNER finn beni.
61.10: Lazwa, bel lazwa, mo pou trouve dan LESEGNER. Mo nam pou trouv so kontantman dan mo Bondie, parski li finn abiy mwa ar linz delivrans, li finn anvlop mwa dan manto lazistis. kouma nouvo marye port enn girland, kouma enn pret so kouronn lor so latet, kouma nouvel marye port so bann bizou,
61.11: kouma later fer so lagrin pouse, e kouma enn zardin fer so bann semans zerme, LESEGNER Bondie pou fer lazistis ek louanz zerme divan tou bann pei.

62.1: Akoz lamour ki mo ena pou Sion, mo pa pou res trankil. Akoz lamour ki mo ena pou Zerizalem, mo pa pou repoze ziska seki li regagn so loner, parey kouma enn reyon lalimier, e so delivrans kouma enn flanbo ki pe brile.
62.2: Lerla, bann nasion pou trouv to lazistis, e tou bann lerwa pou dekouver to laglwar. Labous LESEGNER pou donn twa enn nouvo nom.
62.3: To pou enn zoli-zoli kouronn dan lame LESEGNER, enn diadem rwayal dan lame to Bondie.
62.4: Nepli pou dir twa: “Abandone”, e pou nepli dir to later: “Dezolasion”. Me pou apel twa: “Tomem mo lazwa,” e to later: “Tomem mo madam.” Parski LESEGNER pou trouv so lazwa dan twa, e pou marye ar to later.
62.5: Parey kouma enn zennzan marye ar enn zennfi, seki finn kre twa-la pou marye avek twa. Parey kouma enn nouvo marye ena lazwa pou so lamarye; Bondie pou ena lazwa pou twa.
62.6: Lor bann miray Zerizalem, mo finn met bann gard. Lanwit, lizour zame zot napa pou res trankil. Zot mazinn LESEGNER, zot pa pou pran repo.
62.7: Pa les li repoze, ziska ki li fer Zerizalem vinn for, e fer li vinn renome partou lor later.
62.8: LESEGNER finn fer serman ar so lame drwat e ar so lebra pwisan: “Mo pou nepli les bann etranze pran dible ki to finn plante. Bann etranze pou nepli bwar to divin, fri to travay.
62.9: Me bann ki rekolte dible pou manze e pou loue LESEGNER. Bann ki rekolte rezin pou bwar divin dan lakour mo tanp.
62.10: Pase, pas par laport! Tras sime, mo pep! Konstrir, konstrir sime-la! Tir bann ros-la! Lev drapo lor bann pep.
62.11: Ala LESEGNER pe fer tann so lavwa ziska dan bout later. Dir tifi Sion: “Ala to delivrans pe vini, LESEGNER pou sov twa, li pe amenn avek li bann dimoun ki li finn delivre.”
62.12: Pou apel zot: “Lepep sin”, “Bann ki LESEGNER finn libere”. E twa, pou apel twa: “Dezire”, “Lavil ki pa finn abandone”.

63.1: Kisann-la vinn depi Edom, depi Bokra, ar so linz rouz, fier dan so zoli batman, ki pe drese dan so gran pwisans? Momem sa, ki pe proklam lazistis, ki ena pwisans pou sov zot.
63.2: Kifer to linz rouz? Kifer to finn abiy kouma seki kraz rezin dan preswar?
63.3: Wi, mo finn travay dan preswar e parmi bann pep, personn pa ti ar mwa. Mo finn kraz zot dan mo koler. Mo finn pil lor zot dan mo laraz. Zot disan finn tas mo bann linz, e finn sali tou mo bann zafer.
63.4: Parski zour revans lamem, dan mo leker. Lane finn arive, pou mo liber mo pep.
63.5: Mo finn gete: pena personn pou ed mwa. Mo ti rod led: pena personn pou ankouraz mwa. Lerla mo prop lebra finn vinn sov mwa. Mo laraz finn donn mwa kouraz.
63.6: Mo finn kraz bann pep dan mo koler. Dan mo laraz, mo finn soul zot e mo finn fer zot disan fane lor later.
63.7: Fidelite LESEGNER mo pou rapel. Louanz pou LESEGNER, pou tou seki LESEGNER finn akonpli pou nou, pou so gran bonte pou lakaz Izrael, pou tou seki li finn akonpli dan so mizerikord, pou labondans so fidelite.
63.8: Parski li dir: “Wi, zotmem mo pep, bann garson ki pa koz manti.” Lerla, li finn vinn zot sover.
63.9: Dan tou zot langwas, li pa finn anvoy okenn mesaze pou sov zot. Dan so lamour e so konpasion, limem ki finn raset zot, e ki finn sarye zot, e ki finn port zot, tou lezour dan lepase.
63.10: Me zot, zot finn revolte, e zot finn fer so lespri sin sagrin. Alor li finn sanze, li finn vinn enn lennmi pou zot. Limem ki finn konbat kont zot.
63.11: Li finn rapel letan lontan, Moiz so serviter. Kot li ete, seki ti sov zot depi lamer, avek bann berze so troupo? Kot li ete, seki ti met dan zot so lespri sin;
63.12: seki ti akonpagn lame drwat Moiz ar so lebra pwisan? Kisann-la ti fann lamer divan zot, pou li fer so nom vinn renome pou touzour?
63.13: Ler li ti fer zot travers fon lamer, kouma enn souval dan dezer, zot pa ti tonbe.
63.14: Zot ti kouma enn troupo ki pe desann dan vale. Lespri LESEGNER ti pe kondir zot, pou donn zot repo. Koumsamem to finn kondir to pep, e sanktifie to nom.
63.15: Get depi lesiel, gete. Depi to zoli lakaz sin. Kot to pasion ek to lafors? Kot to konpasion? Pa ignor nou.
63.16: Parski tomem nou papa, parski Abraam pa finn konn nou, e Izrael pa finn rekonet nou, twa “LESEGNER nou papa ki liber nou”, samem to nom depi touzour.
63.17: Kifer SEGNER, to les nou elwagne ar to bann sime; to rann nou leker dir, lwin ar to lakrint? Revini akoz to bann serviter, akoz to pep, to leritaz.
63.18: Pou tigit letan, to pep sin finn profite. Nou bann lennmi finn kraz to Tanp.
63.19: Depi bien lontan, nou finn vinn enn bann ki to nepli gouverne, e ki nepli port to nom. Ti pou bon si to ti desir lesiel, to desann; divan twa, montagn ti pou tranble.

64.1: Desir lesiel, desann! Bann montagn ava tranble divan to prezans.
64.2: Kouma dife bril fatak, e fer dilo bwi, fer to bann adverser konn to nom. Divan twa, bann pei pou tranble.
64.3: Ler to ti fer bann kiksoz terib ki nou pa ti pe atann; to ti desann, e bann montagn ti tranble divan twa.
64.4: Zame personn pa ti kone, zame zorey pa ti tande, lizie zame pa ti trouv enn lot bondie apart twa ki azir koumsa pou seki kont lor li.
64.5: To finn mars avek bann ki fer to volonte, e ki fer li ar lazwa, e ki swiv sime ki to finn trase. Si to finn ankoler, se parski nou finn fer pese. Me lor to bann sime, nou gagn nou delivrans pou touzour.
64.6: Nou tou, nou finn fer pese, e nou bann bon aksion kouma enn linz tase ar disan. Nou tou, nou fletri kouma feyaz, e nou bann fot pe fer nou balote kouma dan divan.
64.7: Personn nepli kriy to nom, personn nepli oule atas li avek twa; parski to finn kasiet to figir lwin ar nou, e to finn les nou anba pouvwar nou bann fot.
64.8: Aster SEGNER, tomem nou papa; nou, nou larzil. Twa, to fasonn nou, e nou tou, nou louvraz to lame.
64.9: SEGNER, napa ankoler tro boukou, napa rapel nou fot touletan. konsider nou tou kouma to pep.
64.10: To bann lavil sin finn vinn dezer, Sion finn vinn dezer. Zerizalem, enn landrwa dezolasion.
64.11: Nou zoli lakaz sin, kot nou bann zanset ti loue twa, finn vinn labrez dife, e tou nou bann kiksoz ki ena valer finn devaste.
64.12: Eski divan tousala, to pou res indiferan SEGNER? To pou res trankil e les nou sibir sa kalite santans la?

65.1: Mo finn les bann ki pa ti pe konsilte mwa rod mwa. Mo finn les bann ki pa ti pe rod mwa trouv mwa. Mo finn dir enn pei ki pa ti pe kriy mo nom: “Ala mo la! Ala mo la!”
65.2: Toulezour, mo finn donn lame enn pep rebel, bann ki pe mars lor enn sime ki pa bon, ki nek swiv zot panse,
65.3: enn pep, ale-vini, ki nek fronte mem. Zot fer sakrifis dan bann zardin, zot bril lansan divan gardien lakour.
65.4: Bann ki asiz dan tonbo, e pas lanwit dan bann landrwa sekre; bann ki manz pork, tou zot bann resipian finn vinn inpir.
65.5: Lerla zot dir ar lezot: “Pa koste ar mwa, pa tous mwa, parski mo tro sin pou twa.” Sa bann kiksoz la fer lafime sort dan mo nene, dife mo koler brile toutlazourne.
65.6: Alalila, enn kiksoz ki finn ekrir divan mwa. Mo pa pou res trankil. Non, mo pou rande, e mo pou regle zot kont.
65.7: Zot pou peye pou zot bann fot ek fot zot bann zanset ansam, LESEGNER finn dir. Zot ki ti pe bril lansan lor bann montagn e ki ti pe defie mwa lor bann kolinn, mo pou fer zot rann kont pou tou zot bann move aksion.
65.8: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Ler gagn zoli grap rezin ranpli ar zi, bann la dir: “Napa kraz li, parski enn benediksion sa. Koumsamem mo pou fer avek mo bann serviter, mo pa pou detrir zot.
65.9: Mo pou fer enn desandans sorti dan Zakob, e enn eritie sorti dan Zida. Bann ki mo finn swazire, pou erit mo montagn. Labamem, mo bann serviter pou reste.
65.10: Pei Saron pou vinn enn patiraz pou bann brebi; Vale Akor, enn lanklo pou bann bef; pou mo pep ki finn rod mwa.
65.11: Me zot ki abandonn LESEGNER, bann ki bliye mo montagn sin, bann ki dres enn latab pou Gad, ki plin Meni ar divin melanze;
65.12: mo pou regle zot kont ar lepe. Zot tou, zot pou ploy zot zenou pou ki masakre zot, parski mo finn apel zot, e zot pa finn reponn. Mo finn koze, e zot pa finn ekoute. Zot finn fer seki pa bon, e seki pa fer mwa kontan, samem zot finn swazir.
65.13: Akoz samem, ala LESEGNER Bondie pe dir: “Ala mo bann serviter pou manze, me zot, zot pou gagn fin. Ala mo bann serviter pou bwar, me zot, zot pou gagn swaf. Ala mo bann serviter pou dan lazwa, me zot, zot pou dan laont.
65.14: Alalila: mo bann serviter pou kriy avek lazwa dan zot leker; me zot, zot pou kriye avek soufrans dan zot leker; zot pou irle avek langwas dan zot leker!
65.15: Bann dimoun ki mo finn swazir pou servi zot nom kouma enn malediksion, e zot pou dir: “LESEGNER Bondie pou kondann twa amor”. Me li pou donn enn lot nom so bann serviter.
65.16: Seki rod benediksion lor later pou gagn benediksion ar nou Bondie ki fidel; e bann ki fer serman lor later, pou fer serman lor so nom. Zot pou bliye zot bann premie soufrans, Mo finn met tousala lwin ar mwa.
65.17: Ala mo pe kre enn nouvo lesiel ek enn nouvo later. Pou nepli rapel bann premie kiksoz, e zot pou nepli pez lour dan leker.
65.18: Me rant dan lazwa, exprim zot kontantman pou touzour, parski momem ki pe kre Zerizalem, enn lazwa! E so pep, ranpli ar kontantman!
65.19: Mo pou met mo lazwa dan Zerizalem. Mo pou met mo kontantman dan mo pep. Pou nepli tann plore ni kriye dan Zerizalem.
65.20: Laba, pou nepli gagn enn ti baba ki mor apre de-trwa zour. Pa pou ena gran dimoun ki pa pou viv lontan. Parski seki pli zenn pou mor laz sant-an. Si arive mor avan sant-an, savedir li finn modi.
65.21: Zot pou aranz bann lakaz, e zot pou res ladan. Zot pou plant pie rezin, e zot pou manz so bann fri.
65.22: Zot pou nepli konstrir pou ki enn lot reste. Zot pou nepli plante pou ki enn lot manze. Mo pep pou parey kouma bann pie ki ena so sezon. Bann ki mo finn swazire pou profit louvraz zot lame.
65.23: Zot pa pou travay dir pou nanye. Zot nepli pou akouse dan dezolasion; parski zot pou enn desandans ki beni dan LESEGNER, zot, e zot bann zanfan avek zot.
65.24: Lerla, avan ki zot apel mwa, mwa mo pou fini reponn. Zot pa pou ankor fini koze, ki mo pou fini tande.
65.25: Loulou ek agno pou manz ansam. Kouma enn sel, lion ek bef pou manz lapay. Serpan pou manz lapousier. Zot pa pou fer dimal. Zot pa pou kraz nanye lor mo montagn sin. LESEGNER finn koze.

66.1: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Lesiel, mo tronn sa. Later, kouma enn eskabo anba mo lipie. Ki sa lakaz ki zot pou konstrir pou mwa la? Ki sa landrwa kot mo pou repoze la?
66.2: Tou sa bann kiksoz la, se mo lame ki finn fer sa; Alor, tou sa bann kiksoz-la zot pou mwa. Me mo pou pran kont bann malere, bann ki zot lespri finn kase, e bann ki pou respekte mo parol.” Samem ki LESEGNER pe dir.
66.3: Zot donn enn bef an sakrifis, me anmemtan, zot pe touy dimoun. Zot sakrifie enn agno, me anmemtan, zot pe kas likou lisien. Zot pe ofer mwa enn lofrand, me anmemtan, zot pe fann disan pork. Zot pe bril lansan pou mwa, me anmemtan, zot pe ador idol. Zot finn swazir zot prop sime, e zot pran plezir dan zot bann abominasion.
66.4: Akoz sa, mo pou fer zot pey konsekans, e mo pou fer tom lor zot seki zot pli per. Mo finn apele, e personn pa finn reponn. Mo finn koze, me zot, zot pa finn tande. Zot finn fer seki depler mwa. Seki pa fer mwa plezir la, samem zot finn swazire.
66.5: Ekout seki LESEGNER pe dir, zot ki ena respe pou so parol. Zot prop frer pe deteste zot, e pe rezet zot akoz mwa. Zot pe sikane e zot pe dir: “Ki LESEGNER montre zot so laglwar, pouki nou trouv zot lazwa,” me sa bann lamem ki pou gagn onte.
66.6: Tande, enn tapaz ki sort dan lavil, enn lavwa ki sort dan tanp, samem lavwa LESEGNER. Li pe donn so bann lennmi zot kantite. LESEGNER dir: “Momem LESEGNER, pena personn kouma mwa.”
66.7: Avan ki li gagn douler, li fini akouse. Avan ki li soufer, li finn donn nesans enn ti garson.
66.8: Kisannla finn tann enn kiksoz koumsa? Kisannla finn trouv bann kiksoz koumsa? Eski enn pei finn deza ne dan enn zour? Eski enn pep kapav pran nesans enn sel kou? pourtan avan mem li koumans gagn douler lakousman, Sion finn akous enn garson?
66.9: “Si mo finn les enn mama sarye so zanfan an so vant pandan nef mwa, eski mo pou anpes li akouse?” LESEGNER pe dir. “Mwa ki donn nesans, eski mo pou anpes lavi-la vini?” To bondie pe dir.
66.10: Manifeste lazwa avek Zerizalem, exprim zot kontantman pou li, zot tou ki kontan li. Manifeste kontantman avek li, enn boner pou zot tou, ki ti an-dey akoz li.
66.11: Ki zot tet dile e ki zot rasazie ar sa dile ki donn konsolasion-la. Ki zot tete e ki zot apresie so bienfe kouma ti baba bwar dile so mama.
66.12: Ala LESEGNER finn koze: “Ala mo pe fer prosperite koul kot twa kouma enn larivier, e rises bann nasion, kouma enn toran ki pe deborde. Pou donn zot dile, pou port zot lor laans, met zot lor zenou, e kares zot.
66.13: Kouma enn mama konsol so zanfan koumsamem, mwa mo pou konsol zot. Dan Zerizalem, zot pou gagn konsolasion.
66.14: Zot pou trouve e zot leker pou dan lazwa. Zot lezo pou regagn lavi kouma lerb ver. LESEGNER pou manifeste so pwisans pou so bann serviter, me so bann lennmi ava trouv so koler.
66.15: Ala LESEGNER pe vini dan dife. So bann saryo, zot kouma siklonn. Li pou fer zot peye ar so koler terib, e li pou menas zot ar laflam so dife.
66.16: Avek dife, LESEGNER pou ziz tou bann imin, e ar so lepe li pou pini zot. Boukou pou mor.
66.17: Bann ki konsakre zot, bann ki pirifie zot, pou rant dan enn zardin, zot dibout deryer kikenn ki dan sant. Sa bann la, zot manz pork ek lera, kiksoz degoutan. Zot tou, zot pou mor ansam. LESEGNER deklare.
66.18: Mwa, mo konn zot bann aksion e zot bann panse. Mo pe vinn rasanble tou bann nasion ek tou bann pep. Zot tou pou trouv mo laglwar.
66.19: Mo pou met enn sign kot zot, e mo pou pran parmi zot bann reskape pou anvoy zot dan bann pei: Kot Tarsis, Pit, Lid, Mesek, Toubal ek Yavann, kot bann zil ki bien lwin, ki pa finn tann koz mwa, e ki pa finn trouv mo laglwar. Zot pou fer bann pei konn mo laglwar.
66.20: E depi tou bann pei, zot pou ramenn tou zot bann frer kouma enn lofrand pou LESEGNER; avek bann souval, bann saryo, bann bourik, bann samo, kot mo montagn sin, Zerizalem. LESEGNER pe dir. Zot pou kouma bann garson Izrael ki amenn lofrand dan enn vaz pir kot lakaz LESEGNER.
66.21: Parmi zot, mo pou pran enn bann pou vinn pret ek Levit. LESEGNER pe dir.
66.22: Parey kouma nouvo lesiel ek nouvo later ki mwa, mo pe fer e ki pe res solid divan mwa, LESEGNER deklare, parey zot desandans e zot nom pou res ferm divan mwa.
66.23: Nouvel linn apre nouvel linn, saba apre saba, tou dimoun pou prosterne divan mwa. LESEGNER finn dir.
66.24: Zot pou sorti, e zot pou trouv kadav bann dimoun ki ti revolte kont mwa. Lever ki pe manz zot, zame pa pou mor, e dife ki pe bril zot, zame pa pou tengn. Zot pou enn abominasion pou tou dimoun lor later.
